However, this benefit comes with redundant tool invocations and longer inference traces. Moreover, when such behaviors are learned mainly from outcome reward, the resulting intermediate crops or visual cues can be noisy or fail to faithfully capture task-relevant visual evidence. In this work, we ask whether the reasoning benefits of ''Thinking with Images'' can be internalized through Thinking with Imagination: an internal process that decides where to look and imagines what visual cues closer inspection would reveal without actually invoking tools. We propose Imagine-OPD, an on-policy self-distillation framework in which a teacher plays the role of a ''Thinking with Images'' reasoner during training: it receives privileged zoomed evidence views derived from annotated regions, and supervises the model's own imagination reasoning trajectories. Imagine-OPD does not require an external teacher or high-quality imagination demonstrations. Experiments on vision-centric benchmarks show that Imagine-OPD achieves the best average performance among compared models while significantly reducing inference overhead compared with ''Thinking with Images'' methods.

</details>


### [110] [AUCp: Pseudo-AUC for Inference Model Selection with Unlabeled Validation Data in Abnormality Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08742)
*Md Mahfuzur Rahman Siddiquee,Fazle Rafsani,Jay Shah,Teresa Wu,Catherine D Chong,Todd J Schwedt,Baoxin Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出AUCp新指标，用于无监督/自监督异常检测的模型选择，无需标注验证集，通过假设测试集所有样本为异常来计算AUC，提升疾病检测性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医疗图像异常检测通常依赖标注数据集，但许多疾病缺乏标注数据且获取耗时。现有无监督方法仍需标注验证集来选择最佳模型，这在真实临床场景中不切实际。

Method: 提出AUCp指标：假设测试集中所有未标注样本均为异常/阳性，使用传统AUC计算方法得出AUCp分数。基于大规模正常样本训练集，通过数学和经验证据证明AUCp能有效选择模型。

Result: 在两个无监督神经疾病检测方法和自监督方法上，AUCp能有效识别最佳推理模型，显著提升异常和疾病检测性能。代码已在GitHub开源。

Conclusion: AUCp为无监督和自监督异常检测方法提供了无需标注验证集的模型选择指标，解决了临床实践中标注数据稀缺的问题，提高了疾病检测的实用性。

Abstract: Abnormality detection is a crucial yet challenging task in medical image analysis. Distinguishing abnormalities from normal data by learning to reconstruct normal-only data alleviates the reliance on labeled datasets. However, many studies, even if unsupervised, rely on a labeled validation set to select the best model for inference from multiple training iterations. For many diseases labeled data are unavailable and substantially time consuming to obtain. To address this, AUCp - a novel metric that supports abnormality detection for unsupervised and self-supervised methods is proposed. Instead of evaluating the realism of reconstructed images to select the best of model for inference, it focuses on actual detection performance and without requiring an annotated test set. Assuming the pseudo ground truth of all unannotated samples in the test set as abnormal/positive and using traditional AUC calculation, AUCp scores are derived. Given a large and representative training set of normal samples, we show mathematical and empirical evidence that model selection using AUCp scores improves disease detection in terms of unsupervised and self-supervised methods over conventional metrics. Using two unsupervised methods for neurologic disease detection and self-supervised methods on diverse datasets, our results demonstrate that the AUCp score effectively identifies the optimal model for inference, significantly enhancing abnormality and disease detection. The corresponding implementations are available in https://github.com/mahfuzmohammad/AUCp.

</details>


### [111] [ATM: Action-Consistency Transfer Matrix for Diagnosing and Improving Latent World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09028)
*Jiaheng Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ATM是一种用于评估潜在世界模型规划适用性的诊断工具，通过轻量级后处理探针比较真实编码转换和模型预测转换中的动作信息，无需昂贵的模拟器评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前评估潜在世界模型规划能力的方法依赖于缓慢的、与规划器耦合的模拟器评估（如CEM），这种方法计算成本高、不透明且模型复杂度依赖性强。需要一种更高效、可解释的诊断工具来评估世界模型表示对规划的有用性。

Method: 提出ATM（Action-Consistency Transfer Matrix），通过比较真实编码转换和模型预测转换中的动作语义信息来诊断潜在转换是否保持规划相关的动作语义。使用轻量级后处理探针生成可解释矩阵，揭示表示质量、转换域不一致性和失败模式。

Result: ATM在真实成功率差距非平凡时，能实现高度可靠的两两排名，同时将分钟到小时的CEM评估减少到秒级转换分析，在实验中实现了100倍以上的加速。此外，引入AITS表明动作可识别性不仅是诊断工具，还能作为训练信号改进下游规划。

Conclusion: ATM提供了一种高效、可解释的方法来评估潜在世界模型对规划的有用性，显著降低了评估成本并提高了诊断能力。动作可识别性不仅可作为诊断指标，还能用于改进世界模型的训练。

Abstract: Latent world models are increasingly used for control and goal-conditioned planning, yet assessing whether their learned representations are useful for planning usually requires slow, planner-coupled simulator evaluation with CEM or similar planners. Such evaluation is black-box and model-complexity-dependent: under the same protocol, different world models may require minutes to hours per checkpoint. In this work, we propose ATM, an Action-Consistency Transfer Matrix for diagnosing whether latent transitions preserve action semantics relevant to planning. ATM compares action information in real encoded transitions and model-predicted transitions through lightweight post-hoc probes, producing an interpretable matrix that reveals representation quality, transition-domain inconsistency, and failure modes without simulator rollout. It can also be collapsed into a simple screening score for within-task ranking across checkpoints, variants, and world models. When the true success gap is non-trivial, ATM achieves highly reliable pairwise ranking, while reducing minutes-to-hours CEM evaluation to seconds-level transition analysis, yielding more than 100x speedup in our setup. We further introduce AITS, showing that action-identifiability is not only diagnostic but also a useful training signal for improving downstream planning without changing the planner.

</details>


### [112] [MB-Loc: Multi-planar Bird's-eye-view Localization in outdoor LiDAR scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08744)
*Ayaan Choudhury,Preet Savalia,Anirudh Pydah,Avinash Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MB-Loc是一个轻量级且视角鲁棒的激光雷达全局定位框架，通过2.5D多平面鸟瞰图表示和KL正则化潜在瓶颈，在保持精度的同时显著提升计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有场景坐标回归(SCR)方法存在两个主要瓶颈：处理原始3D几何结构导致的计算效率低下，以及传感器视角变化导致的性能下降。需要开发轻量级且视角鲁棒的定位解决方案。

Method: 1. 将输入激光雷达扫描投影到2.5D多平面鸟瞰图表示，沿Z轴切片并将有符号深度映射到离散2D平面；2. 引入KL正则化潜在瓶颈显式建模空间不确定性；3. 在平面投影前应用3D空间增强，强制网络学习视角不变特征。

Result: 在公开的NCLT数据集上，MB-Loc优于当前最先进方法，在实时推理速度下显著超越传统3D-SCR架构的计算效率。

Conclusion: MB-Loc通过创新的2.5D表示和不确定性建模，成功解决了SCR方法的计算效率和视角鲁棒性问题，为自动驾驶系统提供了实用的全局定位解决方案。

Abstract: Global LiDAR localization is a fundamental task for autonomous navigation systems. Recent methods perform Scene Coordinate Regression (SCR) and achieve superior accuracy over Absolute Pose Regression (APR) solutions by predicting dense 3D world coordinates. However, SCR approaches introduce two major bottlenecks: severe computational inefficiency from processing raw 3D geometries and significant performance degradation under varying sensor viewpoints. To address these limitations, we present MB-Loc, a lightweight and viewpoint-robust SCR framework. Instead of relying on heavy 3D convolutions, we project the input LiDAR scan into a 2.5D Multi-planar Bird's-Eye View (BEV) representation. By slicing the point-cloud along the Z-axis and mapping signed depths into discrete 2D planes, MB-Loc retains essential 3D geometric structures while exploiting the computational tractability of standard 2D CNNs. To handle the inherent sparsity of outdoor LiDAR, we introduce a KL-regularized latent bottleneck that explicitly models spatial uncertainty without injecting stochastic noise. Finally, to ensure rotation robustness, we apply 3D spatial augmentations prior to planar projection, forcing the network to implicitly learn viewpoint-invariant features. We perform extensive experiments on the publicly available NCLT dataset and demonstrate that our proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art. Operating at real-time inference speeds, MB-Loc significantly outperforms traditional 3D-SCR architectures in computational efficiency.

</details>


### [113] [Real-time body pose non-verbal communication with a consistency-based reliability measure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09390)
*Alina Marcu,Dragos Costea,Cristina Lazar,Marius Leordeanu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究关注从2D人体姿态识别通信意图，针对救援任务等远程环境中的实时低成本人机通信，开发了数据集并比较了多种模型在嵌入式硬件上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 身体运动在远距离环境中（如救援任务）是可靠通信信号，但现有数据集未隔离此信号（情感语料库结合了身体、面部、语音和文本，动作识别数据集标记的是执行的动作而非传达的信息）。

Method: 发布包含十种通信意图的真实全身姿态数据集，与其它真实（IPC）和合成（MotionLCM、VEO3.1、Kimodo）数据集比较。在嵌入式GPU（NVIDIA Orin~Nano）上基准测试多种模型（从骨架图分类器到关节运动预测网络），同时考虑帧率和准确率。提出自回归自一致性作为无监督可靠性信号。

Result: 报告了各种模型在嵌入式硬件上的性能指标和帧率。证明模型自一致性可作为可靠性信号，给出了自一致预测正确概率的界限，显示该概率随一致步骤数量增长，并识别了自信预测仍可能错误的条件。

Conclusion: 身体运动是远距离实时低成本人机通信的可靠信号，模型自一致性可作为无监督可靠性指标，在嵌入式机器人硬件上实现平衡准确率和速度的系统对救援任务等应用至关重要。

Abstract: Body movement communicates intent at distances and in conditions where neither the face, nor speech can be captured. We study the recognition of communicative intent from 2D body pose alone. We argue that body motion is a reliable signal especially in scenarios that require real time low-cost on-device person-to-robot communication in long distance environments, such as rescue missions. However, existing resources do not isolate this signal. Affective corpora combine body, face, voice and text, while skeleton action-recognition benchmarks label the action performed rather than the message conveyed. We release a dataset of real frames of full-body pose covering ten communicative intents and we compare it against other real (IPC) and synthetic (MotionLCM, VEO3.1, Kimodo) ones that span a range of difficulty. We target systems that can run on a robot's limited onboard hardware. We benchmark multiple models, from skeleton graph classifiers to joint motion-forecasting networks, and report performance metrics together with frame rate on an embedded GPU (NVIDIA Orin~Nano), since speed matters as much as accuracy in our scenario. Finally, we show that a model's own autoregressive self-consistency works as an unsupervised reliability signal. We give a short proof that bounds the probability that a self-consistent prediction is correct, show that this probability grows with the number of consistent steps, and identify the conditions under which a confident prediction can still be false, benchmarked against industry-standard metrics.

</details>


### [114] [Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization for Instant Adversarial Purification in Histopathology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08745)
*Zhe Li,Bernhard Kainz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SAWR方法，通过小波域正则化在组织病理学图像中分离对抗性扰动与诊断结构信息，提高对抗鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在计算病理学中广泛应用，但神经网络对对抗性扰动敏感，存在安全隐患。组织病理学图像中高频对抗噪声与细微诊断相关组织结构难以区分

Method: 提出Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization (SAWR)，基于Haar变换的多级小波域正则化框架，分层分离对抗性扰动与诊断结构信息。进一步扩展到单个组织学通道，实现与H&E染色生物特性一致的染色特异性频率调节

Result: SAWR在即时净化框架中，将对抗鲁棒性提高10.69%（相比基线方法），同时在对抗性扰动下保持纹理和频谱保真度

Conclusion: SAWR通过小波域正则化有效提高组织病理学图像对抗性扰动的鲁棒性，为临床实践中的安全部署提供解决方案

Abstract: Deep learning has become prevalent in computational pathology pipelines that support tasks such as cancer screening and digital pathology analysis. However, the susceptibility of neural networks to adversarial perturbations raises safety concerns for reliable deployment in clinical practice. In histopathological images, this challenge is exacerbated by the difficulty of distinguishing high-frequency adversarial noise from subtle and diagnostically relevant tissue structures. To address this issue, we propose Stain-Aware Wavelet Regularization (SAWR), an adversarial purification framework that leverages multi-level wavelet-domain regularization based on Haar transform to hierarchically disentangle adversarial perturbations from diagnostic structural information. This spectral constraint is further extended to individual histological channels, enabling stain-specific frequency regulation consistent with the biological properties of Hematoxylin and Eosin. When integrated into an instant purification framework, SAWR improves adversarial robustness by up to 10.69\% over the baseline approach, while maintaining texture and spectral fidelity under adversarial perturbations.

</details>


### [115] [Less Is More: Training-Free Acceleration Framework of 3D Diffusion Models for Low-Count PET Denoising via Global-Local Trajectory Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08751)
*Yuhan Liu,Scott M. Leonard,Marlee Crews,Muhannad Fadhel,Jinkui Hao,Tianqi Chen,Ryan J. Avery,Bo Zhou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种无需训练的全局-局部跳过策略，加速扩散模型在3D PET去噪中的应用，同时提升重建质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低计数PET协议可减少辐射剂量和采集时间，但图像质量差。基于扩散模型的方法能恢复图像质量，但迭代采样过程在3D高分辨率PET上计算成本过高，限制了临床应用。

Method: 提出无需训练的全局-局部跳过策略：1) 全局去噪步骤跳过策略，通过噪声一致变换从中间步骤初始化反向扩散过程，减少所需去噪步骤；2) 局部特征重用捷径，在相邻去噪步骤间重用缓慢变化的高层U-Net特征，减少每步计算量。

Result: 在多种PET示踪剂（18F-FDG、68Ga-DOTATATE、18F-PSMA）上评估，实现超过一个数量级的加速，同时重建性能相比完整步骤基线有改进或相当。盲法读者研究证实临床信心和感知诊断质量提升。

Conclusion: 提出的全局-局部跳过策略有效解决了扩散模型在3D PET去噪中的计算瓶颈问题，实现了显著加速和图像质量提升，具有临床应用潜力。

Abstract: Accurate quantification and uptake measurement in PET are critical for assessing disease progression and supporting clinical decision-making. While high-count PET provides reliable image quality, the associated radiation dose and prolonged acquisition remain significant clinical concerns, motivating the adoption of low-count protocols. Diffusion-model-based methods have demonstrated strong potential for restoring low-count PET to near high-count quality, but their iterative sampling procedure becomes prohibitively expensive when applied to high-resolution 3D PET volumes, introducing substantial inference latency that limits practical clinical deployment. To address these challenges, we propose a training-free Global-Local Skipping Strategy that accelerates diffusion model-based 3D PET denoising while simultaneously improving reconstruction quality. The proposed method is plug-and-play and directly applicable to pre-trained diffusion models without retraining or architectural modification. Specifically, we introduce: (i) a global denoising step skipping strategy that initializes the reverse diffusion process from an intermediate denoising step using a noise-consistent transformation of the low-count input, substantially reducing the number of required denoising steps; and (ii) a local feature reuse shortcut that reuses slowly-varying high-level U-Net features across neighboring denoising steps, further reducing per-step computation while preserving image fidelity. We evaluate the proposed approach on multiple PET tracers from in-house and public datasets, including 18F-FDG PET, 68Ga-DOTATATE PET, and 18F-PSMA PET, demonstrating consistent acceleration of over an order of magnitude alongside improved or comparable reconstruction performance relative to the full-step baseline. Blinded reader studies further confirm enhanced clinical confidence and perceived diagnostic quality.

</details>


### [116] [Beyond Consistency: Preserving Temporal Structure in Zero-Shot Video Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08780)
*Deyin Liu,Yisheng Ding,Zhe Jin,Xiatian Zhu,Anjan Dutta,Lin Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的零样本视频编辑方法，首次明确关注保留源视频的时间结构，通过自适应分区、锚点帧选择、剪辑自适应token合并和交替组合策略，在保持时间结构的同时提高计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有零样本视频编辑方法虽然实现了空间控制和基本的时间一致性，但无法保留视频的原始时间结构（高层次叙事、节奏和语义流），导致编辑后的视频在语义复杂的长视频中缺乏叙事连贯性和语义清晰度。

Method: 1) 基于特征相似性自适应将视频划分为语义不同的剪辑片段；2) 为每个剪辑选择代表性锚点帧；3) 设计剪辑自适应token合并策略，利用锚点的语义主导性稳定编辑过程；4) 采用交替组合策略确保剪辑间无缝过渡同时保持语义区分。

Result: 大量实验表明，该方法在零样本视频编辑中取得了最先进的结果，成功平衡了原始时间结构的保留与计算效率，为零样本视频编辑保真度设定了新基准。

Conclusion: 本文提出的方法首次明确关注并成功保留了视频的时间结构，解决了现有方法在长视频编辑中叙事不连贯和语义模糊的问题，为零样本视频编辑提供了更高质量的解决方案。

Abstract: Existing zero-shot video editing methods rely on pre-trained diffusion models, successfully achieving spatial control and basic temporal consistency but fundamentally fail to preserve the video's original temporal structure.This distinction is critical: temporal consistency ensures visual smoothness, but temporal structure dictates the video's high-level narrative, rhythm, and semantic flow. Without this preservation, the edited output, especially for long videos with complex semantic variations, becomes narratively incoherent and semantically ambiguous. To address this limitation, we introduce a novel zero-shot editing approach that, for the first time, explicitly focuses on preserving the source video's temporal structure. We achieve this by adaptively partitioning the video into semantically distinct clips based on feature similarity and selecting a representative anchor frame for each clip. To enhance both intra-clip fidelity and computational efficiency, we design a clip-adaptive token merging strategy which leverages the anchor's semantic dominance to stabilize the editing. Furthermore, we employ an alternating combination strategy that ensures seamless inter-clip transitions while maintaining semantic distinction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results, successfully balancing the preservation of original temporal structure with computational efficiency, and setting a new benchmark for zero-shot video editing fidelity.

</details>


### [117] [DeepMine-Mamba: Mitigating Information Dilution in Mamba-Based State Space Models for Document Image Binarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08781)
*Sheng-Wei Chan,Yung-Che Wang,Hsin-Jui Pan,Chia-Min Lin,Jen-Shiun Chiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DeepMine-Mamba框架，通过Anti-Dilution Gate解决Mamba模型在文档图像二值化中稀释弱前景线索的问题，在DIBCO/H-DIBCO基准测试中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习文档二值化方法主要基于卷积、Transformer或生成架构，而基于Mamba的状态空间模型在此任务中尚未充分探索。研究发现直接状态空间传播在长程建模中会稀释弱前景线索（如淡墨痕迹、碎片字符、边界敏感笔画细节）

Method: 提出DeepMine-Mamba框架，包含创新的Anti-Dilution Gate，能够估计传播引起的特征变化，选择性恢复笔画敏感的局部响应，同时抑制不必要的背景增强

Result: 在DIBCO/H-DIBCO基准测试的严格leave-one-year-out协议下，取得了具有竞争力的整体性能，在基准年份上表现出强劲的平均FM和Fps。消融实验进一步证明Anti-Dilution Gate改善了笔画保留并减少了感知上显著的二值化错误

Conclusion: DeepMine-Mamba框架成功解决了Mamba模型在文档二值化中的特征稀释问题，Anti-Dilution Gate机制有效提升了弱前景线索的保留能力，为文档图像二值化任务提供了新的Mamba-based解决方案

Abstract: Document image binarization aims to separate foreground text from degraded backgrounds while preserving thin, broken, and low-contrast strokes. Although deep learning methods have improved binarization performance, most existing approaches rely on convolutional, transformer-based, or generative architectures, while Mamba-based state space models remain largely unexplored for this task. In this work, we investigate Mamba-based feature propagation and observe that direct state-space propagation may dilute weak foreground cues during long-range modeling, especially faint ink traces, fragmented characters, and boundary-sensitive stroke details. To address this problem, we propose DeepMine-Mamba, a Mamba-based binarization framework equipped with a novel Anti-Dilution Gate that estimates propagation-induced feature changes and selectively restores stroke-sensitive local responses while suppressing unnecessary background enhancement. Experiments on DIBCO/H-DIBCO benchmarks under a strict leave-one-year-out protocol show that DeepMine-Mamba achieves competitive overall performance, with strong average FM and Fps across benchmark years. Ablation results further demonstrate that the Anti-Dilution Gate improves stroke preservation and reduces perceptually significant binarization errors.

</details>


### [118] [MaskAlign: Token-Subset Representation Alignment for Efficient Diffusion Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08788)
*Lianyu Pang,Tianlin Pan,Cheng Da,Changqian Yu,Huan Yang,Kun Gai,Song Guo,Wenhan Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MaskAlign：一种基于token子集的表示对齐方法，通过随机采样token子集进行对齐训练，减少对完整token集的依赖，提升扩散模型训练的稳定性和效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过将扩散特征与自监督视觉编码器的干净图像表示对齐来加速扩散transformer训练，但存在不匹配问题：扩散模型处理带噪声输入（其可用信息随时间步变化），而参考特征从干净图像提取。这种对齐引入了非平凡约束，可能导致模型过度依赖完整token集

Method: 提出MaskAlign方法：1) token子集表示对齐：训练时对随机采样的token子集应用对齐，减少对完整token集的依赖；2) 预掩码token混合块：在掩码前轻量级地跨token共享信息，缓解直接丢弃token造成的信息损失

Result: 通过token级分析发现，在全token表示对齐下，具有较大对齐梯度范数的token表现出稳定的空间偏好，表明对齐目标并非对所有token均匀影响，可能鼓励模型依赖完整干净图像token集。MaskAlign通过token子集对齐使模型在不同迭代中接触不同token子集，提升对齐行为的稳定性

Conclusion: MaskAlign通过token子集表示对齐方法解决了扩散模型与干净图像表示对齐中的不匹配问题，减少了对完整token集的依赖，同时通过预掩码token混合块保留了信息，为扩散transformer训练提供了更稳定的对齐策略

Abstract: Representation alignment with pretrained vision models has recently shown strong potential for accelerating diffusion transformer training. By aligning intermediate diffusion features with clean-image representations from self-supervised vision encoders, existing methods improve convergence and generation quality. However, such alignment also introduces a non-trivial constraint: diffusion models operate on noisy inputs whose usable information varies across timesteps, while the reference features are extracted from clean images. In this paper, we revisit this mismatch from a token-level perspective. We find that, under full-token representation alignment, tokens with large alignment-gradient norms exhibit a stable spatial preference, suggesting that the alignment objective does not affect all tokens uniformly and may encourage the model to rely on the complete set of clean-image tokens. To address this issue, we propose MaskAlign, a token-subset representation alignment method that applies alignment to randomly sampled token subsets during training. By exposing the model to different token subsets across iterations, MaskAlign reduces the dependence of representation alignment on the complete token set and encourages alignment behavior that is more stable under token-subset perturbations. To mitigate the information loss caused by directly dropping tokens, we further introduce a lightweight pre-mask token mixing block that shares information across tokens before masking.

</details>


### [119] [PairWise Image Finder: An Open-source Tool for Finding Visually Aligned Street-Level Image Pairs for Urban Perception Studies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08795)
*Jussi Torkko*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PairWise图像查找器：通过特征检测、匹配和语义分割来量化不同时期街景图像对的视觉对齐度，为城市分析提供高质量图像对筛选工具


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 街景图像分析中，仅凭元数据难以可靠找到视觉对齐的图像对，需要更精确的方法来支持纵向变化研究和感知研究

Method: 开发PairWise工具，整合特征检测与匹配算法，结合语义分割掩码，量化图像对的视觉对齐程度，输出匹配特征比例、特征距离、覆盖率和语义掩码对齐度等指标

Result: 工具能够有效筛选出高质量视觉对齐图像对，减少人工工作量，支持准确的纵向变化分析，并通过实际案例展示了视角对量化变化的重要性

Conclusion: PairWise为研究者和利益相关者提供了一个可扩展的开源工具，用于获取高质量图像对，支持城市分析、感知研究及相关应用

Abstract: Change detection and scene recognition techniques have been widely applied to Street View Imagery (SVI) to understand changes in scenes across the years. However, metadata alone is often insufficient to reliably find visually aligned image pairs. This study introduces the PairWise image finder, a tool that integrates feature detection and matching, supported by semantic segmentation masks to quantify the visual alignment of two images of varying time periods. The tool outputs the share of matched key features, the matched feature distance and coverage, and the alignment of semantic masks, which enables the user to filter image pairs depending on the alignment quality and use case. The visually aligned pairs derived from the tool can be used to accurately study explicit longitudinal change and help reduce manual effort for perception studies. The usability of the tool is demonstrated through a comparison of longitudinal changes, highlighting the importance of perspective when quantifying changes. The proposed method provides a scalable and open tool for researchers and stakeholders to find high-quality image pairs for urban analysis, perception and related applications.

</details>


### [120] [Classifying galaxies in the Galaxy10 DECals dataset using Inception and Residual CNNs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08826)
*Lanz Anthonee A. Lagman,Prospero C. Naval,Reinabelle C. Reyes*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究比较了ResNet101和InceptionV4在星系形态分类任务上的性能，发现两者都能达到约90%的准确率，但ResNet101表现更优，可作为未来星系巡天图像分类的稳健基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着星系形态图像数据在数量和质量上的预期增长，需要探索适合图像分类任务的成本效益高的深度学习架构。残差网络和Inception网络因其计算效率高（通过残差连接和并行化inception模块实现），能够在保持计算复杂度不过度增加的情况下构建更深层网络，是理想的探索对象。

Method: 研究分析了ResNet101和InceptionV4在空间增强的Galaxy10 DECals数据集上的性能。保留了10个星系分类，但修改了每个类别的图像数量，对两种架构进行性能比较。

Result: ResNet101和InceptionV4模型都达到了约90%的准确率，与文献中报道的性能相当。在性能指标方面，ResNet101优于InceptionV4。

Conclusion: 两种CNN架构都可以作为未来巡天星系图像分类专用管道的稳健基础。研究结果表明，这些高效架构能够有效处理预期增长的星系形态数据，为大规模星系分类任务提供了可行的技术方案。

Abstract: Image data regarding galactic morphology is expected to increase both in quantity and quality for the next foreseeable years; thus it is important to explore which deep learning architectures adapted for image classification tasks are cost-effective. Residual and Inception networks are ideal for exploring classification convolutional neural networks (CNNs) due to their computational efficiency, achieved through techniques such as residual connections and parallelized inception modules, enabling deeper networks without excessively increasing computational complexity. In this work, we analyze the performance of ResNet101 and InceptionV4 on a spatially-augmented Galaxy10 DECals dataset. Retaining the ten-class classification of galaxies, we modify the image count of each class. We find that ResNet101 and InceptionV4 models achieved accuracies of $\sim$ 90%, comparable with reported performance in the literature. In terms of performance metrics, ResNet101 is superior to InceptionV4. Our results indicate that either of these CNN architectures could serve as a robust foundation for specialized pipelines for classification of galaxy images from upcoming surveys.

</details>


### [121] [CSFlow: Aligning Flow Matching with Human Contrast Sensitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08833)
*Malgorzata Galinska,Bart Pogodzinski,Jan Eric Lenssen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CSFlow是一种将人类视觉对比敏感度函数与流匹配去噪步骤连接起来的权重方案，通过调整时间步权重来改善生成图像质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界图像信号集中在低空间频率，这些成分在连续扩散过程中比高频成分更早达到高信噪比。同时，人类视觉系统对空间频率的敏感度不均等，极低和极高频率需要更高对比度才能被感知。作者首次将这两个观察结合起来。

Method: 提出两个贡献：(1) 估计每个反向流区间生成哪些频率的度量；(2) 通过将每个噪声级别生成的频率与人类对比敏感度对齐获得时间步权重。通过推理时的时间步修改或短期微调来应用这些权重。

Result: 实验验证显示CSFlow权重能提升生成性能：FID降低4.7%，Inception Score提高2.2%，GenEval分数提高2.5%。定性分析发现权重能带来更好的视觉真实感和减少卡通化外观。

Conclusion: CSFlow成功地将人类视觉对比敏感度函数与流匹配模型结合，通过时间步权重调整显著改善了生成图像的质量和真实感，为生成模型提供了基于人类感知的优化方法。

Abstract: We introduce Contrast Sensitive Flow (CSFlow), a weighting scheme that connects the human eye's Contrast Sensitivity Function (CSF) to the iterative denoising steps of flow matching. Because real-world images concentrate signal at low spatial frequencies, these components reach high signal-to-noise ratio earlier during continuous diffusion than high-frequency components. When generating images with diffusion or flow matching models, this induces a soft autoregressive structure in Fourier space, where coarse image content stabilizes before fine detail. Meanwhile, the human visual system is unequally sensitive to spatial frequencies: very low and very high frequencies require significantly higher contrast to be perceived. We for the first time merge these observations through two contributions: (1) a metric that estimates which frequencies are generated at each reverse flow interval and (2) timestep weights obtained by aligning the frequencies generated at each noise level with human contrast sensitivity. We validate our contributions experimentally showing that these weights can improve generative performance by lowering FID by 4.7%, increasing Inception Score by 2.2% and improving GenEval scores by 2.5% using inference-only timestep modification or short fine-tuning. Qualitatively, we find that our CSFlow weights lead to better visual realism and less cartoonish appearance of generated images.

</details>


### [122] [BLM-SGAN: Bidirectional Language Modeling for Semantic-Spatial Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08847)
*Ahmed Abdelmoneim Mazrou,Haidy Maher El-Amir,Ali Hamdi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BLM-SGAN 是一种结合双向语言建模的语义空间文本到图像生成模型，通过BERT注意力机制捕获丰富的上下文信息，在生成鸟类图像方面达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于GAN的文本到图像生成模型取得了进展，但仍面临捕获长距离依赖、梯度消失和序列处理限制等关键挑战。

Method: 提出BLM-SGAN模型，利用BERT的注意力机制捕获丰富的上下文信息，有效处理长序列，实现语义空间文本到图像生成。

Result: 模型在Inception Score上达到5.45±0.08，超越了SSA-GAN、DF-GAN、SD-GAN和AttnGAN等竞争模型，能够从详细文本描述生成高度逼真的鸟类图像。

Conclusion: BLM-SGAN通过结合双向语言建模有效解决了现有T2I模型的挑战，在文本到图像生成任务中实现了最先进的性能。

Abstract: Despite the success of image generation from text descriptions, it still faces challenges that are difficult to overcome in domains such as natural language processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV). Recent advancements in text-to-image (T2I) models, particularly those utilizing generative adversarial networks (GANs), have significantly improved the synthesis of realistic images across various domains. However, existing GAN-based T2I models still encounter key challenges, such as difficulty in capturing long-range dependencies, vanishing gradients, and the limitations of sequential processing. To address these issues, we introduce BLM-SGAN, a novel model that incorporates Bidirectional Language Modeling for Semantic-Spatial Text-to-Image Generation. BLM-SGAN leverages BERT's attention mechanisms to capture rich contextual information and efficiently manage extended sequences. Our model demonstrates state-of-the-art performance, with an Inception Score (IS) of 5.45 +/- 0.08, surpassing several competitive models such as SSA-GAN, DF-GAN, SD-GAN, and AttnGAN. BLM-SGAN effectively generates highly realistic images of birds from detailed text descriptions. The implementation code is available at: https://github.com/haidy-maher/BLM-SGAN-Text-to-Image-Generation.

</details>


### [123] [Intelligent Character Recognition of Handwritten Forms with Deep Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08858)
*Hartwig Grabowski*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于手写表单处理的单任务深度学习方法，将检测和分类合并为一个任务，使用人工合成的训练数据，在真实考试数据上达到了88.28%的识别率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手写表单的自动处理仍然具有挑战性，传统方法需要分别进行字符检测和分类两个步骤。作者旨在开发一种更高效的端到端方法，将检测和分类合并为单一任务，以提升处理效率和准确性。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的单任务深度学习方法，使用深度神经网络同时执行字符检测和分类。训练数据不是手动标注，而是从基础表单和现有数据集（如EMNIST）中人工合成制造。该方法专注于手写拉丁字母处理。

Result: 在真实的手写考试数据上获得了88.28%的整体识别率。研究表明，这种单任务方法优于当前最先进的两任务方法。同时发现了EMNIST数据集的局限性，需要进行进一步定制。

Conclusion: 单任务深度学习方法在手写字符识别方面比传统的两任务方法更有效。虽然EMNIST数据集存在局限性，但通过人工合成训练数据的方法在真实数据上取得了良好的识别性能，为手写表单自动处理提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: The automatic processing of handwritten forms remains a challenging task, wherein detection and subsequent classification of handwritten characters are essential steps. We describe a novel approach, in which both steps -- detection and classification -- are executed in one task through a deep neural network. Therefore, training data is not annotated by hand, but manufactured artificially from the underlying forms and yet existing datasets. It can be demonstrated that this single-task approach is superior in comparison to the state-of-the-art two-task approach. The current study focuses on hand-written Latin letters and employs the EMNIST data set. However, limitations were identified with this data set, necessitating further customization. Finally, an overall recognition rate of 88.28 percent was attained on real data obtained from a written exam.

</details>


### [124] [Vision-Language Work Zone Intelligence for Safety-Critical Speed Regulation of Mixed-Autonomy Vehicles in Dynamic Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08860)
*Angel Martinez-Sanchez,Kianna Ng,Wesley Maia,Laura Fleig,Maitrayee Keskar,Erika Maquiling,Yash Tandon,Parthib Roy,Mohan Trivedi,Ross Greer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 开发实时车载感知系统，通过视觉检测施工区域并识别临时限速，为驾驶员或自动驾驶系统提供安全警报


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 施工区域临时限速标志视觉不一致且常缺失于数字地图，给人类驾驶员和自动驾驶系统带来安全隐患

Method: 融合物体检测与语义验证，使用时态平滑和基于迟滞的状态转换减少误报，在低成本嵌入式硬件上运行

Result: 在ROADWork数据集上施工区域检测召回率96.5%、精确率68.7%；限速识别精确率95.45%、召回率53.85%

Conclusion: 提出了一种实用、可扩展的方法，通过车载感知直接获取施工区域限速信息，不依赖地图或基础设施

Abstract: Temporary work-zone speed limits are communicated through visually inconsistent signage and are often missing from digital maps, creating safety risks for human drivers and automated vehicle systems. We present a real-time, onboard perception pipeline that detects active work zones, recognizes associated temporary speed limits, and outputs a law-aware work-zone state and speed value suitable for driver alerts or downstream automated control. The system fuses object detections with semantic verification and temporally smoothed, hysteresis-based state transitions to reduce false activations and flicker in dynamic scenes, and runs fully on low-cost embedded hardware. Evaluated manually on a annotated subset of the ROADWork dataset (490 sequences), the system achieves inside-work-zone event-level recall of 96.5% and event-level precision of 68.7%. Speed-limit recognition evaluated on 35 minutes of in-house driving data attains 95.45% precision and 53.85% recall, with no incorrect speed classifications and a single false positive. These results demonstrate a practical, scalable approach for grounding work-zone speed awareness directly in onboard perception rather than maps or infrastructure. We release our source code for the proposed system pipeline on our GitHub repository: https://github.com/Mi3-Lab/workzone

</details>


### [125] [CHROMA: Detecting AI-Generated Images through Inter-Channel Color-Space Correlations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08864)
*Juan Pablo Sotelo,Marina Gardella,Pablo Musé*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Chroma：通过分析RGB和Lab色彩空间中的通道间相关性，检测AI生成图像的轻量级方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着扩散模型和大规模生成模型的快速发展，区分合成图像与真实照片变得越来越困难。现有的自动检测器在泛化到未见过的生成器时表现脆弱。本文探索了通道间颜色相关性这一轻量级且未被充分利用的取证线索。

Method: 首先分析LPIPS度量对不同色彩空间参数化中通道依赖性的不一致响应，表明常见感知训练目标未均匀约束跨通道统计。然后分析多个色彩空间中成对通道相关性特征的分布，发现RGB和Lab色彩空间能提供最明显的真实与生成图像分离。基于此，提出Chroma检测器，通过增强标准RGB输入与通道间相关性图，使用固定CNN骨干网络进行训练。

Result: 在标准基准测试中，相关性增强输入提高了真实与生成图像的区分能力和鲁棒性，性能与最新检测器竞争，同时保持简单架构和训练过程。在单生成器训练和有限多生成器监督（仅需少量额外生成器样本）两种情况下均表现良好。

Conclusion: 通道间颜色相关性是检测AI生成图像的有效且轻量级线索，Chroma检测器通过利用这一线索在保持简单性的同时实现了竞争性性能，为AI生成图像检测提供了新的方向。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of diffusion and large-scale generative models has made it increasingly challenging to distinguish synthetic imagery from real photographs. While automated detectors have been proposed, their generalization to unseen generators remains brittle. To address this limitation, we investigate inter-channel color correlations, a lightweight and underexploited forensic cue. We first demonstrate that LPIPS, a widely used perceptual metric, exhibits inconsistent responses to perturbations that selectively alter channel dependence across different color-space parameterizations, indicating that cross-channel statistics are not uniformly constrained by common perceptual training objectives. Motivated by this, we analyze the distributions of pairwise inter-channel correlation features across multiple color spaces. Our analysis reveals systematic, generator-specific differences in these distributions, with RGB and Lab color spaces providing the most apparent separation between real and generated images. Building on this, we introduce Chroma, a detector of AI-generated images which augments standard RGB inputs with inter-channel correlation maps and employs a fixed CNN backbone trained with a modest computational budget. We assess its robustness under both single-generator training and a limited multi-generator supervision regime, where only a few samples from additional generators are available. Across a standard benchmark protocol, correlation-augmented inputs improve real-vs-generated discrimination and robustness, yielding performance competitive with recent detectors while maintaining a simple architecture and training procedure. Code is available at https://github.com/JPSoteloSilva/CHROMA

</details>


### [126] [Generalizing Geometry-Guided Mamba as a Plug-and-Play Context Module for CNN-based Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08866)
*Sheng-Wei Chan,Hsin-Jui Pan,Chun-Po Shen,Chia-Min Lin,Yung-Che Wang,Jen-Shiun Chiang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出将方向性几何Mamba（G-Mamba）作为即插即用的上下文聚合模块，替代传统CNN语义分割网络中的ASPP、PPM等上下文头，通过几何引导的选择性扫描过程实现长距离特征传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CNN语义分割网络依赖ASPP、PPM或注意力模块等上下文头来扩大感受野，但这些方法存在计算量大、内存成本高或边界泄漏等问题。需要寻找更高效、实用的上下文聚合替代方案。

Method: 将方向性几何Mamba（G-Mamba）作为即插即用的上下文聚合模块，通过注入几何引导（边界和向心流线索）到选择性扫描过程中，调制长距离特征传播。该方法替换了DeepLabV3+、DANet、CCNet等六个代表性CNN分割模型的原始上下文头，同时保持ResNet-101主干网络不变。

Result: 在Cityscapes数据集上的实验结果显示，在1024×1024分辨率下，所有六个模型都获得了稳定的mIoU提升，同时只引入了适度的额外GFLOPs计算开销。

Conclusion: 几何引导的状态空间模型（SSM）模块可以作为传统CNN上下文头的实用替代或增强方案，在提升分割性能的同时保持计算效率。

Abstract: CNN-based semantic segmentation networks usually rely on context heads such as ASPP, PPM, or attention modules to enlarge the receptive field. These heads are effective but may introduce heavy computation, memory cost, or boundary leakage. This paper revisits Directional Geometric Mamba (G-Mamba) from DGM-Net and studies it as a plug-and-play context aggregation module rather than a complete new segmentation architecture. The key idea is to inject geometric guidance into the selective scan process, allowing long-range feature propagation to be modulated by boundary and centripetal-flow cues. We replace the original context heads of six representative CNN segmentation models, including DeepLabV3+, DANet, CCNet, PSPNet, PSANet, and OCRNet, while keeping the ResNet-101 backbone unchanged. Results on Cityscapes show consistent mIoU gains with only moderate extra GFLOPs at $1024\times1024$ resolution, suggesting that geometry-guided SSM modules can serve as practical alternatives or enhancements to conventional CNN context heads.

</details>


### [127] [Are Reasoning Vision-Language Models Robust to Semantic Visual Distractions?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08894)
*Yizheng Sun,Mochuan Zhan,Yanan Ma,Jia Tong See,Yifan Wang,Ziyi Wang,Hao Li,Yang Cui,Wenhao Cai,Jingyu Sun,Chenghua Lin,Riza Batista-Navarro,Jingyuan Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Distract-Bench是一个评估视觉语言模型对语义视觉干扰鲁棒性的基准，发现推理型VLM对语义干扰比视觉退化更敏感


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM可靠性评估主要关注视觉退化（如噪声、模糊等），但忽略了模型可能正确感知证据却从无关的语义干扰中错误推理的问题

Method: 构建Distract-Bench基准，包含在保留正确答案的同时添加任务无关但有意义的视觉干扰，评估8个开源和2个闭源VLM在传统视觉退化和语义干扰下的表现

Result: 推理型VLM在视觉退化下的表现与非推理基础模型基本一致，但对语义干扰的鲁棒性显著更低；干扰常被VLM视为证据并导致错误答案

Conclusion: 研究重新定义了推理VLM的鲁棒性评估框架，将重点从感知退化转向语义干扰，这对可靠的实际视觉推理应用至关重要

Abstract: Reasoning Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve strong performance on complex multimodal tasks, but reliable real-world application requires handling visual inputs that are messier than clean, curated benchmarks. Existing works mainly evaluate such reliability of VLMs through input corruptions, such as noise, blur and weather effects, which make visual evidence harder to perceive. This leaves a critical reliability failure mode underexplored: a model may perceive the evidence correctly, yet reason from plausible but irrelevant and distracting evidence and propagate this mistake to its final answer. To address this gap, we introduce \textbf{Distract-Bench}, a benchmark for evaluating VLM robustness to \textbf{semantic visual distractions}, defined as meaningful but task-irrelevant visual cues added to inputs while preserving the ground-truth answer. We comprehensively evaluate eight leading open-source and two closed-source VLMs across conventional vision corruptions and Distract-Bench. Our results show that Distract-Bench exposes a robustness failure distinct from vision corruptions: reasoning VLMs largely track their non-reasoning base models under perceptual degradation, but show consistently lower robustness to semantic distractions. Further analysis shows that these distractions often enter the reasoning process of VLMs, are treated as evidence, and lead to incorrect answers. Together, these findings reframe robustness evaluation for reasoning VLMs, shifting the focus from degraded perception to distractions for reliable real-world visual reasoning. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/Yizheng-Sun/Distract-Bench.

</details>


### [128] [A multi-agent system for spine MRI report generation from multi-sequence imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08897)
*Zhiping Xiao,Junwei Yang,Gongbo Sun,Han Zhang,Hanwen Xu,Yi Yao,Zachary D. Miller,William E. King,Mohammed M. Kanani,Jalal B. Andre,Sammy Chu,Ming Zhang,Paul E. Kinahan,Nathan M. Cross,Sheng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SpineAgent是一个基于多智能体框架的脊柱MRI报告生成系统，通过多序列基础模型整合T1和T2加权序列信息，实现自动化的病理分类、定位和报告生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 脊柱疾病是全球疼痛和残疾的主要原因，脊柱MRI是临床评估的核心工具，但其解读复杂耗时，需要整合多个成像序列和解剖区域信息。当前自动MRI分析在有效结合多序列数据同时保留序列特异性诊断信息方面仍面临挑战。

Method: 1. 基于32,047名患者和453,683个MRI序列（共13,441,191个MRI切片）的临床数据训练多序列基础模型
2. 分别预训练两个基于DINOv3的编码器处理T1和T2加权序列
3. 引入持续训练策略，学习合成器将其他序列图像嵌入到T1和T2编码器表示中
4. 创建37个专门智能体处理不同任务
5. 将智能体输出作为结构化令牌，训练端到端的医疗报告生成智能体

Result: 1. 在脊柱MRI报告生成方面达到最先进性能
2. 在跨制造商和跨队列评估中表现出强大的泛化能力
3. 支持病理定位（识别相关切片和分割病理区域）
4. 支持多模态图像-报告检索
5. 通过自动指标和5位放射科专家评估验证了领先性能

Conclusion: SpineAgent为可扩展和可解释的MRI报告生成提供了坚实基础，通过多智能体框架成功整合了多序列MRI数据，在保持序列特异性诊断信息的同时实现了高效的自动化报告生成。

Abstract: Spinal pathology is a leading cause of pain and disability worldwide. Spine MRI is central to clinical evaluation, yet its interpretation remains complex and time-consuming, requiring integration of information across multiple imaging sequences and anatomical regions. Despite recent advances in automated MRI analysis, effectively combining multi-sequence data while preserving sequence-specific diagnostic information remains an open challenge. Here we present SpineAgent, a multi-agent framework for spine MRI report generation built upon a multi-sequence foundation model trained on routine clinical data from 32,047 patients and 453,683 MRI series, comprising a total of 13,441,191 MRI slices. To accommodate diverse modalities of sequences, we first pre-train two DINOv3-based encoders separately on T1- and T2-weighted sequences. We then introduce a continual training strategy that learns a synthesizer to embed images of other sequences using the T1 and T2 encoders, producing patient-level embedding that integrates various signals across MRI sequences. Using these embeddings, SpineAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance, and demonstrates strong generalizability under cross-manufacturer and cross-cohort evaluation. Beyond classification, SpineAgent enables pathology localization by identifying findings-relevant slices and segmenting pathological regions. It also supports multimodal image-report retrieval, providing a solid foundation for scalable and explainable MRI report generation. We further integrate these validated capabilities of SpineAgent into 37 specialized agents. Finally, we incorporate their outputs as structured tokens within a Medical Report Agent trained end-to-end for report generation. Through both automated metrics and expert evaluation by five radiologists, SpineAgent achieves leading performance in spine MRI report generation.

</details>


### [129] [DifferSeg: Towards Diverse Multimodal Binary Segmentation via Differential Perception and Frequency Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08906)
*Qiangqiang Zhou,Jiawei Xu,Yong Chen,Dandan Zhu,Yugen Yi,Xiaoqi Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DifferSeg是一个通用的多模态二值分割框架，通过差分感知融合模块自适应对齐多模态特征，以及频率引导解码器平衡高低频表示，在29个公开数据集上超越67个SOTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态分割方法存在两个关键问题：1) 缺乏自适应机制处理模态差异和互补性；2) 缺少高效解码策略平衡高低频表示。这导致模态不匹配、融合冗余以及细节边界恢复不足。

Method: 提出DifferSeg框架，包含两个核心模块：1) 差分感知融合(DPF)模块，使用可学习差分算子自适应对齐多模态特征，通过残差融合增强互补性；2) 频率引导解码器(FGD)，建立跨频率交互和多路径上采样，保持高频结构细节和低频语义一致性。

Result: 在29个公开数据集、18个下游任务上，DifferSeg一致超越67个最先进方法，展示了卓越的泛化能力和分割精度，适用于自然和医学模态。

Conclusion: DifferSeg通过自适应模态对齐和频率平衡解码，解决了多模态分割中的关键挑战，为通用二值分割提供了简单而有效的解决方案，在多个任务上实现了SOTA性能。

Abstract: In many binary segmentation tasks, most multimodal methods rely on fixed feature concatenation for cross-modal interaction and straightforward decoder designs dominated by low-frequency semantics. %ToDO: %
However, they ignore two key challenges: one is the lack of an adaptive mechanism to handle modality discrepancies and complementarity, and the other is the absence of an efficient decoding strategy to balance both high- and low-frequency representations. %
In this work, we propose a simple yet general multimodal binary segmentation framework, termed DifferSeg, to address both problems simultaneously. With the help of the differential perception fusion (DPF) module, DifferSeg employs learnable differential operators to adaptively align multimodal features and enhance their complementarity through residual fusion, effectively mitigating modality mismatch and fusion redundancy. %
In addition, we design a frequency-guided decoder (FGD) that builds cross-frequency interactions and multi-path upsampling to maintain consistency between detailed high-frequency structures and semantic low-frequency representations, ensuring fine-grained boundary recovery and noise suppression. %
Benefiting from these designs, DifferSeg can be easily generalized to diverse binary segmentation tasks, including both natural and medical modalities. Without bells and whistles, it consistently surpasses 67 state-of-the-art methods across 29 public datasets involving 18 downstream tasks, demonstrating superior generalization and segmentation accuracy.Code and pretrained models will be available at the Link.

</details>


### [130] [Failure-Aware Refinement of Vision-Language Model for Lithography Defect Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08908)
*Pangyun Jeong,Jiyeong Kong,Yuehua Hu,Dohee Jeong,Kyung-Tae Kang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一个两阶段视觉语言框架，结合初始缺陷检测与预测精炼，用于半导体光刻检测中的小图案缺陷识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 半导体光刻检测需要可靠检测小图案缺陷（如桥接、毛刺、收缩、污染），但直接微调视觉语言模型仍会产生假阳性、漏检和错误分类等常见测试时错误。

Method: 第一阶段：使用LoRA微调Qwen3-VL作为视觉语言适配器，从光刻图像预测缺陷数量、类别和归一化边界框。第二阶段：训练精炼模块，使用第一阶段预测失败案例及其修正标签，让模型能够审查和修正初始输出。

Result: 通过从初始适配器失败案例中学习，精炼过程改进了缺陷推理，超越了单阶段微调的性能。

Conclusion: 两阶段视觉语言框架通过结合初始检测和预测精炼，有效提升了半导体光刻缺陷检测的准确性和可靠性。

Abstract: Semiconductor lithography inspection requires reliable detection of small pattern defects such as bridge, burr, pinch, and contamination. In this study, we propose a two-stage vision-language framework that combines initial defect detection with prediction refinement. In the first stage, Qwen3-VL is fine-tuned with LoRA as a vision-language adapter to predict defect counts, defect categories, and normalized bounding boxes from lithography images. However, direct fine-tuning may still produce common test-time errors, including false positives, missed defects, and incorrect defect types. To address this limitation, the second stage trains a refinement module using first-stage prediction failures and their corrected labels, allowing the model to review and revise initial outputs. By learning from cases where the initial adapter fails, the refinement process improves defect inference beyond single-stage fine-tuning.

</details>


### [131] [When Vision Misleads, Let Location Speak: A Worldwide Image Geo-Localization Method via Location Attention Mechanism and Large Multimodal Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08918)
*Junchao Cui,Wenqi Shi,Xuanzi Ma,Nan Wu,Shaoyong Du,Xiangyang Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TransGeoCLIP 是一个用于全球图像地理定位的检索框架，通过位置注意力机制和大规模多模态模型来区分视觉相似但地理位置不同的图像，显著提升了街景级定位精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像地理定位方法容易将图像误定位到视觉相似但地理位置不同的区域，限制了实际应用的可靠性。需要一种能够有效区分地理特征的方法来解决这个问题。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 检索数据库构建 - 使用带位置注意力的Transformer编码GPS坐标，增强位置语义，通过CLIP实现图像-文本-GPS联合嵌入；2) 检索增强推理 - 利用大规模多模态模型从检索结果中推断最终图像位置。

Result: 在IM2GPS、IM2GPS3k、YFCC4k和YFCC26k数据集上，TransGeoCLIP显著提升了视觉相似图像的定位性能，街景级定位精度（1公里误差内）分别比现有最佳方法提高了1.5%、1.07%、7.18%和9.75%。

Conclusion: TransGeoCLIP通过整合位置注意力机制和大规模多模态模型，有效解决了视觉相似图像的地理定位混淆问题，为全球图像地理定位提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Worldwide image geo-localization aims to determine the capture location of an image on a global scale. Existing methods often mislocalize images by matching them to visually similar scenes from different geographic regions, which limits reliability in practical applications. To address this issue, we propose TransGeoCLIP, a novel retrieval-based framework that integrates a location attention mechanism and large multimodal models (LMMs). Using the Transformer encoder with location attention to encode GPS coordinates, TransGeoCLIP can effectively distinguish geographic features among visually similar images. The framework consists of two stages: 1) Retrieval database construction, which employs Transformers equipped with location attention mechanisms to encode labeled GPS coordinates and enhance location semantics, subsequently enables joint image-text-GPS embedding through CLIP; 2) Retrieval-augmented inference, which leverages LMMs to infer the final image location prediction from retrieved database results. Extensive experimental results on diverse datasets, including IM2GPS, IM2GPS3k, YFCC4k, and YFCC26k, demonstrate that TransGeoCLIP significantly enhances localization performance for visually similar images. Particularly, street-level localization accuracy (within 1 km error) is substantially improved, surpassing state-of-the-art methods by 1.5%, 1.07%, 7.18%, and 9.75% on these benchmarks, respectively.

</details>


### [132] [PolyBuild: An End-to-End Method for Polygonal Building Contour Extraction from High-Resolution Remote Sensing Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08920)
*Yaoteng Zhang,Julin Zhang,Guangshuai Wang,Jiwei Deng,Hui Sheng,Yasir Muhammad,Shiqing Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PolyBuild：一种端到端方法，直接从高分辨率遥感图像提取建筑矢量多边形，无需后处理操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从高分辨率遥感图像提取建筑多边形轮廓是制图应用的基础任务，但由于成像条件变化和建筑结构复杂，自动提取极具挑战性。主流方法依赖像素级分割和多个后处理步骤，计算量大且容易出错。

Method: 提出PolyBuild端到端方法，包含两个主要模块：初始轮廓生成模块（ICGM）和轮廓优化模块（COM）。ICGM通过使用拼接的子区域中心特征为每个建筑实例生成初始轮廓，同时执行目标检测和初始轮廓提取。COM通过Transformer解码器迭代集成CNN特征和轮廓位置信息来细化建筑轮廓，混合CNN-Transformer架构有效捕捉建筑轮廓内的局部和全局空间关系。

Result: 在三个建筑数据集上的广泛实验表明，PolyBuild显著优于最先进的方法，包括基于掩码和基于轮廓的方法。

Conclusion: PolyBuild提供了一种无需后处理的端到端建筑多边形提取方法，有效解决了传统方法的计算复杂性和错误累积问题，在建筑轮廓提取任务上表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Extracting building polygon contours from high-resolution remote sensing images is a fundamental task for various mapping applications. However, the presence of varying imaging conditions and complex building structures, makes automatic contour extraction extremely challenging. Mainstream approaches for building extraction often rely on pixel-level segmentation followed by multiple post-processing steps to produce building contour, which can be computationally intensive and prone to errors. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end method named PolyBuild, which can directly extract building vector polygons from high-resolution remote sensing images without the need for any post-processing operations. The proposed method leverages two primary modules: an Initial Contour Generation Module (ICGM) and a Contour Optimization Module (COM). The ICGM is designed to generate an initial building contour by utilizing concatenated sub-region center features for each building instance. It performs simultaneous object detection and initial contour extraction by generating bounding boxes and using the center features of four sub-regions to represent each building. The Contour Optimization Module (COM) further refines the generated building contours by iteratively integrating Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) features and contour positional information in a Transformer-based decoder. The hybrid CNN-Transformer architecture effectively captures both local and global spatial relationships within the building contour, ensuring high-quality boundary delineation. Extensive experiments are conducted on three building datasets to evaluate the performance of PolyBuild. The results demonstrate that PolyBuild significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, including mask-based and contour-based approaches.

</details>


### [133] [NutriMLLM: Multimodal Large Language Models for Dietary Micronutrient Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08948)
*Runze Yan,Minxiao Wang,Jiaying Lu,Darren Liu,Xiao Hu,Hanqi Luo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 通过合成数据训练的专业模型NutriMLLM，在食物图像的全面微量营养素估算任务上超越了现有通用多模态大模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在食物图像的全面微量营养素估算任务上不可靠，经常回避回答或返回统计上不合理的结果，需要专业模型来解决这一临床营养护理的重要问题。

Method: 利用十年人口规模的24小时饮食回忆作为结构化提示，通过文本到图像生成管道创建了约110万张图像-描述-营养素三元组的合成语料库，并用该数据微调Qwen3-VL和GLM-4.6V-Flash模型，形成了NutriMLLM模型家族。

Result: NutriMLLM所有变体在真实食物图像上实现了对65种营养素的近乎完全覆盖，最大变体在大多数营养素的准确度上匹配或超越了GPT-5、Gemini 3和Claude Sonnet 4.5等专有基线模型。

Conclusion: 基于回忆驱动的合成监督可以使基于图像的全面微量营养素估算成为一个可解决的工程问题，支持饮食评估、个性化营养指导和人口规模的微量营养素监测。

Abstract: Comprehensive estimation of dietary micronutrients from food images could improve clinical nutrition care, but training such models requires large multimodal datasets linking diverse foods to complete nutrient profiles. We first show that existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs), including leading proprietary models, are unreliable for this task. Across five model families and four independent evaluation benchmarks (ASA24, SNAPMe, FNDDS, and NutriBench), models frequently abstained or returned statistically implausible values. To address this gap without costly expert annotation, we repurposed a decade of population-scale 24-hour dietary recalls as structured prompts for text-to-image generation. This pipeline produced a synthetic corpus of about 1.1 million image-description-nutrient triplets, each pairing a generated food image with a complete 65-nutrient label. To our knowledge, this is the largest synthetic food-image corpus with comprehensive micronutrient annotation planned for public release upon publication. Fine-tuning Qwen3-VL (2B/4B/8B/30B) and GLM-4.6V-Flash on this corpus yielded NutriMLLM, the first family of vision-language models specialized for comprehensive dietary micronutrient estimation. We evaluate these models with a four-component framework that separately measures abstention, hallucination, overall usability, and per-nutrient numerical accuracy. On real food images, every NutriMLLM variant achieved near-complete coverage across all 65 nutrients, and the largest variant matched or exceeded proprietary baselines (GPT-5, Gemini 3, and Claude Sonnet 4.5) in accuracy on most nutrients. These results show that recall-driven synthetic supervision can make image-based comprehensive micronutrient estimation a tractable engineering problem and support dietary assessment, personalized nutrition guidance, and population-scale micronutrient surveillance.

</details>


### [134] [Rethinking 3D Shape Generation: Diffusion over Superquadrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08957)
*Zhiyang Liu,Wanze Li,Yuwei Wu,Chengran Yuan,Jiawei Sun,Rui Zheng,Marcelo H Ang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于超二次曲面基元的三维形状生成扩散模型，通过将扩散过程从密集几何表示转移到紧凑几何基元上，显著降低了计算复杂度和内存需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统扩散模型在三维形状生成中通常在高基数空间（如体素、SDF网格、网格或点云）中进行去噪，这导致计算和内存密集型问题，难以扩展到更高分辨率和更强可控性。因此需要重新思考扩散表示方法。

Method: 将扩散过程从密集几何转移到紧凑几何基元，使用超二次曲面表示每个形状（一组超二次曲面参数，包括姿态、大小和形状）。将扩散状态维度从数千到数百万个几何表示值减少到7KB的超二次曲面参数，大幅降低每步计算和内存需求。

Result: 该方法在标准基准测试中通过点云解码后实现了具有竞争力的表面保真度和分布性能，同时支持更广泛的能力（如分辨率无关的点云解码、部件级编辑和基于约束的设计），在大多数条件下能够以每形状0.6秒的效率生成。

Conclusion: 基于超二次曲面的扩散方法通过大幅降低扩散状态维度和计算需求，提高了三维形状生成的可扩展性，同时保持了生成质量并扩展了功能能力，为高效、可控的三维形状生成提供了新途径。

Abstract: Diffusion models have advanced 3D shape generation, yet most methods still denoise in high-cardinality spaces (e.g., voxel/SDF grids, meshes, or point clouds), which is computationally and memory intensive and makes it difficult to scale in terms of both higher resolution and stronger controllability. We rethink the diffusion representation and propose to move diffusion from dense geometry to compact geometric primitives, representing each shape as a small set of superquadrics. Instead of operating on thousands to millions of geometric representation values, we leverage 7KB superquadric parameters (pose, size, and shape), drastically reducing diffusion-state dimensionality and per-step compute/memory. Our diffusion-over-superquadrics improves scalability by supporting broader capabilities (e.g., resolution-free point-cloud decoding, part-level editing, and constraint-based design) and achieving competitive surface-fidelity and distributional performance on standard benchmarks after point-cloud decoding, while enabling efficient generation within 0.6s per shape for most conditions.

</details>


### [135] [ChinaHeritaQA: A Culturally-Grounded Visual Question Answering Dataset for World Heritage Sites in China](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08959)
*Yi Zhang,Bolei Ma,Yong Cao,Chengyan Wu,Daniel Hershcovich,Anna-Carolina Haensch*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 中国文化遗产问答数据集：一个用于评估视觉语言模型在中国UNESCO世界遗产文化推理能力的多模态基准数据集，包含2279张真实图像和14133个双语选择题，涵盖7个认知维度，揭示模型在视觉识别方面表现优异但在文化推理方面存在不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在文化推理能力评估方面缺乏专门针对中国UNESCO世界遗产的基准数据集，需要创建能够评估从基础视觉识别到复杂历史文化推理的多维度能力的评估工具。

Method: 创建ChinaHeritaQA数据集，包含2279张真实图像和14133个双语（中/英）选择题对，基于UNESCO对齐的遗产本体构建，涵盖7个认知维度，经过严格的人工标注验证确保语言质量和事实一致性。

Result: 评估显示顶级模型平均表现超过人类，但在任务层面存在显著差异：模型在视觉识别方面表现优异，但在文化基础推理方面表现不佳；不同朝代和地区的表现也存在差异，表明强大的视觉检索能力不能扩展到文化和历史理解。

Conclusion: ChinaHeritaQA数据集揭示了当前视觉语言模型在文化推理能力方面的局限性，特别是从视觉检索到历史文化理解的差距，该数据集的发布将支持未来文化感知多模态学习的研究。

Abstract: We introduce ChinaHeritaQA, a multimodal benchmark dataset for evaluating the cultural reasoning abilities of vision-language models (VLMs) on UNESCO World Heritage sites in China. The dataset comprises 2,279 in-the-wild images paired with 14,133 bilingual (Chinese/English) multiple-choice QA pairs spanning seven cognitive dimensions, from basic identity recognition to historical periodization and architectural analysis. Guided by a UNESCO-aligned heritage ontology and verified through rigorous human annotation, the dataset ensures linguistic quality and factual consistency. Evaluations of state-of-the-art VLMs reveal that while top models exceed human performance on average, substantial task-level variation emerges: models excel at visual recognition but struggle with culturally grounded reasoning. Performance also varies by dynasty and region. ChinaHeritaQA reveals that strong visual retrieval does not extend to cultural and historical understanding. We release the dataset to support future research on culturally aware multimodal learning.

</details>


### [136] [EPS3D: End-to-End Feed-Forward 3D Panoptic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08980)
*Runsong Zhu,Jiaxin Guo,Xiaoyang Guo,Zhengzhe Liu,Ka-Hei Hui,Wei Yin,Kai Chen,Wei Chen,Weiqiang Ren,Yunhui Liu,Pheng-Ann Heng,Chi-Wing Fu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EPS3D是一个端到端的开放词汇3D全景分割框架，通过蒸馏训练策略和语义-实例互增强模块，实现高效、一致的3D场景理解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D全景分割方法依赖额外预处理步骤，存在错误累积和3D一致性问题，需要更高效、一致的端到端解决方案。

Method: 1. 端到端架构：从多视角图像预测3D感知的语义和实例特征
2. 蒸馏训练策略：在多样化3D场景上进行训练
3. 互增强模块：通过Ins2Sem（实例内语义对齐）和Sem2Ins（语义引导实例特征优化）实现语义-实例一致性

Result: 1. 在两个基准测试上超越SOTA基线
2. Replica数据集上语义mIoU提升13%
3. 高效推理：每个场景仅需1秒
4. 支持机器人操作和3D场景编辑等应用

Conclusion: EPS3D通过端到端架构和语义-实例互增强机制，实现了高效、一致的开放词汇3D全景分割，在性能和效率上均有显著提升。

Abstract: This paper introduces EPS3D, a new end-to-end feed-forward framework for open-vocabulary 3D panoptic segmentation. Unlike existing methods relying on additional preprocessing, we design an end-to-end architecture, with a distillation-based training strategy on diverse 3D scenes to predict 3D-aware semantic and instance features from multi-view images, improving 3D consistency and avoiding error accumulation. We further propose a mutual enhancement module to enforce inherent semantic-instance consistency. By aligning semantics within instances (Ins2Sem) and refining instance features with semantic guidance (Sem2Ins), we achieve more coherent 3D scene understanding. Ultimately, EPS3D outperforms SOTA baselines on two benchmarks (e.g., +13% mIoU for semantics on Replica) with high efficiency (e.g., 1s per scene), supporting tasks like robotic manipulation and 3D scene editing.

</details>


### [137] [Scaling by Diversified Experience for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09009)
*Leiyu Wang,Zhaofengnian Wang,Xueqi Li,Luoyi Fan,Cewu Lu,Nanyang Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SyVLA是一种通过多样化经验训练的强大视觉-语言-动作模型，采用意图解耦算法分离控制相关特征，并使用相似样本引导的强化学习来稳定策略更新，从而解决现有VLA模型在现实部署中高层推理与低层控制纠缠、策略优化不稳定的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型在现实部署中面临两大挑战：1）高层推理与低层控制相互纠缠；2）策略优化不稳定。这些问题限制了VLA模型在真实机器人任务中的实际应用效果和泛化能力。

Method: 提出SyVLA模型，包含两个核心技术：1）意图解耦算法，从推理上下文中分离出控制相关特征；2）相似样本引导的强化学习管道，通过多样化经验训练来稳定策略更新并缓解分布偏移问题。

Result: 在真实机器人任务和多模态基准测试中，SyVLA相比现有方法取得了更高的任务成功率，并展现出更强的分布外泛化能力，同时有效保持了核心视觉-语言能力。

Conclusion: SyVLA通过意图解耦和多样化经验训练，成功解决了VLA模型在现实部署中的关键挑战，为稳健的视觉-语言-动作模型提供了有效的解决方案，并在真实机器人任务中展现了优越性能。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models face significant challenges in real-world deployment due to the entanglement of high-level reasoning with low-level control, and the instability of policy optimization. In this paper, we introduce SyVLA, a robust VLA model trained with diversified experiences. We propose an Intention Decoupling algorithm to isolate control-relevant features from reasoning contexts and a similar-sample guided RL pipeline to stabilize policy updates and mitigate distribution shift. Extensive experiments on real-world robotic tasks and multi-modal benchmarks demonstrate that SyVLA achieves superior task success rates and stronger out-of-distribution generalization compared to existing methods, while effectively preserving core vision-language capabilities. Codes and Datasets is released on \href{https://sy-vla.github.io/}{project page}.

</details>


### [138] [Frequency Decoupled Framework for Screen Content Image Super-Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09029)
*Xufei Wang,Qicheng Zhang,Qi Wu,Ziyang Gu,Shizhuang Weng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出频率解耦框架FDF，从相位角度重新思考屏幕内容图像超分辨率，通过振幅聚类和相位一致性传播分别提取周期性模式和全局结构信息，结合振荡-非调和隐式拟合网络实现高效恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的方法忽视了屏幕内容图像固有的频率特性，导致性能不佳。需要一种能够同时捕获振幅中的结构化能量和相位中的关系连续性的方法，以准确恢复屏幕内容图像的规则纹理和全局配置。

Method: 提出频率解耦框架FDF：1) 振幅相位分解网络APFN：通过振幅聚类模块ACM将稀疏高能振幅响应组织成代表性原型以提取周期性模式；通过相位一致性自注意力PCSA逐步强化配置连续性。2) 振荡-非调和隐式拟合网络OAIF-Net：集成周期性和相干隐式表示，高效利用SCI中嵌入的周期性模式和相干上下文。

Result: 在四个公开SCI数据集上的多尺度实验中，FDF实现了最先进的SCISR性能。消融实验进一步证明了每个组件在提取和利用周期性模式及相干上下文方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 从相位角度重新思考SCISR问题，提出的频率解耦框架通过分离振幅和相位处理，有效捕获了屏幕内容图像的结构化能量和关系连续性，结合专门设计的隐式表示实现了高质量的超分辨率恢复。

Abstract: Methods based on implicit neural representations have demonstrated superior performance in Screen Content Image Super-Resolution (SCISR) . However, they overlooked the inherent frequency characteristics, leading to suboptimal performance. We propose a frequency decoupled framework (FDF) that rethinks SCISR from a phasor perspective by capturing structured energy in amplitude and relational continuity in phase, and jointly exploiting them with bespoke implicit representations to faithfully recover the regular textures and global configuration of Screen Content Image (SCI).
  Amplitude-Phase Factorization Network (APFN) first separates images into amplitude and phase streams, where Amplitude Clustering Module (ACM) organizes sparse yet high-energy amplitude responses into representative prototypes for periodic pattern extraction, while Phase Consistency Self-Attention (PCSA) progressively reinforces configuration through continuous consistency propagation.
  And Oscillation-Anharmonic Implicit Fitting Network (OAIF-Net) integrates periodic and coherent implicit representations for efficient exploitation of the periodic patterns and coherent context embedded in SCI.
  Experimental results show FDF achieves state-of-the-art SCISR performance at multiple scales across four public SCI datasets. Ablation experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of each component in extracting and exploiting periodic patterns and coherent context.

</details>


### [139] [CRANE: Knowledge Editing for Reasoning MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09033)
*Han Huang,Hao Wang,Mengqi Zhang,Shu Wu,Qiang Liu,Liang Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出CRANE框架解决推理型多模态大语言模型的知识编辑问题，传统方法在推理过程中会失败，CRANE通过检索增强和两阶段训练策略实现高效知识编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 推理型多模态大语言模型生成显式思维链，传统知识编辑方法在传统指标上表现良好（教师强制准确率达100%），但在检查模型推理过程时严重失败（基础成功率低至0%）。存在三种失败模式：结构崩溃、认知失调和浅层内化。

Method: 提出CRANE框架：1）基于模态感知的双库检索系统，无需每个编辑的参数修改；2）两阶段训练策略：监督微调进行结构初始化，然后使用带有认知路由奖励的GRPO训练模型在视觉先验和注入编辑事实之间进行仲裁。

Result: 在ReasonEdit-Bench上，CRANE在冲突场景中达到96.9%的基础成功率，多跳链中96.9%的中间实体使用率，97.6%的文本局部性和68.1%的图像局部性编辑独立性。在MMEVOKE基准测试中达到87.0%的黄金检索性能。

Conclusion: CRANE通过检索增强框架有效解决了推理型多模态大语言模型的知识编辑问题，避免了传统方法的失败模式，在保持模型原有能力的同时实现了高效的知识更新。

Abstract: The emergence of reasoning multimodal large language models (MLLMs), which generate explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning before producing answers, has introduced a new challenge for knowledge editing: methods that appear successful under traditional metrics (teacher-forcing accuracy up to 100%) can fail severely when the model's reasoning process is examined (Grounded Success as low as 0%). We identify three failure modes: (1) Structural Collapse, where weight-modifying methods destroy the CoT format; (2) Cognitive Dissonance, where the model's reasoning chain actively rejects the injected edit fact based on visual evidence; and (3) Shallow Internalization, where methods succeed on exact queries but fail on rephrase or multi-hop variants. On reasoning MLLMs, these modes interact: methods that generalize (FT, LoRA) trigger format collapse, while methods without deep modification cannot generalize. To expose these failures, we propose a CoT-aware evaluation protocol and construct ReasonEdit-Bench, with conflict stratification, multi-level probes, and multi-hop portability tests.
  We propose CRANE, a retrieval-augmented framework that requires no per-edit parameter modification. CRANE combines a modality-aware dual-library retrieval system with a two-phase training strategy: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) for structural initialization, followed by GRPO with a Cognitive Routing Reward that trains the model to arbitrate between visual priors and injected edit facts. On ReasonEdit-Bench, CRANE achieves 96.9% Grounded Success on conflict scenarios and 96.9% intermediate entity usage in multi-hop chains, with 97.6% text-locality and 68.1% image-locality Edit Independence. On the out-of-distribution MMEVOKE benchmark, CRANE reaches 87.0% under gold retrieval.

</details>


### [140] [Leveraging NeRF-Rendered Images for 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09034)
*Mizuki Morikawa,Yuta Shimizu,Chunyu Li,Yusuke Monno,Masatoshi Okutomi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种结合NeRF和3DGS的方法，利用NeRF渲染图像来增强3DGS在街景合成中的表现，保持3DGS的速度同时提升渲染质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: NeRF和3DGS在新视角合成中表现出互补特性：3DGS渲染速度快但质量较低，NeRF渲染质量高但速度慢。针对街景场景，希望结合两者优势

Method: 使用预训练的街景专用NeRF生成训练图像，包括去除街景输入视图中的瞬态物体和生成鸟瞰视角作为额外视图。进一步结合基于扩散模型的图像增强技术提升额外视图的质量

Result: 在一个合成数据集和两个真实数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法在保持3DGS渲染速度的同时，提升了街景渲染质量，继承了NeRF的高质量特性

Conclusion: 成功将NeRF的高质量渲染特性融入3DGS框架，实现了在街景合成中同时保持高渲染速度和高质量渲染的目标

Abstract: Neural radiance field (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) are two mainstream approaches for novel view synthesis. They often show complementary performance, i.e., 3DGS demonstrating faster rendering speed and NeRF demonstrating higher rendering quality. Motivated by this, we propose leveraging NeRF-rendered images for 3DGS. Specifically, we target street scenes and utilize a pre-trained street-specific NeRF method to produce training images for a target 3DGS method. In our 3DGS training, NeRF-rendered images are used to remove transient objects in street-level input views and to generate bird's-eye views as additional views, inheriting the higher-quality rendering of NeRF into 3DGS. We further incorporate a diffusion-based image enhancement to improve the image quality of the additional views. Experimental results on one synthetic and two real datasets demonstrate that our proposed method improves street-scene rendering while preserving the speed of 3DGS and the quality of NeRF.

</details>


### [141] [MilliVid: Hierarchical Latents for Long-Range Consistency in Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09056)
*Ishaan Preetam Chandratreya,David Charatan,Basile Van Hoorick,Sergey Zakharov,Vitor Guizilini,Phillip Isola,Vincent Sitzmann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种多尺度令牌空间中的由粗到细展开方法，通过预训练自编码器将视频帧压缩成从粗到细的令牌层次结构，然后训练视频扩散模型进行由粗到细的生成，有效解决了长视频生成中的长期一致性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频生成模型在处理长视频时面临挑战，因为即使几十帧也需要不切实际的长变换器序列长度，导致长期一致性难以保持。现有方法在几何和物体持久性方面的一致性不足。

Method: 首先预训练一个自编码器，将每帧压缩成从典型潜在分辨率到每帧仅几个令牌的多尺度令牌层次结构。最粗的级别捕获场景布局和语义等关键信息，更细的级别添加高频外观和纹理。然后训练视频扩散模型，在生成过程中采用由粗到细的展开策略，在不同步骤中控制生成和用作上下文的细节级别。

Result: 在自定义的长Minecraft视频数据集上验证了该方法，相比现有基线，该方法产生了显著更一致的生成结果，在几何和物体持久性方面保持了更好的长期一致性，同时减少了在感知上不太相关的细节上的计算开销。

Conclusion: 通过多尺度令牌空间中的由粗到细展开方法，可以有效解决长视频生成中的长期一致性问题，在保持关键场景元素一致性的同时，优化了计算资源的分配。

Abstract: Video generative models have become increasingly powerful, but long-range consistency remains challenging to achieve because even a few dozen frames require impractically long transformer sequence lengths. We show that this issue can be mitigated by generating video using coarse-to-fine rollout within a multi-scale token space. Our approach is simple: first, we pre-train an autoencoder that compresses each frame into a hierarchy of tokens, with levels ranging from the typical latent resolution to only a handful of tokens per frame. The coarsest levels capture the most consequential information, such as scene layout and semantics, while finer levels add high-frequency appearance and texture. Then, we train a video diffusion model to generate these tokens using coarse-to-fine rollout. By carefully controlling the level of detail at which frames are generated and used as context during each rollout step, we are able to preserve long-range consistency in geometry and object permanence while spending less compute on the long-range consistency of less perceptually relevant details. We validate this approach using a custom dataset of long Minecraft videos, where it produces substantially more consistent rollouts compared to existing baselines.

</details>


### [142] [See More, Think Deeper: Query-Expanded Visual Evidence and Answer-Clue Guided Reflection for Long Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09064)
*Shuning Wang,Zhiheng Wu,YiNuo Lu,Naiming Liu,Chen Jia,Bowen Liu,Shuo Nie,Weijie Zhu,Yumeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CoVER 是一个用于长视频理解的综合视觉证据与反思框架，通过查询扩展的动态证据收集和答案特定的视觉反馈验证，提升 Video-LLM 的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 Video-LLM 在长视频理解中存在两个关键限制：1) 证据获取通常依赖单一搜索意图；2) 答案生成缺乏有效的视觉反馈机制。

Method: 提出 CoVER 框架，包含两个核心机制：1) "See More" - 通过动态收集查询扩展的视觉证据；2) "Think Deeper" - 通过答案特定的视觉反馈验证草稿答案。

Result: CoVER-7B 在相同参数规模模型中表现显著优于其他模型，在某些指标上甚至超越了最先进的闭源模型。

Conclusion: CoVER 将长视频理解从以答案为中心的生成转变为以证据为中心且可视觉验证的推理，提升了 Video-LLM 的长视频理解能力。

Abstract: Recent advances in Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) have enabled performance on long-video understanding tasks. However, existing methods still face two key limitations: evidence acquisition often relies on a single search intent, and answer generation lacks an effective visual feedback mechanism. To address these limitations, we propose \textbf{CoVER}, a Comprehensive Visual Evidence and Reflection framework for long-video understanding. CoVER enables Video-LLMs to \textbf{See More} by dynamically gathering query-expanded visual evidence, and \textbf{Think Deeper} by verifying draft answers with effective answer-specific visual feedback. Together, these mechanisms shift long-video understanding from answer-centric generation to evidence-centric and visually verifiable reasoning. Experimental results show that CoVER-7B substantially outperforms models with the same parameter scale and even surpasses state-of-the-art closed-source models on certain metrics.

</details>


### [143] [REFINE: Super-efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting Pruning via Rendering-Free Primitive Importance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09074)
*Zhang Chen,Shuai Wan,Mengting Yu,Fuzheng Yang,Junhui Hou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: REFINE提出了一种用于3D高斯泼溅的高效剪枝框架，通过渲染无关的基元重要性度量实现3000倍计算复杂度降低，同时保持渲染质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3DGS剪枝方法存在严重质量下降或计算成本过高的问题，需要一种既能保持渲染质量又能大幅降低计算复杂度的剪枝方法

Method: 提出基于渲染感知Hessian场的分析近似方法，通过建模可见性、投影几何和内容自适应超参数的联合调制，推导各向异性感知权重场作为基元重要性的高保真代理，完全绕过昂贵的正向渲染过程

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，REFINE在保持高度竞争力的渲染质量的同时，相比最先进的剪枝方法实现了前所未有的3000倍剪枝相关计算复杂度降低

Conclusion: REFINE通过引入渲染无关的基元重要性度量，成功解决了3DGS剪枝中质量与效率的权衡问题，为高效3D场景表示提供了新思路

Abstract: Existing pruning methods for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) suffer from either severe quality degradation or prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we propose REFINE, a highly accelerated 3DGS pruning framework centered on a novel rendering-free primitive importance metric. Our approach leverages an analytically approximated, rendering-aware Hessian field to quantify the expected perceptual error induced by the removal of individual primitives. By modeling the joint modulation of visibility, projection geometry and the content adaptive hyperparameter, we entirely bypass costly forward rendering passes and derive an anisotropic perceptual weight field that serves as a high-fidelity proxy for primitive importance. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that REFINE maintains highly competitive rendering quality while achieving an unprecedented $3,000\times$ reduction in pruning-related computational complexity compared to state-of-the-art pruning methods.

</details>


### [144] [Beyond Scalar Rewards by Internalizing Reasoning into Score Distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09076)
*Xin Jin,Huanqia Cai,Zhen Li,Zechao Zhan,Dengyang Jiang,Aiming Hao,Yuming Jiang,Chunle Guo,Peng Gao,Ming-Ming Cheng,Steven C. H. Hoi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Z-Reward是一个用于文本到图像后训练的教师1学生奖励建模框架，通过解耦推理密集型判断和高效奖励部署，使用大型视觉语言模型作为教师进行推理，训练紧凑的学生模型无需推理链即可提供奖励信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有奖励模型过度压缩不确定性：标量、分数标记和成对奖励模型无法充分捕捉视觉偏好的主观性和分布特性，而基于推理的生成奖励虽然判断力强但部署成本高且难以作为直接优化信号。

Method: 提出Z-Reward框架：教师使用大型VLM通过推理推断与评分标准对齐的分数分布，采用组级直接分数优化(GDSO)训练；学生通过推理内化分数蒸馏(RISD)训练，将教师的推理条件分数分布转移到紧凑VLM中，无需推理链即可推理。

Result: 27B GDSO教师达到89.6%人类偏好准确率，优于SFT、RewardDance和GRPO；9B RISD学生达到88.6%，优于OPD基线并与较大教师接近；作为文本到图像优化的可微分奖励信号，相比SFT基线带来41.3%的净人类偏好改进。

Conclusion: Z-Reward通过解耦推理和部署，在保持强判断力的同时实现高效奖励建模，为文本到图像后训练提供了有效的奖励信号，在人类偏好准确率和优化效果方面均表现优异。

Abstract: Reward models are central to text-to-image post-training, but visual preference is subjective and better represented as a distribution over rubric scores than as a deterministic scalar. Existing scalar, score-token, and pairwise reward models over-compress uncertainty and fine-grained score differences, while reasoning-based generative rewards provide stronger judgments but are costly to deploy and difficult to use as direct optimization signals. We propose Z-Reward, a teacher-student reward modeling framework that decouples reasoning-heavy judgment from efficient reward deployment. The teacher is a large VLM that uses reasoning to infer rubric-aligned score distributions, and is trained with Group-wise Direct Score Optimization (GDSO), which combines policy-gradient rewards from distribution expectations with direct pointwise and pairwise supervision on score distributions and score gaps. The student is trained with Reasoning-Internalized Score Distillation (RISD), which transfers the teacher's reasoning-conditioned score distribution into a compact VLM without requiring explicit reasoning chains at inference time. On our internally annotated evaluation set, the 27B GDSO teacher reaches 89.6% human preference accuracy, outperforming SFT, RewardDance, and GRPO, while the 9B RISD student reaches 88.6%, outperforming the OPD baseline and closely matching the larger teacher. We further show that Z-Reward can serve as a differentiable reward signal for text-to-image optimization, yielding a 41.3% net human-preference improvement over the SFT baseline.

</details>


### [145] [Edge-Constrained UAV Small-Object Detection with P2 Enhancement and Quantum-Inspired Lightweight Structure Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09081)
*Wuming Lei,Yanbin Gao,Mingyan Sun,Xiaobin Li,Xuechen Liang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究针对无人机目标检测的边缘部署需求，通过结合P2高分辨率检测分支和量子启发进化算法，优化YOLOX-Nano的轻量化结构，提升小目标检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机目标检测需要在机载计算和内存限制下保持紧凑的检测器，同时保留小目标细节。轻量化网络中的重复下采样会削弱浅层空间信息，而手动添加注意力或融合模块可能增加成本且效果不稳定。

Method: 1) 在YOLOX-Nano基础上添加P2高分辨率检测分支以增强小目标检测；2) 使用量子启发进化算法(QIEA)进行轻量化结构筛选，搜索空间基于轻量化优先级和任务特异性定义；3) 评估综合考虑准确率、FLOPs、延迟、内存消耗和召回率。

Result: 1) P2分支在VisDrone数据集上比YOLOX-Nano基线提升APsmall 31.10%；2) 与相似模型大小的NanoDet-Plus相比，YOLOX-Nano+-P2提升AP50:95 17.5%和APsmall 44.9%；3) QIEA筛选的候选模型获得最高Recall50，但+P2在完整训练后仍是最强的AP导向变体；4) 代理排名不一定能转移到最终AP50:95表现。

Conclusion: 研究支持将P2作为主要的小目标增强路径，QIEA作为轻量化工具用于候选模型筛选和精度-成本分析。代码和结果已开源。

Abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) object detection requires compact detectors that retain small-object details under onboard computation and memory constraints. Repeated downsampling inlightweight networks weakens shallow spatial information, while manually adding attention orfusion modules may increase cost without stable gains. This study analyzes YOLOX-Nano underedge-deployment constraints by combining a P2 high-resolution detection branch with a quantum-inspired evolutionary algorithm (QIEA) for lightweight structure screening. The search space isdefined by lightweight priority and task specificity, and the evaluation jointly considers accuracy,floating-point operations (FLOPs), latency, memory consumption, and recall. On VisDrone, theP2 branch increases APamall by 31.10% over the YOLOX-Nano baseline. Compared with NanoDet-Plus with similar model size, YOLOX-Nano+-P2 improves APs0.ss by 17.5% and APamal by 44.9%.The QIEA-selected candidate obtains the highest Recallso, but +P2 remains the strongest AP-oriented variant after full training. Full 100-epoch verification of Random-best, GA-best, andSA/QUBO-best candidates further shows that proxy rankings do not necessarily transfer to finalAPse9s. These results support using P2 as the main small-object enhancement path and QIEA as alightweight tool for candidate screening and accuracy-cost analysis. The source code, configurationfiles, diagnostic scripts, and summarized results are available at https://github.com/Ming23233/UAV-QIEA-Edge-Detection

</details>


### [146] [Driving Video Retrieval for Complex Queries with Structured Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09109)
*Manyi Yao,Sparsh Garg,Christian Shelton,Amit Roy-Chowdhury,Abhishek Aich*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: STRIVE-D：一个用于自动驾驶视频检索的数据校准框架，通过使用弱标记域内视频评估查询规则的可靠性、调整不匹配的规则，并将校准后的规则分数与视觉语言和基于关键字的检索信号融合，显著提升动态事件检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶中需要检索动态事件（如切入、急刹车），但现有视觉语言和基于关键字的检索方法常因文本描述不明确而遗漏这些事件，而基于规则的检索方法虽然能直接编码事件，但规则假设与真实数据不匹配时容易失效。

Method: 提出STRIVE-D框架：1）使用弱标记的域内视频评估查询规则的可靠性；2）调整与观测数据不匹配的规则；3）将校准后的规则分数与视觉语言和基于关键字的检索信号融合。

Result: 在三个驾驶基准测试（包括新发布的DrivingDojo人工标注事件数据）上，STRIVE-D相比最先进方法在top-1准确率上实现了高达84%的相对提升。

Conclusion: STRIVE-D通过数据校准有效解决了规则检索的脆弱性问题，显著提升了自动驾驶视频中动态事件的检索性能，为数据管理和安全验证提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Video retrieval at scale is central to data curation and safety validation in autonomous driving, where users want to find not only scenes but also dynamic events such as cut-ins and hard braking. Existing vision-language and keyword-based retrieval methods often miss these events because the relevant motion may not be explicitly described in text or captured by lexical overlap. Rule-based retrieval can encode such events more directly, but it is brittle: generated or hand-written rules often fail when their assumptions do not match real driving data. We propose STRIVE-D, a data-calibrated retrieval framework for driving videos.
