Beyond cold-start leaderboard scores, IDC exposes two additional observables for each (agent, game) pair: how the score evolves across reflection rounds, and how the learned skill behaves on held-out task variants. We report these observables for twelve VLM agents on the cold-start leaderboard and four top agents under IDC.

</details>


### [217] [Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09828)
*Weijie Wang,Haoyu Zhao,Yifan Yang,Feng Chen,Zeyu Zhang,Yefei He,Zicheng Duan,Donny Y. Chen,Yuqing Yang,Bohan Zhuang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于潜在空间的空间记忆框架Mirage，用于视频世界模型，避免了像素空间重建的信息损失和计算负担，实现了更快的视频生成和更小的内存占用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视频世界模型依赖显式点云内存，需要在RGB空间构建，这既计算昂贵（需要重复渲染和VAE编码），又存在信息损失（像素空间往返会丢弃学习到的潜在表示中的丰富特征）。

Method: 提出潜在空间空间记忆（latent spatial memory），直接在扩散潜在空间中存储场景信息，避免像素空间重建。具体框架Mirage通过深度引导反投影将潜在标记提升到3D空间构建记忆，并通过直接潜在空间变形来合成新视角查询记忆。

Result: 潜在空间空间记忆相比显式3D基线实现了高达10.57倍的端到端视频生成加速和55倍的内存占用减少。Mirage在WorldScore上达到最先进的性能，在RealEstate10K上获得强重建质量。

Conclusion: 潜在空间空间记忆框架通过统一潜在空间表示，消除了像素空间重建的信息损失和重复编码渲染的计算负担，为视频世界模型提供了高效且高性能的解决方案。

Abstract: Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. This design is both computationally expensive, requiring repeated rendering and VAE encoding, and inherently lossy, as the round trip through pixel space discards rich features of the learned latent representation. In this paper, we introduce \emph{latent spatial memory} for video world models, a persistent 3D cache that stores scene information directly in the diffusion latent space, avoiding pixel-space reconstruction. Building on this, we propose Mirage, a latent-space spatial memory framework that constructs the memory by lifting latent tokens into 3D via depth-guided back-projection and queries it by synthesizing novel views through direct latent-space warping. This unified formulation eliminates both the information loss of pixel-space reconstruction and the computational burden of repeated encoding and rendering. Experiments show that latent spatial memory achieves up to \textbf{10.57}$\times$ faster end-to-end video generation and \textbf{55}$\times$ reduction in memory footprint relative to explicit 3D baselines. Leveraging the geometric prior of the diffusion model, Mirage attains state-of-the-art performance on WorldScore and strong reconstruction quality on RealEstate10K.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [218] [VoLo: A Physical Orchestrator for Open-Vocabulary Long-Horizon Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07723)
*Siyi Chen,Hugo Hadfield,Alex Zook,Mikaela Angelina Uy,Chan Hee Song,Erwin Coumans,Xuning Yang,Faisal Ladhak,Qing Qu,Stan Birchfield,Jonathan Tremblay,Valts Blukis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VoLoAgent是一个基于视觉语言模型的机器人代理系统，通过将视觉语言动作模型作为可中断工具来协调异构机器人能力，实现开放词汇长时程操作任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决开放词汇长时程操作中机器人需要处理灵活指令、复杂多物体场景，同时需要自适应地规划、执行、监控和从失败中恢复的问题。物理世界中的决策、动作和工具调用时机至关重要，不能像虚拟AI代理那样暂停推理。

Method: 提出物理编排概念，VoLoAgent将VLA/WAM作为可中断工具，在运行过程中可以中断和调整，同时协调视觉模型和动作原语。系统采用封闭代理循环，通过VLM协调异构机器人能力。

Result: VoLoAgent在RoboVoLo基准测试中显著优于单VLA/VLM或基于工具的系统。该基准专注于开放词汇长时程操作，涵盖常识、记忆/状态跟踪、复杂引用和世界知识等维度，并提供任务级成功和失败模式诊断。

Conclusion: VoLoAgent通过物理编排方法有效解决了开放词汇长时程操作的挑战，在真实机器人实验中验证了其性能优势，为复杂机器人操作任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary long-horizon manipulation requires robots to reason over flexible instructions and complex multi-object scenes while adaptively planning, executing, monitoring, and recovering from failures. We address these demands with a closed agent loop in which a VLM orchestrates heterogeneous robot capabilities as interruptible tools. Unlike in virtual AI agents, the timing of decisions, actions and tool calls is important in a physical world that does not pause for reasoning. We refer to this setting as Physical Orchestration, and propose VoLoAgent, a VLM that plans, monitors, and recovers by treating a VLA/WAM as an interruptible tool it steers mid-rollout alongside vision models and action primitives. To evaluate these long-horizon capabilities, we introduce RoboVoLo, a high-fidelity benchmark for open-vocabulary long-horizon manipulation across common sense, memory/state tracking, complex references, and world knowledge, with both task-level success and failure-mode diagnostics. Experiments show VoLoAgent substantially outperforms single VLA/VLM or tool-based systems, with validation on real-robot experiments. Project page: https://chicychen.github.io/VoLo/

</details>


### [219] [MinNav: Minimalist Navigation Using Optical Flow For Active Tiny Aerial Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07813)
*Aniket Patil,Mandeep Singh,Uday Girish Maradana,Nitin J. Sanket*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MinNav是一个基于单目相机光流及其不确定性的导航系统，能够在未知环境中处理静态/动态障碍物和未知形状间隙，无需先验知识，成功率达70%，计算量远小于深度方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单目相机导航对于微型空中机器人至关重要，因为它平衡了多功能性、成本和精度。现有方法通常需要先验知识或深度传感器，限制了在完全未知环境中的应用。

Method: 基于光流及其不确定性进行导航，利用机器人的主动性进行探索性移动来发现障碍物，无需场景组件、位置或顺序的先验知识。

Result: 在各种真实环境中的实验表明，系统在静态/动态障碍物和未知形状间隙场景中总体成功率70%，性能与深度方法相当但计算量大幅减少，可实时在微型空中机器人上运行。

Conclusion: MinNav是首个无需先验知识就能处理所有上述导航场景的单目相机解决方案，计算效率高，适合资源受限的微型空中机器人平台。

Abstract: Navigation using a monocular camera is pivotal for autonomous operation on tiny aerial robots due to their perfect balance of versatility, cost and accuracy. In this paper, we introduce MinNav, a navigation stack based on optical flow and its uncertainty to fly through a scene with static and dynamic obstacles and unknown-shaped gaps without any prior knowledge of the scene components and/or their locations/ordering. We further improve success rate by using the activeness of the robot to move around in an exploratory way to find obstacles and navigate. We successfully evaluate and demonstrate the proposed approach in many real-world experiments in various environments with static and dynamic obstacles and unknown-shaped gaps with an overall success rate of 70%. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first solution to tackle all the aforementioned navigation cases without prior knowledge using a monocular camera. Our approach is on par in performance with depth based methods with factors of magnitude less computation required and can readily run onboard tiny aerial robots. The accompanying video, supplementary material, code and dataset can be found at https://pear.wpi.edu/research/minnav.html

</details>


### [220] [Path Planning Using Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient: A Reinforcement Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07855)
*Qiang Le,Yaguang Yang,Isaac E. Weintraub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 使用DDPG强化学习方法解决威胁环境下的车辆路径规划，相比传统最优控制方法显著提升计算速度，适用于实时应用


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 威胁环境下的车辆路径规划是非线性非凸问题，传统最优控制方法计算速度过慢，无法满足实时决策需求

Method: 基于深度确定性策略梯度(DDPG)方法，将威胁建模为圆形"禁入"区域，通过包含吸引场、排斥场和控制能耗的三部分奖励函数训练智能体

Result: DDPG方法能生成有效路径且计算速度显著快于传统伪谱法最优控制方法，适合实时应用

Conclusion: 基于学习的DDPG方法在威胁环境下能提供快速有效的路径规划，为任务前规划提供关键信息，确定任务是否可从给定起点完成

Abstract: Path-planning for autonomous vehicles in threat-laden environments is a fundamental challenge because the problem is nonlinear and nonconvex even in simplest scenarios. While traditional optimal control methods can be used to find ideal paths, the computational time is often too slow for real-time decision-making. To solve this challenge, we propose a method based on Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) and model the threat as possibly multiple circular 'no-go' zones. A mission is regarded as a failure if the vehicle enters this restricted zone at any time or does not reach a neighborhood of the destination. The DDPG agent is trained through trial and error in a simulated environment, learning a direct mapping from its current state (position and heading) to a series of feasible actions that guide the agent to safely reach its destination. The reword function has three parts: (a) an attractive field centered at the final destination, (b) some repulsive fields centered at the origins of circular obstacles, and (c) a penalty of control energy consumption (the magnitude of heading change) that indirectly in favor for straight path. The DDPG trains the agent using these incentives to find the largest possible set of starting points wherein a safe path to the destination is guaranteed. This provides critical information for mission planning, showing beforehand whether a task is achievable from a given starting point, assisting pre-mission planning activities. The approach is validated in simulation. A comparison between the DDPG method and a traditional optimal control (pseudo-spectral) method is carried out. The results show that the learning-based agent produces effective paths while being significantly faster, making it a better fit for real-time applications.

</details>


### [221] [End-to-End Control of a Powered Knee-Ankle Prosthesis Towards Unified, Tuning-Free Assistance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07902)
*John Shim,Christoph Nuesslein,Sixu Zhou,Hanjun kim,Kinsey Herrin,Aaron Young*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发了一种基于时序卷积网络的端到端假肢控制器，无需意图分类器和特定对象调优，能够实时估计连续执行器信号，在多地形环境中实现自适应辅助。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统动力假肢依赖需要大量手动调优和显式模式分类的阻抗控制器，这限制了其在实际应用中的适应性和易用性。

Method: 使用时序卷积网络训练端到端假肢控制器，基于18名经股截肢者的多地形数据集，实时部署在五种运动模式下，通过机载传感器估计连续执行器信号。

Result: 在平地行走中成功复现了踝关节峰值扭矩随步行速度的变化规律；在坡道上升时控制器能根据坡度调整膝关节预屈曲角度；在坡道下降时增加了膝关节阻力矩；在楼梯上下时能生成无缝过渡动作，即使训练数据仅包含单侧肢体领先序列。

Conclusion: 该研究为端到端控制提供了初步证据，表明无需特定对象调优即可实现统一、模式自适应的假肢辅助，有望简化假肢控制并提高适应性。

Abstract: Powered prostheses conventionally rely on impedance controllers that require extensive manual tuning and explicit mode classification. In this work, we present real-time deployment of an end-to-end prosthesis controller that estimates continuous actuator signals from onboard sensors, eliminating the need for intent classifiers and subject-specific tuning. Temporal Convolutional Networks were trained on a multi-terrain dataset from 18 individuals with transfemoral amputation and deployed in real time across five locomotion modes. Four participants (three able-bodied, one with transfemoral amputation) ambulated across level ground, ramp ascent and descent, and stair ascent and descent. During level walking, the deployed controller reproduced the training-data scaling of peak ankle torque with walking speed (deployed 0.85 Nm/kg per m/s, p = 0.001; training 0.96 Nm/kg per m/s, 95% CI [0.42, 1.50], p = 0.002), after excluding one outlier traced to atypical prosthesis loading. During ramp ascent, the controller scaled knee pre-flexion with grade (deployed 2.92 deg/deg, p = 0.027; training 3.30 deg/deg, 95% CI [1.83, 4.77], p < 0.001). During ramp descent, the controller increased resistive knee torque relative to level walking (deployed +0.16 Nm/kg, p < 0.001; training +0.16 Nm/kg, p = 0.008). Seamless stair transitions were generated for both intact- and prosthetic-side-leading sequences in ascent and descent, despite the training data containing only one limb-leading sequence. These results provide initial evidence towards end-to-end control that can provide unified, mode-adaptive prosthetic assistance without subject-specific tuning.

</details>


### [222] [X-OP: Cross-Morphology Whole-Body Teleoperation via MPC Retargeting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07934)
*Jen-Wei Wang,Sarthak Kaingade,Andrea Tagliabue,Nicholas Morozovsky*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于单XR设备的层次化全身遥操作框架，通过MPC运动重定向实现跨机器人形态的通用控制，无需针对特定机器人重新训练策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有全身遥操作方法依赖外骨骼套装或多摄像头设置，成本高、复杂度大、环境限制多。基于单XR设备的端到端强化学习方法虽然部分解决了这些问题，但仍需要针对特定机器人重新训练，容易发生分布外故障，且运动重定向忽略动态可行性。

Method: 提出层次化全身遥操作框架：1) 基于MPC的运动重定向器，联合优化操作者意图对齐和机器人动态可行性；2) 状态同步方法处理噪声测量和接触敏感性；3) 集成SLAM全局位姿反馈减少长期漂移。

Result: 仿真实验中，人形机器人完成任务时间降低30%以上，功耗降低20%；移动机械臂实现零碰撞。真实世界实验验证了方法的有效性和灵活性，成功在两个平台上部署并允许用户根据偏好调整遥操作行为。

Conclusion: 该即插即用框架为全身机器人遥操作提供了可扩展、形态无关的解决方案，支持实时行为定制，具有广泛的平台适用性。

Abstract: Whole-body teleoperation is essential for scalable robot data collection in loco-manipulation tasks, yet existing approaches relying on exoskeleton suits or multi-camera setups impose prohibitive cost, complexity, and environmental constraints. Recent methods using a single extended reality (XR) device with end-to-end reinforcement learning policies partially address these limitations but require robot-specific retraining, suffer from out-of-distribution failures, and rely on motion retargeting that neglects dynamic feasibility. We propose a hierarchical whole-body teleoperation framework driven by a single XR device that generalizes across diverse robot morphologies without retraining robot-specific policies. A Model Predictive Control (MPC)-based motion retargeter jointly optimizes alignment with the operator's intent and the robot's dynamic feasibility, generating optimal commands for existing low-level controllers. To ensure robust online execution, we introduce a state synchronization method that resets the simulator state at each MPC step to handle noisy real-world measurements and contact sensitivity, and integrate SLAM-based global pose feedback to mitigate long-term drift. Simulation results show higher success rates on whole-body control tasks for both a humanoid (over 30% lower completion time and 20% lower power consumption) and a mobile manipulator (zero collisions) compared to baselines. Real-world experiments further validate the effectiveness and flexibility of our method, demonstrating the successful deployment of the proposed retargeter on both platforms for whole-body control tasks and the ease of allowing users to adjust teleoperation behavior based on their preferences. This plug-and-play framework offers a scalable, morphology-agnostic solution for whole-body robot teleoperation, enabling real-time behavioral customization and broad applicability across platforms.

</details>


### [223] [PRISM: PRior-guided Imagination Sampling in world Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07974)
*Yuhai Wang,Jiawei Xia,Rongxuan Zhou,Xiao Hu,Yongliang Shi,Jing Du,Yang Ye*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PRISM框架通过从世界模型自身提取动作先验，指导模型预测控制的搜索过程，显著提升连续控制任务的性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于世界模型的规划器在生成候选动作时通常随机搜索或仅用专家演示初始化采样均值，忽略了专家的状态条件置信度。需要鲁棒的动作先验来指导搜索，但当前方法依赖独立的视觉编码器或大规模视觉语言模型，导致架构臃肿

Method: PRISM在标准JEPA风格潜世界模型基础上，附加轻量级MLP到其冻结编码器来预测状态条件高斯先验。规划时通过精度加权的Product-of-Gaussians更新将先验融合到规划器的采样分布中，实现参数免费、闭式集成

Result: 在Cube任务上比基于世界模型的MPC提升35个百分点成功率，在PushT任务上提升32个百分点，且不引入显著推理开销

Conclusion: 从世界模型自身学习到的表示中提取动作先验是可行的，无需额外架构复杂性。PRISM通过简单而有效的先验集成机制显著提升了基于世界模型的规划性能

Abstract: A learned world model provides a powerful physical intuition for evaluating future states. But its effectiveness in continuous control also depends critically on how candidate actions are generated for model-based planning. Rather than solely asking how accurately a model can simulate the future, we ask: which candidate actions are worth evaluating in the first place? Existing planners typically search arbitrarily or use expert demonstrations only to initialize a sampling mean, discarding the expert's state-conditioned confidence. Properly guiding this search requires a robust action prior, yet current approaches often rely on independent visual encoders or large-scale VLMs to obtain one. We argue that this architectural bloat is unnecessary: the exact same data - and the learned representations of the world model itself - inherently encode the agent's action intuition. We introduce PRISM, a task-agnostic framework that extracts both from a single dataset while maintaining strict architectural simplicity. Building on a standard JEPA-style latent world model, PRISM attaches a lightweight MLP directly to its frozen encoder to predict a state-conditioned Gaussian prior. At plan time, PRISM fuses this prior into the planner's sampling distribution via a precision-weighted Product-of-Gaussians update. This parameter-free, closed-form integration steers the sampling process, making the prior confident where it is and ceding control where it is not. PRISM improves success rates by 35 percentage points over vanilla world-model-based MPC on Cube and 32 percentage points on PushT, without introducing significant inference overhead.

</details>


### [224] [Q-VGM: Q-Guided Value-Gradient Matching for Flow-Matching VLA Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08015)
*Ziqian Wang,Jiayu Sun,Xingjian Mao,Minqian Wang,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Q-VGM是一种离策略强化学习方法，通过价值梯度匹配改进流匹配视觉语言动作策略，无需动作似然或通过去噪链反向传播，在多个机器人任务上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微调流匹配视觉语言动作策略时，有效利用价值函数的一阶梯度信息存在挑战：直接通过多步去噪过程反向传播数值不稳定，而策略梯度方法所需的动作似然在迭代去噪下不可用。

Method: 提出Q-VGM，利用VGG-Flow的价值梯度视角，将价值梯度转化为去噪时间价值梯度场而非不稳定的端到端目标。使用基于紧凑RLT特征的动作敏感Cal-QL集成批评家，无需动作似然或通过去噪链反向传播，在固定回放缓冲区上操作。

Result: 在LIBERO上平均成功率从75.0%提升至92.5%；RoboTwin 2.0上从76.4%提升至87.2%；两个真实机器人桌面任务上从40.0%提升至67.5%，在所有三个设置中均优于相同骨干、相同批评家的基线方法。

Conclusion: Q-VGM提供了一种实用的少样本初始化后学习经验范式，从少量监督微调的视觉语言动作策略开始，利用自生成数据显著提升任务性能，无需额外专家监督，解决了流匹配策略微调的长期挑战。

Abstract: We propose Q-Guided Value-Gradient Matching (Q-VGM), an off-policy reinforcement learning (RL) method that tackles a long-standing challenge in fine-tuning flow-matching vision-language-action (VLA) policies: efficiently improving an expressive flow-matching action expert with respect to a learned Q-function. Effective improvement must exploit the first-order (gradient) information of the critic, but this is difficult for flow policies, because directly back-propagating the value through their multi-step denoising process is numerically unstable at VLA scale, while the tractable action likelihoods required by policy-gradient methods are unavailable under iterative denoising. Existing value-based methods either backpropagate through the full denoising chain, use the critic only at test time without updating the policy, or distill critic-improved actions as terminal labels without supervising the velocity field. Q-VGM sidesteps these issues by leveraging VGG-Flow, a value-gradient view of flow alignment in generative modeling that transforms value gradient into a denoising-time value-gradient field rather than an unstable end-to-end objective. This requires no action likelihoods and no backpropagation through the denoising chain, and operates on a fixed replay buffer. The critic is an action-sensitive Cal-QL ensemble over compact RLT features with per-layer action injection. Q-VGM enables a practical few-shot initialization then learn-from-experience paradigm: starting from a few-shot-SFT pi0.5 VLA, the method leverages self-generated rollout data to substantially improve task performance without additional expert supervision. On LIBERO, Q-VGM raises the average success rate from 75.0% to 92.5%; on RoboTwin 2.0, from 76.4% to 87.2%; and on two real-robot tabletop tasks, from 40.0% to 67.5%, outperforming all same-backbone, same-critic baselines across all three settings.

</details>


### [225] [IntentNav: Learning Spatial-Visual Object Navigation from Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08029)
*Yuxin Cai,Zongtai Li,Maonan Wang,Muyi Bao,Haokun Zhu,Ruofei Bai,Ding Zhao,Zirui Li,Wenshan Wang,Wei-Yun Yau,Ji Zhang,Chen Lv*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: IntentNav 是一个空间视觉模仿框架，通过从人类演示中学习，实现类人的物体导航策略。它使用基于前沿的人类意图标注来推断高级搜索意图，构建空间视觉候选空间，并训练视觉语言模型策略来选择候选，实现零样本跨机器人平台迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物体导航需要机器人在未知环境中搜索未观测到的目标，在部分可观测性下决定下一步探索位置。当前方法缺乏类人探索能力，无法像人类一样选择性探测有视觉前景的前沿区域，同时利用空间记忆避免重复访问。

Method: 1. 前沿人类意图标注：通过前瞻人类演示，标注最能解释演示者未来搜索方向的前沿区域；2. 构建空间视觉候选空间：BEV记忆跟踪已探索区域、未探索前沿和轨迹历史，自我中心视觉记忆提供每个候选的语义线索；3. 训练VLM策略：使用意图对齐目标，鼓励一致且类人的探索，从这些基础候选中选择。

Result: 在MP3D、HM3D-v1和HM3D-v2物体导航基准测试中达到最先进性能。提出的候选级导航接口无需进一步VLM微调，即可零样本迁移到轮式、四足和人形机器人。

Conclusion: IntentNav通过模仿人类探索行为，实现了高效的物体导航。其空间视觉候选表示和意图对齐训练方法能够学习类人搜索策略，并具有强大的跨平台泛化能力。

Abstract: Object navigation requires a robot to search for an unobserved target in an unknown environment by deciding where to explore next under partial observability. Effective search resembles human-like exploration: selectively probing visually promising frontiers while relying on spatial memory to avoid redundant revisits. We propose IntentNav, a spatial-visual imitation framework that learns human-like ObjectNav policies from human demonstrations. To infer high-level search intent from low-level human actions, we introduce Frontier-based Human-Intent Labeling, which looks ahead in human demonstrations and labels the frontier that best explains the demonstrator's future search direction. We construct a spatial-visual candidate space, where BEV memory tracks explored regions, unexplored frontiers, and trajectory history, while egocentric visual memory provides semantic cues for each candidate. A VLM policy is trained to select among these grounded candidates, using Intent-Aligned Objective to encourage consistent and human-like exploration. IntentNav achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MP3D, HM3D-v1 and HM3D-v2 ObjectNav benchmarks. The proposed candidate-level navigation interface transfers zero-shot to wheeled, quadruped, and humanoid robots without further VLM fine-tuning. \href{https://anonymous.4open.science/w/IntentNav/}{Project page}.

</details>


### [226] [MuJoCo-Drones-Gym: A GPU-Accelerated Multi-Drone Simulator for Control and Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08039)
*Manan Tayal*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MuJoCo-Drones-Gym是一个基于MuJoCo物理引擎的开源多无人机Gymnasium环境，支持任意数量的Crazyflie 2.x纳米四旋翼，提供模块化API选择物理模型、动作接口和观测空间，包含七个任务环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有四旋翼学习环境在物理保真度、多智能体支持和现代深度强化学习管道所需吞吐量之间存在权衡。需要开发一个既能保持高物理精度，又能支持多智能体且具有高吞吐量的仿真环境。

Method: 基于MuJoCo物理引擎构建Gymnasium兼容的多无人机环境，支持模块化API：1)物理模型选择（刚体MuJoCo、显式Python动力学、地面效应等）；2)动作接口选择（电机RPM、归一化推力、速度设定点等）；3)观测空间选择（运动状态向量、RGB/深度/分割相机等）。提供PettingZoo ParallelEnv包装器实现多智能体强化学习。

Result: 开发了包含七个任务环境的完整套件：悬停、速度跟踪、多无人机悬停、航点导航、编队飞行、门框竞速和通用多智能体模板。相比gym-pybullet-drones项目，MuJoCo-Drones-Gym利用了MuJoCo在接触处理、渲染和并行化方面的改进优势。

Conclusion: MuJoCo-Drones-Gym提供了一个灵活、高保真且高效的多无人机学习环境，解决了现有环境在物理精度、多智能体支持和吞吐量之间的权衡问题，为无人机控制算法开发和强化学习策略训练提供了强大工具。

Abstract: Robotic simulators are a cornerstone of modern research in aerial robotics, serving both as a vehicle for the development of new control algorithms and as the data source for training reinforcement learning (RL) policies. Yet, existing quadcopter learning environments often face a trade-off between physical fidelity, multi-agent support, and the throughput required by modern deep RL pipelines. In this paper, we present MuJoCo-Drones-Gym, an open-source Gymnasium-compatible multi-drone environment built on top of the MuJoCo physics engine. MuJoCo-Drones-Gym supports an arbitrary number of Bitcraze Crazyflie 2.x nano-quadcopters and exposes a modular API for selecting (i)~the physics model (rigid-body MuJoCo, explicit Python dynamics, or any subset of ground effect, blade drag, and inter-drone downwash), (ii)~the action interface (per-motor RPMs, collective normalized thrust, velocity setpoints, or PID waypoint commands), and (iii)~the observation space (kinematic state vectors, RGB / depth / segmentation cameras, or neighbourhood adjacency information). A PettingZoo ParallelEnv wrapper enables drop-in multi-agent reinforcement learning, while a suite of seven task environments, hover, velocity tracking, multi-drone hover, waypoint navigation, formation flight, gate racing, and a generic multi-agent template, demonstrates the breadth of the interface. We describe the environment design, the underlying physics and quadcopter dynamics, and illustrate its use through control and learning examples that mirror those of the closely related gym-pybullet-drones project, while taking advantage of MuJoCo's improved contact handling, rendering, and parallelizability.

</details>


### [227] [EgoAERO: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from a Single Egocentric Video without Object Assets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08057)
*Yichen Niu,Haoran Lv,Xinrui Zhang,Xueyao Wan,Shiyu Gao,Ying Ai,Hui Xu,Yongqi Hu,Hengyi Zhang,Yang Xie,Zhaxizhuoma,Yue Zhao,Zhenshan Bing,Yan Ding,Jianxing Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EgoAERO：首个从单视角RGB-D人类演示中学习灵巧操作的无资产框架，通过无资产物体跟踪重建、自适应接触优化和两阶段残差学习实现机器人策略转换


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自我中心RGB-D视频数据难以用于机器人学习，因为缺乏物体姿态、几何和接触信息，且需要预扫描物体资产。需要无需物体资产的灵巧操作学习框架。

Method: 1) 无资产物体跟踪与重建；2) 自我运动补偿；3) 自适应接触优化重建接触一致的手-物体轨迹；4) 两阶段残差学习将轨迹转换为机器人策略；5) 在线质量评估机制

Result: 构建了大规模EgoDex-R数据集（430万RGB-D帧），仿真和真实实验表明EgoAERO能实现单演示灵巧操作，在HOI4D上性能接近基于CAD的重建方法

Conclusion: EgoAERO是首个无需物体资产、从单视角RGB-D人类演示学习灵巧操作的有效框架，在性能接近基于CAD方法的同时降低了数据要求

Abstract: Egocentric RGB-D videos offer a natural source of human dexterous manipulation demonstrations, but existing data is difficult to use for robot learning because object pose, geometry, and contact information are often missing or require pre-scanned object assets. We present EgoAERO, the first framework that learns dexterous manipulation from a single egocentric RGB-D human demonstration without object assets. EgoAERO reconstructs contact-consistent hand-object trajectories through asset-free object tracking and reconstruction, ego motion compensation, and adaptive contact optimization, then converts them into robot policies using two-stage residual learning. We further introduce an online quality assessment mechanism and construct EgoDex-R, a large-scale egocentric dataset with 4.3M RGB-D frames for dexterous policy learning. Simulation and real-world experiments show that EgoAERO enables single-demonstration dexterous manipulation and achieves downstream performance close to CAD-based reconstructions on HOI4D.

</details>


### [228] [Perceptive Behavior Foundation Model: Adapting Human Motion Priors to Robot-Centric Terrain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08059)
*Zifan Wang,Yizhao Li,Teli Ma,Qiang Zhang,Yudong Fan,Hao Xu,Shuo Yang,Junwei Liang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出感知行为基础模型（Perceptive BFM），通过机器人感知将人体运动先验与地形适应相结合，解决现有运动中心基础策略在机器人环境与演示者环境不同时的物理兼容性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的人形机器人行为基础模型假设参考运动已经与机器人环境物理兼容，但当演示者、操作者和机器人处于不同环境时，这种假设不成立。人体运动可能指定了预期行为，但未考虑机器人局部地形所需的落脚点、间隙、身体高度或接触时机。

Method: 1. 提出感知行为基础模型（Perceptive BFM），通过局部地形观测来适应接触、姿态和时机；2. 开发地形一致参考合成（TCRS），将面向运动的人体运动片段转化为地形一致的参考；3. 训练盲适应参考教师模型，并通过目标帧动作对齐将地形一致行为转移到部署的原始参考学生模型；4. 学生模型采用身份门控Transformer跟踪器，地形特征通过残差路径输入，初始时保留运动跟踪先验，训练后仅在需要时产生局部修正。

Result: 论文提出了一个完整的地形感知人形机器人控制框架，能够将人体运动先验与机器人局部地形感知相结合，生成适应地形的行为策略。

Conclusion: Perceptive BFM通过将人体运动先验与机器人中心感知相结合，解决了人形机器人在不同地形环境中的行为适应问题，为地形感知的人形控制提供了新框架。

Abstract: Humanoid behavior foundation models aim to acquire reusable whole-body control policies from broad human motion priors, enabling a single controller to produce diverse and expressive behaviors. However, existing motion-centric foundation policies largely assume that the reference motion is already physically compatible with the robot's surroundings. This assumption breaks when the demonstrator, operator, and robot inhabit different environments: a human motion may specify the intended behavior, but not the footholds, clearance, body height, or contact timing required by the robot's local terrain. We introduce \emph{Perceptive Behavior Foundation Model} (Perceptive BFM), a terrain-aware humanoid control framework that grounds human motion priors in robot-centric perception. The model preserves raw kinematic motion references as the behavioral interface, while using local terrain observations to adapt contacts, posture, and timing. To provide scalable terrain supervision, we develop \emph{terrain-conformal reference synthesis} (TCRS), which converts locomotion-oriented human motion clips into terrain-consistent references through contact-aware foothold construction, foot-geometry-aware swing optimization, support-aware root reconstruction, collision repair, and multi-point inverse kinematics. We then train a blind adapted-reference teacher and transfer its terrain-conformal behavior to a deployed raw-reference student through target-frame action alignment. The student is an identity-gated Transformer tracker whose terrain features enter through residual pathways initialized to preserve the motion-tracking prior and trained to produce local corrections only when needed.

</details>


### [229] [Cooperative Long Rope Skipping via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08064)
*Zihao Wang,Shijie Peng,Kerui Wu,Yu Huang,Ruiqi Xue,Dong Liu,Tian Xu,Lei Yuan,Yang Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 多智能体强化学习框架Marope用于人形机器人协同长绳跳绳，通过分层策略和多样化玩家行为训练，在仿真和真实机器人上实现了高效稳定的绳操和鲁棒协作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长绳跳绳需要两名摇绳者协同配合并适应不同玩家的跳跃节奏，这对人形机器人来说是一个有意义但具有挑战性的任务。现有的人形机器人运动方法主要针对单智能体和非交互场景，而需要多参与者精确协调的任务场景尚未充分探索。

Method: 提出Marope多智能体强化学习框架，采用分层强化学习结构：底层通过MARL学习去中心化的摇绳策略，上层训练集中式调度策略来协调底层策略的执行。为提升对不同玩家行为风格的泛化能力，在协同训练中引入了多样化的跳跃策略。

Result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上的仿真和真实世界实验表明，Marope优于多种基线方法，实现了更高效稳定的绳操操作，以及与不同玩家更鲁棒和自适应的协作。

Conclusion: Marope框架成功解决了人形机器人在长绳跳绳这一需要多智能体精确协调的任务，展示了多智能体强化学习在复杂人形机器人协同运动中的潜力。

Abstract: Humans exhibit remarkable motor agility, enabling a wide range of dynamic skills such as running and jumping, which highlights the great potential of humanoid robots for athletic locomotion. Among athletic sports, long rope skipping requires two rope turners to cooperatively swing the rope while adapting to a player under different jumping rhythms, making it a meaningful yet challenging task for humanoid robots. Although existing methods for humanoid sports have achieved success in single-agent and interaction-free settings, such as running, dancing, and parkour, task scenarios that require precise coordination among multiple participants remain largely unexplored. To this end, we propose Marope, a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for cooperative long rope skipping with multiple humanoid robots. Specifically, Marope adopts a hierarchical reinforcement learning framework for policy training. At the lower level, it learns decentralized rope manipulation policies through MARL, while at the upper level, a centralized scheduling policy is trained to coordinate the execution of the lower-level policies. To improve generalization across different player behavioral styles, Marope further incorporates diverse jumping policies into cooperative game training. We evaluate our approach on Unitree G1 humanoid robots in both simulation and real-world settings. Experimental results demonstrate that Marope outperforms various baselines, achieving more efficient and stable rope manipulation as well as more robust and adaptable cooperation with varied players.

</details>


### [230] [vla.cpp: A Unified Inference Runtime for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08094)
*Khanh D. Nguyen,Hung T. Ho,Chinh T. Nguyen,Thanh Q. Duong,Linh D. Le,Duy M. H. Nguyen,Vien A. Ngo,An T. Le*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: vla.cpp是一个基于llama.cpp构建的便携C++推理运行时，专为机器人硬件部署Vision-Language-Action策略而设计，支持多种架构，在资源受限设备上高效运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA策略通常基于Python/PyTorch堆栈，需要工作站级GPU，与机器人实际运行的硬件不匹配，需要更轻量、便携的部署方案。

Method: 基于llama.cpp构建C++推理运行时，支持流匹配和扩散VLA推理模式，单运行时服务7种架构，模型打包为自包含包，采用IMMA阶梯GEMM优化计算。

Result: 在LIBERO-Object上匹配SOTA检查点（200个episode中仅差1个），BitVLA在1.3GiB内存下达到100%成功率，同一包在三个硬件层级上无需修改运行，IMMA GEMM将BitVLA每步延迟降低4.5倍。

Conclusion: vla.cpp为VLA策略提供了高效、便携的部署方案，证明批量1的VLA推理是计算受限的，优化计算利用率比带宽更重要，能在资源受限的机器人硬件上有效运行。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies are typically shipped as Python/PyTorch stacks that assume a workstation-class GPU, a mismatch for the hardware on which robots actually run. We present vla.cpp, a portable C++ inference runtime built on llama.cpp. To our knowledge, it is the first ggml-class engine to natively serve the flow-matching and diffusion VLA inference pattern, in which a cached vision-language prefix is consumed by a cross-attending action expert integrated over several solver steps. A single runtime serves seven architectures spanning five backbone and four action-head families behind one request/response protocol, with each model packaged as a self-contained bundle. On LIBERO-Object, the engine matches a state-of-the-art checkpoint to within one episode out of 200, and runs BitVLA at 100% success in 1.3 GiB of memory. The same bundle runs unchanged across three hardware tiers, from a consumer GPU down to an 8 GB embedded module. A cross-hardware roofline analysis shows that batch-1 VLA inference is compute-bound, so utilization rather than bandwidth is the deployment lever; an IMMA ladder GEMM derived from this analysis cuts BitVLA per-step latency by 4.5x. We then frame an on-robot stress test on an ALOHA arm that isolates the latency constraint under which a learned VLA must replan against a moving target on the hardware it was trained for. Code, demo videos, and the reproducible benchmark scaffold are available at https://fai-modelopt-tech.github.io/vla-cpp.github.io/.

</details>


### [231] [Cybernetic Android Avatar "Yui": System Integration, Field Deployment, and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08099)
*Kaoruko Shinkawa,Mizuki Nakajima,Taisei Mogi,Yoshihiro Nakata*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Yui是一个全身赛博格安卓机器人化身，通过沉浸式远程操作实现共享物理空间感和丰富的非语言信号传递，在真实世界部署中验证了其可用性和社交效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 远程通信技术虽然广泛应用，但在支持共享物理空间感和传递丰富非语言线索方面仍面临挑战，特别是在社交互动场景中。

Method: 开发了"Yui"全身赛博格安卓机器人化身，具有55个自由度，结合了安卓头部、面部表情和视线控制、上半身和手臂运动、手部驱动以及移动平台，可通过头戴式显示器的沉浸模式或网络摄像头的桌面模式进行操作。

Result: 在三个真实世界部署中评估：大阪世博会长期公开展示（两个单元累计约1131小时运行），远程教育交流，以及公众互动研究。操作者和对话者都对共在感和使用意愿有积极评价，对话者对人相似度和情感意图传递给予正面评价。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明系统对普通操作者具有可用性，但在精确可控性方面仍有改进空间，为可社会部署的全身安卓机器人化身提供了现场证据和设计启示。

Abstract: Remote communication technologies have become widely used; however, supporting a sense of shared physical space and conveying rich non-verbal cues remain challenging in many social interaction scenarios. This study presents "Yui," a full-body cybernetic android avatar designed to integrate operator-side immersive teleoperation with interlocutor-side human-like social signaling. Yui combines a 55-degrees of freedom full-body mechanism with a previously developed android head, facial expression and gaze control, upper-body and arm motion, hand actuation, and a mobile platform. It can be operated through either the immersive mode using a head mounted display-based interface or desktop mode using a webcam-based interface. We evaluated the system through three real-world deployments: a long-term public exhibition at Expo 2025 in Osaka, Kansai, Japan; a remote educational exchange between elementary school students; and a public interaction study with general participants. During the Expo deployment, two units accumulated approximately 1131 h of operation, demonstrating both operational feasibility and maintenance challenges. In the public study, both operators and interlocutors reported positive impressions of co-presence and willingness to use the system. Interlocutors also rated the avatar positively in terms of human likeness and the transmission of emotions and intentions. The results indicate usability for general operators while suggesting room for improvement in precise controllability. These findings provide field-derived evidence and design implications for socially deployable full-body android avatars.

</details>


### [232] [Continual Quadruped Robots Coordination via Semantic Skill Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08102)
*Daoqing Wang,Yuchen Xiao,Weixuan Huang,Zhilong Zhang,Shenghua Wan,Meng Li,Lei Yuan,Yang Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Conquer是一个语义技能库框架，用于多四足机器人协调的持续学习，通过检索-适应-更新过程解决开放持续学习中的任务遗忘问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多四足机器人协调方法通常针对预定义任务族，依赖多智能体强化学习训练任务特定策略，但在开放持续学习场景中难以避免灾难性遗忘，无法在获取新技能的同时重用已有技能。

Method: 提出Conquer框架，采用团队结构的自我-盟友-目标(SAG)骨干网络支持可变团队规模；通过任务级语义描述符检索技能库，执行后提取轨迹级语义描述符更新技能库，按语义距离组织实现持续技能积累和跨任务知识迁移。

Result: 仿真实验达到95.6%的平均成功率，表现出强正向迁移和可忽略的灾难性遗忘；在Unitree Go2机器人团队上的真实部署验证了实际可行性。

Conclusion: Conquer框架有效解决了多四足机器人协调的持续学习问题，通过语义技能库实现了技能积累和知识迁移，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Multi-quadruped coordination has attracted increasing attention due to its enhanced payload capacity, broader contact coverage, and improved adaptability to challenging tasks. Existing methods for multi-quadruped manipulation typically focus on predefined or closed task families, often relying on multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) to train task-specific coordination policies. However, such methods struggle in open-ended continual learning settings, where tasks arrive sequentially and robots are expected to acquire new coordination skills while reusing previously learned ones without catastrophic forgetting. To address this challenge, we propose Conquer, a semantic skill-library framework that formulates continual multi-quadruped coordination as a retrieve-adapt-update process. First, to accommodate varying team sizes across tasks, we design a team-structured Self-Allies-Goal (SAG) backbone that supports variable-cardinality robot teams by explicitly modeling each robot's own state, teammate context, and task goal. For each incoming task, Conquer constructs a task-level semantic descriptor from pre-execution information and retrieves a relevant skill from the library for adaptation. After successful execution, Conquer updates the skill library by extracting trajectory-level semantic descriptors and organizing them according to semantic distance, thereby enabling continual skill accumulation and cross-task knowledge transfer. Simulation experiments show that Conquer achieves a final average success rate of 95.6%, demonstrating strong forward transfer and negligible catastrophic forgetting. Real-world rollouts on Unitree Go2 teams further validate the deployment feasibility of Conquer for practical multi-quadruped coordination. Simulation and real-robot demonstration videos are available at: https://conquer-project.pages.dev/.

</details>


### [233] [Revisiting Articulated Parts Perception in Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08103)
*Xiaoqian Wu,Yejie Guo,Xiaoyang Chen,Lixin Yang,Cewu Lu,Yong-Lu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的铰接部件表示方法——几何主结构（GPS），通过结合VR设备实现高效标注，并开发了通用GPS模型用于机器人操作，在无需领域微调的情况下取得了73%的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前铰接部件感知存在两种主要方法：基于姿态的表示需要高人工成本，而基于可供性的方法虽然无需额外人工但数据质量低。需要一种既能平衡可扩展性又能保证质量的新表示方法。

Method: 提出几何主结构（GPS）作为铰接部件几何结构的抽象表示。结合便携式VR设备开发了VR-GPS系统，只需一分钟即可标注一个物体序列。使用单张RGB-D图像作为输入训练通用GPS模型，并基于GPS预测部署启发式策略进行物体操作。

Result: 收集了6个部件类别、234个物体的41K帧数据。训练的GPS模型在9个物体、270个初始状态下，无需领域微调即达到73%的操作成功率。

Conclusion: GPS表示方法在铰接部件感知的质量和可扩展性之间取得了良好平衡，VR-GPS系统提供了高效的标注方案，通用GPS模型在机器人操作任务中表现出良好的泛化能力。

Abstract: We are surrounded by various objects with movable, articulated parts, e.g., box, handle, door. An accurate and generalizable perception of articulated parts is essential to enhance robotic manipulation capabilities. Building on this need, recent efforts in articulated parts perception have followed two main directions: One line of work uses pose-based representation, which requires high manual cost; in parallel, affordance-based methods extract future object motion from point tracking without additional manual efforts, but suffer from low-quality data. In this paper, we propose a new representation of articulated parts, Geometric Primary Structure (GPS), an abstraction of the part geometry structure to balance scalability and quality. For efficient and scalable data collection, GPS is integrated with a portable Virtual Reality (VR) device and requires only one minute to annotate one object sequence. This direct human annotation provides higher quality than the estimated affordance. With this efficient VR-GPS system, we collect 41K frames for 234 objects across six part classes, and train a generalizable GPS model with a single RGB-D object image as input. For object manipulation, we deploy a heuristic policy based on GPS prediction. Without any in-domain fine-tuning, our method achieves an 73% success rate, covering 270 initial states for 9 objects. Our code, data and reusable tool are available at https://enlighten0707.github.io/gps.

</details>


### [234] [Reinforcement learning in linear embedding space unlocks generalizable control across soft robot configurations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08104)
*Xinglong Zhang,Cong Li,Hangjie Mo,Yue Jiang,Xin Xu,Wei Jiang,Zhenshan Bing,Yihe Yang,Xiaojian Li,Yueneng Yang,Huimin Lu,Ling-li Zeng,Alois Knoll,Dewen Hu,Li Wen,Wei Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于共享线性Koopman嵌入空间的通用控制框架，使软体机器人能够在不同配置间快速适应，无需针对每种配置重新训练控制策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软体机器人虽然材料结构设计进步显著，但缺乏通用控制框架，现有控制器局限于固定配置，需要针对每种新配置重新建模和设计策略，限制了实际应用。

Method: 通过强化学习在共享线性Koopman嵌入空间中学习控制策略，将机器人动力学编码到该嵌入空间，使控制策略与具体形态解耦，实现实时、无模型的策略适应。

Result: 在33种不同机器人配置上验证，实现了跨配置传输样本减少75倍，在高速运动、重负载、多执行器故障下保持鲁棒性能，并实现了软体机器人领域前所未有的实际技能。

Conclusion: 建立了一个统一且可适应的软体机器人控制范式，将机械可重构性与控制灵活性相结合，为复杂物理系统的通用控制提供了更广泛的见解。

Abstract: Soft-bodied organisms such as octopuses and elephant trunks exhibit remarkable morphological adaptability, dynamically reconfiguring body shape and stiffness, and flexibly adjusting their control strategies to enable versatile behaviors. Inspired by these biological systems, various soft robots have emerged in recent decades, featuring diverse materials, stiffnesses, and morphologies tailored to specific tasks. Despite substantial advances in the materials and structural designs of soft robots, developing a generalizable control framework capable of rapid adaptation across diverse configurations remains a long-standing challenge. Existing controllers are limited to fixed configurations, demanding laborious configuration-specific remodelling and policy redesign for new configurations. Here, we introduce a generalizable control system that enables rapid adaptation across diverse soft robot configurations via reinforcement learning in a shared linear Koopman embedding space. By encoding robot dynamics into this embedding space, our method decouples control policies from specific morphologies, allowing real-time, model-free policy adaptation across diverse configurations without retraining from scratch. We validate our system across 33 distinct robot configurations. Our system achieves a 75 times reduction in transfer samples across configurations, while sustaining robust performance under high-speed motion, heavy payloads, and multiactuator faults, and achieving real-world skills previously unattainable in soft robotics. This work establishes a unified and adaptable control paradigm for diverse soft robot configurations, bridging mechanical reconfigurability with control flexibility, and may offer broader insights for generalizable control in complex physical systems.

</details>


### [235] [Ego-Pi: VLA Fine-Tuning for Ego-Centric Human and Robot Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08107)
*Ji Woong Kim,Ke Wang,Zipeng Fu,Sirui Chen,Cong Zhao,Jeff Lai,Chelsea Finn*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文研究了如何利用人类自我中心数据来解决机器人操作的数据稀缺问题，通过跨人类和人形机器人具身的学习，使机器人能够学习新任务语义并组合现有技能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人领域面临数据稀缺的根本挑战，不像语言或视觉研究有互联网规模的数据集。人类自我中心数据更容易收集、范围更广、规模更大，为解决机器人操作数据稀缺问题提供了有前景的路径

Method: 以π₀.₅模型为基础，研究跨人类和人形机器人具身（配备灵巧五指手）学习的关键设计选择，探索如何利用人类数据训练机器人

Result: 研究表明，人类数据使机器人能够学习新的任务语义，并将现有技能组合成新的行为，而不需要对应的机器人数据

Conclusion: 利用人类自我中心数据是解决机器人操作数据稀缺问题的有效途径，能够使机器人获得新的能力并组合技能，为机器人学习提供了新的可能性

Abstract: Robotics faces a fundamental challenge of data scarcity. Unlike language or vision research, there is no internet-scale dataset for robotic manipulation. A promising path forward is to leverage egocentric human data, which can be collected more easily, with greater breadth, and at a larger scale. Towards this end, we investigate key design choices for learning across human and humanoid embodiments equipped with dexterous five-finger hands, using the $π_{0.5}$ model as a foundation. Our results show that human data enables robots to learn new task semantics and compose existing skills into novel behaviors without corresponding robot data. The paper website is here: https://egopipaper.github.io/

</details>


### [236] [Learning Predictive Control with Deep Koopman Operators for Autonomous Vehicle Motion Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08136)
*Xinglong Zhang,Yongqian Xiao,Haotian Cao,Xing Zhou,Xin Yin,Xin Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于深度Koopman算子的学习预测控制（LPC）框架，用于在非凸约束下实现高效实时运动规划，通过深度Koopman预测器将非线性车辆动力学提升到可解释的线性可观测空间，并采用滚动时域演员-评论家学习生成闭环状态反馈策略，在安全性和计算效率方面优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统模型预测控制（MPC）在自动驾驶运动规划中需要精确模型并求解非线性非凸优化问题，实时性受限；而演员-评论家强化学习缺乏显式控制理论结构。需要一种结合两者优势的实时运动规划方法。

Method: 提出学习预测控制（LPC）框架：1）使用深度Koopman预测器将非线性不确定车辆动力学数据驱动地提升到可解释线性可观测空间；2）通过滚动时域演员-评论家学习在每个预测区间内生成闭环状态反馈策略；3）构建障碍物的凸局部代理表示并定义势场函数，将其梯度嵌入演员-评论家结构实现安全感知策略学习。

Result: 在红旗EHS3平台上进行的广泛仿真和实车实验表明，在多种避障场景中，相比CBF-MPC和LMPCC等基准方法，LPC在安全性、计算效率和驾驶舒适性方面表现优异。

Conclusion: LPC框架成功结合了MPC的预测能力和强化学习的策略学习优势，通过深度Koopman表示和滚动时域演员-评论家学习，实现了在非凸约束下的高效实时运动规划，为自动驾驶车辆提供了安全、高效且舒适的解决方案。

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used for autonomous-vehicle (AV) motion planning, but its real-time applicability is often limited by the need for accurate models and online solution of nonlinear, nonconvex optimization problems in dynamic road environments. Actor-critic reinforcement learning offers a promising alternative for online policy generation, yet its policy-learning process often lacks explicit control-theoretic structure. This article proposes a learning predictive control (LPC) framework with deep Koopman operators for efficient real-time motion planning under nonconvex constraints. To address nonlinear and uncertain vehicle dynamics, a deep-Koopman-based predictor is used to lift the system into an interpretable linear observable space in a data-driven manner. Unlike traditional MPC, which computes open-loop control sequences, the proposed LPC framework yields a closed-loop state-feedback policy within each prediction interval through receding-horizon actor-critic learning. To ensure safety under nonconvex environmental constraints, LPC constructs convex local surrogate representations of obstacles and defines corresponding potential-field functions. These functions and their gradients are directly embedded into the actor-critic structure, enabling efficient, safety-aware policy learning. Extensive simulations and real-world experiments on the HongQi-EHS3 platform demonstrate favorable performance in diverse obstacle-avoidance scenarios in terms of safety, computational efficiency, and driving comfort, compared with benchmark methods such as CBF-MPC and LMPCC.

</details>


### [237] [Vision-Guided Dual-Arm Humanoid Robotic Disassembly of End-of-Life 18650 Lithium-ion Battery Packs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08152)
*Yile Chen,Zhihao Liu,Xi Vincent Wang,Lihui Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于视觉引导的双臂机器人系统，用于在姿态不确定条件下无夹具拆卸锂离子电池组，实现单个电池的自动化分离


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着电动汽车和便携电子设备退役锂离子电池组数量激增，需要安全、灵活、可选择性拆卸到单个电池的自动化解决方案。现有机器人系统大多假设已知电池组姿态、依赖外部夹具或专用工具，无法解决姿态不确定下的无夹具电池级拆卸问题。

Method: 采用视觉引导的双臂流水线，仅使用通用平行夹爪、RGB-D传感器和预训练抓取检测器；通过"学习-过滤"感知堆栈吸收姿态不确定性，采用离散"看-动"腕部相机校正；双臂间任务中支持转移扩展有效工作空间，无需外部夹具。

Result: 系统在21个18650电池组上实现8/10的端到端成功率，电池定位均方根误差2.4mm，平均每个电池组拆卸时间6.0分钟，为工业电池回收提供了实用的无夹具解决方案。

Conclusion: 该研究提出了一种实用的无夹具构建模块，能够处理姿态不确定的电池组拆卸，为工业电池回收自动化提供了可行方案，展示了仅使用通用硬件实现复杂拆卸任务的潜力。

Abstract: The growing volume of retired lithium-ion battery packs from electric vehicles and portable electronics calls for automated disassembly that is safe, flexible, and selective down to the individual cell. Existing robotic systems, however, mostly assume known pack poses, external fixtures, or specialised tooling, leaving fixture-free cell-level disassembly under pose uncertainty largely unsolved. This paper presents a vision-guided dual-arm pipeline that disassembles a 21-cell 18650 pack from an arbitrary initial pose using only general-purpose parallel-jaw grippers, RGB-D sensing, and a pre-trained grasp detector. Pose uncertainty is absorbed by a learn-and-filter perception stack with discrete look-and-move wrist-camera corrections, while a mid-task support transfer between the two arms extends the effective workspace without any external clamp. The pipeline achieves an 8/10 end-to-end success rate, a cell-localisation root-mean-square error of $2.4$\,mm, and a mean cycle time of 6.0\,minutes per pack, providing a practical, fixture-free building block for industrial battery recycling.

</details>


### [238] [SynthICL: Scalable In-context Imitation Learning with Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08154)
*Cheng Qian,Ruomeng Fan,Yifei Ren,Yilong Wang,Edward Johns*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SynthICL是一个完全使用RGB合成数据训练上下文模仿学习(ICIL)策略的框架，通过流匹配transformer策略和子目标预测，在16个未见过的真实世界操作任务上达到79%的平均成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前上下文模仿学习(ICIL)方法在训练可泛化和可扩展的策略方面仍面临挑战，需要深度感知、精确相机标定和真实世界训练数据，限制了其实际应用。

Method: 1. 构建高保真ICIL合成数据生成流水线；2. 在合成数据集上训练流匹配transformer策略；3. 通过预测下一个子目标图像实现更精确的视觉控制。

Result: 在16个未见过的真实世界操作任务上，仅提供一个演示的情况下，SynthICL达到79%的平均成功率，优于现有方法。

Conclusion: SynthICL提供了一种更简单、可扩展的ICIL训练方法，仅需RGB合成数据，无需深度感知、相机标定或真实世界数据，在真实世界任务中表现出色。

Abstract: In-context imitation learning (ICIL) enables robots to learn new tasks from a small number of demonstrations by conditioning a pre-trained policy on task-specific examples, without retraining at test time. Despite this promise, training generalizable and scalable in-context imitation policies remains an open challenge. We present SynthICL, a scalable framework that trains ICIL policies entirely from RGB-only synthetic data. Specifically, we build a data generation pipeline to produce high-fidelity ICIL data and train a flow-matching transformer policy on the resulting dataset. SynthICL avoids the need for depth sensing, precise camera calibration, and real-world training data in prior approaches, offering a simpler and more scalable alternative. We further incorporate subgoal prediction by training the model to predict the next subgoal images, enabling more precise and visually grounded control. Evaluated on 16 unseen real-world manipulation tasks, SynthICL achieves an average success rate of 79% with only one demonstration provided at test time and outperforms prior methods. Project page: https://synth-icl.github.io

</details>


### [239] [CLASP: Language-Driven Robot Skill Selection and Composition using Task-Parameterized Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08169)
*Markus Knauer,Valentin Gieraths,Tai Mai,Samuel Bustamante,Alin Albu-Schäffer,Freek Stulp,João Silvério*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种模块化架构，结合任务参数化核化运动基元(TP-KMPs)与预训练视觉语言模型(VLMs)，实现数据高效的自然语言指令机器人任务执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：基础模型(如VLA和VLM)需要大量数据，而任务参数化模仿学习虽然数据高效但缺乏自然语言基础。需要一种既能理解自然语言指令又能保持数据效率的方法。

Method: 采用模块化架构：1) 使用TP-KMPs从2-5次示教中学习技能；2) VLM生成技能模式，描述技能参数和前提条件；3) 执行时VLM解释指令、选择技能、推理参数绑定、通过协方差加权组合创建新行为；4) 当技能不足时，系统识别能力差距并请求针对性示教，无需微调。

Result: 在7自由度机械臂上验证，在需要技能选择、组合和主动学习的场景中，成功率达到了73.3%-100%。

Conclusion: 该方法成功桥接了自然语言交互与数据效率之间的差距，通过模块化结合TP-KMPs和预训练VLMs，实现了高效的机器人技能学习与执行。

Abstract: Enabling robots to understand and execute tasks from natural language commands while maintaining data efficiency remains challenging. Foundation models such as vision-language-action (VLA) and vision-language models (VLMs) provide intuitive interaction channels but require extensive data; task-parameterized imitation learning achieves data efficiency but lacks natural language grounding. This work bridges this gap through a modular architecture combining task-parameterized kernelized movement primitives (TP-KMPs) with pretrained VLMs. During learning, skills are acquired from 2 to 5 kinesthetic demonstrations, and the VLM generates skill schemas describing each skill's parameters and preconditions. During execution, the VLM interprets commands to select skills, reason about parameter bindings, and create novel behaviors through covariance-weighted composition. When no skill or composition suffices, the system identifies capability gaps and requests targeted demonstrations, all without fine-tuning. Validation on a 7-DoF manipulator shows success rates of 73.3%-100% in scenarios requiring skill selection, composition, and active learning.

</details>


### [240] [Learning from Human Driving: A Human-in-the-Loop Online Behavior Cloning Framework for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08170)
*Yuhong Shi,Jianyi Liu,Lihang Sun,Li Li,Xudong Dong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出HiL-OBC框架，通过人机协同在线学习提升自动驾驶决策鲁棒性，在复杂交互和长尾场景中显著改善性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动自动驾驶范式在复杂交互和长尾场景中面临分布偏移和因果混淆挑战，导致缺乏人类级决策灵活性和极端条件下的安全性。

Method: 提出HiL-OBC框架：1）人类干预的政策初始化；2）贝叶斯政策适应的潜在行为建模；3）在线部署更新。设计MOBC模型，通过轻量网络架构、接管触发机制和多变体损失函数在线优化驾驶策略。

Result: 在LangAuto-Human CARLA基准测试中，通过人机协同机制优化的驾驶策略取得显著性能提升：StructNav、LFG和LMDrive的DS分别提高47.25%、31.59%和32.12%。

Conclusion: 人机协同学习能有效提升自动驾驶决策鲁棒性和整体驾驶性能，特别是在复杂交互和长尾场景中。

Abstract: With the evolution of large foundation models (LFMs), data-driven autonomous driving has made significant strides. However, existing paradigms still face severe challenges in complex interaction and long-tail scenarios due to distribution shift and causal confusion. These limitations often result in a lack of human-level decision-making flexibility and safety in extreme conditions. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a Human-in-the-Loop Online Behavior Cloning frame work (HiL-OBC) for autonomous driving, which aims to deeply integrate the cross-modal perceptual capabilities of LFMs with the high-level driving intelligence of human experts. Specifically, HiL-OBC deployment is executed through three critical phases: policy initialization with human intervention, latent behavioral modeling with Bayesian policy adaptation, and online deploy ment and updates. Furthermore, we design a Multi-modal Online Behavior Cloning (MOBC) model, which optimizes the base driving policy online through a lightweight network architecture, a takeover trigger mechanism, and a multi-variant loss function, thereby enhancing the system's decision-making robustness in complex environments. We evaluated the HiL-OBC on the LangAuto-Human CARLA benchmark. Experimental results demonstrate that the driving policies optimized via the human-in-the-loop mechanism achieve substantial performance gains: the DS of StructNav, LFG, and LMDrive increased by 47.25%, 31.59%, and 32.12%, respectively, with a simultaneous of various experimental settings and key components highlights the advantages of human-in-the-loop learning in improving decision-making robustness and overall driving performance.

</details>


### [241] [Propeller-Assisted Robust 3D Hopping Robot with Hierarchical Force Allocation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08186)
*Chuhan Zhang,Hongbo Zhang,Yanlin Chen,Yunxi Tang,Yun-Hui Liu,Mingyi Liu,Xiangyu Chu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了Pro-OMEGA2，一种螺旋桨辅助的三维单足跳跃机器人，通过分层力分配框架协调腿部接触力和螺旋桨推力，实现稳健的三维跳跃。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单足跳跃机器人虽然概念简单但动态性高且不稳定。三维跳跃难以实现，因为地面反作用力仅在短暂的支撑相可用，而飞行相机器人处于欠驱动状态。关键未解决问题是如何提高飞行相的控制能力。

Method: 提出Pro-OMEGA2机器人，采用主动3-RSR并联腿和机身安装的三旋翼辅助姿态调节。基于单刚体模型提出分层力分配框架，腿部生成主要支撑接触力矩，三旋翼提供辅助姿态调节。

Result: 室内外实验展示了持续的三维跳跃能力，包括地形转换和冲击推力的恢复，验证了在未建模接触和外部干扰下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 螺旋桨辅助为单足跳跃机器人提供了有前景的解决方案，分层力分配框架有效解决了腿部接触力和螺旋桨推力的协调挑战，实现了稳健的三维跳跃性能。

Abstract: Monopedal hopping robots are conceptually simple but highly dynamic and inherently unstable. Achieving robust 3D hopping is still difficult because ground reaction forces are available only during the short stance phase, while the robot is underactuated in flight. A key unresolved issue is how to improve flight-phase control authority. Propeller assistance provides a promising solution, but it requires careful coordination of leg-generated contact forces and propeller thrusts across stance and flight. This paper presents Pro-OMEGA2, a propeller-assisted 3D monopedal hopping robot with an active 3-RSR parallel leg and a trunk-mounted tri-rotor for auxiliary attitude regulation. To address the force coordination challenge, we propose a Hierarchical Force Allocation (HFA) framework based on a single rigid body (SRB) model. The leg generates the main stance contact wrench, while the tri-rotor provides auxiliary attitude regulation, compensating the residual attitude moment in stance and maintaining attitude during flight. Real-robot experiments in indoor and outdoor scenarios demonstrate sustained 3D hopping, including terrain transitions and impulsive push recovery, validating robustness under unmodeled contact and external disturbances.

</details>


### [242] [Agentic Neuro-Symbolic Planning and Commissioning for Human-in-the-Loop Industrial Robotics with Digital Twins](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08214)
*Zhihao Liu,Victor Nan Fernandez-Ayala,Tianyu Wang,Qiang Qin,Xi Vincent Wang,Dimos V. Dimarogonas,Lihui Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于工业机器人的人机协同神经符号框架，结合LLM进行语言理解和上下文推理，同时保持验证、排序和执行的确定性，通过SDI架构和两层级恢复机制实现故障恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 柔性机器人自动化需要能够解释操作员意图、验证物理可行性并在规划和执行阶段从故障中恢复的系统。当前系统在语言理解、上下文推理和故障恢复方面存在不足。

Method: 提出SDI（Specifier-Designer-Inspector）架构，将软件工程的PGE模式应用于工业机器人，结合LangGraph动态路由进行故障恢复。采用两层级恢复机制：结构级重新规划通过上下文感知编排，执行级几何故障通过确定性恢复技能。使用Unity3D数字孪生支持物理执行前的人工检查、修改和重新验证。

Result: 在多个难度级别的自然语言命令评估中，与十个基线方法相比，该方法取得了最高的任务成功率。消融实验证实结构化命令扩展、符号验证、选择性LLM路由和恢复技能都是必要的。

Conclusion: 该神经符号框架通过结合LLM的语言理解能力和确定性验证，实现了人机协同工业机器人的高效故障恢复和任务执行。

Abstract: Flexible robotic automation requires systems that interpret operator intent, verify physical feasibility, and recover from execution failures across both the planning and execution stages. This paper proposes an agentic neuro-symbolic framework for human-in-the-loop industrial robotics, in which LLMs are used for tasks that require language understanding or contextual reasoning, while all verification, sequencing, and execution remain deterministic. The framework adapts the Planner-Generator-Evaluator (PGE) harness pattern from software engineering into a Specifier-Designer-Inspector (SDI) architecture for industrial robotics, combined with LangGraph-based dynamic routing for failure recovery. A two-tier recovery mechanism addresses structure-level replanning through context-aware orchestration and execution-level geometric failures through deterministic recovery skills. A Unity3D digital twin supports human inspection, modification, and re-verification prior to physical execution. Evaluated on natural-language commands across multiple difficulty levels against ten baselines, the proposed method achieves the highest task success. Ablation results confirm that structured command expansion, symbolic verification, selective LLM routing, and recovery skills are each individually necessary.

</details>


### [243] [Disturbance-Aware Aerial Robotics for Ethical Wildlife Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08249)
*Mahmut Osmanovic,Isac Paulsson,Teddy Lazebnik*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于强化学习的干扰感知框架，用于异构无人机空中机器人舰队自主追踪野生动物，旨在最小化行为干扰，同时保证观测质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有野生动物监测方法（如标记、捕捉、近距离观察）会改变动物行为，影响生态有效性。无人机监测虽然前景广阔，但现有方法缺乏行为意识、依赖固定启发式规则或需要昂贵且不道德的真实训练数据，缺乏既能保护生态有效性又能跨物种、行为和机器人平台扩展的通用框架。

Method: 引入干扰感知强化学习框架，结合基于动物运动统计数据的拟合模型构建动物学基础模拟环境，使用奖励函数平衡观测质量与干扰风险，训练控制策略。

Result: 在三种具有不同生态和运动模式的物种（鸽子、豺、距翅麦鸡）及四种常见行为模型中，学习到的策略始终优于当前使用的基于规则的基线方法，并能泛化到不同的监测任务、动物动态和无人机类型。

Conclusion: 干扰感知学习为非侵入性自主野生动物观测奠定了可行基础，为生态学和保护领域实现可扩展、道德负责且科学可靠的机器人监测开辟了道路。

Abstract: Reliable wildlife monitoring is essential for ecology and conservation, yet many existing methods, such as tagging, capture, and close-range observation, can alter the very behaviors they aim to measure. Aerial robots offer a scalable alternative, which has shown promising performance in multiple studies. Nonetheless, existing approaches typically lack behavioral awareness, rely on fixed heuristics, or require real-world training data that are costly, impractical, and ethically difficult to obtain. As a result, there remains no general framework for adaptive drone-based monitoring that can both preserve ecological validity and scale across species, behaviors, and robotic platforms. In this study, we introduce a disturbance-aware reinforcement-learning-based framework for heterogeneous aerial robotic fleets that enables autonomous wildlife tracking while explicitly minimizing behavioral disruption. We couple a zoologically grounded simulation environment with fitted animal movement models derived from real trajectory statistics, and train control policies using a reward formulation that captures the trade-off between observation quality and disturbance risk. Across three species (pigeon, jackal, and spur-winged lapwing) with distinct ecologies and motion patterns and four increasingly strategic behavior models common in nature, the learned policies consistently surpassed currently used rule-based baselines and generalized across monitoring tasks, animal dynamics, and drone types. These results establish disturbance-aware learning as a viable foundation for non-invasive autonomous wildlife observation, opening a path towards scalable, ethically responsible, and scientifically reliable robotic monitoring in ecology and conservation.

</details>


### [244] [Mind Your Steps: A General Learning Framework for Accurate Humanoid Foothold Tracking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08253)
*Alessandro Montenegro,Shihao Li,Puze Liu,Alberto Maria Metelli,Jan Peters*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种轻量级框架用于训练通用3D落脚点跟踪策略，通过动态提供脚步支撑和新的目标表示方法，解决了现有方法在现实世界部署中的问题，实现了精确且安全的类人机器人导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前类人机器人在复杂动态环境中的操作面临重大挑战。基于速度命令的强化学习策略虽然实现了稳健的运动，但缺乏对落脚点位置的显式控制，导致不安全行为（如踩到人脚）和不精确导航。而现有的落脚点跟踪策略要么依赖不现实的状态假设，要么是特定于下游任务的阶段性管道，限制了实际应用。

Method: 提出了一种新颖的轻量级框架来训练通用3D落脚点跟踪策略。通过目标采样器动态提供脚步支撑，使学习策略对特定地形具有通用性。新的目标表示方法有效缓解了现实世界中的挑战，如噪声和不准确的姿态估计及足部接触估计。该策略设计为独立的低级控制器，可与各种高级落脚点生成器无缝集成。

Result: 通过广泛的仿真和现实世界实验验证了框架的有效性。将策略与不同的上游规划器结合，在挑战性环境中实现了自然且精确的运动，为复杂环境中的运动操作任务铺平了道路。

Conclusion: 该框架为类人机器人提供了通用、可部署的落脚点跟踪解决方案，解决了现有方法在安全性和精确性方面的限制，为实现复杂环境中的运动操作任务提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Enabling humanoid robots to operate in complex, dynamic environments remains a critical challenge, fundamentally limited by the ability to navigate robustly, safely, and accurately. While reinforcement learning with velocity-commanded policies has achieved remarkable robustness in humanoid locomotion, this approach lacks explicit control of the foothold placement, leading to unsafe behavior, such as stepping onto human feet, or imprecise navigation, hindering the following manipulation task. Conversely, explicit foothold-tracking policies offer a promising alternative by directly being commanded with target foot poses. However, existing approaches are often limited by unrealistic state assumptions, compromising real-world deployment, or they are part of staged pipelines, making them tied to specific downstream tasks. In this work, we introduce a novel, lightweight framework for training general-purpose 3D foothold-tracking policies. By dynamically providing footstep support through a goal sampler, this method enables the learned policy to be agnostic to specific terrains. Our new target representation effectively mitigates challenges arising in the real world, such as noisy and inaccurate pose estimation and foot contact estimation. Designed for direct real-world transfer, our policy acts as a standalone low-level controller that can be seamlessly paired with various high-level foothold generators. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework through extensive experiments in simulation and in the real world. By coupling our policy with different upstream planners, we achieve natural and accurate locomotion in challenging settings, paving the way for loco-manipulation tasks in complex environments.

</details>


### [245] [SIMPLE: Simulation-Based Policy Learning and Evaluation for Humanoid Loco-manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08278)
*Songlin Wei,Zhenhao Ni,Jie Liu,Zhenyu Zhao,Junjie Ye,Hongyi Jing,Junkai Xia,Xiawei Liu,Michael Leong,Liang Heng,Di Huang,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SIMPLE是一个用于人形机器人全身运动操作策略学习与评估的统一仿真测试平台，提供大规模多样化任务、场景和资产，支持自动化轨迹生成和VR遥操作数据收集，并验证了仿真与真实世界性能的强相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人形机器人基础模型发展迅速，但缺乏可扩展、可复现的全身运动操作评估基准。真实世界测试成本高且难以复现，现有仿真基准主要关注桌面或轮式机器人，因此需要构建一个用于人形机器人策略学习与评估的统一仿真平台。

Method: SIMPLE平台结合了MuJoCo的高精度接触动力学和IsaacSim的光线真实渲染，提供包含60个多样化全身任务、50个室内场景和超过1000个物体资产的大规模环境。集成了两种数据生成管道：基于运动规划的自动化轨迹生成和低延迟VR遥操作接口。在平台上集成并大规模评估了主流人形机器人策略，包括轻量级模仿网络、大型视觉语言动作模型和世界动作模型。

Result: 实验发现策略在仿真中的表现与真实世界性能存在强相关性。此外，在SIMPLE中收集数据训练的策略可以零样本迁移到物理人形机器人上，为人形机器人研究提供了稳健且可复现的基础。

Conclusion: SIMPLE为整个人形机器人研究社区提供了一个可扩展、可复现的仿真测试平台，能够有效评估和训练人形机器人策略，并验证了仿真与真实世界性能的一致性，为人形机器人基础模型的发展提供了重要基础设施。

Abstract: Humanoid foundation models are advancing faster than we can evaluate them. While real-world testing is expensive and difficult to reproduce, existing simulation benchmarks focus primarily on table-top or wheeled robots. A scalable and reproducible benchmark for whole-body humanoid loco-manipulation remains an open problem. To this end, we present SIMPLE, a unified simulation testbed for humanoid policy learning and evaluation. SIMPLE couples the accurate contact-rich dynamics of MuJoCo with the photorealistic rendering of IsaacSim. It provides a large-scale environment comprising 60 diverse whole-body tasks, 50 indoor scenes, and over 1,000 object assets. To facilitate scalable data collection, the framework integrates two data generation pipelines: automated trajectory generation via motion planning and a low-latency VR teleoperation interface. We further integrate and benchmark mainstream humanoid policies at scale in SIMPLE, including lightweight imitation networks, large vision-language-action (VLA) models, and recent world action models (WAMs). Our experiments reveal a strong correlation between policy performance in simulation and the real world. Furthermore, we demonstrate that policies trained on data collected in SIMPLE can be transferred zero-shot to physical humanoid robots under similar settings, providing a robust and reproducible foundation for humanoid robotics research.

</details>


### [246] [Impedance MPC for Physical Human-Robot Interaction: Predictive Disturbance Rejection with Joint-Limit Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08281)
*Yongyan Cao,Jinshan Tang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Impedance MPC with Kalman滤波解决了传统阻抗控制在持续外力下存在稳态位置误差的问题，实现了零稳态误差保证，在7自由度机器人上实现了亚毫米级跟踪精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理人机交互需要同时满足轨迹精度和接触安全，但传统阻抗控制在持续外力下会产生非零稳态位置误差，积分控制只能在有限的稳定增益范围内减少误差

Method: 提出两层阻抗MPC：第一层解析消除重力、科里奥利力和任务空间惯量，将系统简化为配置无关的双积分器；第二层在100Hz频率下求解30变量凸QP，利用恒定结构预计算自由响应矩阵，通过增强卡尔曼滤波器估计持续扰动状态

Result: 在7自由度Franka FR3机器人上，阻抗MPC+卡尔曼滤波在15N持续外力下实现亚0.05mm稳态误差（相比传统阻抗44.8mm误差减少800倍以上），在四个3D圆上实现亚毫米跟踪，对30%测量噪声和惯量失配具有鲁棒性

Conclusion: Impedance MPC解决了物理人机交互中轨迹精度与安全性的矛盾，通过解析简化、凸优化和状态估计实现了零稳态误差保证，显著提升了机器人对外部扰动的鲁棒性和跟踪性能

Abstract: Physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) demands simultaneous trajectory accuracy and compliant safety under unplanned contact. Classical impedance control incurs a nonzero steady-state position error under sustained human force -- the applied force divided by the task stiffness -- which integral action reduces only within a narrow stable-gain budget. We present a two-layer Impedance MPC that resolves this tension. Layer~1 analytically cancels gravity, Coriolis, and task-space inertia, reducing the residual plant to a configuration-independent double integrator with a constant state-transition matrix. Layer~2 solves a 30-variable convex QP at 100\,Hz, exploiting this constant structure so the free-response matrix is precomputed once; an augmented Kalman filter estimates the persistent disturbance state, giving a formal zero-steady-state-error guarantee. A null-space inverse-barrier potential and a task-space workspace projection enforce joint-limit safety across the tested workspace. On a 7-DOF Franka FR3, Impedance MPC with Kalman augmentation attains sub-0.05\,mm steady-state error versus 44.8\,mm for classical impedance (a $>$800-fold reduction) under a sustained 15\,N force, sub-millimeter tracking on four 3-D circles, and graceful robustness to measurement noise and inertial mismatch up to 30\%.

</details>


### [247] [MotionVLA: Injecting Geometric Motion into Vision-Language-Action Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08288)
*Shanglin Yuan,Weiheng Zhao,Xianda Guo,Wei Sui,Li Yu,Wenyu Liu,Xinggang Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MotionVLA提出了一种运动历史接口，将短时视频窗口转换为紧凑的连续轨迹场token，通过运动一致性证据而非单纯增加时空信息来改善VLA模型的长时程操作性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型通过增加历史、深度或4D特征来减少长时程操作中的歧义，但非运动一致的证据会引入几何漂移、碎片化时间线索和不稳定动作生成。问题在于：VLA应该记住过去帧，还是记住连接这些帧的运动？

Method: MotionVLA将短时过去视频窗口转换为紧凑的连续轨迹场token，将近期观测表示为物理一致的运动证据。当前视觉token查询此历史以检索任务相关运动信息，然后在轨迹基础监督下重新耦合到VLA流中。

Result: 在仿真基准和初步真实机器人部署中，MotionVLA改善了长时程操作，同时产生更平滑、更直接的执行效果。

Conclusion: 有效的VLA记忆不仅在于提供更多4D上下文，而在于暴露可用于控制的运动一致性证据。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly condition robot policies on history, depth, or 4D features to resolve ambiguity in long-horizon manipulation. However, more spatiotemporal evidence is not necessarily better: when the injected evidence is not motion-consistent, it can introduce geometric drift, fragmented temporal cues, and unstable action generation. This raises a simple question: should a VLA remember past frames, or remember the motion that connects them? We introduce MotionVLA, a motion-history interface that converts a short past-only video window into compact, time-continuous trajectory-field tokens. Instead of treating history as a sparse set of ndependently lifted frames, MotionVLA represents recent observations as physically coherent motion evidence. Current visual tokens query this history to retrieve task-relevant motion information, which is then recoupled into the VLA stream under trajectory-grounded supervision. Experiments across simulation benchmarks and preliminary real-robot rollouts show that MotionVLA improves long-horizon manipulation while producing smoother and more direct executions. These results suggest that effective VLA memory is not just about providing more 4D context, but about exposing motion-consistent evidence that is usable for control.

</details>


### [248] [Uncertainty-Aware Intention Prediction for Human-to-Robot Assembly Teleoperation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08341)
*Fnu Heman,Yixuan Wang,Kolin Xu,Conner Wallace,John Dang,Akhil Joshi,Jun Sheng,Pinhas Ben-Tzvi,Mingyu Cai*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个不确定性感知的人到机器人意图预测框架，通过分层迁移学习、保形预测和VLM引导的片段校正，实现机器人辅助遥操作的准确意图预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人类-机器人协作的辅助遥操作中，准确的意图预测对于在长视野操作和装配任务中提供及时可靠的机器人辅助至关重要。然而，机器人遥操作演示成本高且受硬件限制，而人类演示更容易收集并提供丰富的时间结构。

Method: 1) 分层迁移学习：MS-TCN++在人类手部演示上预训练，然后在有限的机器人遥操作数据上微调，以捕获低级动作和高级任务意图；2) 保形预测模块：提供具有统计覆盖保证的帧级预测集，用于可靠的不确定性量化和早期意图估计；3) VLM引导的片段校正：利用视觉和时间上下文选择性审查低置信度或时间不确定的片段。

Result: 在22个动作类别的机器人装配演示实验中，人-机器人微调将机器人测试集Edit分数从70.50提高到80.70（仅使用16个机器人演示）。Edit-safe VLM校正将帧准确率从45.21%提高到46.42%，同时提高了F1@25和F1@50并保持了Edit分数。

Conclusion: 人类演示为鲁棒、不确定性感知的机器人动作分割提供了可扩展的预训练数据，该框架能够支持动作识别、时间分割、意图预测和错误检测，为辅助遥操作提供可靠支持。

Abstract: In assisted teleoperation for human-robot collaboration, accurate intention prediction is critical for enabling timely and reliable robotic assistance during long-horizon manipulation and assembly tasks. These systems require continuous understanding of user behavior to recognize actions, anticipate intentions, and detect mistakes in real time. However, robot teleoperation demonstrations are costly and hardware-limited, whereas human demonstrations are easier to collect and provide rich temporal structure. To address this challenge, we propose an uncertainty-aware human-to-robot intention prediction framework that combines: (1) hierarchical transfer learning, where MS-TCN++ is pretrained on human hand demonstrations and fine-tuned on limited robot teleoperation data to capture low-level actions and high-level task intentions; (2) a conformal prediction module that provides frame-level prediction sets with statistical coverage guarantees for reliable uncertainty quantification and early intention estimation; and (3) VLM-guided segment correction, which selectively reviews low-confidence or temporally uncertain segments using visual and temporal context. The framework supports action recognition, temporal segmentation, intention anticipation, and mistake detection for assisted teleoperation. Experiments on robot assembly demonstrations with 22 action classes show that human-to-robot fine-tuning improves the robot test-set Edit score from 70.50 to 80.70 using only 16 robot demonstrations. Edit-safe VLM correction further improves frame accuracy from 45.21% to 46.42% and increases F1@25 and F1@50 while preserving the Edit score. These results show that human demonstrations provide scalable pretraining data for robust, uncertainty-aware robot action segmentation. Code and data: project website.

</details>


### [249] [PACT: Self-Evolving Physical Safety Alignment for Diffusion Policies in Embodied Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08414)
*Lingxuan Wu,Zijian Zhu,Lizhong Wang,Chengyang Ying,Huayu Chen,Xiao Yang,Fangming Liu,Jun Zhu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PACT是一个自演化的后训练框架，通过将预训练扩散策略投影到约束可行区域，在保持任务性能的同时显著减少安全违规。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散策略在机器人操作中取得了显著成功，但往往无法满足安全部署所需的严格物理约束。现有方法要么在训练期间过早施加安全约束，要么在测试时通过外部防护措施被动应对，限制了策略的表达能力和整体可扩展性。

Method: PACT是一个自演化的后训练框架，无需访问演示数据或任务奖励，将预训练扩散策略投影到约束可行区域。它通过具有跨时间步密集监督的反向KL目标，将约束梯度蒸馏到扩散模型中。采用渐进式收紧约束的课程学习，同时保持理论上有限的策略偏移和单调改进，缓解因灾难性遗忘导致的安全-性能权衡。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界具身操作基准测试中，PACT平均显著减少31.0%的安全违规，同时将任务成功率提高30.7%。

Conclusion: PACT通过自演化的后训练框架有效解决了扩散策略的安全约束问题，在保持任务性能的同时显著提升安全性，为安全机器人部署提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Diffusion policies have achieved remarkable success in robotic manipulation, yet they often fail to satisfy strict physical constraints required for safe deployment. Existing approaches impose safety either prematurely during training or reactively via external guardrails at test time, limiting policy expressivity and overall scalability. We propose Physical safety Alignment for Constrained Trajectories (PACT), a self-evolving post-training framework that projects pretrained diffusion policies onto constraint-feasible regions without accessing demonstration data or task rewards. PACT distills constraint gradients into the diffusion model through a reverse-KL objective with dense supervision across timesteps. It incorporates a curriculum that progressively tightens constraints while maintaining theoretically bounded policy shift and monotone improvement, mitigating the safety-performance trade-off from catastrophic forgetting. On simulated and real-world embodied manipulation benchmarks, PACT significantly reduces safety violations by 31.0% on average while improving task success by 30.7%.

</details>


### [250] [GraspFoM: Towards Reconstruction-Driven Robotic Grasping with 3D Foundation Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08440)
*Dongli Wu,Xiaobao Wei,Hao Wang,Qiaochu Dong,Ying Li,Qingpo Wuwu,Ming Lu,Wufan Zhao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GraspFoM：一个统一框架，利用3D基础先验（SAM3D）构建共享的3D物体潜在表示，用于重建和抓取姿态预测，通过锚点初始化的截断姿态推理扩散器预测连续多模态抓取姿态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有几何感知抓取方法通常将几何重建作为中间预测，而非可重用的物体先验。可靠的抓取需要局部接触线索和物体级3D结构，但部分观测下仍具挑战性。

Method: 1）利用SAM3D构建共享3D物体潜在表示；2）锚点初始化的截断姿态推理扩散器预测连续多模态抓取姿态；3）重建感知评分器和残差潜在更新器；4）联合预测抓取姿态并重建高保真3D资产（网格和3DGS）。

Result: 在重建和抓取任务上均达到最先进水平，仅需少量额外可训练参数。组件消融研究验证了各部分的贡献。

Conclusion: GraspFoM成功将3D基础先验用于构建共享物体表示，实现重建和抓取的协同优化，为部分观测下的可靠抓取提供了统一解决方案。

Abstract: Robotic grasping is a fundamental capability in robotic manipulation. Yet grasping remains challenging under partial observations. Reliable grasping depends on both local contact cues and object-level 3D structure. Existing geometry-aware grasping methods recognize the value of reconstruction, but they typically treat geometry as an intermediate prediction rather than a reusable object prior for grasping. In this paper, we present GraspFoM, a unified framework that leverages 3D foundation priors (SAM3D) to build a shared 3D object latent for both reconstruction and grasp pose prediction. Built on this shared object latent, we introduce an anchor-initialized truncated pose-reasoning diffuser that predicts continuous and multimodal grasp poses without directly relying on discrete grasp candidates. We further investigate the interaction between reconstruction and grasping through a reconstruction-aware scorer and a residual latent updater. Reconstruction provides grounded geometric cues, while grasp supervision refines the shared object latent toward grasp-relevant affordances. GraspFoM jointly predicts grasp poses and reconstructs high-fidelity 3D assets in mesh and 3DGS forms. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that GraspFoM achieves state-of-the-art results on both reconstruction and grasping. Notably, these improvements require only a small number of additional trainable parameters. Component-wise ablation studies also demonstrate the contribution of each component.

</details>


### [251] [Personalized and Robust Proactive Robot Assistance with Uncertainty-Guided LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08458)
*Alvaro Gonzalez,M. H. Hasan Shovo,Ali Ayub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GLOBE：一个轻量级框架，结合n-gram马尔可夫模型捕捉时间行为模式与不确定性引导的LLM推理，用于家庭环境中人类活动和物体使用的预测，在噪声条件下保持鲁棒性和计算效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 家庭环境中主动机器人辅助需要准确预测人类活动和物体使用，现有方法依赖复杂的时空模型，计算成本高且对环境变化敏感。

Method: 提出GLOBE框架，结合n-gram马尔可夫模型捕捉时间行为模式，并使用不确定性引导的LLM推理，仅在模型置信度低时调用LLM。引入HOMER-Noise数据集评估噪声条件下的性能。

Result: GLOBE在干净和噪声设置下都实现了与最先进方法竞争的性能，同时提高了鲁棒性和计算效率。通过Stretch 3移动机械臂的概念验证集成展示了实际应用潜力。

Conclusion: GLOBE为家庭环境中人类活动预测提供了一种轻量级、鲁棒的解决方案，在计算效率和噪声鲁棒性方面具有优势，适合实际人机交互应用。

Abstract: Proactive robot assistance in household environments requires accurate prediction of human activities and object usage under dynamic and noisy conditions. Existing approaches often rely on complex spatio-temporal models, which can be computationally expensive and sensitive to environmental variability. In this paper, we propose GLOBE, a lightweight framework that combines n-gram Markov models for capturing temporal behavioral patterns with uncertainty-guided large language model (LLM) reasoning. The framework performs sequential prediction efficiently while selectively invoking LLM reasoning only when the model confidence is low. To evaluate performance under realistic conditions, we introduce HOMER-Noise, a noisy extension of the HOMER+ dataset that simulates structured disturbances such as object movements caused by humans, pets, and toddlers. Experimental results show that GLOBE achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods while improving robustness and computational efficiency across both clean and noisy settings. The framework is further validated through a proof-of-concept integration with a Stretch 3 mobile manipulator, demonstrating its potential application in real-world human-robot interaction scenarios.

</details>


### [252] [LUNA-AD: Lightweight Uncertainty-Aware Language Model with Lifelong Learning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08470)
*Ruoyu Yao,Pei Liu,Ruiguo Zhong,Mingxing Peng,Rui Yang,Jun Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: LUNA-AD 是一个轻量级、不确定性感知的语言模型，用于自动驾驶，具有终身学习能力，通过三系统架构实现多模态行为推理、高效部署和持续优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在安全关键的驾驶系统中应用面临推理多样性有限、计算开销高和静态学习范式的问题，需要解决这些挑战以实现可靠的自动驾驶决策。

Method: 提出LUNA-AD三系统架构：1) 多智能体分析系统通过多样化假设探索生成不确定性感知的决策演示；2) 双头轻量级启发式模型统一决策分布和文本解释推理；3) 反思驱动的终身学习机制通过多模态决策输出和闭环反馈优化决策和推理。

Result: 在nuPlan基准测试中，LUNA-AD在非反应式和反应式模式下都实现了最先进的成功率，同时推理延迟相比现有知识驱动的自动驾驶框架大幅降低。

Conclusion: LUNA-AD通过不确定性感知、轻量级部署和终身学习机制，有效解决了自动驾驶中语言模型应用的多样性、效率和适应性挑战，为安全关键驾驶系统提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: While large language models (LLMs) offer promising reasoning capabilities, their integration into safety-critical driving systems is hindered by limited reasoning diversity, high computational overhead, and static learning paradigms.
