Method: 使用低成本、低分辨率的时间飞行(ToF)相机作为反馈传感器，应用于经典的倒立摆在轨道上平衡的控制系统

Result: 实验证明，这种低分辨率ToF相机能够提供足够的反馈信息，可靠且精确地实现倒立摆的平衡控制

Conclusion: 低成本、低分辨率ToF相机能够胜任对快速、不稳定动态系统的精确反馈控制，挑战了传统认知

Abstract: Time-of-flight cameras are popular in robotics for providing direct depth information while being compact, inexpensive, and robust to lighting conditions, but their low spatial resolution and depth noise are widely believed to preclude precise feedback control. In this paper, we show that an inexpensive, low-resolution time-of-flight camera provides sufficient feedback to reliably and precisely balance an inverted pendulum on a cart--a canonical benchmark for fast, unstable dynamics.

</details>


### [289] [RPO-PDT: Demonstrating Role-Play-Based Knowledge Adaptation for Student Support Dialogue (Demonstration System)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09255)
*Filip Janik,Ewa Olton,Robert Smales,Harris Spratt,Shea Tait,Md Zia Ullah,Yanchao Yu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RPO-PDT是一个基于检索和角色扮演的对话系统，用于高等教育中的自适应学生支持，能够提供机构特定的个人发展导师指导，并具有明确的角色边界和安全性约束


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为高等教育提供机构特定的、安全的、自适应的学生支持对话系统，解决传统个人发展导师指导的局限性和可扩展性问题

Method: 采用检索增强的、基于角色扮演的对话方法，结合结构化知识源，通过反向角色扮演循环处理未解决的互动，生成可重复使用的策略记忆

Result: 开发了支持文本和Furhat机器人实体交互的对话系统，能够提供基于机构知识、安全且自适应的学生支持对话

Conclusion: RPO-PDT展示了在高等教育中实现基于检索、角色扮演和自适应的学生支持对话系统的可行性和有效性

Abstract: We present RPO-PDT: a retrieval-grounded, role-play-based dialogue system for adaptive student support in higher education. RPO-PDT is: (1) able to provide institution-specific Personal Development Tutor (PDT) guidance using structured knowledge sources; (2) constrained by explicit persona, boundary, confidentiality, and safety policies; and (3) designed around a reverse-roleplay loop where unresolved interactions are replayed from the student perspective, enabling alternative tutor strategies to be generated and stored as reusable strategy memory. RPO-PDT supports both text-based and Furhat-based embodied interaction for demonstrating grounded, safe, and adaptive student-support dialogue.

</details>


### [290] [Back to the Familiar Future: Failure Recovery for VLA Policies via Pre-Imagined Milestone Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09258)
*Suyeon Shin,Juwon Kim,Hyeonbin Park,Hyunseo Kim,Hyundo Lee,Hyung-Sin Kim,Byoung-Tak Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: B2FF框架通过预生成熟悉未来状态里程碑，在VLA策略偏离轨迹时提供视觉目标引导恢复，无需重新训练底层动作生成器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略在执行过程中容易偏离预定轨迹，即使任务在物理上仍然可行。这些偏离会将策略推入不熟悉的状态空间，直接重新规划常常会破坏动作序列的稳定性，导致恢复困难。

Method: 提出Back to the Familiar Future（B2FF）恢复框架，包含两个阶段：1）执行前，VLA基于干净初始观察生成熟悉未来状态里程碑库；2）恢复时，可恢复性感知选择器从里程碑库中选择一个恢复里程碑作为固定视觉目标，使VLA能将偏离轨迹的观察映射回熟悉的未来状态。

Result: 在注入故障的LIBERO基准测试中，在控制恢复时间与注入故障对齐的情况下，B2FF将基线VLA的平均成功率从56.3%提升到74.0%，证明预想象的里程碑可以指导恢复而不需要微调底层动作生成器。

Conclusion: B2FF框架通过利用未来视觉条件作为恢复接口，有效解决了VLA策略偏离轨迹时的恢复问题，预生成的熟悉未来状态里程碑为策略提供了可靠的恢复目标，显著提升了系统的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies can deviate from nominal trajectories during manipulation, even when tasks remain physically feasible. Recovering from these deviations is challenging, as they push the policy into unfamiliar state spaces where direct re-planning frequently destabilizes action sequences. We propose Back to the Familiar Future (B2FF), a recovery framework for foresight-driven VLAs that leverages future visual conditioning as a recovery interface. Before execution, the VLA generates a milestone bank of familiar future states conditioned on the clean initial observation. At recovery time, a recoverability-aware selector selects a recovery milestone from this bank and enforces it as a fixed visual goal. This enables the VLA to robustly map off-trajectory observations back to a familiar future. On failure-injected LIBERO, under controlled recovery timing aligned with the injected failure, B2FF increases the average success rate of a baseline VLA from 56.3% to 74.0%, demonstrating that pre-imagined milestones can guide recovery without fine-tuning the low-level action generator.

</details>


### [291] [VGP-Nav: Metric-Aware Visual Geometric Perception for Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09268)
*Hewei Pan,Weiye Zhu,Zekai Zhang,Zitong Huang,Rongtao Xu,Jinbao Wang,Feng Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VGP-Nav 是一个仅使用单目RGB视觉的导航框架，通过地面几何约束解决单目尺度模糊问题，实现全局一致定位和密集度量障碍物感知。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人导航系统通常需要多传感器融合（如相机+LiDAR）来实现精确定位和障碍物感知，但这增加了校准复杂性和部署成本。纯视觉方法虽然成本低、可扩展，但现有单目视觉系统难以同时实现高效的全局一致定位和密集的度量一致几何感知。

Method: 提出VGP-Nav框架，核心思想是将定位基础的视觉几何锚定到从地面平面几何推导出的物理尺度约束上，从而为单目感知提供可靠的度量参考。该框架在线解决单目尺度模糊问题，并生成可直接用于下游规划的定位基础、度量障碍物表示。

Result: 在多种环境中的大量实验表明，该方法具有很强的泛化能力，并成功部署在真实移动机器人上，证明了该框架对于可扩展、低成本、安全自主导航的实用性。

Conclusion: VGP-Nav为仅使用单目RGB视觉的机器人导航提供了一种统一的度量感知视觉几何感知框架，成功解决了单目尺度模糊问题，实现了同时支持度量定位和障碍物感知的目标，具有实际部署价值。

Abstract: Reliable robotic navigation necessitates the seamless integration of accurate global localization and dense, metric-consistent obstacle perception. A common strategy to achieve these capabilities involves integrating diverse sensing modalities: cameras offer rich visual features for localization, while active sensors like LiDAR provide direct metric measurements. However, such multi-sensor configurations necessitate complex spatial-temporal calibration and increase deployment overhead. Although vision-only approaches offer a low-cost and scalable alternative, existing monocular visual systems typically struggle to simultaneously achieve efficient, globally consistent localization and dense, metric-consistent geometric perception. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{VGP-Nav}, a unified framework for \textit{Metric-Aware Visual Geometric Perception} that relies solely on monocular RGB input to jointly support metric localization and obstacle perception. Our key insight is to anchor localization-grounded visual geometry to physically meaningful scale constraints derived from ground-plane geometry, thereby providing a reliable metric reference for monocular perception. VGP-Nav resolves monocular scale ambiguity online and produces localization-grounded, metric obstacle representations that are directly applicable to downstream planning. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong generalization across diverse environments and successful deployment on real mobile robots, highlighting the practicality of our approach for scalable, low-cost, and safe autonomous navigation.

</details>


### [292] [VAIC: Vision-Guided Humanoid Agile Object Interaction Control via Decoupled Commands](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09286)
*Dongting Li,Qianyang Wu,Xingyu Chen,Liang Li,Yuhang Lin,Sikai Wu,Guoyao Zhang,Mingliang Zhou,Diyun Xiang,Qiang Zhang,Renjing Xu,Jianzhu Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VAIC是一个用于人形机器人敏捷交互的视觉引导控制框架，通过两阶段蒸馏范式，使机器人仅使用机载深度传感器和本体感知就能执行多样化的动态交互任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人形机器人控制器严重依赖密集参考轨迹和完美状态观测，限制了在非结构化环境中的物理泛化能力，存在部署鸿沟。需要一种能够仅使用机载传感器就能实现敏捷交互的控制框架。

Method: VAIC采用两阶段蒸馏范式：1）特权教师策略使用精确物体运动学和环境状态掌握多样交互技能；2）可部署学生策略通过用多轴速度目标和每帧交互指示器替换全身跟踪来蒸馏这些能力，并使用循环物体适应模块从原始深度流和本体感知中隐式推断不可观测的物体动力学。

Result: 在真实人形机器人上的评估和部署表明，单个VAIC策略成功执行了高度多样化的动态任务，包括搬运箱子、推车交互和滑滑板，始终优于基线方法，推进了自主人形机器人的部署。

Conclusion: VAIC通过统一的视觉引导敏捷交互控制框架，弥合了人形机器人控制器部署鸿沟，实现了仅使用机载传感器就能在非结构化环境中进行多样化动态交互的能力。

Abstract: Humanoid robots hold immense potential for real-world assistance, yet agile interaction with objects in unstructured environments demands tightly coupled whole-body coordination. Despite recent advancements, current controllers face a critical deployment gap. They rely heavily on dense reference trajectories and perfect state observability, which inherently limits physical generalization. We present Vision Guided Agile Interaction Control (VAIC), a unified framework that bridges this gap by operating exclusively on onboard depth, historical proprioception, and a decoupled user command interface. VAIC employs a two-stage distillation paradigm. First, a privileged teacher policy masters diverse interaction skills using precise object kinematics and exact environmental states. Second, a deployable student policy distills these capabilities by replacing full body tracking with velocity targets across multiple axes and an interaction indicator for each frame. The student utilizes a recurrent object adaptation module to implicitly infer unobservable object dynamics from raw depth streams and proprioception. Evaluations and real-world deployments on the humanoid robot demonstrate that a single VAIC policy successfully executes highly diverse dynamic tasks. These tasks include box carrying, cart interaction, and skateboarding, consistently outperforming baselines and advancing autonomous humanoid deployment.

</details>


### [293] [Dual Quaternion-Based Unscented Kalman Filter with Visual Inertial Odometry for Navigation in GPS-Denied Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09292)
*Mohamed Khalifa,Hashim A. Hashim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于对偶四元数的无迹卡尔曼滤波（DQUKF）结合视觉惯性里程计（VIO）的导航框架，用于GPS拒止环境下的精确状态估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GPS拒止环境下的可靠导航是机器人、航空航天和自动驾驶领域的基础性挑战，需要开发不依赖GPS的精确状态估计方法。

Method: 采用对偶四元数表示名义位姿，6维twistor参数化表示局部位姿误差，构建误差状态DQUKF；同时使用VIO算法跟踪图像特征、同步IMU和相机测量，提供视觉约束补充惯性传播。

Result: 在EuRoC MAV数据集上的仿真结果表明，所提DQUKF在高初始化不确定性下能够收敛，在困难飞行序列中达到0.2584米的位置RMSE，优于基准滤波器。

Conclusion: DQUKF-VIO框架在GPS拒止环境下实现了精确的状态估计和导航性能，为自主系统在无GPS条件下的可靠运行提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Reliable navigation in GPS-denied environments remains a fundamental challenge in robotics, aerospace, and autonomous vehicle applications. This paper presents a Dual Quaternion-Based Unscented Kalman Filter (DQUKF) equipped with a Visual Inertial Odometry (VIO) algorithm for accurate state estimation enabling navigation in GPS denied locations. The proposed framework formulates the DQUKF in an error state manner, where the nominal pose is represented by a unit dual quaternion and the local pose error is represented by a 6-dimensional twistor parameterization used for sigma point generation, covariance propagation, and measurement correction. In parallel, the VIO algorithm tracks features across image frames, synchronizes measurements between the IMU and camera, and provides visual constraints that complement inertial propagation. Simulation results on the EuRoC MAV dataset show that the proposed DQUKF converges under high initialization uncertainty and achieves a position RMSE of 0.2584~m in the difficult flight sequence, outperforming the benchmark filters.

</details>


### [294] [KPGrasp: Scalable Keypoint Flow Matching for Dexterous Grasp Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09314)
*Yuansen Huang,Jiayi Chen,Haoran Liu,Yubin Ke,Bing Han,Jiangran Lyu,Mi Yan,Li Yi,He Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: KPGrasp提出基于流匹配的灵巧抓取生成框架，避免传统接触损失或测试时接触优化，通过全欧几里得手部关键点参数化和Transformer流模型实现最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于学习的灵巧抓取方法依赖精心调校的接触损失或昂贵的测试时接触优化，难以生成高质量抓取。需要一种不依赖这些限制、能从大规模数据学习抓取先验的框架。

Method: 提出KPGrasp框架：1) 使用全欧几里得3D手部关键点参数化，避免传统混合SE(3)姿态和关节角输出空间的缺点；2) 采用简单可扩展的Transformer流模型，仅使用标准流匹配损失训练；3) 抓取表达与物体点云在同一坐标系，支持原生空间推理。

Result: 在Dexonomy基准上达到76.3%抓取成功率，比最强直接可比基线提升47.4%，穿透深度降至2.4mm；在DexGrasp Anything基准上也取得最佳平均性能；批量推理仅需0.032秒/抓取；在20个多样化物体上的真实世界实验验证了部署可行性。

Conclusion: KPGrasp通过流匹配框架成功学习灵巧抓取先验，不依赖接触损失或测试时接触优化，在仿真基准和真实世界实验中均表现出色，展示了可部署的灵巧抓取生成能力。

Abstract: Generating high-quality dexterous grasps remains challenging for learning-based methods, which often depend on carefully tuned contact losses or costly contact-based test-time refinement. We present KPGrasp, a flow-matching framework that learns dexterous grasp priors from large-scale data rather than relying on contact losses or contact-based test-time refinement. KPGrasp couples an all-Euclidean 3D hand-keypoint parameterization with a simple yet scalable Transformer flow model. The parameterization avoids the drawbacks of the conventional mixed SE(3) pose and joint-angle output space, expresses grasps in the same frame as the object point cloud, and thus enables native spatial reasoning; the Transformer flow model is trained with only the standard flow-matching loss and scales effectively with data, model capacity, and batch size. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on two simulation benchmarks. On the Dexonomy benchmark, it reaches a 76.3% grasp success rate, improving over the strongest directly comparable baseline by 47.4% while reducing penetration depth to 2.4 mm. The same model also achieves the best average performance on the DexGrasp Anything benchmark without fine-tuning. For batched inference, KPGrasp requires only 0.032 s per grasp. Finally, real-world experiments on 20 diverse objects demonstrate that the pipeline can be deployed in a real-world setup.

</details>


### [295] [TORL-VLA: Tactile Guided Online Reinforcement Learning for Contact-Rich Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09337)
*Huaihang Zheng,Yi Yang,Kai Ma,Shenglin Xu,Tian Xie,Guozheng Li,Xiangyu Wang,Yiren Ma,Si Liu,Yinian Mao,Baoxu Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出TORL-VLA框架，结合触觉反馈与在线强化学习，解决接触密集型任务中离线策略无法适应接触条件变化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型通常作为离线策略部署，当接触条件偏离训练分布时，无法进行在线适应，导致接触力不当和重试效率低下等问题。

Method: 提出TORL-VLA框架：1)触觉导引的力矩感知VLA预测参考动作和未来力矩序列；2)轻量级在线RL模块精炼参考动作；3)引入干预审查评论家，防止干预后的成功被错误归因于干预前的策略生成动作。

Result: 在闩锁操作、咖啡杯放置和鸡蛋处理等长视野接触密集型任务的真实机器人实验中，TORL-VLA在子任务和完整任务的成功率以及时间限制下的执行效率方面均优于强基线。

Conclusion: TORL-VLA通过结合触觉反馈与在线策略精炼，有效提升了接触密集型操作任务的性能，解决了离线策略在接触条件变化时的适应性问题。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become a powerful framework for robotic manipulation, and recent studies have introduced tactile or force feedback into VLAs to address contact-rich tasks. However, these models are typically deployed as offline policies. When contact conditions shift from the training distribution, the policy cannot perform online adaptation, leading to problems such as inappropriate contact forces and inefficient retries. Therefore, we propose TORL-VLA, a tactile-guided online reinforcement learning framework that couples tactile feedback with policy refinement for contact-rich manipulation. Our method introduces a tactile-derived wrench-aware VLA to predict reference actions and future wrench sequences, while a lightweight online RL module is used to refine the reference actions. To stabilize learning from mixed exploratory policy-generated and human-intervention data, we introduce an intervention-censored critic that prevents post-intervention success from being wrongly credited to policy-generated actions preceding intervention. Real-robot experiments on long-horizon contact-rich tasks, including latch manipulation, coffee-cup placement, and egg handling, show that TORL-VLA improves success rates at both subtask and full-task levels, as well as time-bounded execution efficiency over strong baselines.

</details>


### [296] [Taming Perception Jitter: Uncertainty-Aware LiDAR Object Detection for Reliable Motion Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09350)
*Cornelius Schröder,Žygimantas Marcinkus,Markus Lienkamp*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于不确定性感知的3D检测与轻量统计测试，用于区分真实运动与检测抖动，减少自动驾驶中的误动态预测


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶中可靠的动态分类至关重要，因为静态物体的误动态预测会导致不必要的规划干预。不稳定的边界框预测会产生虚假速度估计和错误轨迹预测。

Method: 1. 增强3D目标检测器，提供aleatoric不确定性估计；2. 在短观测窗口上应用双样本z检验，区分真实运动与检测抖动；3. 集成到Autoware中，重用现有数据关联以最小化计算开销

Result: 在nuScenes数据集上与速度阈值方法性能相当，但在真实世界测试中显著减少了误动态预测和不必要的停车。研究发现存在一个"抖动带"，速度规则无法正确分类，而该方法能有效处理。

Conclusion: 不确定性感知检测和轻量统计测试能在噪声较大的真实世界环境中为自动驾驶提供实际性能提升，部署友好且计算开销小。

Abstract: Reliable motion classification is critical for autonomous driving, as false dynamic predictions of static objects can cascade into unnecessary planner interventions. Unstable bounding box predictions can lead to spurious velocity estimates in tracking and falsely predicted trajectories. We present a deployment-friendly mitigation strategy that augments a 3D object detector with aleatoric uncertainty estimates and applies a two-sample z-test over short observation windows to separate true motion from jitter. Integrated into Autoware with minimal changes, the approach reuses existing data association for minimal compute overhead. Empirical results show parity with velocity thresholding on nuScenes, but substantially fewer false dynamic predictions and unnecessary stops in real-world test drives, explained by the presence of an intermediate jitter band in the recorded data that speed-only rules misclassify. This demonstrates that uncertainty-aware detection and lightweight statistical testing can deliver practical performance gains for autonomous driving in noisier real-world settings.

</details>


### [297] [MosaicIMU: Composing Carrier Experts for Generalizable Neural Inertial Odometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09355)
*Junye Zou,Huiyi Yan,Xinning Xu,Xiaolei Li,Pengkun Zhou,Jinhui Zhang,Ziyang Meng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MosaicIMU是一个基于混合专家(MoE)的通用神经惯性里程计框架，通过预训练和适应机制实现跨载具的泛化能力，显著降低惯性导航的漂移误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学习型惯性里程计方法通常局限于特定载具，难以泛化到异构平台，需要一种能够适应不同载具且具有良好泛化能力的解决方案。

Method: 采用载具条件化的混合专家(MoE)预训练-适应框架，包含原型路由器组合载具特定专家特征，解码局部速度和不确定性约束，并与历史感知EKF集成。针对未见域适应，冻结预训练基础模型并学习轻量级专家残差分支；针对边缘部署，重用路由器选择信息样本进行高效增量更新。

Result: MosaicIMU在实验中持续优于现有学习型基线方法，平均绝对轨迹误差(ATE)和10秒相对轨迹误差(RTE-10s)分别降低40%和34%。

Conclusion: MosaicIMU为通用化和自适应的神经惯性里程计提供了一个可扩展的预训练到部署范式，显著提升了跨载具的泛化能力和导航精度。

Abstract: Robust inertial odometry is essential for various carriers when external sensing is unreliable. Learning-based methods reduce integration drift by capturing local motion priors, but these methods often remain tied to a particular carrier, limiting generalization across heterogeneous platforms. We present MosaicIMU, a carrier-conditioned Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) pretraining-and-adaptation framework for generalizable neural inertial odometry. MosaicIMU uses a prototype-based router to compose carrier-specific expert features, decodes local velocity and uncertainty constraints, and integrates them with a history-aware EKF. For unseen domain adaptation, it freezes the pretrained base model and learns a new lightweight expert residual branch. For edge-deployment, it further reuses the router to select informative online samples for efficient incremental updates. Experiments show that MosaicIMU consistently outperforms learning-based baselines, reducing average ATE and RTE-10s by 40% and 34%, respectively. These results highlight that MosaicIMU provides a scalable pretraining-to-deployment paradigm for generalizable and adaptive neural inertial odometry.

</details>


### [298] [ReGIL: Retrieval-Guided Imitation Learning from a Single Demonstration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09381)
*Yuying Zhang,Francesco Verdoja,Wenyan Yang,Ville Kyrki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReGIL是一个基于检索的模仿学习框架，将单次演示作为外部记忆库，通过查询该记忆来指导探索、生成正则化缓冲区和构建奖励，从而高效学习机器人操作策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从单次演示中学习机器人操作策略面临挑战：微小偏差会快速累积导致失败，而收集大量在线交互数据成本高昂。

Method: ReGIL将单次演示视为静态记忆库，在训练过程中反复查询该记忆库，用于指导探索、生成正则化缓冲区和构建奖励。通过当前轨迹与检索片段之间的局部时间对齐计算奖励，为策略改进提供逐步且信息丰富的反馈。

Result: 在LIBERO和Meta-World基准测试的单次演示设置下，ReGIL在成功率和训练效率方面均优于先前基线方法。在真实机器人实验中，仅使用一次演示和不到一小时的在线训练，ReGIL在三个具有随机初始机器人姿态和目标位置的操作任务中取得了超过75%的成功率。

Conclusion: 将单次演示作为可重复使用的记忆库，能够提供比静态监督更高效的机器人学习方式。

Abstract: Learning robot manipulation policies with deep neural networks from a single demonstration remains highly challenging, as even small deviations from the demonstrated trajectory can quickly compound into failure, while collecting substantial online interaction data is costly. We propose ReGIL, a retrieval-guided imitation learning framework that treats a single demonstration as an external memory. ReGIL repeatedly queries this static memory throughout training to simultaneously guide exploration, generate the regularization buffer, and construct rewards. Specifically, it computes rewards through local temporal alignment between the current trajectory and the retrieved segment, providing step-wise and informative feedback for policy improvement. We evaluate ReGIL on robotic manipulation tasks from the LIBERO and Meta-World benchmarks under the single demonstration setting. ReGIL outperforms prior baselines in both success rate and training efficiency. In real-robot experiments, using only one demonstration and less than one hour of online training, ReGIL achieves over 75% success rate across three manipulation tasks with randomness in both initial robot pose and target position. These results demonstrate that leveraging the single demonstration as reusable memory can provide more than static supervision for efficient robot learning. More details can be found on our website: https://regil2026.github.io/

</details>


### [299] [Harness Engineering for Physical AI: Robot Middleware Is the Harness Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09416)
*Sanghoon Lee,Jiyeong Chae,Kyung-Joon Park*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出将机器人中间件重新定义为Physical AI的"harness"（约束系统），用于管理学习策略在控制、计算和通信三个维度的执行，通过三个核心功能（投影、隔离、转移）来确保AI模型的安全部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Physical AI时代，学习策略、规划器和视觉语言动作模型作为控制路径的因果参与者进入部署的机器人系统，但缺乏一个统一的层来集成它们的时间安排、调度和网络管理。当前机器人中间件虽然提供了大部分所需功能，但缺乏对AI模型的执行约束机制。

Method: 将机器人中间件重新定义为Physical AI harness，提出三个核心执行功能：1) Projection（投影）- 在输出时对每个命令进行门控检查；2) Isolation（隔离）- 限制模型的执行和传输时隙；3) Transfer（转移）- 当检查失败时回退到已验证的基线系统。这些功能基于ROS 2、DDS和Zenoh等现有中间件表面实现。

Result: 提出了ROS 2 Harness Profile的概念，这是一个部署工件，承载AI模型声明的输出区域、推理预算和操作状态，同时中间件在ROS 2、DDS和Zenoh上强制执行这些约束。

Conclusion: 机器人中间件应作为Physical AI的harness，不是作为单一的最佳执行器，而是作为整合控制、计算和通信三个维度约束的层。这为安全部署学习模型到物理机器人系统提供了系统化的框架。

Abstract: Robot middleware faces a new role in the era of Physical AI. Learned policies, planners, and vision-language-action (VLA) models now enter deployed robots as causal participants on the control path, but the layer that integrates them with timing, scheduling, and network has not been named. Recent language-agent work names this layer the harness, the external system that mediates tools, manages state, bounds resources, and records execution. The robotics community has not yet adopted this framing, and we propose that robot middleware is that harness. A Physical AI harness differs from a software harness in where it intervenes. A software harness mediates at tool-call boundaries. A Physical AI harness must mediate at control, computing, and communication simultaneously, because a learned policy's output crosses all three: its commands shift the trajectory, its inference time shifts the schedule, and its payload shifts the bandwidth. Robot middleware is the lowest robot-stack layer with mediating abstractions over all three, so it is best positioned to compose their enforcement. It already provides most of what a harness needs but lacks the enforcement for an AI model. We name this missing enforcement as three functions: Projection gates each output at emission, Isolation bounds the model's execution and transmission slot, and Transfer falls back to a verified baseline when checks fail. Each appears today as hand-built application code in deployed robot systems, built on surfaces robot middleware already provides. Robot middleware should host them not as the best single-axis enforcer but as the layer that composes all three. We sketch this as a ROS 2 Harness Profile, a deployment artifact that carries an AI model's declared output region, inference budget, and operating regime while the middleware enforces them across ROS 2, DDS, and Zenoh.

</details>


### [300] [Dense Force Estimation with an Event-based Optical Tactile Sensor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09451)
*Agis Politis,René Zurbrügg,Valentina Cavinato*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 首个基于事件光学触觉传感器的密集三维力场重建框架，通过事件数据估计三维表面位移，利用逆有限元方法映射到力，实现了100Hz高频率的物理基础力重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类依赖高时空分辨率的密集几何和力感知触觉反馈进行灵巧操作。现有视觉触觉传感器受相机帧率、运动模糊和数据带宽限制，而事件光学触觉传感器虽有微秒级分辨率但只能预测净力，需要密集三维力场重建方法。

Method: 1. 从事件数据估计三维表面位移；2. 通过逆有限元方法（iFEM）将位移映射到力；3. 提出事件标记追踪算法恢复剪切位移；4. 使用卷积神经网络预测法向位移，基于同步的力-位移-事件数据集训练。

Result: 实验显示能够准确重建物理基础力，在力范围达(4N, 4N, 20N)时，平均绝对误差为(0.14N, 0.10N, 0.93N)，平均运行频率达100Hz。

Conclusion: 这是实现高频率控制机器人抓取和灵巧操作的密集力反馈的第一步，为基于事件触觉传感器的密集三维力场重建提供了首个可行框架。

Abstract: Humans rely on spatially dense, geometry and force-aware tactile feedback at high temporal resolution for dexterous manipulation. While vision-based tactile sensors enable dense force estimation, they are limited by camera frame rates, motion blur, and data bandwidth. Event-based optical tactile sensors offer an attractive alternative with microsecond temporal resolution and low motion blur, but existing methods are restricted to predicting only net forces. We introduce the first framework for dense 3D force field reconstruction using event-based optical tactile sensors. Our approach estimates 3D surface displacements from event data and maps them to forces via the inverse Finite Elements Method (iFEM). Shear displacements are recovered through the proposed event-based marker tracking algorithm, while normal displacements are predicted by a convolutional neural network trained on a collected dataset of synchronized force-displacement-event data. Experiments demonstrate accurate reconstruction of physically grounded forces, achieving a mean absolute error of (0.14 N, 0.10 N, 0.93 N) over force ranges up to (4 N, 4 N, 20 N), while operating at an average of 100 Hz. This work constitutes a first step toward enabling dense force feedback for high-frequency control in robotic grasping and dexterous manipulation.

</details>


### [301] [$ω$-EVA: Envision, Verify, and Act with Latent Interactive World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09457)
*Zhenguo Sun,Yu Sun,Hande Huang,Alois Knoll*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ω-EVA是一个潜在交互世界模型，通过"设想-验证-行动"循环实现具身动作生成，让策略在行动前检查其提议的想象后果，避免生成未来视频，在多种仿真设置中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有具身策略通常直接将当前观察映射到动作，而世界模型主要提供预测监督或外部模拟，很少让策略在行动前检查其提议动作的想象后果。

Method: 提出三阶段框架：1)学习动作条件潜在动态；2)在动态感知的视觉表示上训练语言条件流策略；3)将策略提议反馈给世界模型。使用三分支精炼器联合推理当前状态、提议条件的未来和提议动作。

Result: 在单臂、双手、长视野和扰动仿真设置中，完整的交互流程持续改进提议策略性能，潜在诊断显示有意义的动作条件未来结构。约12亿参数，无需额外机器人数据预训练。

Conclusion: ω-EVA展示了紧凑且具有竞争力的性能-规模-数据权衡，使世界模型成为主动的动作反馈模块而非被动预测器，实现了在潜在特征空间中进行后果推理。

Abstract: Embodied policies typically map current observations directly to actions, leaving candidate-action consequences implicit. World models provide predictive supervision, representations, or external simulation, but rarely let a policy inspect the imagined consequence of its own proposal before acting. We introduce $ω$-EVA, a latent interactive world model that realizes an Envision--Verify--Act loop for embodied action generation. Its three-stage framework learns action-conditioned latent dynamics, trains a language-conditioned flow policy on dynamics-aware visual representations, and feeds the policy's proposal back through the world model. A tri-branch refiner jointly reasons over the current state, proposal-conditioned future, and proposed action to produce the final action chunk. Because consequence reasoning remains in latent feature space, $ω$-EVA avoids generating future videos at inference. Evaluations across diverse single-arm, bimanual, long-horizon, and perturbed simulation settings show that the complete interaction pipeline consistently improves the proposal policy, while latent diagnostics indicate meaningful action-conditioned future structure. With approximately 1.2B parameters and no additional robot-data pretraining, $ω$-EVA demonstrates a compact and competitive performance--scale--data trade-off, making the world model an active action-feedback module rather than a passive predictor.

</details>


### [302] [Goal Sets, Not Goal States: Queryable Robot Goals through Goal-Set Hindsight Relabeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09476)
*Carlos Vélez García,Miguel Cazorla,Jorge Pomares*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GS-HER是一种目标集后见重标方法，通过谓词级泛化将实现的状态与查询定义的目标集而非单一目标状态匹配，解决离线机器人学习中全状态目标受无关维度限制的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统后见重标通常将已实现的状态作为精确目标，这在离线机器人学习中会过度约束，因为任务成功通常只依赖于状态的一个子集。当任务成功仅取决于部分状态变量时，全状态目标会受到无关维度的影响。

Method: 提出Goal-Set Hindsight Relabeling (GS-HER)，这是HER的谓词级泛化方法。已实现的状态认证查询定义的目标集而非单一目标状态。二元查询指定哪些变量定义成功，使目标谓词成为推理时输入，同时保持底层离线GCRL算法不变。

Result: 在OGBench任务和五种离线目标条件学习器上，GS-HER在全状态目标受无关维度限制时提高了性能，并将后见重标转化为可重用的目标接口：一个检查点可以回答多个机器人目标谓词而无需重新训练。

Conclusion: GS-HER通过目标集重标有效解决了离线目标条件强化学习中全状态目标受无关维度限制的问题，提供了一种灵活的目标接口，使单个模型能够适应多种目标谓词。

Abstract: Hindsight relabeling usually turns achieved future states into exact goals, which can overconstrain offline robot learning when task success depends only on a subset of the state. We propose Goal-Set Hindsight Relabeling (GS-HER), a predicate-level generalization of HER in which achieved states certify query-defined goal sets rather than singleton goal states. A binary query specifies which variables define success, making the goal predicate an inference-time input while leaving the underlying offline GCRL algorithm unchanged. Across OGBench tasks and five offline goal-conditioned learners, GS-HER improves performance when full-state goals are bottlenecked by nuisance dimensions and turns hindsight relabeling into a reusable goal interface: one checkpoint can answer multiple robot goal predicates without retraining.

</details>


### [303] [Targeting World Models to Compromise Robot Learning Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09499)
*Ethan Rathbun,Ahmed Agha,Saaduddin Mahmud,Christopher Amato,Alina Oprea,Eugene Bagdasarian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了一种针对世界模型的新型数据投毒攻击，攻击者通过在看似安全的遥操作数据集中植入恶意提示，当这些数据通过世界模型处理后，会生成危险的合成训练轨迹，最终导致部署不安全的机器人策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界模型作为机器人学习流程中的高效工具越来越受欢迎，但作者发现世界模型为数据投毒攻击提供了独特的隐蔽入口点，可能使机器人策略在看似安全的训练数据下仍然变得不安全。

Method: 提出两种新型攻击方法：在遥操作数据集中注入恶意提示或篡改状态转移动态。这些攻击在原始数据中看似安全，但通过世界模型处理后，会生成危险的合成机器人训练轨迹，进而训练出不安全的下游策略。

Result: 攻击在两种最先进的世界模型（动作条件化和文本条件化）上均有效，成功实现了对下游深度强化学习策略的端到端后门攻击，并在视觉语言动作设置中进行了概念验证。

Conclusion: 研究结果表明需要开发更安全的世界模型，并重新评估其在机器人学习供应链中的位置，以防止这种隐蔽的数据投毒攻击。

Abstract: World models have recently seen a rapid growth in both their popularity and capability as more data efficient tools for generating robot training data or simulating real world environments, with many works proposing their integration into the robot learning pipeline. While highly practical, in this work we demonstrate that world models introduce a uniquely stealthy and effective data poisoning entry point into the robot learning supply chain that can result in the deployment of unsafe or otherwise compromised robotic policies despite training on seemingly safe ground truth training data. In contrast to traditional data poisoning techniques which directly implant dangerous trajectories into sold or uploaded datasets, our novel attack methods inject malicious prompts or compromising transition dynamics into visibly safe teleoperated datasets which are only activated once fed through a world model as input. This can result in the generation of synthetic, dangerous robot training trajectories and subsequently unsafe or compromised robot policies. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our attacks against both state of the art action conditioned and text conditioned world models, showing a full end-to-end backdoor on a downstream DRL policy and a proof-of-concept for the VLA setting. Overall these findings necessitate research into more secure world models and reevaluating their position within the robot learning supply chain.

</details>


### [304] [Efficient Minimal Solvers for Relative Pose Estimation in Autonomous Driving Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09569)
*Tao Li,Liang Liu,Jianli Han,Weimin Lv*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于新颖平移参数化和一阶旋转近似的统一框架，为自动驾驶车辆设计了三种高效的最小解算器，在RANSAC流程中减少点对应数量并降低代数复杂度，实现速度与精度的良好平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多摄像头系统中的相对位姿估计对自动驾驶车辆定位和环境感知至关重要，需要高实时性和鲁棒性。现有方法计算成本高且严重依赖丰富的特征匹配，限制了在时间敏感驾驶场景中的应用。

Method: 提出统一框架，基于新颖的平移参数化和一阶旋转近似。设计了三种针对自动驾驶的最小解算器：1)集成IMU垂直方向先验；2)利用转向时旋转轴方向先验；3)针对平面运动（地面车辆在结构化道路上的现实假设）。减少最小点对应数量和代数复杂度。

Result: 在合成数据集和KITTI自动驾驶基准上的大量实验表明，所提出的解算器在速度与精度之间实现了比现有最先进算法更优的平衡，更适合实时系统。

Conclusion: 通过减少点对应数量和代数复杂度，提出的方法能够在RANSAC流程中更快地生成假设，提高了在实时系统中的适用性，为自动驾驶车辆提供了高效可靠的相对位姿估计解决方案。

Abstract: With the advancement of visual sensing systems, computer vision is playing an increasingly important role in autonomous driving and robot navigation. Relative pose estimation in multi-camera systems is essential for accurate vehicle localization and environment perception, demanding high real-time performance and robustness. Existing methods, however, often involve high computational costs and rely heavily on abundant feature matches, limiting their applicability in time-sensitive driving scenarios. To address these limitations, this paper introduces a unified framework for efficient relative pose estimation, built upon a novel translation parameterization and first-order rotation approximation. Within this framework, we propose three efficient minimal solvers specifically designed for autonomous vehicles. The first solver integrates the vertical direction prior from Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs), the second utilizes the rotation axis direction prior during steering maneuvers, and the third is designed for planar motion - a realistic assumption for ground vehicles operating on structured roads. By reducing both the minimal number of point correspondences and the algebraic complexity, our methods enable faster hypothesis generation within RANSAC-based pipelines, improving suitability for real-time systems. Extensive experiments on synthetic datasets and the KITTI autonomous driving benchmark demonstrate that the proposed solvers achieve a favorable balance between speed and accuracy compared to existing state-of-the-art algorithms.

</details>


### [305] [CT-VAM: A Cerebello-Thalamic-Inspired Vision-Action Model for Efficient Visuomotor Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09572)
*Jiacheng Li,Yize Guo,Jiabin Guo,Qingchen Liu,Jiahu Qin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出CT-VAM模型，将高级语义推理与快速闭环控制分离，实现高效的任务条件视觉运动控制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型在机器人操作中表现良好，但原始语言主要用于指定任务意图，而不是在高频低层执行中重复处理。需要将高级语义推理与快速闭环控制分离，实现云-边协同计算范式。

Method: 提出CT-VAM模型，作为紧凑的本地执行策略，从双视角视觉观测、本体感觉和轻量任务条件预测动作块。引入TARS（丘脑动作路由流）解码器，独立路由动作、视觉和任务流，防止密集感官令牌淹没紧凑的任务相关条件。

Result: 仅6800万参数的CT-VAM在LIBERO基准上取得与更大VLA模型竞争的成功率，同时降低推理延迟。结合流一致修复实现异步块执行，支持高频控制，并在资源受限机器人平台上实现稳健的实时部署。

Conclusion: CT-VAM实现了高效的任务条件视觉运动控制，验证了云-边计算范式的可行性，为资源受限机器人平台提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Vision-language-action models have shown strong promise for robot manipulation, yet raw language is primarily needed to specify task intent rather than to be repeatedly processed during high-frequency low-level execution. Motivated by this separation, we propose a cerebello-thalamic-inspired vision-action model (CT-VAM) for efficient task-conditioned visuomotor control. CT-VAM acts as a compact local execution policy that predicts action chunks from dualview visual observations, proprioception, and a lightweight task condition, potentially enabling a practical cloud-edge paradigm in which high-level semantic reasoning can be handled by large models while fast closed-loop control runs on local hardware. To fuse heterogeneous inputs effectively, CT-VAM introduces TARS (Thalamic Action Routing Stream), a stream-separated conditional attention decoder that independently routes action, visual and task streams, preventing dense sensory tokens from overwhelming compact task-relevant conditions. With only 68M parameters, CT-VAM achieves LIBERO success rates competitive with substantially larger VLA models, while reducing inference latency. Together with flow-consistent inpainting for asynchronous chunk execution, CT-VAM supports high-frequency control and demonstrates robust realworld deployment on resource-constrained robotic platforms.

</details>


### [306] [Shape Formation for the Cooperative Transportation of Arbitrary Objects Using Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09610)
*Mohamed Sayed,Wolfram Burgard,Tanja Katharina Kaiser*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种多智能体强化学习方法，用于多机器人系统在复杂物体下的自主编队控制，以安全运输任意形状、非均匀质量分布的物体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中物体的形状任意且质量分布不均匀，需要机器人编队能够安全支撑物体重量。现有方法在解决编队控制、协同导航和避障这三个相互关联的子问题时面临挑战。

Method: 提出一种新颖的多智能体强化学习方法，使多机器人系统能够自主定位到物体下方以支撑其重量，同时在编队过程中避开障碍物。

Result: 在不同环境和不同机器人数量下的评估表明，该方法能够产生可靠的平衡编队，并能泛化到杂乱场景以及具有复杂几何形状和非均匀质量分布的物体。

Conclusion: 该方法成功解决了复杂物体运输中的编队控制问题，为多机器人系统在现实世界中的物体运输任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Cooperative object transportation is essential in numerous domains, including industrial to domestic services. A popular transportation strategy is to carry objects on top of multi-robot systems. The corresponding task is typically solved by decomposing it into three interconnected subproblems: formation control, cooperative navigation, and collision avoidance. A particular challenge posed by real-world objects is their potentially arbitrary shape and non-uniform mass distribution, necessitating robot formations that securely support the object. In this work, we address the challenge of pattern formation control for transporting such real-world objects by proposing a novel multi-agent reinforcement learning approach. Our approach enables a multi-robot system to autonomously position itself underneath an object to support its weight while avoiding obstacles during the formation process. Our evaluations with diverse environments and varying numbers of robots show that our approach leads to policies that reliably produce balanced formations and generalize to cluttered scenes and objects with complex geometry and non-uniform mass distribution.

</details>


### [307] [DexPIE: Stable Dexterous Policy Improvement from Real-World Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09615)
*Ruizhe Liao,Wenrui Chen,Liangji Zeng,Haoran Lin,Fan Yang,Kailun Yang,Yaonan Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DexPIE是一个用于灵巧操作策略改进的后训练框架，通过真实世界部署收集的经验来提升基于演示的策略性能，在三个真实世界灵巧操作任务中实现了37%的成功率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵巧操作因其高维动作空间和复杂的接触动力学而给模仿学习带来挑战。仅基于演示训练的策略在部署时容易出现复合误差，且需要大量专家数据才能获得可靠性能。为了突破演示数据的限制，需要一种能够从实际部署经验中改进策略的方法。

Method: DexPIE采用后训练框架，包含三个关键技术：1) 通过灵巧手适配的干预系统和多阶段DAgger风格数据收集实现有效探索覆盖；2) 引入相对动作空间的异步推理，减少后训练轨迹与演示数据之间的时间噪声；3) 通过连续最优性指标的条件化，让策略更精细地利用数据质量。

Result: 在三个具有挑战性的真实世界灵巧操作任务中，DexPIE相比基于演示的参考策略实现了37%的成功率提升，超越了所有基线方法并表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DexPIE通过从实际部署经验中进行策略改进，有效克服了纯粹基于演示的模仿学习在灵巧操作中的局限性，为灵巧操作策略的后训练改进提供了有效的框架。

Abstract: Dexterous manipulation presents substantial challenges for imitation learning due to its high-dimensional action space and complex contact-rich dynamics. Policies trained purely from demonstrations often suffer from compounding errors during deployment and require large amounts of expert data to achieve reliable performance. To move beyond the limitations of demonstration data, in this work, we propose DexPIE, a post-training framework for dexterous policy improvement from experience collected through real-world deployment. First, DexPIE enables effective exploration coverage through a dexterous-hand-adapted intervention system and multi-stage DAgger-style data collection across initial and intermediate task stages, providing reliable supervision for accurate policy evaluation. To reduce temporal noise between post-training rollouts and demonstration data, we introduce asynchronous inference in the relative action space, which better aligns rollout data with demonstrated behavior and allows the critic to learn a value function induced by a more consistent underlying policy. Finally, DexPIE improves the policy through conditioning on a continuous optimality indicator, allowing the policy to leverage the quality of data in a more fine-grained manner. Across three challenging real-world dexterous manipulation tasks, DexPIE achieves a 37% improvement in success rate over the demonstration-based reference policy, outperforming all baseline methods and demonstrating stronger robustness. The source code and dataset will be made publicly available.

</details>


### [308] [Motion planning for hundreds of floating robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09620)
*Jan Kamm,Antonio Terpin,Raffaello D'Andrea,Aswin Ramachandran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种可扩展的机器人编队运动规划管道，通过构建碰撞图、分解交互集群、并行求解，实现了大规模机器人编队（最多500个）的快速轨迹生成，并在真实世界演示中验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模机器人编队的无碰撞运动规划困难，因为避碰导致强耦合，且随着团队规模增长而急剧增加。需要为水上全向浮动机器人生成稀疏关键帧编排，并在几秒内生成跨越数分钟和数千时间步的轨迹。

Method: 提出可扩展管道：1) 从初始化构建碰撞图；2) 将耦合问题分解为交互集群；3) 独立（并行）求解集群，并针对常见分解问题提供鲁棒性机制。

Result: 在最多500个机器人的模拟中验证了方法。合成的轨迹已在两个真实世界演示中部署：苏黎世湖的24个Way of Water 船队和2025年威尼斯双年展的Time Space Existence展览。

Conclusion: 提出的可扩展管道能够有效处理大规模机器人编队的运动规划问题，通过分解和并行化实现了快速轨迹生成，并在真实环境中成功演示。

Abstract: Planning collision-free motion for large robot fleets is difficult because collision avoidance induces strong inter-agent coupling that grows rapidly with team size. We consider omnidirectional floating robots on water, where choreographies are specified by sparse keyframes and an interactive tool must generate trajectories within seconds, even when transitions span minutes and thousands of time steps. We propose a scalable pipeline that builds a collision graph from an initialization, decomposes the coupled problem into interaction clusters, and solves clusters independently (and in parallel) with robustness mechanisms for common decomposition pathologies. We validate the approach in simulations up to 500 robots. The synthesized trajectories have also been deployed in two real-world demonstrations, on Lake Zürich with a fleet of 24 Way of Water crafts and at the Time Space Existence 2025 Venice Biennale.

</details>


### [309] [ReCoVLA: VLM-Guided Reward Compilation for Failure Recovery in Vision-Language-Action Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09630)
*Haodi Hu,Chung-Ta Huang,Jing Liu,Ye Wang,Kei Suzuki,Matthew Brand,Toshiaki Koike-Akino*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ReCoVLA是一个针对VLA策略的故障恢复框架，通过外部VLM识别故障模式并生成结构化奖励，训练残差策略进行恢复，无需修改原VLA策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA策略在非正常状态下的故障恢复能力较弱，需要一种能够保持预训练VLA策略不变，同时增强其恢复能力的方法。

Method: 使用外部VLM推断故障模式和恢复阶段，生成结构化奖励，训练残差恢复策略，保持原始VLA策略冻结，实现零样本仿真到现实的部署。

Result: 在仿真中，平均成功率从基线36.7%提升到66.7%；在物理零样本实验中，达到61.7%的最佳平均成功率。

Conclusion: ReCoVLA通过解耦高层故障理解和低层纠正控制，有效提升了VLA策略在故障状态下的恢复能力，且支持不同VLA策略。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) policies provide strong priors for language-conditioned manipulation, but remain brittle in off-nominal states requiring targeted recovery. We propose ReCoVLA -- a failure-conditioned residual recovery framework that keeps a pretrained VLA policy frozen, uses an external vision-language model (VLM) to infer the failure mode and recovery stage, and compiles a structured reward from task-relevant components. Rather than using the VLM to generate actions or rewards directly, ReCoVLA uses it as a semantic reward selector: it predicts a recovery descriptor and reward mask for in-simulation residual-policy training, followed by zero-shot sim-to-real deployment of the trained recovery policies. This decouples high-level failure understanding from low-level corrective control to support different VLAs. Experiments across short-horizon, long-horizon, and contact-rich manipulation tasks show that ReCoVLA outperforms the tested baselines on average. In simulation, our reward compiler improves average success from 36.7% for the fine-tuned $π_{0.5}$ baseline to 66.7%. In physical zero-shot sim-to-real experiments, ReCoVLA achieves the best average performance, with 61.7% success.

</details>


### [310] [Physics-Aware Sparse Learning and Selective Online Adaptation for Euler-Lagrange Robot Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09640)
*Rishabh Dev Yadav,Samaksh Ujjawal,Sihao Sun,Spandan Roy,Wei Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种保持机械结构特性的残差学习框架，将模型误差分解为惯性修正、相应的科里奥利项和广义力残差，在保持关键机械结构的同时对变化条件最敏感的部分进行在线自适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的Euler-Lagrange模型在存在负载变化、未建模耦合、摩擦、气动效应和变化操作条件时变得不准确。大多数基于学习的修正方法通过引入单一加性残差来提高预测精度，但未能保持Euler-Lagrange系统的内部机械结构，导致模型不保持对称性、正定性或惯性与速度依赖项之间的耦合，从而产生物理不一致的预测，并降低在基于模型的控制器中的可靠性。

Method: 提出结构保持残差学习框架，将模型不匹配分解为：1）惯性修正；2）相应的诱导科里奥利项；3）广义力残差。机械部分在物理约束下学习，而扰动敏感部分通过稀疏历史依赖的潜在交互模型表示，并使用贝叶斯线性回归在线自适应。这种分离保持了关键机械结构，同时将自适应限制在受变化条件影响最大的动力学部分。

Result: 在多个机器人平台（包括移动、空中和机械臂系统）上的实验表明，该方法在耦合和时变动力学下提高了动力学预测和轨迹跟踪性能。结果突出了结构化残差建模、紧凑潜在交互选择和选择性在线自适应在现实世界基于模型控制中的价值。

Conclusion: 通过将模型误差结构化分解为机械部分和扰动敏感部分，并分别采用约束学习和在线自适应，该方法在保持物理一致性的同时提高了模型预测精度和控制性能，为现实世界基于模型的控制提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate dynamics models are essential for model-based robotic control, yet nominal Euler--Lagrange models often become inaccurate in the presence of payload variation, unmodeled coupling, friction, aerodynamic effects, and changing operating conditions. Most learning-based correction methods improve prediction accuracy by introducing a single additive residual, but do not preserve the internal mechanical structure of Euler--Lagrange systems. This leads to models that do not preserve symmetry, positive-definiteness, or the coupling between inertia and velocity-dependent terms, which can result in physically inconsistent predictions and reduced reliability when embedded in model-based controllers. We propose a structure-preserving residual learning framework that decomposes model mismatch into an inertia correction, the corresponding induced Coriolis term, and a generalized-force residual. The mechanical component is learned under physical constraints, while the disturbance-sensitive component is represented through a sparse history-dependent latent interaction model and adapted online using Bayesian linear regression. This separation preserves key mechanical structure while restricting adaptation to the part of the dynamics most affected by changing conditions. Experiments across multiple robotic platforms, including mobile, aerial, and manipulator systems, show that the proposed method improves dynamics prediction and trajectory tracking under coupled and time-varying dynamics. These results highlight the value of combining structured residual modeling, compact latent interaction selection, and selective online adaptation for real-world model-based control.

</details>


### [311] [Modeling Components and Connections in Cyber-Physical Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09645)
*Kate Sanborn,Tanuj Kenchannavar,Vakul Nath,Jonathan Sprinkle*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ROSLaunchVisual：一个基于WebGME的模型集成环境，用于通过图形界面设计、可视化和管理ROS启动文件，提高开发效率并减少错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于文本的配置文件虽然能很好地展示组件模块的层次结构，但往往隐藏了模块间连接和接口的细节。对于ROS启动文件，XML结构可以通过建模方法改进，以更好地捕获这些信息。

Method: 开发了ROSLaunchVisual工具，这是一个基于WebGME的模型集成环境。它通过图形化界面表示节点、发布者、订阅者和参数等组件，提供动态系统分析功能，并包含元模型驱动的验证、自动导入/导出启动文件、可视化通信映射等特性。

Result: 该工具使启动文件创建更加直观且不易出错，提高了开发效率和系统理解，特别是在协作或大规模机器人项目中。插件功能进一步增强了库更新、语义错误检查和重映射管理等功能。

Conclusion: ROSLaunchVisual通过基于模型的视觉方法改进了ROS启动文件的配置，提高了抽象层次，使开发人员能够通过图形界面更有效地设计和管理复杂的机器人系统配置。

Abstract: Text based configuration files for cyber-physical systems show the hierarchy of component modules well but often hide the details of connections and interfaces between modules. A model-based visual approach to these configuration files can better capture this information. The XML structure of Robot Operating System (ROS) launch files can be improved using a modeling approach. This paper presents ROSLaunchVisual, a model-integrated environment built on WebGME for designing, visualizing, and managing ROS launch files. The tool raises the level of abstraction by allowing developers to create and modify launch files using a graphical interface that represents nodes, publishers, subscribers, and arguments as interconnected components. The tool provides a dynamic system analysis that can then be used in the static development and analysis of new and existing launch files. ROSLaunchVisual incorporates features such as metamodel-driven validation, automatic import/export of launch files, and visual communication mapping. Plugins further enhance functionality by updating libraries, checking for semantic errors, and managing remaps. By making launch file creation more intuitive and less error-prone, ROSLaunchVisual improves development efficiency and system understanding, especially in collaborative or large-scale robotics projects.

</details>


### [312] [Safe Polytope-in-Polytope Motion Planning and Control with Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09719)
*Alejandro Gonzalez-Garcia,Dries Dirckx,Jan Swevers,Wilm Decré*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于控制障碍函数的局部运动规划方法，保证多面体机器人在凸自由空间内安全移动，无需障碍物检测，计算效率高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将机器人简化为点或圆形过于保守，无法充分利用几何信息通过狭窄通道，需要更精确的几何建模来保证安全性和通过性。

Method: 使用模型预测控制框架，将机器人多面体包含在连续更新的凸自由空间区域作为约束条件，通过离散时间控制障碍函数实现安全保证，约束数量取决于自由空间几何复杂度和机器人形状而非障碍物数量。

Result: 相比基于多面体的避障方法，计算时间最多减少91倍，且能处理动态障碍物；在嵌入式计算机上实现10Hz实时运动规划与控制。

Conclusion: 该方法通过将机器人几何与自由空间直接结合，实现了高效、安全且无需障碍物检测的局部运动规划，适用于复杂环境中的实时导航。

Abstract: Autonomous mobile robots operating in tight environments require motion planning frameworks that account for the physical footprint of the robot. Simplifying the geometry to a point or a circle is conservative and discards information needed to successfully and safely traverse narrow passages. This work proposes a safe local motion planning and control method that guarantees that a polytopic robot footprint stays inside a continuously updated convex free-space region. The containment condition is formulated as a set of discrete-time control barrier function constraints within a model predictive controller. The number of safety constraints depends on the complexity of the local free-space geometry and the robot shape, instead of the number of obstacles. The proposed free-space formulation does not need any obstacle detection or segmentation. A comparative analysis against a polytope-based obstacle avoidance formulation confirms favorable scaling up to a reduction of 91$\times$ in computation time as the number of obstacles increases. The approach is validated in simulation with an autonomous surface vehicle and on hardware with a non-holonomic mobile robot, using both occupancy grids and LiDAR sensing. The experiments demonstrate safe real-time motion planning and control at 10~Hz on an onboard embedded computer, including reactive avoidance of dynamic obstacles.

</details>


### [313] [ProbeAct: Probe-Guided Training-Free Failure Recovery in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09740)
*Fan Zhang,Seongbin Park,Baharan Mirzasoleiman,Shariar Talebi,Nader Sehatbakhsh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: PROBEACT是一个无需训练、运行时干预的框架，用于检测和恢复预训练VLA策略中的抓取和放置失败，通过多目标隐藏状态探针、运动学状态机和CBF滤波器提升VLA模型的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VLA模型在训练分布内表现良好，但对光照变化、相机视角改变、初始状态微小变化等扰动缺乏鲁棒性，容易失败。需要一种无需修改模型权重或额外演示的干预方法。

Method: PROBEACT包含三个组件：1)轻量级多目标隐藏状态探针，从VLA中间特征预测任务相关物体的3D位置，使用匈牙利匹配进行身份跟踪；2)物体无关的运动学状态机，仅使用夹爪内部信号和末端执行器运动学检测抓取、运输和放置失败；3)分层控制屏障函数滤波器，将重复失败位置编码为软安全集约束，最小化修正VLA动作。

Result: 在LIBERO-plus基准测试中，PROBEACT将OpenVLA-OFT模型的成功率从69.6%提升到74.1%，展示了其对基础和微调VLA策略的广泛适用性。

Conclusion: PROBEACT作为即插即用、无需训练的干预框架，为现有VLA策略提供了通用的安全网，显著提升了在扰动环境下的鲁棒性和成功率。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models demonstrate strong perfor-1 mance on language-conditioned robotic manipulation within their training dis-2 tribution, yet their generalization capabilities remain fundamentally limited. They3 lack the robustness required to handle perturbations, frequently failing when con-4 fronted with lighting changes, altered camera viewpoints, or small initial-state5 variations. We propose PROBEACT, a training-free runtime intervention frame-6 work that detects and recovers from grasping and placement failures in pre-7 trained VLA policies without modifying their weights or requiring additional8 demonstrations. PROBEACT combines three components: (i) a lightweight multi-9 target hidden-state probe that predicts the 3D positions of task-relevant objects10 from intermediate VLA features, with Hungarian-matched identity tracking for11 multi-object scenes; (ii) an object-agnostic kinematic state machine that detects12 grasp, transport, and placement failures using only gripper-internal signals and13 end-effector kinematics; and (iii) a hierarchical Control Barrier Function (CBF)14 filter that encodes repeated-failure locations as soft safe-set constraints, mini-15 mally correcting VLA actions while preserving baseline behavior. As a plug-and-16 play, training-free intervention loop, PROBEACT is orthogonal to existing train-17 ing pipelines. Evaluated on the LIBERO-plus benchmark, our framework acts as18 a universal safety net, improving the success rate of the OpenVLA-OFT model19 from 69.6% to 74.1%, while demonstrating broad applicability to both base and20 fine-tuned VLA policies.

</details>


### [314] [Your Model Already Knows: Attention-Guided Safety Filter for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09749)
*Seongbin Park,Fan Zhang,Baharan Mirzasoleiman,Shahriar Talebi,Nader Sehatbakhsh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: VLA模型在机器人操作中表现出色但缺乏碰撞安全保证。现有方法通过VLM识别障碍物但速度慢且无法跟踪移动障碍。研究发现VLA模型中少数注意力头能可靠定位策略目标对象，可被用于无训练安全框架，结合轻量实时目标跟踪器实现移动障碍物避碰。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLA模型在机器人操作任务中表现出色，但缺乏对场景中任务无关物体的碰撞安全保证。现有安全过滤器使用VLM识别障碍物，但速度太慢无法在控制循环中运行，且只能在任务开始时调用，无法跟踪移动障碍物。

Method: 研究发现VLA模型中少数注意力头能可靠定位策略意图接近的目标对象。利用这一发现构建无训练安全框架：在每一步从注意力头获取活动目标，将场景其余部分视为障碍物，输入到控制屏障函数（CBF）过滤器中。结合轻量实时目标跟踪器，实现非静态障碍物的碰撞避免。

Result: 在静态基准测试SafeLIBERO上，该方法与使用特权模拟器状态识别目标的oracle方法表现相当。在包含移动障碍物的动态变体上，该方法比oracle方法平均提升43%性能，因为oracle的初始目标分配会过时。

Conclusion: 研究表明，实时安全过滤所需的感知信号已经存在于VLA策略中，无需额外训练或重型辅助模型即可利用。注意力头提供了一种轻量、实时的目标定位方法，可用于动态环境中的安全控制。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated impressive end-to-end performance across a variety of robotic manipulation tasks. However, these policies offer no guarantees against collisions with task-irrelevant objects in the scene. Existing safety filters sidestep this problem by querying a vision-language model (VLM) to identify obstacles and their locations. This, however, is too slow to run in the control loop and can only be invoked at episode initialization, leaving the filter unable to track moving obstacles. We discover that a small number of attention heads within a VLA model reliably localize the object the policy intends to approach. These heads can be exploited within a training-free safety framework that obtains the active target from the attention heads at every step, treats the remainder of the scene as obstacles, and feeds these into a Control Barrier Function (CBF) filter. Together with a lightweight real-time object tracker, this allows for collision avoidance for non-static obstacles. We evaluate our framework on SafeLIBERO, which we extend with moving obstacles. On the original static benchmark, our method performs comparably to an oracle that uses privileged simulator state to identify the target, emulating a VLM-based identification step run once at episode initialization. On the dynamic variant, where the oracle's init-time target assignment becomes stale, our method substantially outperforms it by 43%, on average. Our findings suggest that the perceptual signals needed for real-time safety filtering are already present within VLA policies and can be exploited without additional training or heavy auxiliary models.

</details>


### [315] [Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09758)
*Quinn Pfeifer,Ethan Pronovost,Paarth Shah,Khimya Khetarpal,Siddhartha Srinivasa,Abhishek Gupta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DARP是一种基于检索的半参数化模仿学习方法，通过重新参数化为局部邻域结构而非直接状态-动作映射，利用训练数据在推理时进行检索来提升泛化能力，相比标准行为克隆有显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 参数化模仿学习（行为克隆）在部署时由于误差累积，在分布外状态上泛化能力差。需要一种方法能够重用训练数据来缓解这一问题，而不需要额外数据收集、在线专家反馈或任务特定知识。

Method: DARP采用半参数化检索方法，训练模型基于k近邻专家演示、对应动作以及邻居状态与查询状态之间的相对距离向量来预测动作，而不是学习全局策略。

Result: 在连续控制和机器人操作等多样化领域，包括高维视觉特征表示，DARP相比标准行为克隆实现了15-46%的持续性能提升。

Conclusion: DARP通过基于检索的重新参数化方法，在不增加额外假设的情况下，有效解决了行为克隆的泛化问题，为模仿学习提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Parametric imitation learning via behavior cloning can suffer from poor generalization to out-of-distribution states due to compounding errors during deployment. We show that reusing the training data during inference via a semi-parametric retrieval-based imitation learning approach can alleviate this challenge. We present Difference-Aware Retrieval Policies for Imitation Learning (DARP), a semi-parametric retrieval-based imitation learning approach that addresses this limitation by reparameterizing the imitation learning problem in terms of local neighborhood structure rather than direct state-to-action mappings. Instead of learning a global policy, DARP trains a model to predict actions based on $k$-nearest neighbors from expert demonstrations, their corresponding actions, and the relative distance vectors between neighbor states and query states. DARP requires no additional assumptions beyond those made for standard behavior cloning -- it does not require additional data collection, online expert feedback, or task-specific knowledge. We demonstrate consistent performance improvements of 15-46% over standard behavior cloning across diverse domains, including continuous control and robotic manipulation, and across different representations, including high-dimensional visual features. Code and demos are available at https://weirdlabuw.github.io/darp-site/.

</details>


### [316] [AetheRock: An Arm-Worn Robot Teaching System for Force-Guided Vision-Tactile Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09777)
*Hong Li,Yue Xu,Yihan Tang,Yankang Dong,Chenyuan Liu,Chenyang Yu,Xuyang Li,Siyuan Huang,Yujun Shen,Nan Xue,Yong-Lu Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 开发了AetheRock穿戴式设备收集力觉、视觉和触觉数据，并提出ForceVT学习框架，通过力和视觉引导触觉学习，解决触觉传感器制造和使用不一致的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 力觉和触觉感知在接触丰富的操作中至关重要，但现有手持或穿戴设备中触觉和力传感器的组装不兼容，限制了力感知机器人学习的发展。

Method: 1) 设计AetheRock穿戴式设备，包含指尖的GelSlim-MiniFab视觉触觉传感器、手指接触区域的电阻压力传感器、定制PCB模块和舒适穿戴套件；2) 提出ForceVT表示学习框架，利用力和视觉引导保真度无关的触觉学习。

Result: AetheRock实现了合格的数据收集效率，ForceVT有效缓解了视觉触觉传感器在制造和使用不一致时的低效问题，在真实世界实验中表现良好。

Conclusion: 通过创新的硬件设计和算法，本工作缓解了夹持器力-视觉-触觉机器人学习的局限性，为接触丰富的操作提供了更可靠的感知解决方案。

Abstract: Force and tactile sensing are indispensable in contact-rich manipulation. However, force-aware robot learning faces critical challenges due to the incompatible assembly of tactile and force sensors in handheld or wearable devices. To address these limitations, we first introduce AetheRock for gripper-force, vision, and tactile data collection, which is an arm-worn device featuring a modular and easily manufactured visuo-tactile sensor, GelSlim-MiniFab, at the fingertip, a resistive pressure sensor at the human finger contact region, a customized PCB module, and a wearable kit for comfortable and robust collection. Building on this, we propose ForceVT, a representation learning framework that uses force and vision to guide fidelity-agnostic tactile learning, enabling robust inference in any tactile situation. Real-world experiments show that AetheRock achieves qualified data efficiency and that ForceVT effectively alleviates inefficiencies when visuo-tactile sensors exhibit manufacturing and utilization inconsistencies. Overall, our work mitigates the limitations of gripper-force vision-tactile robot learning through innovative hardware design and algorithms.

</details>


### [317] [SynManDex: Synthesizing Human-like Dexterous Grasps from Synthetic Human Pre-Grasps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09798)
*Yanming Shao,Zanxin Chen,Wenwei Lin,Mingjie Zhou,Tianxing Chen,Xiaokang Yang,Yichen Chi,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SynManDex是一个合成流水线，通过生成人类预抓取作为可供性感知提议，并通过机器人原生优化解决最终接触，实现从人类手部交互到机器人灵巧手的转移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类手-物体交互编码了功能意图，但直接转移到机器人手部常常因形态、接触和可达性约束而失败。需要一种方法将人类抓取意图适应到机器人形态。

Method: 采样物体条件化数字人类预抓取，将其重定向到灵巧机器人手部姿势，在目标体现上优化力闭合接触，并通过每个步骤的检查来生成轨迹。

Result: SynManDex实现了高抓取质量（86.4%抓取稳定性）和4.67/5的人类相似度（93.4%）。在仿真中达到80.7%成功率，在真实36-DOF双手机器人平台上达到83.3%成功率。

Conclusion: SynManDex能够有效将人类手部交互意图转移到机器人灵巧手上，支持抓取提升演示和多种灵巧操作任务，如倒茶、拍照和吹笛子等。

Abstract: Human hand-object interactions encode functional intent, but direct transfer to robotic hands often fails under morphology, contact, and reachability constraints. We present SynManDex, a synthetic pipeline that uses generated human pre-grasps as affordance-aware proposals and resolves the final contacts with robot-native optimization. SynManDex samples object-conditioned digital human pre-grasps, retargets them to dexterous robotic hand poses, optimizes force-closure contacts on the target embodiment, and admits trajectories that pass checks from each step. The resulting keyframes support both grasp-and-lift demonstrations and various prehensile manipulation tasks such as tea pouring, photo taking, and flute playing, designed via VLM agents. As a result, SynManDex combines high grasp quality (86.4\% grasp stability) with 4.67/5 human-likeness (93.4\%). It achieves 80.7\% successes in simulation and 25/30 (83.3\%) real-robot successes when applied to a 36-DOF bimanual dexterous robotic platform.

</details>


### [318] [AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09811)
*Jisong Cai,Long Ling,Shiwei Chu,Zhongshan Liu,Jiayue Kang,Zhixuan Liang,Wenjie Xu,Yinan Mao,Weinan Zhang,Xiaokang Yang,Ru Ying,Ran Zheng,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AHA-WAM 是一种异步时域自适应世界-动作模型，通过双扩散变换器架构解耦世界预测和动作执行的时间分辨率，让视频分支专注于长时域规划，动作分支专注于短时域执行，从而提升机器人操作性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界-动作模型将世界预测和动作执行耦合在同一时间分辨率，导致视频分支需要建模冗余的短期帧变化，未能充分利用视频分支在具身控制中的潜力。作者认为严格绑定两者的时间节奏可能限制了世界-动作模型的性能。

Method: 提出AHA-WAM模型，基于双扩散变换器架构：1）低频视频DiT作为世界规划器，维护过去观测的滚动键值记忆，生成可重用的分层潜在上下文编码长时域场景演化；2）高频动作DiT通过分层联合注意力查询该上下文，在闭环中执行短时动作块。引入时域自适应偏移训练和观测引导的视频上下文路由，支持异步执行。

Result: 在RoboTwin和真实世界操作任务中达到最先进性能，无需机器人数据预训练：RoboTwin平均成功率92.80%，4个真实世界任务平均成功率78.3%，闭环控制频率24.17 Hz，比Fast-WAM快4.59倍。

Conclusion: 通过解耦世界预测和动作执行的时间分辨率，AHA-WAM能更有效地利用视频分支进行长时域规划，同时保持动作执行的实时响应性，在机器人操作任务中实现了性能、效率和泛化能力的显著提升。

Abstract: World-action models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot manipulation, jointly modeling visual scene dynamics and actions to inject physical priors into policy learning. However, existing world-action models couple world prediction and action execution at the same temporal resolution, forcing the world branch to model near-term frame variations that are redundant and weakly informative. We posit that strictly binding world prediction and action execution to the same temporal rhythm may underutilize the potential of the video branch for embodied control. Therefore, we propose AHA-WAM, an Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Model built on a dual Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture that reorganizes world-action modeling around this temporal asymmetry. AHA-WAM instantiates the video DiT as a low-frequency world planner that maintains rolling key-value memory over past observations and exposes reusable layerwise latent context encoding long-horizon scene evolution, while a high-frequency action DiT executes short action chunks in closed loop by querying this context through layerwise joint attention. To support asynchronous execution, we introduce horizon-adaptive offset training and Observation-Guided Video-Context Routing (OVCR), which together let the action expert exploit long-horizon world context while remaining responsive to real-time execution state without rerunning the video DiT. Experiments on RoboTwin and real-world manipulation tasks show that AHA-WAM achieves state-of-the-art performance without any robot-data pretraining, attaining 92.80% average success on RoboTwin and 78.3% success across 4 real-world tasks, while reaching 24.17 Hz closed-loop control with a 4.59x speedup over Fast-WAM.

</details>


### [319] [iMaC: Translating Actions into Motion and Contact Images for Embodied World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09813)
*Zhenyu Wu,Xiuwei Xu,Yukun Zhou,Yifan Li,Qiuping Deng,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Bingyao Yu,Ziwei Wang,Jiwen Lu,Haibin Yan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出iMac（Image as Action Control）方法，将原始视觉图像作为具体化世界模型的本机动作表示，替代传统的低维结构化动作向量，实现更自然、泛化能力更强的机器人控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统具体化框架依赖低维结构化动作向量（如关节角度、末端执行器位姿），存在表达能力有限、跨不同实现方式泛化能力差、对复杂物理交互的动态建模不自然等问题。

Method: 提出iMac统一控制范式，将原始视觉图像作为本机动作表示，构建双分支具体化架构：图像-动作编码器将目标驱动视觉图像压缩为紧凑动作嵌入，动态世界预测器学习基于图像动作的环境转移规则，实现高保真未来状态预测和闭环具体化控制。

Result: 在公共具体化操作基准和真实世界机器人场景上的实验表明，iMac在预测精度、任务成功率和跨场景泛化能力方面优于基于向量的动作控制基线方法。

Conclusion: iMac消除了对手动定义动作空间的依赖，为异构具体化代理实现灵活通用的控制，为具体化世界模型提供了创新的视觉-动作视角，为可扩展机器人感知和操作提供了简单有效的范式。

Abstract: Embodied world models have emerged as a pivotal paradigm for visual robotic decision-making and interactive environment simulation. However, conventional embodied frameworks rely on low-dimensional structured action vectors (e.g., joint angles and end-effector poses), which suffer from limited expressive capacity, poor generalization across diverse embodiments, and unnatural dynamic modeling for complex physical interactions. To address these limitations, this paper proposesiMac (Image as Action Control), a novel unified control paradigm that treats raw visual images as native action representations for embodied world models. Departing from traditional explicit kinematic action encoding, iMac formulates continuous visual manipulation as image-based action tokens, which inherently encapsulate spatial motion intentions, interactive geometric constraints and subtle physical dynamics. We construct a dual-branch embodied architecture consisting of an image-action encoder and a dynamic world predictor: the encoder compresses target-driven visual images into compact action embeddings, while the predictor learns environment transition rules conditioned on image actions to achieve high-fidelity future state prediction and closed-loop embodied control. Extensive experiments are conducted on public embodied manipulation benchmarks and real-world robotic scenarios. The results demonstrate that iMac outperforms vector-based action control baselines in prediction accuracy, task success rate and cross-scene generalization ability. Moreover, our image-action design eliminates the reliance on manually defined action spaces, realizing flexible and universal control for heterogeneous embodied agents. This work provides an innovative visual-action perspective for embodied world models, offering a simple yet effective paradigm for scalable robotic perception and manipulation.

</details>


### [320] [MemoryVLA++: Temporal Modeling via Memory and Imagination in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09827)
*Hao Shi,Weiye Li,Bin Xie,Yulin Wang,Renping Zhou,Tiancai Wang,Xiangyu Zhang,Ping Luo,Gao Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: MemoryVLA++ 是一个为视觉语言动作模型配备记忆和想象能力的完整时序建模框架，通过工作记忆、感知-认知记忆库和世界模型实现机器人操作中的长期依赖任务处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大多数VLA模型主要依赖当前观察，难以处理长期依赖的时序任务。人类认知科学表明，工作记忆、海马体系统和内部模型对时序建模至关重要。因此需要为VLA模型配备类似人类的记忆和想象能力。

Method: 1) 预训练VLM编码当前观察为感知和认知token作为工作记忆；2) 感知-认知记忆库存储历史交互的低级细节和高级语义，通过冗余感知的巩固机制更新；3) 世界模型在降噪潜在空间中想象未来状态；4) 记忆引导下整合想象状态形成完整时序感知token；5) 扩散动作专家基于这些token预测时序一致的动作序列。

Result: 在5个仿真基准和3类真实机器人任务上进行了广泛实验，涵盖通用操作、长期时序任务、鲁棒性和泛化能力。在Libero、SimplerEnv、Mikasa-Robo、Calvin、Libero-Plus等基准上表现优异。在真实机器人任务中，通用任务提升9%，记忆依赖任务提升26%，想象依赖任务提升28%。

Conclusion: MemoryVLA++通过完整的记忆和想象机制实现了有效的时序建模，显著提升了VLA模型在长期依赖机器人操作任务中的性能，验证了基于认知科学启发的全时序建模框架的有效性。

Abstract: Temporal modeling is essential for robotic manipulation, as effective control requires both memory of past interactions and imagination of future states. However, most VLA models rely primarily on the current observation and therefore struggle with long-horizon, temporally dependent tasks. Cognitive science suggests that humans rely on working memory to buffer short-lived context, the hippocampal system to preserve episodic memory of past experience, and internal models to imagine possible future state evolution. Inspired by these mechanisms, we propose MemoryVLA++, a full temporal modeling framework that equips VLA models with memory and imagination for robotic manipulation. A pretrained VLM encodes the current observation into perceptual and cognitive tokens, forming working memory. These tokens query a Perceptual-Cognitive Memory Bank to retrieve relevant historical context. This bank stores low-level details and high-level semantics from past interactions, and is updated through redundancy-aware consolidation. A world model imagines future states in a denoising latent space, and the imagined latents are integrated under memory guidance to form full temporal-aware tokens. The resulting tokens condition a diffusion action expert to predict temporally consistent action sequences. We conduct extensive experiments on 5 simulation benchmarks and 3 categories of real-robot tasks across 3 robots, covering general manipulation, long-horizon temporal tasks, robustness, and generalization. Our method achieves strong performance across Libero, SimplerEnv, Mikasa-Robo, Calvin, Libero-Plus, and diverse real-robot tasks, validating the effectiveness of full temporal modeling with memory and imagination. For example, on real robots, it achieves +9%, +26%, +28% gains on general, memory-dependent, and imagination-dependent tasks. Project Page: https://shihao1895.github.io/MemoryVLA-PP-Web

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [321] [Offline Reinforcement Learning for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion: Codebase and Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07550)
*Yang Fu,Haomin Bao,Rohit Sonker,Xiaoyan Hu,Aravind Venugopal,Jeff Schneider,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了RL4F基准测试，用于评估核聚变等离子体控制的离线强化学习方法，基于真实DIII-D托卡马克数据构建评估环境，测试多种算法在多个控制任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习为从历史数据开发等离子体控制器提供了有前景的途径，但缺乏标准化的基准测试来评估多执行器、长时域等离子体控制问题的算法性能。

Method: 基于DIII-D托卡马克历史放电数据构建动力学函数，创建闭环评估环境，涵盖旋转、密度、温度和压力四个全剖面跟踪任务，在统一协议下评估多种模仿学习和离线RL基线方法。

Result: 离线模型基RL方法在大多数目标上获得最佳平均性能，但没有单一方法在所有任务上占优，强调了在复杂长时域等离子体控制任务中动力学建模的重要性。

Conclusion: RL4F基准为聚变社区和离线RL算法开发提供了标准化评估框架，开源了代码库、数据集和评估框架，促进该领域进一步研究。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a promising route for developing plasma controllers from historical tokamak data, since online trial-and-error on real devices is costly and risky. However, progress in this direction remains difficult to measure due to the lack of a standardized offline RL benchmark for realistic multi-actuator, long-horizon plasma control problems in nuclear fusion. We introduce RL4F, an Offline Reinforcement Learning Benchmark for Plasma Control in Nuclear Fusion, providing closed-loop evaluation environments and baseline comparisons across four full-profile tracking tasks: rotation, density, temperature, and pressure. The dynamics function underlying the evaluation environment is built from historical discharge data from DIII-D, a real-world Tokamak. We evaluate a broad set of imitation learning and offline RL baselines under a unified protocol. We find that offline model-based RL methods obtain the best average performance on most objectives, although no single method dominates all tasks, highlighting the importance of dynamics modeling in complex, long-horizon plasma control tasks. To foster further research, we open-source the codebase, datasets, and evaluation framework, providing a benchmark not only for the fusion community but also for algorithm development in offline RL.

</details>


### [322] [MedicalRec: Medical recommender system for image classification without retraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07553)
*Roghayeh Taghavi,Aysa Hasanazde Bashkandi,Amir Ali Bengari,Mohammad Amin Raji,Mohammad Salahi Ardekani,Parisa Mardukhian,Parvaneh Rezaei,Ramin Mousa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 开发了一个基于Transformer的医学图像分类模型推荐系统MedicalRec，使用包含5000多条记录的MedicalRec-Bench数据集，通过四种特征模式评估，在12个基础模型上达到最高75.5%的HitRate@100命中率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习在医疗领域的广泛应用带来了巨大的计算能耗和碳排放问题，而研究人员为分类任务选择合适模型时通常需要反复试错，这进一步加剧了能源消耗和浪费。因此需要开发一个模型推荐系统来优化模型选择过程。

Method: 收集了3000篇医学图像分类文献中的5000多条模型测试记录，构建了MedicalRec-Bench公开数据集，包含四种不同特征数量的模式（5、9、11、18个特征）。使用基于Transformer的MedicalRec模型进行项目推荐，处理数据集中存在的大量缺失值问题。

Result: MedicalRec模型在数据集评估和12个基础模型对比中表现优异，最高达到了75.5%的HitRate@100命中率。数据集和实现代码已通过GitHub公开。

Conclusion: 提出的MedicalRec推荐系统能够有效帮助研究人员选择合适的医学图像分类模型，减少试错过程中的能源消耗和浪费，为医疗AI的可持续发展提供解决方案。

Abstract: The emergence of machine learning and deep learning has revolutionized the efficiency of diagnostic, therapeutic, and administrative systems in healthcare. However, this rapid adoption has come at the cost of requiring significant computing power and energy consumption, as well as e-waste disposal and carbon emissions. One of the challenges of these models is choosing the right model for classification tasks. To this end, researchers attempt to identify the optimal model using their data through trial and error, which involves energy consumption and waste. The goal of this study is to develop a model-based recommender system for medical image classification. For this purpose, a data set was collected from 3,000 articles in the field of medical image classification. This dataset, publicly available under the name MedicalRec-Bench, contains over 5,000 records of models tested in various tasks, including Skin Cancer Classification, Tumour Classification, Wound Classification, Breast Cancer, and MRI classification. The dataset was evaluated in four different modes, depending on the number of features: MedicalRec I (5 features), MedicalRec II (9 features), MedicalRec III (11 features), and MedicalRec IV (18 features). Collecting all values for the features is challenging due to non-reporting by the authors; hence, the dataset contains significant amounts of missing values. The Medical Recommender System (MedicalRec) is a transformer-based model used for item recommendations in this study. This model achieved remarkable results in the evaluation on the dataset and in the evaluation with 12 base models. This model achieved a maximum HitRate@100 of 75.5%. The dataset and implementations are available through the GitHub link: https://github.com/Ramin1Mousa/MedicalRec

</details>


### [323] [SPIN: Decentralized Swarm Control via Tensorized Policy Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07557)
*Zhaowen Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPIN框架通过张量网络分解将多智能体联合策略计算复杂度从指数级降低到线性级，实现了资源受限边缘平台上的去中心化群协调。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 去中心化多智能体群协调在资源受限的边缘平台上存在两个根本瓶颈：联合动作空间的指数级扩展和高延迟通信开销。需要一种能够绕过这些限制的架构范式。

Method: 引入Swarm Policy Interference Network（SPIN）框架：1）将群拓扑建模为压缩张量网络，将局部多智能体小团的联合策略张量分解为矩阵乘积状态链；2）采用解耦的混合神经符号控制管道，本地多层神经网络作为结构协调编码器离线预训练，运行时通过Radon-Nikodým导数进行零样本重要性重加权。

Result: 将计算复杂度从指数级O(n^m)降低到线性级O(m·n·χ²)。在离散时间多智能体模拟沙箱中验证了跟踪、去中心化分散/区域覆盖和多目标协调等任务，实现了稳定的目标导向运动、反坍塌空间扩展和结构化子群形成。

Conclusion: SPIN框架为可处理、低功耗的边缘群智能提供了一条数学上严谨的路径，通过张量网络分解和混合神经符号控制实现了资源受限平台上的高效去中心化协调。

Abstract: Decentralized multi-agent swarm coordination on resource-constrained edge platforms remains fundamentally bottlenecked by the exponential scaling of joint action spaces and high-latency communication overhead. This paper introduces the Swarm Policy Interference Network (SPIN) framework, an architectural paradigm that bypasses these limitations by modeling swarm topologies as a compressed tensor network. We factorize the joint policy tensors of local multi-agent cliques into Matrix Product State (MPS) chains, reducing the computational complexity of evaluation from an exponential $O(n^m)$ wall to a strictly linear $O(m \cdot n \cdot χ^2)$ constraint. To bridge local continuous spatial geometry with this discrete algebraic backend without requiring power-intensive online training loops, we introduce a decoupled, hybrid neuro-symbolic control pipeline. Local multi-layered neural networks operate as structural coordination encoders, pre-trained offline to nonlinearly map hand-engineered geometric descriptors into abstract environmental target measures. At runtime, edge agents execute instantaneous behavioral adaptations by applying the Radon-Nikodým derivative directly as a zero-shot importance-reweighting filter. We validate the framework within a discrete-time multi-agent simulation sandbox spanning tracking, decentralized dispersion/area coverage, and multi-goal coordination regimes. Qualitative telemetry demonstrates that the integrated pipeline achieves stable target-directed motion, anti-collapse spatial spreading under decentralized constraints, and structured subgroup formation across multiple targets, providing a mathematically grounded route to tractable, low-power edge swarm intelligence.

</details>


### [324] [Boundary Variance Inflation Causes Acquisition Bias in Gaussian Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07561)
*Maria Bånkestad,Sanna Jarl,Jens Sjölund*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 高斯过程在边界区域后验方差膨胀的现象源于几何机制：边界截断了核相关邻域，造成观测无关的扭曲，随维度增加而恶化，导致采集函数行为被核几何而非目标任务主导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究高斯过程在边界区域后验方差膨胀的根源及其对贝叶斯优化中采集函数行为的影响。尽管这一现象在地统计学中长期被认识且在贝叶斯优化中导致过度探索，但其原因和影响尚未充分探索。

Method: 通过几何机制分析边界引起的核相关邻域截断效应，研究三类采集函数（方差最大化、负积分后验方差、期望预测信息增益）在边界区域的行为模式，并引入无函数选择剖面诊断方法。

Result: 方差最大化采集函数倾向于在角点集中选择，而负积分后验方差和期望预测信息增益则向轴对齐的内部壳层移动选择。这些模式与目标函数无关，表明采集行为可能被核几何主导而非任务特定不确定性。

Conclusion: 边界引起的采集偏差源于简单的几何机制，随维度增加而恶化，可能导致贝叶斯优化中的次优探索行为。引入的无函数诊断方法有助于量化任意采集函数、核函数和有界域几何中的这种偏差。

Abstract: Gaussian processes with stationary kernels on bounded domains exhibit inflated posterior variance near the boundary. Despite being a long-recognized artifact in geostatistics and a source of over-exploration in Bayesian optimization, the causes and effects of boundary-induced acquisition bias are underexplored. We trace the root cause to a simple geometric mechanism: the truncation of the kernel correlation neighborhood at the domain boundary creates an observation-independent distortion that worsens with dimensionality. We show how this distortion manifests across three acquisition classes: variance maximization concentrates selections at the corners, whereas negative integrated posterior variance and expected predictive information gain move selections inward to axis-aligned interior shells. These patterns arise without reference to any objective function, meaning that acquisition behavior can be dominated by kernel geometry rather than the desired task-specific uncertainty. To quantify this, we introduce a function-free selection-profile diagnostic for arbitrary acquisitions, kernels, and bounded-domain geometries.

</details>


### [325] [Emergence via Phase Transitions: Mechanism Landscapes and Universal Convergence Across Complex Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07563)
*Truong Xuan Khanh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出层次涌现框架（HEF）作为解释不同系统中收敛现象的候选普适性框架，通过相变模型描述机制竞争到收敛的转变，并在模块化算术变换器的延迟泛化（grokking）实验中验证了理论预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器学习、生物学和物理学中，独立演化的系统常常收敛到相似的高层结构，尽管微观细节完全不同。现有理论缺乏统一的数学框架来解释这种跨领域的收敛现象。

Method: 提出层次涌现框架（HEF），将涌现建模为受热力学和信息论定律约束的机制景观中的相变。引入临界能量阈值Ec区分探索机制竞争阶段和收敛到唯一最小成本机制阶段。通过结构假设证明物理可行性、严格度量收缩和向唯一固定点表示的收敛性。

Result: 在111个模块化算术变换器的延迟泛化实验中，92%的运行中权重范数在grokking前系统性达到峰值。归一化准确率曲线坍缩到tanh拐点（R^2=0.93），符合Landau-Ginzburg普适性类别。所有grokked模型收敛到0.9745±0.014，与初始化、权重衰减或训练分数无关（ANOVA p>0.13）。

Conclusion: HEF为研究复杂系统中的收敛现象提供了一个可证伪的数学框架，展示了跨领域收敛现象的统一解释潜力，但并非作为涌现的普适理论，而是作为研究工具。

Abstract: Across machine learning, biology, and physics, independently evolving systems often converge toward strikingly similar high-level structures despite radically different microscopic details. Grokking circuits converge across random seeds, evolutionary lineages rediscover similar metabolic solutions, and renormalization flows approach common fixed points. We propose the Hierarchical Emergence Framework (HEF) as a candidate universality framework for such convergence phenomena. HEF models emergence as a phase transition in a mechanism landscape constrained by thermodynamic and information-theoretic laws. The framework introduces a critical energy threshold Ec separating an exploration regime with competing mechanisms from a convergence regime governed by a unique minimum-cost mechanism.
