Result: 在植入真实情况的合成结构因果模型上验证：对比估计器能够恢复关键步骤，Shapley估计器能够恢复两步交互（效率总和0.909 vs 理论值0.91）。所有效应都报告了置信区间。CAR是开源的，可以在托管或免费本地模型上运行。

Conclusion: CAR通过因果干预方法有效解决了LLM智能体失败归因问题，相比现有方法（如LLM判断归因的14%准确率）提供了更可靠和可解释的故障诊断工具。

Abstract: When an LLM agent fails -- issues a refund it should not have, calls the wrong tool, leaks data -- existing tooling answers what happened (observability) or whether it passed (evaluation), but not which step caused the failure. The obvious heuristics are wrong: the step that executes the harmful action is usually not the step that decided on it, and LLM-judge attribution is correlational and unreliable (state-of-the-art step-level accuracy on the Who&When benchmark is about 14%). We present Causal Agent Replay (CAR), which answers the question by intervention: it models an agent run as a structural causal model, applies a do-operation to a step, and re-executes the trajectory forward under the same stochastic policy, measuring the shift in the outcome distribution. We define an intervention algebra over agent steps, a single-step contrastive estimator whose point-of-commitment rule resolves a confound specific to stochastic run-forward, and a budget-bounded Monte-Carlo Shapley estimator that splits credit across interacting steps. Every effect is reported with confidence intervals. We validate against synthetic structural causal models with planted ground truth: the contrastive estimator recovers the pivotal step, and Shapley recovers a two-step interaction (0.44, 0.45, ~0; efficiency sum 0.909 versus the analytic 0.91). CAR is open source and runs on hosted or free local models.

</details>


### [438] [Mesh Graph Neural Network Framework for Accelerating Finite Element Simulation for Arbitrary Geometries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08287)
*Josiah D. Kunz,Kamal Choudhary*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于网格图网络（MGN）的机器学习替代模型，用于预测具有任意孔洞几何形状的2D结构部件的von Mises应力场，实现了对未见几何形状和载荷条件的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 有限元分析（FEA）在结构设计中至关重要，但计算成本高昂，特别是在评估多个设计迭代或载荷场景时。现有的机器学习替代模型大多难以在不同几何形状之间泛化，这是实际工程应用中的关键限制。

Method: 提出了一种网格图网络（MGN）架构，该架构基于现有MGN框架，编码节点类型（如固定边界、自由表面、孔洞边缘）、相对边缘特征（相邻节点之间的距离）和全局特征（施加的载荷）。这种架构具有固有的平移和旋转不变性，能够在无需重新训练的情况下泛化到未见几何形状。

Result: 模型在11种板几何形状和20种载荷条件下训练，并在7种未见几何形状和3种未见载荷条件下评估。在最有利的情况下，模型在未见几何形状和未见载荷条件下达到R²≥0.97，而传统模型（随机森林、梯度提升、K最近邻）在相同数据上训练的R²仅为0.01-0.86。即使在不太有利的情况下，MGN模型仍优于传统模型。

Conclusion: 该工作将Pfaff等人（arXiv:2010.03409）的基于网格的模拟框架扩展到结构力学领域，证明图神经网络可以作为有限元分析的高效替代模型，在不同几何形状之间实现泛化。

Abstract: Finite element analysis (FEA) is essential for structural design but remains computationally expensive, particularly when evaluating multiple design iterations or load scenarios. Machine learning surrogate models offer a promising alternative, yet most approaches struggle with a critical limitation: generalizing across varying geometries. This work presents a mesh graph network (MGN) for predicting von Mises stress fields in 2D structural components with arbitrary hole geometries. Unlike traditional machine learning approaches that use absolute node coordinates as features, the proposed model builds on existing MGN frameworks that encode node types (e.g., fixed boundary, free surface, hole edge), relative edge features (distance between neighbors), and global features (applied load). This architecture is inherently translation- and rotation-invariant, enabling generalization to unseen geometries without retraining. The MGN was trained on 11 plate geometries under 20 load conditions and evaluated on 7 unseen geometries and 3 unseen loads. In the most favorable case, the model achieves $R^2 \geq 0.97$ on an unseen geometry and unseen load, compared to $R^2 \approx 0.01$--$0.86$ for conventional models (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting , K-Nearest Neighbors) trained on identical data. However, even in less favorable cases, the MGN model still outperforms conventional models. This work extends the mesh-based simulation framework of Pfaff et al. (arXiv:2010.03409) to structural mechanics, demonstrating that graph neural networks can serve as efficient surrogates for finite element analysis across varying geometries.

</details>


### [439] [On solving symmetric multi-type orthogonal non-negative matrix tri-factorization problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08291)
*Rok Hribar,Gregor Papa,Janez Povh,Andrej Kastrin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了对称多类型正交非负矩阵三因子分解问题，开发了两种启发式算法来求解，并在合成数据和真实网络数据上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 该研究的动机源于聚类和网络分析的需求。非负性提高了模型的解释性，而正交性为潜在因子赋予了自然的分配型结构。这种模型能够同时近似多个对称非负矩阵，适用于多关系网络分析。

Method: 提出了两种启发式算法：1）基于KKT条件的固定点方法，通过添加正交性约束的惩罚项；2）三阶段ADAM方法，结合了非负保持优化、正交化和可行集上的受限ADAM精炼。

Result: 在合成数据上，两种算法都能恢复接近最优的分解，并在噪声下保持稳定。在真实网络数据上，学习到的嵌入在链接预测、节点聚类和节点分类任务中优于或与SVD、node2vec等基线方法相当。

Conclusion: 该研究提出的对称多类型正交非负矩阵三因子分解模型及其求解算法是有效的，能够为网络分析提供高质量的局部解，并在实际应用中表现出竞争力。

Abstract: We study the symmetric multi-type orthogonal non-negative matrix tri-factorization problem, where several symmetric non-negative matrices are simultaneously approximated by factors of the form $GS_{i}G^{\top}$, with a shared non-negative and orthogonal factor $G$. This model is motivated by clustering and network analysis, where non-negativity improves interpretability and orthogonality gives a natural assignment-type structure to the latent factor. Since the resulting optimization problem is highly non-convex, we develop two heuristic algorithms for computing high-quality local solutions. The first one is a fixed point method derived from the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker conditions after adding a penalty term for the orthogonality constraint. The second one is a three-stage ADAM-based method that combines non-negativity-preserving optimization, orthogonalization, and restricted ADAM refinement on the feasible set. We evaluate both methods on synthetic data, including noisy instances, and on citation network benchmarks. The synthetic experiments show that both algorithms recover factorizations close to the optimum and remain stable under noise. On real networks, the learned embeddings are competitive with or better than standard baselines such as SVD, node2vec, and classical link prediction heuristics in link prediction, node clustering, and node classification tasks.

</details>


### [440] [QueryWeaver: Reliable Multi-Tool Query Execution Planning via LLM-Based Graph Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08300)
*Aishwarya Chakravarthy,Vidhi Kulkarni,Duen Horng Chau*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个将自然语言查询转换为结构化图并通过确定性规划器执行的系统，用于跨多工具的复杂查询


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中对个人数据的查询通常涉及多个应用程序，而单个工具只能提供部分信息。虽然大语言模型在推理和工具使用方面表现强大，但可靠地执行多步骤、跨工具的查询仍然具有挑战性

Method: 将自然语言查询转换为结构化图，使用深度优先搜索解决依赖关系并通过确定性规划器执行，实现跨工具的结果组合

Result: 提高了查询的可靠性，能够处理超越传统基于关键词搜索的复杂查询，即使使用较小或本地部署的大语言模型也能实现高准确性

Conclusion: 通过结构化图和确定性规划的方法，可以有效解决跨多工具的多步骤查询问题，为复杂数据查询提供了可靠的技术方案

Abstract: Many real-world queries over personal data span multiple applications and require structured planning, as individual tools expose only partial information. While LLMs show strong reasoning and tool use, reliably executing multi-step, cross-tool queries remains challenging. We introduce a system that converts natural language queries into structured graphs and executes them via a deterministic planner. Our approach uses depth-first search to resolve dependencies and combine results across tools, improving reliability and enabling queries beyond traditional keyword-based search. We demonstrate high accuracy even with smaller or locally hosted LLMs.

</details>


### [441] [GeoGNN: Time Series Geo-Localization using Two-Tower Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08303)
*Toan Tran,Waqwoya Abebe,Abhishek Potnis,Supriya Chinthavali,Cyrus Shahabi,Li Xiong,Dalton Lunga*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了时间序列地理定位的新概念，旨在从原始时间序列推断地理来源，并提出了GeoGNN双塔架构，通过在电力消费数据集上的实验验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列通常缺乏空间信息，成功的地理定位可以为时间序列提供空间上下文，支持下游位置感知应用。

Method: 提出GeoGNN双塔架构：空间塔通过地理邻接图学习候选地理单元的嵌入，时间塔从时间序列中提取信息表示。推理时通过点积相似度和辅助分类头预测地理来源。

Result: 在大规模全国电力消费数据集上的实验表明，GeoGNN在所有数据集上均取得最佳性能，将细粒度和粗粒度地理定位准确率平均提高约27%。

Conclusion: GeoGNN有效解决了时间序列地理定位问题，为时间序列提供了空间上下文，支持位置感知应用。

Abstract: This paper investigates a novel concept of time series geolocalization, where the goal is to infer the geographic origin of each raw time series. Successful geolocalization can provide spatial context to time series, enabling downstream location-aware applications. We formalize the problem, adapt core ideas from image geolocalization to establish strong baselines, and propose GeoGNN, a two-tower architecture. During training, GeoGNN's spatial tower learns embeddings of geographic cell candidates by leveraging the geographic adjacency graph, while the temporal tower extracts informative representations from time series. During inference, each temporal representation is matched against candidate geographic embeddings using dot-product similarity, combined with an auxiliary classification head, to predict the time series' associated geographic origin. Experiments on large-scale, countrywide electricity-consumption datasets demonstrate that GeoGNN achieves the best performance across datasets and enhances both fine- and coarse-grained geolocalization accuracy by ~27% on average.

</details>


### [442] [Towards Graph Foundation Models for Dynamics in Complex Networked Systems: Lessons from Super-Spreader Identification in Multilayer Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08306)
*Michał Czuba,Mateusz Stolarski,Adam Piróg,Piotr Bielak,Piotr Bródka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了网络动力学领域的图基础模型(GFMs)需要具备跨网络归纳泛化能力，并通过TS-Net模型在多层网络上的零样本泛化实验验证了这一方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前网络动力学研究（如传播、影响力最大化、流行病建模）主要局限于转导范式，模型在单一网络上训练后无法直接应用于未见过的网络。作者认为跨网络的归纳泛化能力是构建网络动力学领域图基础模型的必要前提。

Method: 提出了实现跨网络归纳泛化的四个设计属性，并开发了TS-Net（TopSpreadersNetwork）作为概念验证。TS-Net仅在合成的多层网络上进行训练，然后零样本泛化到真实世界的多层网络，无论其规模和层数如何。

Result: TS-Net在四个评估指标中的三个上超越了经典启发式方法和转导基线，证明了其在真实世界多层网络上具有良好的零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: 基于TS-Net的性能表现，作者进一步提出了构建网络动力学图基础模型的五个开放挑战：规模扩展、多层泛化、自监督预训练、跨任务迁移和节点属性集成。

Abstract: Network dynamics - including spreading, influence maximisation, and epidemic modelling - remain largely confined to the transductive paradigm, where models are trained on a single network and cannot be reused on unseen graphs without retraining. We argue that inductive cross-network generalisation is a necessary prerequisite for Graph Foundation Models (GFMs) in this domain and propose four design properties towards this goal. As a proof of concept, ts-net (TopSpreadersNetwork), trained solely on synthetic multilayer networks (MLNs), demonstrates zero-shot generalisation to real-world MLNs of varying size and layer count, outperforming classical heuristics and transductive baselines on three of four metrics. Based on ts-net's performance, we further outline five open challenges towards building GFMs for network dynamics: scale, many-layer generalisation, self-supervised pretraining, cross-task transfer, and node-attribute integration.

</details>


### [443] [Fourier fractal dimension to predict the generalization of deep neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08308)
*Joao B. Florindo,Davi Wanderley Misturini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于傅里叶分形维度的神经网络泛化能力度量方法，通过分析权重变化的频率特征来预测模型泛化性能，并设计相应的优化器进行正则化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络在高度参数化情况下，随机梯度下降的厚尾非高斯动态导致参数空间产生复杂的尺度不变轨迹，需要不依赖验证数据的泛化性能预测方法。

Method: 基于网络权重变化的傅里叶分形维度构建泛化度量，通过分析Lévy驱动随机微分方程的特征函数在频域提取几何复杂度指标，并设计傅里叶基优化器主动正则化分形维度。

Result: 在CIFAR-10、SVHN和MNIST数据集上验证，傅里叶泛化度量与实际泛化差距强相关，获得最先进的Kendall秩相关系数，优于现有范数基、边界基和PAC-Bayesian度量。

Conclusion: 频域分形分析既可作为模型泛化能力的强大预测器，也可为开发更稳定优化算法提供理论基础，展示了频率域分析在深度学习中的潜力。

Abstract: Predicting the generalization performance of deep neural networks without relying on hold-out validation data is a fundamental challenge in machine learning. While Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) drives the optimization of these highly parameterized models, its heavy-tailed, non-Gaussian dynamics induce complex, scale-invariant trajectories in the parameter space. In this paper, we propose a novel generalization measure based on the Fourier fractal dimension of the network's weight variations. By analyzing the characteristic function of the Lévy-driven stochastic differential equations in the frequency domain, we extract a metric that robustly captures the geometric complexity of the learning process. Furthermore, we introduce a customized Fourier-based optimizer designed to actively regularize this fractal dimension during training. Extensive empirical evaluations on the CIFAR-10, SVHN, and MNIST datasets demonstrate that our proposed Fourier generalization measure exhibits a strong correlation with the actual generalization gap. Our method achieves state-of-the-art Kendall rank correlation coefficients, outperforming a wide array of existing norm-based, margin-based, and PAC-Bayesian measures. Ultimately, this work highlights the potential of frequency-domain fractal analysis as both a powerful predictor for model generalizability and a principled foundation for developing more stable optimization algorithms.

</details>


### [444] [Where the Score Lives: A Wavelet View of Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08309)
*Emma Finn,Binxu Wang,T. Anderson Keller,Demba E. Ba*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于2D正交小波基的可解析求解的分数函数参数化方法，通过数据分布的矩来推导可解释的最优分数函数，用于分析不同架构对生成行为的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于分数的生成模型在各种视觉图像生成方面取得了显著成功，但不同架构选择（如CNN、U-Net、Transformer）如何影响生成行为的研究相对较少。作者希望深入理解架构选择对扩散模型生成行为的影响机制。

Method: 提出使用2D正交小波基展开来参数化分数函数，推导出基于数据分布矩的可解释最优分数函数。该方法能够进行架构无关的、基于矩的分析，揭示数据分布中哪些属性对去噪最重要。分数机器足够灵活，可以部分模仿多种架构的相关归纳偏置。

Result: 建立了可解析求解的分数函数参数化框架，能够通过数据分布的矩来理解最优分数函数。该方法提供了对扩散模型中数据分布与分数网络交互如何产生观察到的生成行为的洞察。

Conclusion: 通过小波基参数化方法，为理解不同分数架构展现不同生成行为的原因迈出了重要一步。该框架允许从矩的角度分析数据分布与分数网络的相互作用，为扩散模型的架构选择提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Score-based generative models have had remarkable success over the last decade in generating a diverse set of visually plausible images. A variety of architectures including CNNs, U-Nets, and Transformers have been used as the score-approximation network in such diffusion modeling; however, to date, relatively little is known about how these architectural choices impact generative behavior. In this work, to provide insight into this area, we propose an analytically solvable parameterization of the score function using an expansion in a 2D orthogonal wavelet basis. In particular, we derive interpretable optimal score functions in terms of the moments of the data distribution. We use this parametrization to provide an architecture-agnostic, moment-based analysis that reveals which attributes of the data distribution tend to matter most for denoising. Our score machine is flexible enough to partially mimic the relevant inductive biases of multiple architectures, including U-Nets, and CNNs, taking a step towards understanding why different score architectures can exhibit distinct generative behavior. Since our score is solvable in terms of the moments of the data, we can begin to understand how the data distribution interacts with the score network to produce the behavior we observe in diffusion models.

</details>


### [445] [Orthogonality and Dimensionality in Airline Cluster Analysis using PCA and Kernel PCA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08322)
*Andreas Schlapbach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究复制了Renold等人(2023)的航空公司利润周期聚类分析，通过多种降维和核方法验证了六聚类结构的几何鲁棒性，但轮廓系数显示数据实际上只支持三个结构簇。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证Renold等人(2023)关于美国航空公司利润周期六聚类分类的稳健性，探索不同降维空间和核方法下的聚类一致性，并识别数据内在的聚类结构。

Method: 使用k-means聚类在三个不同空间进行复制：原始7维变量空间、3维主成分得分空间和4维主成分得分空间；采用核主成分分析（KPCA）作为非线性检验，使用六个核函数覆盖三个核族；通过轮廓系数评估聚类质量。

Result: 六聚类分类在几何上是鲁棒的：3维主成分空间中的k-means聚类与7维原始空间产生完全相同的聚类分配；所有六个核函数在2维空间中都能保持六聚类分配；轮廓系数分析显示数据集实际上只支持三个结构簇，原始7维空间中的共线性抑制了轮廓信号。

Conclusion: 虽然六聚类分类在几何上具有鲁棒性，但数据的内在结构实际上只支持三个聚类。原始高维空间中的共线性问题掩盖了数据真实的聚类结构，降维方法有助于揭示这一本质特征。

Abstract: To characterize the US airline profit cycles from 1995 to 2020, the authors of Renold et al. (2023) combine k-means clustering, principal component analysis, and system dynamic modelling. We replicate their clustering experiment in three spaces -- the original 7-dimensional raw-variable space, a 3-dimensional PC score space, and a 4-dimensional PC score space using their dataset gratefully included in the paper. We show that the six-cluster taxonomy is geometrically robust: k-means in 3-PC space produces bit-for-bit identical cluster assignments relative to 7D raw space. As a nonlinearity check we apply kernel PCA under six kernels spanning three families plus a linear baseline. All six kernels preserve the six-cluster assignment in 2D. A 1D diagnostic tightens this: the linear kernel conflates the COVID year C_3 with the peak-profit cluster C_0, whereas all five non-baseline kernels shift C_3 to overlap only the post-financial-crisis cluster C_5. Agreement across the kernel families confirms an intrinsically linear manifold with no hidden curvature. The silhouette criterion reveals that the dataset structurally supports only three clusters, not six. Collinearity in the raw 7D space suppresses the silhouette signal that would otherwise identify k=3 as the structurally motivated choice.

</details>


### [446] [GENERIC-FNO: Embedding Energy Conservation and Entropy Production into Fourier Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08343)
*Jason Sulskis,Sathya Ravi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GENERIC-FNO是首个在函数空间中嵌入完整GENERIC（度量辛）结构（可逆能量守恒动力学和不可逆熵产生动力学通过退化条件耦合）的神经算子。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有结构保持神经算子最多只能强制执行单一守恒定律或可逆（哈密顿）结构，而热力学一致学习仅限于有限维、图或粒子系统。需要填补这一空白。

Method: 将能量和熵泛函学习为神经算子，将泊松算子和摩擦算子参数化为对角傅里叶乘子，夹在秩一投影之间，通过构造精确强制执行退化条件，无需惩罚项、更新投影或残差。

Result: 退化恒等式达到机器精度（残差~10^-13），连续时间动力学精确守恒学习到的能量并产生熵；显式时间步进仅添加小的O(dt^2)漂移（每步残差~10^-6）。在三个算子骨干（1D/2D FNOs和DeepONet）和四个跨越可逆、耗散和混合机制的PDE上，GENERIC-FNO在4倍超分辨率范围内保持精确结构保证，恢复物理耗散的真实顺序，性能与强无约束和能量惩罚基线相当或更好。

Conclusion: GENERIC-FNO首次在函数空间中实现了完整的热力学一致结构保持学习，为不可逆热力学系统的神经网络建模提供了严格的理论保证和优异的性能。

Abstract: We introduce GENERIC-FNO, the first neural operator to embed the full GENERIC (metriplectic) structure of nonequilibrium thermodynamics -- reversible, energy-conserving dynamics and irreversible, entropy-producing dynamics coupled through the degeneracy conditions -- directly in function space. Existing structure-preserving neural operators enforce at most a single conservation law or reversible (Hamiltonian) structure, while thermodynamically consistent learning has been confined to finite-dimensional, graph, or particle systems. GENERIC-FNO closes this gap: it learns the energy and entropy functionals as neural operators and parameterizes the Poisson and friction operators as diagonal Fourier multipliers sandwiched between rank-one projections that enforce the degeneracy conditions exactly, by construction, with no penalty term, update projection, or residual. The degeneracy identities hold to machine precision (residuals ~10^-13) for any initialization, dimension, or resolution, so the continuous-time dynamics conserve the learned energy and produce entropy exactly; the explicit time stepping adds only a small O(dt^2) drift (per-step residual ~10^-6). We further note that the (E,S,L,M) decomposition of a given flow is not unique, and introduce a gauge-invariant dissipation diagnostic separating reversible from dissipative dynamics independently of the learned functionals. Across three operator backbones (1D/2D FNOs and DeepONet) and four PDEs spanning reversible, dissipative, and mixed regimes, GENERIC-FNO preserves its exact structural guarantees zero-shot across a 4x super-resolution range (64 to 256), recovers the ground-truth ordering of physical dissipation, and is competitive with strong unconstrained and energy-penalized baselines, outperforming them on several dissipative and mixed problems at comparable or fewer parameters.

</details>


### [447] [Generative Frontier Planning for Adaptive Peer-Referral Recruitment under Covariate-Dependent Arrivals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08360)
*Lingkai Kong,Hezi Jiang,Andrew Ma,Keyu Wang,Akseli Kangaslahti,Milind Tambe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了Generative Frontier Planning（GFP）方法，用于优化受访者驱动抽样中的招募资源分配，通过生成式模型处理现实中的同质性和共享情境影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的受访者驱动抽样系统假设推荐是独立同分布的，忽略了现实中的同质性和共享情境对推荐过程的影响，这限制了招募效率的优化。

Method: 提出GFP方法，使用删失计数模型和条件生成模型从数据中学习推荐能力和被推荐者特征，通过确定性备份在潜在特征-覆盖值代理上进行规划，避免蒙特卡洛采样。

Result: 在基于真实受访者驱动抽样数据集的模拟环境中，GFP在四个折现因子下均优于随机分配、强化学习和i.i.d.动态规划基线方法。

Conclusion: GFP方法能够有效处理现实推荐系统中的同质性和情境依赖性，为公共卫生机构优化隐藏人群招募提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Peer-referral recruitment systems such as respondent-driven sampling are critical for studying and intervening on hidden populations affected by infectious diseases. To accelerate recruitment, public health agencies must adaptively allocate limited referral resources across multiple rounds, where current decisions shape both the number and the covariates of future recruits. Prior work makes this problem tractable by assuming that referrals are drawn i.i.d.\ from a homogeneous population, an assumption that ignores the homophily and shared context that drive real peer recruitment. We instead consider a more realistic model in which both referral capacity and the covariates of newly referred individuals are conditioned on the referrer, learned from data with a censored count model and a conditional generative model. The resulting planning problem is challenging because each candidate allocation induces a different distribution over future recruits. We propose \emph{Generative Frontier Planning} (GFP), a model-based planner that replaces per-step Monte-Carlo sampling with a deterministic backup over a latent covariate-coverage value surrogate. The surrogate is designed so that the expected value of the next frontier depends on the offspring generative model only through finite-dimensional summaries that are amortized offline, and so that the resulting per-round objective is monotone with diminishing returns. Together, these two properties make planning tractable: the deterministic backup eliminates Monte-Carlo sampling, and the diminishing-returns structure lets a marginal greedy allocation achieve a \((1-1/e)\)-approximation for the per-round problem. On a simulation environment calibrated to a real respondent-driven sampling dataset, GFP outperforms random, reinforcement-learning, and i.i.d.\ dynamic-programming baselines across four discount factors.

</details>


### [448] [Pre-Intervention Prediction of Sparse Autoencoder Steering Side Effects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08365)
*Evan Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种预干预筛选框架，用于在稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征引导前预测其副作用，通过特征统计量评估引导的模块化程度（效应稳定性和副作用扩散），并在多个模型和SAE字典设置上验证预测效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAE）特征被越来越多地用于引导语言模型，但特征引导往往不"干净"：相同的干预在不同上下文中的行为不一致，并可能扰动无关特征。因此，需要一种在引导前预测副作用的方法，以提高引导的可控性和可靠性。

Method: 提出了一个预干预筛选框架，利用引导前计算的特征统计量来预测SAE引导的副作用。将副作用操作化为两个模块化维度：效应稳定性（effect stability）和副作用扩散（collateral spread）。评估了GPT-2-small、Pythia-70M-deduped、Gemma-2-2B和Llama-3.1-8B模型在ReLU、JumpReLU和TopK SAE字典上的表现。使用解码器几何结构、激活统计量、共激活结构和直接logit足迹等特征作为预测因子。

Result: 解码器几何结构、激活统计量、共激活结构和直接logit足迹等特征统计量比仅使用频率和激活幅度的基线方法能更好地预测引导模块化。预测信号在GPT-2-small、Pythia-70M和Llama-3.1-8B中最强，在Gemma-2-2B中较弱。留出筛选显示，按预测的"清洁度"排序未见特征可以选择在新鲜上下文中引导更干净的特征，但成功的维度因设置而异：GPT-2在清洁度上改善最明显，Pythia主要在稳定性上改善，Llama主要在副作用扩散上改善，Gemma仅部分改善。在Llama的字典宽度比较中，预测信号在32K到128K字典宽度变化下仍然存在，但筛选收益变得不太稳定。

Conclusion: SAE引导的副作用可以在引导前进行预测，但有用的预测信号特征和传递的模块化维度取决于具体的模型和字典设置。这表明需要针对不同模型和设置定制预测方法，而不是采用统一的解决方案。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features are increasingly used to steer language models, but feature steering is rarely clean: the same intervention can behave inconsistently across contexts and perturb unrelated features. We introduce a pre-intervention screening framework for forecasting SAE steering side effects from feature statistics computed before steering. We operationalize side effects along two axes of steering modularity, effect stability and collateral spread, and evaluate GPT-2-small, Pythia-70M-deduped, Gemma-2-2B, and Llama-3.1-8B across ReLU, JumpReLU, and TopK SAE dictionaries. Across these settings, decoder geometry, activation statistics, co-activation structure, and direct-logit footprint predict steering modularity better than frequency-only and activation-magnitude baselines. The signal is strongest in GPT-2-small, Pythia-70M, and Llama-3.1-8B, where it survives residualization against magnitude-related confounds, and weaker in Gemma-2-2B. Held-out screening shows that ranking unseen features by predicted cleanliness can select features that steer more cleanly on fresh contexts, but the successful axis varies by setting: GPT-2 improves most cleanly, Pythia improves mainly on stability, Llama mainly on collateral, and Gemma only partially. A controlled Llama Scope width comparison shows that the predictive signal persists under a 32K-to-128K dictionary-width change, although the screening payoff becomes less stable. Overall, SAE steering side effects are predictable in advance, but the useful predictor signature and transferred modularity axis are model- and dictionary-setting dependent.

</details>


### [449] [An Information-Theoretic Definition for Open-Ended Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08369)
*Wanqiao Xu,Yifan Zhu,Benjamin Van Roy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于信息论的开放终结性定义，引入"比特等价"概念来衡量达到特定奖励水平所需的信息量，并设计了能够实现开放终结学习的算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前AI系统在开放环境中持续扩展能力的研究日益增多，但缺乏对开放终结性的统一定义和相关理论。现有研究无法明确解释在开放环境中智能体应如何进行探索。

Method: 引入"比特等价"这一信息论概念，量化达到每个预期奖励水平所需的信息量。定义环境为开放终结的条件是智能体能够实现比特等价的线性增长。建立了经典老虎机环境不是开放终结的证明，并设计了一个开放终结的老虎机环境及相应的学习算法。

Result: 证明了经典老虎机环境无法实现开放终结学习，而新设计的环境能够支持开放终结学习。提出的算法在该环境中能够实现比特等价的线性增长，从而满足开放终结性要求。

Conclusion: 该研究为开放终结性提供了首个信息论定义和理论框架，填补了该领域的概念空白。提出的比特等价概念和算法为实现真正的开放终结学习奠定了基础，为未来AI系统在开放环境中的持续能力扩展提供了理论指导。

Abstract: A growing body of work points to the great promise of AI systems that can continually expand their capabilities as they operate in an open-ended environment. But yet there is no coherent definition of open-endedness or theory about how an agent ought to explore an open-ended environment. We introduce an information-theoretic definition based on a new concept -- the ${\textit bit-equivalent}$ -- which quantifies the information required to attain each level of expected reward. We consider an environment to be open-ended if an agent can attain linear growth in the bit-equivalent. We establish that classical bandit environments are not open-ended and formulate a bandit environment that is. We also introduce an algorithm that achieves open-ended learning in this environment.

</details>


### [450] [Few-step Cofolding with All-Atom Flow Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08375)
*Gianluca Scarpellini,Ron Shprints,Peter Holderrieth,Juno Nam,Pranav Murugan,Rafael Gómez-Bombarelli,Tommi Jaakola,Maruan Al-Shedivat,Nicholas Matthew Boffi,Avishek Joey Bose*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DeCAF是一个将全原子共折叠模型蒸馏为全原子流映射的框架，能够在少量推理步骤中生成高质量样本，显著减少计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前全原子生物分子复合物生成模型需要昂贵的迭代扩散过程，导致传统部署和推理时搜索技术计算成本高昂。

Method: 基于去噪器的流映射公式，支持SE(3)刚性对齐；通过变量变换在EDM风格架构的σ空间噪声调度中操作；结合流映射前瞻进行奖励引导搜索。

Result: DeCAF-Boltz在严格NFE预算下在RMSD和物理有效性得分上优于Boltz-1x；DeCAF-Pearl使用5倍更少的NFE匹配其教师模型的成功率。

Conclusion: DeCAF框架成功将最先进的全原子共折叠模型蒸馏为高效的流映射模型，显著降低了计算成本同时保持了生成质量。

Abstract: All-atom generative modeling of 3D biomolecular complexes has emerged as the dominant paradigm for predicting the structure of proteins and protein-ligand systems. Generating structures at the atomic level of fidelity, however, typically requires expensive iterative diffusion rollouts, making both conventional deployment and inference-time search techniques computationally costly. In this paper, we introduce the Denoiser Cofolding All-Atom Flowmap (DeCAF) framework for distilling state-of-the-art all-atom cofolding models into all-atom flow maps that produce high-quality samples in only a few inference steps. We build DeCAF on a denoiser-based formulation of flow maps with endpoint losses that naturally support SE(3) rigid alignment, which we show is critical for training accurate models. We further derive a simple change of variables that lets DeCAF operate in the σ-space noise schedule of EDM-style architectures, enabling direct distillation from pretrained cofolding diffusion models. Equipped with DeCAF's flowmap lookahead, we introduce a purpose-built inference-time framework that improves sampling through reward-guided search. Empirically, DeCAF-Boltz statistically improves over Boltz-1x in both accuracy (RMSD) and physical validity scores of protein-ligand poses at strict NFE budgets on the challenging Runs N' Poses, while also showing a more optimal Pareto frontier across all inference compute budgets on PoseBusters. Distilling the state-of-the-art Pearl cofolding model, DeCAF-Pearl outperforms diffusion-based cofolding models and matches its teacher on success rate while using 5x fewer NFEs. We release our code at https://github.com/genesistherapeutics/decaf.

</details>


### [451] [RiskNet: A large-scale dataset of AI risk incidents from news with alignment and multi-dimensional annotations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08376)
*Leihan Zhang,Wecheng Ye,Xianlong Ma,Haochuan Liu,Yang Li,Qianyu Zhang,Jinliang Chen,Qiang Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RiskNet是一个大规模AI风险事件数据集，通过多语言新闻源构建，支持AI安全、治理和风险分析研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI系统在社会关键领域部署增加，AI相关危害事件频发且多样化。现有治理框架虽有高层原则，但缺乏大规模实证资源来追踪和分析真实世界的AI风险事件。现有事件收集通常手工整理、规模较小，不适合持续的数据驱动监控和计算分析。

Method: RiskNet采用结构化流水线处理：AI风险新闻识别、事件级报告筛选、事件对齐和多维度事件分类。基于大规模多语言新闻源，将分散的新闻报道组织成以事件为中心的记录，并提供事件分类、事件对齐和事件级风险标注的基准数据集。

Result: RiskNet当前版本覆盖数亿条源记录，产生了大规模AI风险相关报告集合，包括对齐的事件聚类和标注的基准子集。数据集可通过在线平台浏览和探索，并提供了数据源、处理流程、分类法设计和资源技术验证的详细描述。

Conclusion: RiskNet旨在支持AI安全、治理、风险分析和基准测试的下游研究，以及AI相关危害的纵向和跨源分析。通过提供结构化和可重用的实证资源，RiskNet有助于弥合高层治理原则与AI风险事件现实记录之间的差距。

Abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across socially consequential domains, reports of AI-related harms and failures have grown in frequency and diversity. Although existing governance frameworks articulate high-level principles for responsible AI, large-scale empirical resources for tracking and analyzing real-world AI risk incidents remain limited. Existing incident collections are often manually curated, relatively small in scale, and insufficient for continuous, data-driven monitoring and downstream computational analysis. To address this need, we present RiskNet, a large-scale dataset of AI risk incidents constructed from large-scale multilingual news sources. RiskNet applies a structured pipeline for AI risk news identification, event-level report screening, incident alignment, and multi-dimensional incident classification. The resulting resource organizes dispersed news reports into incident-centered records and provides benchmark datasets for event classification, incident alignment, and incident-level risk labeling. In its current release, RiskNet covers hundreds of millions of source records and yields a large-scale collection of AI risk-related reports, including aligned incident clusters and annotated benchmark subsets. The dataset is also accessible through an online platform for browsing and exploration. We describe the data sources, processing workflow, taxonomy design, and technical validation of the resource. RiskNet is intended to support downstream research on AI safety, governance, risk analysis, and benchmarking, as well as longitudinal and cross-source analyses of AI-related harms. By providing a structured and reusable empirical resource, RiskNet helps bridge the gap between high-level governance principles and the documented realities of AI risk incidents.

</details>


### [452] [STAR-KV: Low-Rank KV Cache Compression via Soft Thresholding for Adaptive Rank Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08382)
*Priyansh Bhatnagar,Ashkan Moradifirouzabadi,Se-Hyun Yang,SeungJae Lee,Jungwook Choi,Mingu Kang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STAR-KV 是一个自适应的低秩KV缓存压缩框架，通过细粒度秩控制、混合分解策略和低秩感知混合精度量化，实现高达75%的KV缓存压缩和20倍的整体缓存减少，同时提升推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低秩投影方法依赖固定或启发式秩选择，难以在实现激进压缩的同时最小化精度损失，需要更智能的自适应压缩方案。

Method: STAR-KV包含三个核心技术：1) 可微阈值机制实现注意力头和块级的最优秩选择；2) 根据键值投影敏感度应用不同低秩分解的混合策略；3) 利用数据统计进行近无损低比特量化的低秩感知混合精度量化。

Result: 在多个LLM和基准测试中，STAR-KV实现高达75%的KV缓存压缩，结合量化可达20倍整体缓存减少。通过定制Triton GPU内核，注意力模块加速6.9倍，端到端生成吞吐量提升3.1倍。

Conclusion: STAR-KV通过自适应低秩压缩框架有效解决了KV缓存压缩的精度-效率权衡问题，为大规模语言模型推理提供了高效实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Low-rank projection has emerged as a promising approach for compressing the KV cache by exploiting hidden-dimension redundancy. However, prior methods rely on fixed or heuristic rank selection and struggle to achieve aggressive compression with minimal accuracy degradation. We propose STAR-KV, an adaptive low-rank KV cache compression framework with fine-grained rank control. STAR-KV encompasses 1) a differentiable thresholding mechanism that enables optimal rank selection at both attention-head and block levels, 2) a hybrid decomposition strategy that applies different low-rank factorizations according to the sensitivity of key and value projections, and 3) a low-rank-aware mixed precision quantization that leverages data statistics for near lossless low-bit quantization. Evaluated across multiple LLMs and benchmarks, STAR-KV achieves up to 75% KV cache compression and up to 20x overall KV cache reduction when combined with quantization. Enabled by custom Triton-based GPU kernels, STAR-KV delivers up to 6.9x speedup for the attention module and 3.1x end-to-end generation throughput. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/PriyanshBhatnagar/STAR-KV.

</details>


### [453] [The Spectral Dynamics and Noise Geometry of Muon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08388)
*Pierfrancesco Beneventano,Mahmoud Abdelmoneum,Tomaso Poggio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Muon优化器将矩阵梯度替换为其极因子，保持奇异方向但使更新谱变平。研究该操作产生的优化偏差，在回归模型中证明Muon促使谱向等奇异值移动，与核范数最小化的谱集中趋势相反。实验表明Muon在需要保持多个谱方向活跃的场景中表现更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Muon优化器（将矩阵梯度替换为其极因子操作）产生的优化偏差，理解这种谱平坦化更新在深度学习优化中的影响，探究其与核范数最小化等传统方法的区别。

Method: 理论分析：在显式对齐假设下证明极因子更新是单步熵最大化的选择；在欠定回归模型中推导连续时间Muon的奇异值动态；通过受控矩阵感知实验分离梯度缩放效应；在小规模NanoGPT预训练和小型ViT中进行实证比较。

Result: 理论证明Muon促使归一化谱向相等的非零奇异值移动；实验表明Muon与核范数最小化相反，在固定Frobenius范数下偏好平坦谱；在小规模NanoGPT中Muon保持稳定秩，有宽学习率平台，相比AdamW改善验证损失；但在小型ViT中表现相反。

Conclusion: Muon的谱平坦化偏差具有场景依赖性：并非普遍优越，但在需要保持多个谱方向活跃（如NanoGPT预训练）时能提供帮助，与核范数最小化的谱集中趋势形成对比。

Abstract: Muon replaces a matrix gradient $G=UΣV^\top$ by its polar factor $UV^\top$. This keeps the singular directions selected by the gradient, but makes the update spectrum flat. We study the optimization bias created by this operation. Under explicit alignment assumptions, we prove that the polar update is the one-step entropy-maximizing choice among bounded updates that use the gradient singular directions and do not adapt to the current weight spectrum. In an underdetermined regression model, we derive exact singular-value dynamics for continuous-time Muon and identify a measurement-dependent condition under which the normalized spectrum moves toward equal nonzero singular values. This geometry also rules out a common low-rank interpretation: at fixed Frobenius norm, Muon's distinguished state has a flat spectrum, whereas nuclear-norm minimization favors spectral concentration. Controlled matrix-sensing experiments separate the effect from simple gradient rescaling, show that norm-matched gradient descent does not reproduce Muon, and recover the predicted flattening trend across broad ablations. In small NanoGPT pretraining, Muon preserves stable rank, has a broad learning-rate plateau, and improves validation loss relative to AdamW; in a matched small-ViT control, the ranking reverses. The resulting picture is regime-dependent: Muon is not universally superior, but its flat-spectrum bias can help when many spectral directions need to remain active.

</details>


### [454] [When Are Neural Interaction Discoveries Real? Identifiability, Recoverability, and a Pre-Fit Diagnostic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08390)
*Valentina Kuskova,Dmitry Zaytsev,Michael Coppedge*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了神经网络时间序列模型中交互作用发现的识别性问题，指出交互作用的可恢复性取决于输入数据的几何结构而非模型架构，并提出了基于联合滞后块协方差有效秩的预拟合诊断方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当神经网络时间序列模型报告一个变量调节另一个变量对目标的影响时，这种发现的交互作用是数据的真实属性还是模型灵活性的伪影？作者认为这本质上是一个识别性问题，由观测输入支撑的几何结构而非特定神经架构决定。

Method: 研究了乘法门控扩展的神经可加向量自回归(GNAVAR)模型，其中源贡献由其他滞后变量调节。证明了表示能力不等同于识别性：依赖输入会导致边特定交互项之间的泄漏，低维支撑允许不同的交互分解在观测数据上一致但在其他地方不同。提出了基于联合滞后块协方差有效秩的预拟合诊断方法和两种子稳定性检查的实用操作测试。

Result: 提出了群体识别性定理，在明确的支撑条件下(包括共享调节器设置)对归一化最小GNAVAR分解进行证明。理论产生了一个简单的面向实践者的诊断：联合滞后块协方差的有效秩可以预测交互恢复是否可行。当候选集未知时，两种子稳定性检查提供实用操作测试。相同的支撑条件将实证结果组织成理论预测的三种状态。

Conclusion: 交互作用的可恢复性取决于支撑几何结构，有效秩提供了实用的预拟合诊断，独立拟合之间的不稳定性是非识别性交互发现的典型特征。识别性现象、支撑条件和不稳定性特征是模型无关的；GNAVAR只是使其可证明的工具。

Abstract: When a neural time-series model reports that one variable modulates another's effect on a target, is the discovered interaction a property of the data or an artifact of model flexibility? We argue that this is fundamentally a question of identifiability, governed by the geometry of the observed input support rather than by the specific neural architecture. We study the problem in a multiplicative-gating extension of neural additive vector autoregression (GNAVAR), in which source contributions are modulated by other lagged variables. We show that representational capacity is not identifiability: dependent inputs induce leakage between edge-specific interaction terms, and low-dimensional support permits distinct interaction decompositions that agree on the observed data while differing elsewhere. We then prove a population identifiability theorem for normalized minimal GNAVAR decompositions under explicit support conditions, including settings with shared modulators. The theory yields a simple practitioner-facing diagnostic: the effective rank of the joint lag-block covariance predicts, before fitting, whether interaction recovery is feasible for a given candidate set. When the candidate set is unknown, a two-seed stability check provides a practical operational test. The same support condition organizes empirical outcomes into the three states predicted by the theory. Our results show that interaction recoverability depends on support geometry, that effective rank provides a practical pre-fit diagnostic, and that instability across independent fits is a characteristic signature of non-identifiable interaction discovery. The identifiability phenomenon, the support condition, and the instability signature are model-agnostic; GNAVAR is the vehicle that makes them provable.

</details>


### [455] [Provably Efficient Personalized Multi-Objective Bandits with Proactive Conversational Queries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08410)
*Linfeng Cao,Ming Shi,Ness B. Shroff*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MO-PQUCB算法，整合用户主动查询与多臂老虎机反馈，通过shift-invariant正则化和双探索UCB解决多目标个性化决策问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法仅从效用反馈推断用户偏好，将偏好学习与奖励探索纠缠在一起。实践中用户通过主动对话查询（如"便宜干净的酒店"）透露偏好，但未充分利用这种结构化信号。

Method: 提出主动查询框架，通过Plackett-Luce子集选择模型建模查询信号。引入MO-PQUCB混合算法，结合查询式偏好锚定与老虎机反馈，采用shift-invariant正则化和双探索UCB。

Result: 理论证明主动查询加速偏好估计，改善遗憾边界。在查询被污染情况下，提出鲁棒估计器在稀疏污染时达到近最优性能。实验验证理论和实践优势。

Conclusion: 主动查询为多目标个性化决策提供有效结构化信号，MO-PQUCB算法成功整合查询与反馈，在偏好学习和遗憾边界方面优于现有方法，对查询污染具有鲁棒性。

Abstract: Personalized decision-making in multi-objective bandits requires learning user-specific trade-offs among competing objectives. Since arm utility depends on both unknown rewards and unknown preferences, existing methods infer preferences only from utility feedback, entangling preference learning with reward exploration. In practice, however, users often reveal their priorities through proactive conversational queries (e.g., "cheap and clean hotel"), yet this structured signal is not leveraged. We formalize a proactive query-based framework in which user queries provide structured preference signals. Modeling these signals via a Plackett-Luce subset choice model, we show that query-only learning is insufficient due to a fundamental shift-invariance barrier. To resolve this, we introduce MO-PQUCB, a hybrid algorithm that integrates query-based preference anchoring with bandit feedback through shift-invariant regularization and dual-exploration UCB. We prove that proactive queries accelerate preference estimation and yield improved regret scaling over prior preference-aware MO-MAB methods. Under corrupted queries, we further characterize statistical limits and design a robust estimator achieving near-optimal performance when the corruption is sparse. Experiments validate both theoretical and practical gains.

</details>


### [456] [Sparrow: Sparse Rollout for Stable and Efficient Long-context RL of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08446)
*Yang Zhou,Ranajoy Sadhukhan,Zhaofeng Sun,Zhuoming Chen,Souvik Kundu,Saket Dingliwal,Sai Muralidhar Jayanthi,Aram Galstyan,Haizhong Zheng,Beidi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种动态稀疏化方法来加速RLVR训练，通过保持稀疏-密集演员策略不匹配的尾部统计量恒定来平衡稳定性与效率，在Qwen3模型上实现了2.0-2.4倍的加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR（带可验证奖励的强化学习）因生成长上下文轨迹而计算昂贵。稀疏注意力虽能加速，但需要在稳定性和效率间精细权衡：过度稀疏会导致崩溃，而过于保守则加速不足。

Method: 首先观察稀疏轨迹崩溃并非均匀的token级退化，而是由稀疏-密集演员策略不匹配的尾部统计量驱动。提出动态稀疏调度，在生成过程中保持该尾部统计量恒定，并通过成本模型寻找在给定不匹配阈值下的最优稀疏调度以实现最大加速。

Result: 在Qwen3-1.7B、4B和8B模型上分别实现了2.2x、2.4x和2.0x的轨迹生成加速。该阈值可推广到更大模型（Qwen3-14B）和另一RL领域（代码生成）。进一步提出DistillSparse，通过轻量级LoRA蒸馏使更激进的稀疏化达到相同的不匹配阈值，获得更高加速。

Conclusion: 通过控制稀疏-密集演员策略不匹配的尾部统计量，可以实现稳定且高效的稀疏RLVR训练。该方法在多个模型规模和任务上有效，并可通过蒸馏进一步提升加速效果。

Abstract: Despite being powerful, reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) induces extremely long COT, making it computationally expensive. Since RLVR per-step cost is dominated by long-context rollout generation, sparse attention offers a promising way to accelerate dense rollout. However, sparse rollouts require a delicate stability-efficiency tradeoff: overly aggressive sparsity causes collapse, while overly lenient sparsity gives insufficient speedup. In this work, we study this tradeoff through sparse-to-dense actor-policy mismatch. We first observe that sparse rollout collapse is not driven by uniform degradation across tokens: most sparse tokens align perfectly with dense even under aggressive sparsity. Motivated by this, we hypothesize that sparse rollout training remains stable if the lower tail of per-token actor-policy mismatch stays above a critical threshold throughout the trajectory. We introduce a dynamic sparsity schedule that keeps this tail statistic constant during generation and validate our hypothesis. Across Qwen3 thinking-family models, keeping the tail mismatch statistic near a consistent threshold generally enables stable training. We then use a cost model to find the sparsity schedule for maximum speedup under this mismatch threshold, achieving 2.2x, 2.4x, and 2.0x rollout speedups when training Qwen3-1.7B, Qwen3-4B, and Qwen3-8B. Empirically, we show the thresholds generalize to a larger model (Qwen3-14B) and another RL domain (coding). Finally, our analysis naturally motivates DistillSparse: lightweight LoRA-based distillation on sparse rollout lets more aggressive sparsity reach the same sparse-to-dense mismatch threshold, yielding higher speedup.

</details>


### [457] [Not Just After One: Sleep-Inspired Replay Prevents Catastrophic Forgetting After Sequential Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08447)
*Anthony Bazhenov,Jean Erik Delanois,Giri P. Krishnan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种受生物启发的持续学习方法，通过将主动学习与睡眠式回放相结合，在连续学习多个新任务后进行无监督的睡眠式回放，从而恢复先前学习任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工神经网络在持续学习方面存在局限性，训练新任务时容易干扰和遗忘先前任务。现有算法通常在新训练期间或之后立即应用，而生物系统可以在主动学习期间获取多个新记忆，然后通过睡眠式回放将其巩固到长期存储中。

Method: 提出了一种顺序训练多个新任务，然后在所有先前学习任务上应用无监督的睡眠式回放阶段来部分恢复性能的方法。这种方法模拟了生物学习中的主动学习和睡眠巩固机制。

Result: 研究表明，任务特定信息在面对新训练时保持弹性，但随着网络在新任务上训练而逐渐衰减。通过睡眠式回放可以部分恢复所有先前学习任务的性能。

Conclusion: 这些发现为开发广泛的持续学习AI解决方案提供了新原则，特别是通过结合主动学习和睡眠式回放来缓解灾难性遗忘问题。

Abstract: One of the critical limitations of artificial neural networks is their lack of ability to continually learn: training on new tasks often leads to interference and forgetting of the previous ones. While several algorithms have been proposed to protect old memories from interference, they are typically applied during or immediately after each new episode of training. In contrast, humans and animals can learn continuously, acquiring multiple new memories during active learning before consolidating all of them into long-term storage. Here we show that multiple new tasks can be trained sequentially before an unsupervised sleep-like replay phase is applied to partially restore performance across all previously learned tasks. Our study further suggests that task-specific information remains resilient to new training but decays gradually as network is trained on new tasks. These findings point to novel principles for developing a broad range of continual learning AI solutions.

</details>


### [458] [Theoretical Foundations of Continual Learning via Drift-Plus-Penalty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08452)
*Nazreen Shah,Govinda Arya,Bharath B. N.,Ranjitha Prasad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于控制理论的持续学习框架COLD，使用Drift-Plus-Penalty原则显式调节遗忘过程，在稳定性与可塑性之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界数据流通常是非平稳的且顺序到达，需要学习系统能够持续适应而不从头训练。持续学习面临灾难性遗忘问题，即学习新知识会损害先前学到的知识。现有方法缺乏对遗忘过程的显式控制。

Method: 提出COLD框架，基于随机优化的Drift-Plus-Penalty原则。使用有限内存缓冲区存储先前任务的代表性样本。在每个任务中，最小化当前任务损失的同时，通过虚拟队列跟踪先前任务长期稳定性的偏差，将稳定性与可塑性的权衡建模为受调节的动态过程。

Result: 在标准基准测试中，COLD持续优于多种最先进的持续学习方法，同时通过显式调节稳定性与可塑性，提供竞争性且可控的遗忘行为。建立了稳定性和收敛性理论保证。

Conclusion: 控制理论视角为持续学习提供了新的框架，能够显式调节遗忘过程。COLD框架在性能和控制遗忘方面都表现出色，为解决稳定性-可塑性权衡问题提供了系统化方法。

Abstract: In many real-world settings, data streams are nonstationary and arrive sequentially, requiring learning systems to adapt continuously without retraining from scratch. Continual learning (CL) addresses this challenge by incorporating new tasks while mitigating catastrophic forgetting, where learning new information degrades performance on previously acquired knowledge. We introduce a control-theoretic perspective on CL that explicitly regulates the evolution of forgetting, framing adaptation as a controlled process subject to long-term stability constraints. We focus on replay-based CL, where a finite memory buffer stores representative samples from prior tasks. We propose COntinual Learning with Drift-Plus-Penalty (COLD), a continual learning framework based on the Drift-Plus-Penalty (DPP) principle from stochastic optimization. To facilitate analysis, we also consider an oracle variant, COLD-ORACLE, as a reference benchmark. At each task, both methods minimize the current task loss while maintaining a virtual queue that tracks deviations from long-term stability on previously learned tasks, capturing the stability-plasticity trade-off as a regulated dynamical process. We establish stability and convergence guarantees that characterize this trade-off through a tunable control parameter. Experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that COLD consistently outperforms a broad range of state-of-the-art CL methods while providing competitive and controllable forgetting behavior through explicit regulation of stability and plasticity.

</details>


### [459] [Beyond Linear Activation Steering: Invertible Latent Transformations for Controlling LLM Behavior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08454)
*Tuc Nguyen,Thai Le*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: INNSteer：基于可逆潜在变换的非线性激活引导框架，通过在潜在空间中进行线性控制实现原始激活空间的非线性、输入依赖干预，相比传统线性方法能更好地处理复杂行为特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导方法通常计算固定方向，将行为控制视为全局线性偏移。当行为特征在激活空间中非线性变化或位于弯曲各向异性流形时，这些方法受限，因为最优干预可能是输入依赖的。

Method: 提出INNSteer框架，学习轻量级可逆神经网络φ，将LLM激活映射到潜在空间，在该空间行为类别更适合线性控制。推理时，激活通过φ映射，在潜在空间引导，再通过精确逆变换φ⁻¹映射回原始空间。

Result: 在多个LLM系列、规模、行为特征和安全基准测试中，INNSteer持续优于线性、基于传输和非线性引导基线，同时保持生成流畅性。

Conclusion: INNSteer通过可逆潜在变换实现非线性激活引导，为LLM控制提供了更灵活有效的框架，能处理复杂行为特征，优于传统线性方法。

Abstract: Activation steering provides a lightweight inference-time mechanism for controlling large language models (LLMs) by modifying their internal activation vectors toward desired behaviors. Most existing methods compute a fixed steering direction in the original activation space, typically from pairs of contrastive examples using mean differences, linear probes, or arbitrary separability criteria. While effective to a certain extent, these methods treat behavioral control as a global, linear, additive offset: the same direction is applied across inputs, and behaviors are linearly separable. This can be restrictive when behavioral features vary nonlinearly across the activation space or lie on curved and anisotropic manifolds, where the optimal intervention may be input-dependent. To address this limitation, we propose INNSteer, a nonlinear activation steering framework based on invertible latent transformations. Rather than searching for a better steering vector in the original representation space, INNSteer learns a lightweight invertible neural network $φ$ that maps an LLM's activations into a latent space where behavioral classes are more amenable to linear control. At inference time, activations are mapped through $φ$, steered in the latent space, and mapped back through the exact inverse transformation $φ^{-1}$. This makes a simple latent-space translation become a nonlinear, input-dependent intervention in the original activation space. Across experiment settings on multiple LLM families, scales, behavioral traits, and safety benchmarks, INNSteer consistently improves model control over linear, transport-based, and nonlinear steering baselines while largely preserving generation fluency.

</details>


### [460] [The Confidence Trap: Calibration Attacks for Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08467)
*Cuong Dang,Jiahao Zhang,Hieu Ta Quang,Dung Le,Lu Cheng,Suhang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对图神经网络（GNN）置信度校准的对抗攻击框架UGCA，解决了图结构扰动中的技术挑战，并理论分析了模型泛化能力与校准脆弱性的关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管置信度校准对于安全关键应用中的可信决策至关重要，但校准后的GNN对对抗性结构扰动的鲁棒性尚未得到充分研究。图上的校准攻击面临独特技术挑战：图结构的离散性使基于梯度的优化困难、现有欠置信目标无法驱动预测趋近均匀分布、GNN对边扰动高度敏感常导致违反攻击约束的标签变化。

Method: 提出统一图校准攻击（UGCA）框架，包含：1）KL散度损失鼓励均匀预测分布；2）重排序机制减少标签翻转；3）混合损失在违反约束时恢复标签；4）波束搜索探索更广泛的对抗搜索空间。采用最坏情况（白盒）分析方法。

Result: 实验表明UGCA能显著增加期望校准误差（ECE），同时保持分类准确率。理论分析显示，在该威胁模型下，具有更高准确率或在更多类别数据集上训练的模型更易受攻击。

Conclusion: UGCA框架有效解决了图神经网络校准攻击的技术挑战，为评估GNN校准鲁棒性提供了有效工具，并揭示了模型泛化能力与校准脆弱性之间的理论联系。

Abstract: While confidence calibration is essential for trustworthy decision-making in safety-critical applications, the robustness of calibrated GNNs to adversarial structural perturbations remains largely unexplored. However, studying calibration attacks on graphs presents unique technical challenges: (1) the discrete nature of graph structures complicates gradient-based optimization, (2) existing underconfidence objectives fail to drive predictions toward uniform distributions, and (3) GNNs are highly sensitive to edge perturbations, often causing unintended label changes that violate attack constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a \textbf{Unified Graph Calibration Attack (UGCA)} framework designed for \textbf{worst-case (white-box) analysis} of GNN calibration robustness. UGCA introduces a KL-divergence loss to encourage uniform predictive distributions, a reranking mechanism to reduce label flipping, a hybrid loss to recover labels when violations occur, and beam search to explore a broader adversarial search space. We further provide theoretical insights linking model generalization, dataset complexity, and calibration vulnerability, showing that models with higher accuracy or trained on datasets with more classes are more susceptible under this threat model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UGCA substantially increases Expected Calibration Error while preserving classification accuracy. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/CaptainCuong/Graph-Calibration-Attack.git.

</details>


### [461] [Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment for Detection of Low-Magnitude False Data Injection Attacks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08473)
*Xin Li,Chenhan Xiao,Jonathan Cohen,Aviad Elyashar,Yang Weng,Rami Puzis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出PCNSA框架，通过保持物理零空间与测量伪零空间之间的几何对应关系来检测隐蔽的虚假数据注入攻击，解决了现有检测方法忽略伪零空间中隐藏变化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有虚假数据注入攻击检测方法存在局限性：基于残差测试的方法忽略伪零空间中的变化，而基于子空间学习的方法虽然捕获相关模式但不强制物理一致性。当攻击信号与系统模型的伪零空间对齐时，即使测量扰动很小，也会导致状态估计出现较大偏差，现有检测器可能无法识别这种低幅度但高影响的攻击。

Method: 提出物理一致零空间对齐(PCNSA)框架，核心是伪零空间守恒数据预处理(PSCP)步骤，在子空间提取前将测量值重新表达在物理坐标系中。PSCP保持了行空间与其正交补空间之间的分离特性，使奇异值分解(SVD)导出的伪零子空间与物理残差空间对齐，无需显式知道系统矩阵H。

Result: 在IEEE 14、30、57和118总线系统上的实验验证了该方法的有效性：能够逃避XTM、LSTM、AE和Isolation Forest等基线方法的隐蔽攻击，在PCNSA的对齐子空间中表现为明显偏差，获得了更高的F1分数和检测精度，并且在部分可观测性和实际PMU噪声下保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: PCNSA框架通过保持物理零空间与测量伪零空间之间的几何对应关系，能够有效检测隐蔽的虚假数据注入攻击，解决了现有检测方法忽略伪零空间中隐藏变化的问题，在多种测试场景下表现优于现有方法。

Abstract: False data injection attacks (FDIAs) introducing small measurement perturbations can still cause large deviations in power system state estimation when the injected signals align with the pseudo-null space of the system model. Existing model- and data-driven detectors may fail to identify such low-magnitude but high-impact attacks because residual tests ignore changes hidden in the pseudo-null space, while subspace learning methods capture correlation patterns without enforcing physical consistency. This paper proposes Physically Consistent Null Space Alignment (PCNSA), a framework that detects stealthy FDIAs by preserving, through preprocessing, the geometric correspondence between the physical null space and the measurement-derived pseudo-null space. The key point is a Pseudo-null Space Conserved data Preprocessing (PSCP) step that re-expresses measurements in the physical coordinate frame before subspace extraction. We prove that PSCP preserves the separation between row space and its orthogonal complement, a property that conventional per-feature standardization violates. This keeps the singular value decomposition (SVD)-derived pseudo-null subspace aligned with the physical residual space without explicit knowledge of H. Experiments on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems confirm this principle in practice: stealthy attacks that evade XTM, LSTM, AE and Isolation Forest baselines appear as clear deviations in the aligned subspace, yielding higher F1-score and detection accuracy while remaining robust under partial observability and realistic PMU noise.

</details>


### [462] [Inferring hidden forcing in a biological oscillator using Kolmogorov-Arnold networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08479)
*Julian Szereszewski,Facundo Fainstein,Leandro E. Fernandez,Gabriel B. Mindlin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 从鸟类气囊压力数据推断呼吸肌肉驱动力的数据驱动方法，揭示了传统压力信号分析无法发现的二阶段激活模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从部分观测中推断驱动动力系统的力是物理学中的基本挑战，特别是当不同的底层机制产生相似的可观测动力学时。鸟类呼吸动力学中，从气囊压力数据推断有效肌肉驱动力具有重要价值

Method: 使用基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的可解释学习框架，直接从数据推断系统的控制方程，重建底层驱动力的非平凡结构

Result: 重建的动力学预测了每个呼吸周期内的二阶段激活模式，通过呼气肌肉的肌电图记录独立验证了这一预测

Conclusion: 数据驱动的动力学定律重建可以揭示隐藏的物理结构，并提供对未观测驱动变量的访问，为部分观测动力系统中推断潜在力建立了一般路径

Abstract: Inferring the forces that drive a dynamical system from partial observations is a fundamental challenge across physics, particularly when distinct underlying mechanisms produce similar observable dynamics. Here we show that the effective muscular forcing underlying avian respiratory dynamics can be reconstructed from measurements of air-sac pressure alone. Using an interpretable learning framework based on Kolmogorov-Arnold networks, we infer the governing equations of the system directly from data and uncover a nontrivial structure in the underlying forcing that is not apparent from the pressure signal, which instead suggests a relaxation-like oscillation. The reconstructed dynamics predict a two-phase activation pattern within each respiratory cycle, which we independently validate through electromyographic recordings of expiratory muscles. These results demonstrate that data-driven reconstruction of dynamical laws can reveal hidden physical structure and provide access to unobserved driving variables, establishing a general route to infer latent forces in partially observed dynamical systems.

</details>


### [463] [Adaptive Loss Balancing for Noise-Robust GRPO in Generative Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08480)
*Kewei Xu,Junbo Qi,Yanyan Zou,Pengfei Zhang,Xingzhi Yao,Shengjie Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaGRPO框架通过选择性应用奖励引导优化，解决传统强化学习推荐中奖励模型偏差问题，在保持稳定性的同时提升推荐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习推荐系统依赖奖励模型，但生产环境中的排序模型存在曝光偏差，导致奖励信号不可靠。均匀应用RL可能放大噪声梯度，损害推荐质量。

Method: 提出AdaGRPO框架，将奖励引导优化视为选择性准入而非均匀压力。训练以监督负对数似然为基础，GRPO目标通过二元门控控制，门控基于两个诊断指标：策略侧难度和奖励可区分性。未通过诊断的样本回归纯监督学习。

Result: 在大规模电商数据集上，最佳中间检查点将HR@10从11.01%提升至12.18%，同时将幻觉率控制在0.22%以下。最终检查点保持稳健（HR@10 11.63%，幻觉率0.27%）。生产A/B测试显示点击率和停留时间有显著提升。

Conclusion: AdaGRPO通过选择性应用奖励信号，有效解决了传统RL推荐中的奖励偏差问题，在提升推荐效果的同时保持了系统稳定性，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) presents a promising avenue for enhancing generative recommendation beyond supervised imitation, leveraging reward signals to guide policy improvement. However, its efficacy is critically contingent on the trustworthiness of the reward model for the samples it evaluates. In practice, production rankers, the widely adopted reward models, are trained on exposure-biased logs, leading to sample-dependent inaccuracies that violate this assumption. Our stratified analysis uncovers a consistent pattern: reward guidance is most beneficial when the policy exhibits uncertainty and the ranker can effectively discriminate the ground-truth item from rollout negatives. On other samples, the reward signal is either negligible or detrimental, highlighting the risk of uniform RL application. To address such an issue, we introduce AdaGRPO, a novel framework that treats reward-guided optimization as selective admission rather than uniform pressure. Training is anchored in supervised negative log-likelihood, while the GRPO objective is gated by a binary, per-sample clip determined by two rollout diagnostics: policy-side difficulty and reward discriminability. Instances failing either diagnostic default to pure supervision, ensuring stability and mitigating the amplification of noisy gradients. We validate AdaGRPO on a large-scale e-commerce dataset. At the best intermediate checkpoint, it elevates HR@10 from 11.01% to 12.18% while constraining hallucination below 0.22%, and maintains robustness at the final checkpoint (HR@10 11.63%, hallucination 0.27%), outperforming fixed NLL--GRPO mixtures across the retrieval--validity frontier. In production A/B tests, AdaGRPO achieves statistically significant gains in click-through rate and dwell time, confirming its practical utility.

</details>


### [464] [PIPE-Cypher: Automatic Enterprise Benchmark Generation for Text-to-Cypher Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08481)
*Suraj Ranganath,Anish Raghavendra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PIPE-Cypher是一个本地基准生成管道，能将实时属性图和用户问题转化为平衡的自然语言到Cypher查询基准，解决企业图数据库基准创建的难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业属性图在模式结构、术语、领域假设、治理约束和用户交互模式上差异很大，需要反映实际用户查询的基准。但创建这样的基准很困难，因为模式和值唯一，图结构随时间变化，且需要保证查询可执行、使用真实实体、保持多样性并平衡查询类型和难度。

Method: PIPE-Cypher结合了模式分析、反向查询接地、约束生成、确定性Cypher治理、执行验证、数据脱敏、多样性控制和校准的本地LLM评估器。使用本地Qwen3.5-9B进行生成和评估。

Result: 生成了3,000个FinBench/SNB示例，完成了三个消融实验套件，用人工标签校准了评估器行为，并评估了11个本地下游模型。基准具有区分性：零样本迁移效果弱，而少量样本控制表明模式特定的示例库能帮助兼容的模型家族。

Conclusion: PIPE-Cypher使Text2Cypher基准测试成为一个可重复的过程，能够随着图结构、用户和目标工作负载的变化而演进。

Abstract: Enterprise property graphs vary widely in schema structure, internal terminology, domain assumptions, governance constraints, and user interaction patterns. A deployment-relevant Text2Cypher benchmark therefore reflects the questions users and agents actually ask of that graph. Creating such a benchmark is difficult because schemas and values are unique, and graph structure changes over time. Each NL-query pair must also be executable, use real graph entities, preserve diversity, and remain balanced across query types and difficulty levels. We present PIPE-Cypher, a local benchmark-generation pipeline that turns a live property graph and optional seed queries from customer questions, analyst logs, or agent tool calls into balanced NL-to-Cypher benchmarks. PIPE-Cypher combines schema profiling, reverse-query grounding, constrained generation, deterministic Cypher governance, execution validation, redaction, diversity controls, and a calibrated local LLM judge. Using local Qwen3.5-9B generation and judging, PIPE-Cypher exports 3,000 accepted FinBench/SNB examples, completes three audited ablation suites, calibrates judge behavior with human labels, and evaluates 11 local downstream models. The resulting benchmark is deliberately discriminative: zero-shot transfer is weak, while a few-shot control shows that schema-specific example banks can help compatible model families. Together, PIPE-Cypher makes Text2Cypher benchmarking a repeatable process that evolves with the graph, its users, and its target workloads.

</details>


### [465] [STELLAR: Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement for Long-Tailed Species Distribution Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08484)
*Shufeng Kong,Tao Yu,Yuanyuan Wei,Caihua Liu,Junwen Bai,Yingheng Wang,Marc Grimson,Daniel Fink,Carla P. Gomes*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STELLAR是一个联合物种分布建模框架，通过图时空编码器、上下文锚定的潜在对齐机制和失衡感知的解耦解码模块，共同优化动态栖息地环境和群落结构，显著提升了稀有物种的预测能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前联合物种分布建模面临两个耦合挑战：环境驱动因素和物种分布本质上是时空的，而物种共现模式表现出复杂的非线性群落结构和由稀有物种驱动的严重长尾不平衡。现有方法通常孤立处理这些因素，从静态协变量学习或忽略动态群落结构的历史轨迹。

Method: STELLAR框架包含三个互补组件：1) 图时空编码器，使用图注意力和循环单元聚合空间邻域效应，捕捉环境背景和群落结构的共同演化历史动态；2) 上下文锚定的潜在对齐机制，使用标签激活的混合先验和监督对比学习构建潜在空间，基于共享环境偏好主动聚类物种；3) 失衡感知的解耦解码模块，利用非对称损失专注于学习困难的稀有物种样本，防止长尾中的模式崩溃。

Result: 在由领域专家策划的大规模eBird数据集上的实验表明，该框架显著优于最先进的基线方法，特别是在预测稀有物种和揭示可解释的物种相互作用方面。

Conclusion: STELLAR通过联合优化动态栖息地环境和群落结构，成功解决了联合物种分布建模中的时空动态和长尾不平衡问题，为生物多样性监测和保护规划提供了有效的工具。

Abstract: Joint Species Distribution Modeling (JSDM) is a key enabler for biodiversity monitoring and conservation planning. However, accurate JSDM faces two coupled challenges: environmental drivers and species distributions are inherently spatio-temporal, while species co-occurrence patterns exhibit complex non-linear community structure and severe long-tail imbalance driven by rare species. Existing approaches often address these factors in isolation, learning from static covariates or neglecting the historical trajectories of dynamic community structure. To overcome these limitations, we propose STELLAR (Spatio-Temporal Environmental Learning with Latent Alignment and Refinement), a novel framework that learns a shared latent space where dynamic habitat context and community structure are optimized jointly. Our approach integrates three complementary components: (1) a Graph-Temporal Encoder that employs graph attention and recurrent units to aggregate spatial neighborhood effects and capture the co-evolving historical dynamics of environmental context and community structure; (2) a Context-Anchored Latent Alignment mechanism that structures the latent space using a label-activated mixture prior and supervised contrastive learning, actively clustering species based on shared environmental preferences; and (3) an Imbalance-Aware Decoupled Decoding module that utilizes Asymmetric Loss to focus learning on hard, rare species samples, preventing mode collapse in the long tail. Experiments on the large-scale eBird dataset, curated with domain experts, demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, particularly in predicting rare species and revealing interpretable species interactions.

</details>


### [466] [A Joint Finite-Sample Certificate for Adaptive Selective Conformal Risk Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08517)
*Xiaoli Yu,Jiamiao Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的选择性预测器证书构造方法，通过直接处理风险比而非使用Hoeffding式范围界，为有界（可能非单调）损失提供了同时上界选择风险、下界接受概率（高于最小阈值）和下界部署效用的单一有限样本证书。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 选择性预测器在置信输入上回答并在其他地方弃权；部署这样的预测器需要一个单一的有限样本证书，该证书必须同时上界选择风险、下界接受概率（高于最小阈值）和下界部署效用。该证书必须在从有限网格中选择自适应阈值时有效。

Method: 通过将选择风险直接视为比率而非通过Hoeffding式范围界来处理。构造结合了三个置信界：风险比率的方差自适应经验Bernstein界、接受的Clopper-Pearson界和效用的双侧接近界。还提出了一个制度范围的第三条界限，可与外部预言机匹配。

Result: 相对于仅使用范围的Hoeffding比率构造，该方法将接受阈值依赖从1/p_min改进为1/√p_min。在ImageNet（三个ResNets）和COCO val 2017全景分割上，证书比Hoeffding-CRC开辟了+22个百分点的认证接受前沿，比非空匹配验证基线约紧致10倍。这些增益是制度范围的而非普遍存在，在ADE20K上不存在。认证器运行时间为O(n_cert m)。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种更紧致的选择性预测器证书构造，通过直接处理风险比率和使用方差自适应界限，在特定制度范围内显著提高了认证性能，同时保证了部署效用的绝对下界和与最佳认证策略的接近性。

Abstract: Selective predictors answer on confident inputs and abstain elsewhere; deploying one safely needs a single finite-sample certificate that simultaneously upper-bounds the selected risk, lower-bounds the acceptance probability $\pacc$ above a floor $\pmin$, and lower-bounds the deployment utility. This certificate must be valid under adaptive threshold selection from a finite grid of $m$ pairs on $\ncert$ samples. We give such a certificate for bounded, possibly non-monotone losses by treating the selected risk directly as a ratio rather than through a Hoeffding-style range bound. The construction couples three confidence bounds: a variance-adaptive empirical-Bernstein bound on the ratio risk, a Clopper--Pearson bound on acceptance, and a two-sided closeness bound on utility. Together they lower-bound the certified policy's utility absolutely and to within $2\gammau$ of the best over the \emph{certified set}, both non-vacuous whenever feasible; a regime-scoped third leg matches an external oracle, informative only where the risk margin $\gammar < α$ and vacuous at the headline operating points. Relative to the range-only Hoeffding-ratio construction this sharpens the acceptance-floor dependence from $1/\pmin$ to $1/\sqrt{\pmin}$, and a closed-form corollary identifies a per-pair regime in which our risk bound dominates a Hoeffding conformal risk control (Hoeffding--CRC) selective bound. Empirically, on ImageNet (three ResNets) and COCO val 2017 panoptic, the certificate opens a $+22$ pp certified-acceptance frontier over Hoeffding--CRC and is ${\approx}10{\times}$ tighter than a non-vacuous matched-valid baseline; these gains are regime-scoped, not universal, and absent on ADE20K. The certifier runs in $O(\ncert m)$ time.

</details>


### [467] [Routine laboratory trajectories encode the onset of organ-level complications in cancer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08538)
*Jannik Lübberstedt,Krischan Braitsch,Jacqueline Lammert,Christof Winter,Florian Gabriel,Tristan Lemke,Christopher Zirn,Markus Graf,Friedrich Puttkammer,Hartmut Häntze,Johannes Moll,Anirudh Narayanan,Andrei Zhukov,Fabian Drexel,Zeineb Ben Chaaben,Sebastian Ziegelmayer,Su Hwan Kim,Marion Högner,Jan Kirschke,Florian Bassermann,Marcus Makowski,Christian Wachinger,Lisa Adams,Keno Bressem*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于277万+实验室检查数据的Transformer模型，能够从常规肿瘤治疗中的纵向实验室数据中，提前数月至数月预测162种治疗相关并发症的发生。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前肿瘤治疗中，常规实验室检查数据虽然包含器官功能的时间序列信息，但现有预后工具仅使用单时间点数据，忽略了时间序列结构。研究者希望利用这些纵向数据来预测治疗相关并发症。

Method: 使用基于Transformer的深度学习模型，分析2,777,595个实验室测量数据（来自3,905名多发性骨髓瘤或卵巢癌患者），预测162种治疗相关并发症的2年内发生风险。

Result: 模型在组水平上达到1.5-6.1倍于患病率的富集度，AUROC增益最高达+0.11，优于非序列基线模型。在MIMIC-IV和MMRF CoMMpass外部验证中，AUROC最高达0.85，显示良好的跨医疗系统可迁移性。

Conclusion: 常规肿瘤实验室数据包含器官功能恶化的早期信号，能够提前数月至数月预测并发症发生，为并发症特异性监测提供了无需额外检测基础设施的新方法。

Abstract: Routine laboratory panels drawn during cancer treatment constitute longitudinal physiological recordings of organ function, yet their temporal structure is discarded by single-timepoint prognostic tools. A transformer trained on 2,777,595 laboratory measurements from 3,905 patients with multiple myeloma or ovarian cancer predicted the two-year onset of 162 treatment-associated complications, including therapy-related myelodysplastic syndromes, spanning eight clinical categories, achieving 1.5- to 6.1-fold enrichment above prevalence at the group level. It matched or outperformed non-sequential baselines across grouped endpoints (AUROC gains up to +0.11), demonstrating that longitudinal laboratory trajectories capture evolving complication-specific physiology inaccessible from isolated measurements. Predictions generalised across both cancers, divergence concentrating in disease-specific complications, and biomarker masking recovered signatures consistent with established pathophysiology. External validation on MIMIC-IV and MMRF CoMMpass confirmed transferability across independent healthcare systems (AUROC up to 0.85). Routine oncological laboratory data encode organ deterioration weeks to months before clinical onset, enabling complication-specific surveillance without additional testing infrastructure.

</details>


### [468] [A Theoretical Analysis of Memory and Overfitting Phenomena in Stochastic Interpolation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08554)
*Yunchen Li,Shaohui Lin,Zhou Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文从理论上分析了随机插值模型中的记忆化现象，证明生成样本本质上是训练样本加上三个可控项：离散化误差、估计误差和随机高斯噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究生成模型中的记忆化现象，理解生成样本与训练样本之间的关系，为生成模型的过拟合和欠拟合提供理论定义。

Method: 利用最优速度场和得分函数的闭式表达式，在连续时间oracle设置下分析确定性/随机生成过程，研究Euler离散化下的偏差，并分析估计误差对生成结果的影响。

Result: 生成样本可表示为训练样本加上三个可控项：离散化误差界、估计误差界和随机高斯噪声。基于此表征，提出了生成模型中过拟合和欠拟合的理论定义。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解生成模型中的记忆化现象提供了理论框架，揭示了生成样本与训练样本之间的定量关系，为评估生成模型的泛化能力提供了理论基础。

Abstract: This paper provides a theoretical account of memorization in stochastic interpolation models. By leveraging closed-form expressions for the optimal velocity field and the associated score function, we show that, in the continuous-time oracle setting, both deterministic and stochastic generation processes recover training samples. Under Euler discretization, generated samples remain centered around training samples, with deviations controlled by the step size. We further analyze generation in the presence of estimation errors and show that accumulated estimation errors control the endpoint deviation from the training set. These results imply that the generated sample admits a representation as a training sample perturbed by three controlled terms: a discretization-induced bound, an estimation-error-induced bound, and stochastic Gaussian noise. Based on this characterization, we provide theoretical definitions of overfitting and underfitting in generative models. Synthetic simulations support our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [469] [Physics-Guided Dual Decoding and Spectral Supervision for Global 3D Hydrometeor Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08563)
*Dandan Chen,Yaqiang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PredHydro-Net是一个物理引导的双解码框架，用于改进三维水凝物预报，解决了传统深度学习模型在预测零膨胀、长尾分布变量时过度平滑的问题，在极端事件检测和空间保真度方面优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 三维水凝物预报具有挑战性，因为这类变量具有零膨胀、长尾分布特性。标准的深度学习优化往往产生过度平滑的预报，削弱了极端事件和空间纹理特征，需要一种能平衡定量精度和空间保真度的新方法。

Method: 提出PredHydro-Net物理引导双解码框架：1）采用解耦架构，宏观热力学和动力学场单向调制水凝物生成；2）集成小波频率解耦、频谱幅度匹配和对抗训练；3）实现多变量优化冲突的缓解。

Result: 在72小时全球评估中，PredHydro-Net在极端事件检测和频谱表示方面优于时空深度学习基线（Earthformer和PredRNNv2）以及业务化全球预报系统（GFS）。模型与GPM卫星反演数据具有强气候一致性，能合理再现极端天气事件（如飓风Ian）的三维云结构。

Conclusion: PredHydro-Net通过物理引导的架构设计，在长尾大气预测中实现了定量精度和空间保真度的良好平衡。特征归因证实了模型对相对湿度和风辐合等物理前兆的依赖，为三维水凝物预报提供了稳健的物理信息方法。

Abstract: While global data-driven models excel at predicting continuous atmospheric variables, three-dimensional hydrometeor forecasting remains challenging due to the zero-inflated, long-tailed distributions of these variables. Standard deep learning optimization often yields overly smooth forecasts, attenuating extreme events and spatial textures. We propose PredHydro-Net, a physics-guided dual-decoding framework that mitigates this smoothing. To resolve multi-variable optimization conflicts, it employs a decoupled architecture where macroscopic thermodynamic and dynamic fields unidirectionally modulate hydrometeor generation. By integrating wavelet-based frequency decoupling, spectral amplitude matching, and adversarial training, the model achieves a favorable trade-off between quantitative accuracy and spatial fidelity. In a 72-h global evaluation, PredHydro-Net outperforms both spatiotemporal deep learning baselines (Earthformer and PredRNNv2) and the operational Global Forecast System (GFS) in extreme-event detection and spectral representation. Furthermore, it demonstrates strong climatological consistency with Global Precipitation Measurement (GPM) satellite retrievals. The model reasonably reproduces the three-dimensional cloud structures in extreme weather events, such as Hurricane Ian. Feature attribution confirms its dependence on physical precursors such as relative humidity and wind convergence, offering a robust, physics-informed approach to long-tailed atmospheric prediction.

</details>


### [470] [EinSort: Sorting is All We Need for Tensorizing LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08565)
*Toshiaki Koike-Akino,Jing Liu,Ye Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应张量化方法，通过索引排序发现大模型中固有的低秩结构，用于权重和KV缓存压缩，相比基线方法提升了重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 张量网络能够有效压缩大神经网络，但大型基础模型由于规模巨大且权重分布无结构，识别其隐含的低秩结构仍然具有挑战性。

Method: 提出自适应张量化方法，通过索引排序发现目标张量中固有的低秩结构。

Result: 在权重压缩和KV缓存压缩的实验中，相比基线方法获得了更好的重建质量。

Conclusion: 自适应张量化方法能够有效发现大模型中的低秩结构，为模型压缩提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Tensor networks provide efficient representations for compressing large neural networks. By carefully designing shapes and topologies, they can significantly reduce memory and computational costs. However, identifying implicit low-rank structures in large foundation models remains challenging due to their enormous scale and un-structured weight distributions. We propose an adaptive tensorization method that discovers inherent low-rank structure in a target tensor by index ordering. Experiments on weight and KV-cache compression demonstrate improved reconstruction quality compared to baselines.

</details>


### [471] [Titans-as-a-Layer: Test-Time Memory for Conversational Speech Emotion Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08573)
*Daniel Chen,Qicong Hu,Yang Xiao,Ting Dang,Hong Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于对话语音情感识别的记忆适配器（MAL），通过神经记忆存储对话历史上下文，作为音频标记对齐的残差更新，无需修改基础音频大模型的标记位置，从而提升对话情感识别性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前语音情感识别通常基于单语句分类，忽略了说话者的正常音域范围和先前话语建立的情感上下文。虽然语音-语言模型提供了强大的预训练声学和语义表示，并通过微调适应SER标签，但仍缺乏每个对话的状态信息。

Method: 基于Titans框架，引入即插即用的Memory-as-a-Layer (MAL)适配器，将对话历史写入小型神经记忆，然后作为音频标记对齐的残差更新读取，避免改变宿主模型的标记位置。该方法保持基础音频大模型主干不变。

Result: 在不同音频大模型和情感识别数据集的评估中，该设计提高了SER在不同评估指标上的性能，支持测试时记忆作为对话SER的残差上下文机制。

Conclusion: 测试时神经记忆能够为对话语音情感识别提供缺失的上下文信息，同时保持大型音频语言模型主干不变。MAL适配器通过残差更新机制有效整合对话历史，提升了情感识别的准确性。

Abstract: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is commonly formulated as utterance-level classification, although conversational emotion depends on a speaker's usual vocal range and the emotional context established by previous utterances. Speech-language models provide strong pretrained acoustic and semantic representations, and can adapts them to SER labels via finetune, but this mechanism still missing per-dialogue state. We study whether test-time neural memory can supply this missing context while leaving the large audio language models (LALMs) backbone intact. Building on Titans, we introduce a plug-and-play Memory-as-a-Layer (MAL) adapter that writes dialogue history into a small neural memory and reads it back as an audio-token-aligned residual update, avoiding changes to the host model's token positions. Across different audio LLMs and emotion recognition datasets evaluations, our design improves SER performs across different evaluation metrics, supporting test-time memory as a residual contextual mechanism for conversational SER.

</details>


### [472] [OrderDP: A Theoretically Guaranteed Lossless Dynamic Data Pruning Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08574)
*Chenhan Jin,Shengze Xu,Qingsong Wang,Fan Jia,Dingshuo Chen,Tieyong Zeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OrderDP是一个数据剪枝框架，通过随机选择子集再选取top-q样本的方式，在替代损失函数上实现无偏训练，提供理论保证，减少40%以上训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据剪枝方法通常选择高信息量样本，但这会导致梯度估计偏差，且这种偏差对最终性能的影响尚不明确。需要一种能够提供稳定、无偏且接近无损训练加速的理论保证方法。

Method: OrderDP采用两阶段方法：首先随机选择一个子集，然后从该子集中选择top-q样本。这种方法在替代损失函数上建立了无偏性，确保训练过程在替代目标函数上是无偏的。框架还提供了收敛性和泛化性分析。

Result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet-1K上的实验表明，OrderDP在准确性、稳定收敛性和精确控制方面具有竞争力，同时设计更简单、运行更快，训练成本降低超过40%。

Conclusion: OrderDP提供了一个强大且易于适配的数据高效学习工具，既保证了强性能又实现了计算效率，为数据剪枝提供了理论保证的实用解决方案。

Abstract: Data pruning (DP), as an oft-stated strategy to alleviate heavy training burdens, reduces the volume of training samples according to a well-defined pruning method while striving for near-lossless performance. However, existing approaches, which commonly select highly informative samples, can lead to biased gradient estimation compared to full-dataset training. Furthermore, the analysis of this bias and its impact on final performance remains ambiguous. To address these challenges, we propose OrderDP, a plug-and-play framework that aims to obtain stable, unbiased, and near-lossless training acceleration with theoretical guarantees. Specifically, OrderDP first randomly selects a subset and then chooses the top-$q$ samples, where unbiasedness is established with respect to a surrogate loss. This ensures that OrderDP conducts unbiased training in terms of the surrogate objective. We further establish convergence and generalization analyses, elucidating how OrderDP affects optimal performance and enables well-controlled acceleration while ensuring guaranteed final performance. Empirically, we evaluate OrderDP against comprehensive baselines on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet-1K, demonstrating competitive accuracy, stable convergence, and exact control -- all with a simpler design and faster runtime, while reducing training cost by over 40%. Delivering both strong performance and computational efficiency, our method serves as a robust and easily adaptable tool for data-efficient learning. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/shengze-xu/OrderDP.

</details>


### [473] [Lost in the Non-convex Loss Landscape: How to Fine-tune the Large Time Series Model?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08578)
*Xu Zhang,Peang Wang,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SFF方法，通过随机初始化构建辅助模型并与预训练模型权重线性插值，平滑损失函数，改善大时间序列模型的微调效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大时间序列模型预训练后直接微调容易过拟合且性能不佳，甚至不如从头训练，限制了预训练的优势

Method: SFF（平滑全微调）：构建随机初始化的辅助模型获得平滑损失函数，与预训练模型权重线性插值，平滑原始损失函数，改善可训练性

Result: 在Timer、TimesFM、MOMENT、UniTS、MOIRAI、Chronos、TTMs和Sundial等8个代表性LTSM上，下游任务性能均得到一致提升

Conclusion: SFF通过平滑损失函数改善预训练大时间序列模型的微调效果，从优化角度扰动尖锐最小值而不显著影响平坦区域，促进逃逸不良局部最优

Abstract: Recently, large time series models (LTSMs) have gained increasing attention due to their similarities to large language models, including flexible context length, scalability, and task generality, outperforming advanced task-specific models. However, prior studies indicate that pre-trained LTSMs may exhibit a poorly conditioned non-convex loss landscape, leading to limited trainability. As a result, direct fine-tuning tends to cause overfitting and suboptimal performance, sometimes even worse than training from scratch, substantially diminishing the benefits of pre-training. To overcome this limitation, we propose Smoothed Full Fine-tuning (SFF), a novel fine-tuning technology. Specifically, we construct an auxiliary LTSM via random initialization to obtain a smoother loss landscape, and then linearly interpolate its weights with those of the pre-trained model to smooth the original landscape. This process improves trainability while preserving pre-trained knowledge, thereby enabling more effective downstream fine-tuning.
