For regret minimization, we explore a new notion of regret and give sharp memory-regret trade-offs for any single-pass algorithm. We complement our theoretical results with experiments, demonstrating the trade-offs between sample, regret, and memory.

</details>


### [509] [Heterophily-Aware Adaptive Knowledge Distillation for Hypergraph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08978)
*Joohee Cho,David Yoon Suk Kang,Yunyong Ko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HADES是一种针对超图神经网络的异质性感知自适应知识蒸馏方法，通过量化节点异质性来评估教师模型的可靠性，从而在保持轻量化的同时提升学生模型的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究发现超图神经网络在异质性节点（通过语义多样的超边连接）上的预测性能显著较低，这表明教师模型的知识可靠性在不同节点间存在差异。因此需要一种能够根据节点异质性来调整知识转移的蒸馏方法。

Method: 提出HADES方法：1）量化节点异质性；2）将节点异质性作为教师模型可靠性的估计；3）在蒸馏过程中基于此估计来调节教师知识向学生模型的转移。

Result: 在真实世界超图上的实验表明，HADES在不同HNN教师模型和蒸馏目标下都能持续提升学生模型性能。在许多情况下，所得学生模型不仅超越了教师模型的预测性能，还实现了高达12.3倍的推理加速。

Conclusion: HADES通过考虑节点异质性来适应性地调整知识蒸馏过程，能够有效提升轻量级学生模型的性能，使其在保持快速推理的同时，甚至超越教师模型的预测能力。

Abstract: Hypergraph knowledge distillation aims to retain the predictive performance of a hypergraph neural network (HNN) teacher while reducing inference costs through a lightweight student model. In this work, we observe that HNNs exhibit substantially lower prediction performance on heterophilic nodes connected through semantically diverse hyperedges, indicating that the reliability of teacher knowledge varies across nodes. Motivated by this observation, we propose HADES, a heterophily-aware adaptive distillation method for hypergraph neural networks. HADES quantifies node heterophily and leverages it as an estimate of teacher reliability to modulate the transfer of teacher knowledge during distillation. Experimental results on real-world hypergraphs demonstrate that HADES consistently improves student performance across different HNN teachers and distillation objectives. In many cases, the resulting student models surpass the predictive performance of their teachers while achieving up to 12.3 times faster inference.

</details>


### [510] [Beyond Neural Collapse: Task-Intrinsic Geometry Governs Neural Representations in Modular Arithmetic](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08985)
*Hu Tan,Kuo Gai,Shihua Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了在模加法任务中神经网络出现的循环几何结构，而非神经坍缩预测的单纯形ETF结构。作者从三个方向解释了这一现象：分层非均匀训练机制、熵正则化输运解释、以及循环解相对于单纯形ETF的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经坍缩理论预测K类平衡分类器应形成(K-1)维单纯形等角紧框架，但在模加法任务中，网络却压缩到二维循环几何结构。作者试图解释为什么会出现这种与理论预测不同的几何结构。

Method: 1. 形式化了分层非均匀训练机制：下游分类器权重在交叉熵梯度驱动下先形成秩2等角配置，然后上游嵌入被约束在同一平面；2. 提出熵正则化输运解释，将嵌入形成简化为相位对齐；3. 量化分析循环解相对于单纯形ETF的优势。

Result: 1. 解释了分类器权重先移动、嵌入随后对齐的机制；2. 模加法任务的嵌入形成简化为单频字符的相位对齐，导致等角点分布在圆上；3. 循环秩2解在Schatten或权重衰减代理下具有Θ(K)优势，而单纯形ETF只有O(1)优势。

Conclusion: 模算术上的"顿悟"现象不仅由最大分离决定，而是分离、对称性和复杂性之间的任务结构化权衡。循环几何结构是这种权衡的自然结果，解释了为什么分类器权重先形成平面，然后嵌入被约束在同一平面。

Abstract: While neural collapse (NC) predicts that a $K$-class-balanced classifier should organize terminal representations as a $(K-1)$-dimensional simplex equiangular tight frame (ETF), modular addition consistently enters a different regime: networks compress to a two-dimensional cyclic geometry in which both classifier weights and token embeddings lie on circles. We refine the explanation of this phenomenon in three directions. First, we formalize a layerwise non-uniform training mechanism: downstream classifier weights are driven by dense cross-entropy gradients into a rank-2 equiangular configuration before upstream embeddings fully reorganize, and once this classifier plane forms, backpropagated feature gradients constrain embedding motion to the same plane while weight decay suppresses orthogonal components. Second, after this subspace locking, the induced in-plane dynamics admit an entropy-regularized transport interpretation on $S^1$; combined with modular-addition labels, this reduces embedding formation to phase alignment, whose minimizers are single-frequency characters of $\mathbb{Z}/P\mathbb{Z}$ and hence equal-angle points on a circle. Third, we quantify why this solution prevails over NC: a simplex ETF gains only an $O(1)$ advantage in cross-entropy, whereas the cyclic rank-2 solution enjoys a $Θ(K)$ advantage under Schatten or weight-decay surrogates, yielding a critical threshold $λ_{\mathrm{crit}} = Θ(1/K)$. Our results explain both why classifier weights move first and why embeddings subsequently align with them, showing that grokking on modular arithmetic is governed not by maximal separation alone but by a task-structured trade-off between separation, symmetry, and complexity.

</details>


### [511] [LEAF: A Learning-Enabled ADMM Framework for Accelerated Convex Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08993)
*Binh Nguyen,Trinh Tran,Truong X. Nghiem*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LEAF是一个基于学习增强的ADMM框架，用于加速凸优化。核心思想是使用输入凸神经网络(ICNN)近似目标函数的Moreau包络，从而得到保持凸性和光滑性的学习模型。提出了MEL-ADMM及其分裂变体sMEL-ADMM，相比直接学习高维算子的现有方法，LEAF学习标量值的Moreau包络，显著降低了模型复杂度并提高了数据效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的优化方法通常直接学习高维算子，导致模型复杂度高且数据效率低。需要一种既能保持优化问题结构特性（如凸性），又能显著加速计算的方法。LEAF旨在通过学习目标函数的Moreau包络来降低模型复杂度，同时保持凸优化问题的关键结构性质。

Method: 1. 使用输入凸神经网络(ICNN)近似目标函数的Moreau包络，确保学习模型保持凸性和光滑性；2. 提出MEL-ADMM（Moreau Envelope Learning ADMM）框架；3. 提出分裂变体sMEL-ADMM；4. 通过显式嵌入凸性结构来保持优化问题的关键特性；5. 提供理论收敛性和可行性保证。

Result: 1. 理论分析表明所提方法达到与经典ADMM相当的收敛速度，同时降低了每次迭代的计算成本；2. 数值实验显示相比最先进的求解器实现了高达一个数量级的加速，同时保持较低的最优性差距；3. 框架适用于具有光滑和非光滑目标的广泛凸问题类别。

Conclusion: LEAF通过将学习技术整合到ADMM框架中，为凸优化提供了高效且理论可靠的加速方法。通过使用ICNN学习Moreau包络，在保持凸性和光滑性的同时显著降低了模型复杂度。该方法在理论和实验上都表现出优越性能，为基于学习的优化提供了有前景的新方向。

Abstract: We propose LEAF, a learning-enabled ADMM framework for accelerated convex optimization. The key idea is to approximate the Moreau envelope of the objective function using an Input Convex Neural Network (ICNN), resulting in a learned model that preserves convexity and smoothness. This leads to the proposed Moreau Envelope Learning ADMM (MEL-ADMM) and its splitting variant sMEL-ADMM. Unlike existing approaches that learn high-dimensional operators directly, LEAF learns a scalar-valued Moreau envelope, significantly reducing model complexity and improving data efficiency. The framework accommodates a broad class of convex problems with smooth and non-smooth objectives. By embedding convexity explicitly through the ICNN architecture, the proposed approach maintains high approximation accuracy while preserving key structural properties of the optimization problem. Both MEL-ADMM and sMEL-ADMM are developed with theoretical guarantees of convergence and feasibility under the learned model. Rigorous analysis shows that the proposed methods achieve convergence rates comparable to classical ADMM while reducing per-iteration computational cost. Numerical experiments demonstrate up to an order-of-magnitude speedup over state-of-the-art solvers while maintaining low optimality gaps

</details>


### [512] [Understanding Quantization-Aware Training: Gradients at Quantized Weights Bias to the Low-Loss Basin](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09012)
*Hanyang Li,Jianhao Ma,Ying Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出一个统一的几何框架，解释后训练量化（PTQ）在低比特量化时失败的原因，以及量化感知训练（QAT）如何恢复精度。研究发现，全精度训练在低损失"河流"周围的"盆地"内进行，当量化网格与盆地宽度相当时，PTQ可能选择盆地外的高损失量化点，而QAT的梯度机制能感知"山谷"壁并将量化点引导回盆地内。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究PTQ在激进比特宽度下失效的原因以及QAT能够恢复精度的机制。虽然PTQ在中等比特宽度下通常有效，但在低比特量化时精度会急剧下降，而QAT虽然更昂贵但能恢复损失精度。需要一个统一的框架来解释这两种现象。

Method: 提出一个几何框架，将全精度训练建模为在"山谷"内沿着低损失"河流"进行，河流周围形成平坦的"盆地"。当量化网格与盆地宽度相当时，PTQ可能选择盆地外的高损失量化点。分析QAT的直通估计器机制，证明其梯度能感知山谷壁并将量化点引导回盆地。通过局部景观模型形式化这一机制，构建几何PTQ失败模式，并在局部量化器兼容假设下证明QAT的有限时间恢复。

Result: 实验验证了PTQ的"盆地跨越"失败和QAT的恢复机制。在视觉和语言模型上的多个神经网络量化方案实验证实了理论预测：PTQ在低比特量化时可能选择盆地外的高损失点，而QAT能成功将量化点引导回盆地内。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解PTQ失败和QAT恢复提供了统一的几何解释框架。量化网格与损失盆地宽度的相对关系是关键因素，QAT的梯度机制能有效感知损失景观的几何结构并引导量化点保持在低损失区域内。这一理论框架有助于指导更有效的量化方法设计。

Abstract: Post-training quantization (PTQ) converts a trained full-precision model into low-bit weights without task-level retraining, while quantization-aware training (QAT) incorporates quantization into the training loop. Although PTQ is efficient and often accurate at moderate bitwidths, it can fail sharply at aggressive bitwidths; QAT is more expensive but can often recover the lost accuracy. We propose a unified geometric framework that explains both PTQ failure and QAT recovery. We model full-precision training as following a low-loss \emph{river} inside a wider \emph{valley}: a normal neighborhood of the river forms a nearly flat \emph{basin}, while leaving this basin incurs a sharp loss increase. When the quantization grid is comparable to the basin width, local PTQ objectives, including rounding and Hessian-based second-order reconstruction, can select a high-loss deployed quantized point outside the basin even when nearby low-loss quantized points exist. In this regime, straight-through-estimator-based QAT has a useful bias: it evaluates gradients at the deployed quantized weights while updating latent full-precision weights, causing the gradient to sense the valley wall and acquire an inward component that steers subsequent quantized iterates back into the basin. We formalize this mechanism through a local landscape model, construct a geometric PTQ failure mode, and prove finite-time QAT recovery under local quantizer-compatibility assumptions. Experiments across vision and language models under multiple neural-network quantization schemes corroborate the predicted basin-crossing failure of PTQ and the corresponding recovery mechanism of QAT.

</details>


### [513] [Structural Grid Descriptors Predict Within-Task Solver Success on ARC-AGI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09026)
*Ayan Pendharkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了中间网格状态的结构特性是否能预测符号化ARC-AGI求解器的成功，发现手工制作的网格描述符在50%轨迹完成时能有效区分成功与失败的运行，这一信号在不同求解器架构间可迁移，并可用于早期停止以减少计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探究中间网格状态的结构特性是否能够预测符号化抽象推理语料库（ARC）人工通用智能（AGI）求解器的成功，这有助于理解求解器行为并可能优化计算效率。

Method: 通过44,800次运行实验，涵盖两种架构不同的求解器（波束搜索和随机深度优先搜索），400个ARC任务，每个求解器28种配置，以及训练和评估数据集。在轨迹完成50%时测量手工制作的网格描述符，使用条件互信息框架I(X;Y|task)>0进行分析，并通过特征选择、跨求解器迁移和预注册验证等方法评估预测能力。

Result: 研究发现：1）手工网格描述符在任务内能有效区分成功与失败运行（平均最佳特征AUC=0.885）；2）预测信号主要沿单一网格复杂度轴；3）特征可跨求解器架构迁移（AUC 0.747-0.762）；4）预注册特征n_components_final在41个任务上AUC=0.765；5）信号与求解器容量无关（配置残差化AUC=0.927/0.896）；6）早期停止可减少33.6%计算同时保留98.9%解；7）发现DSL原语库在229个任务上无法产生有效转换，表明DSL覆盖限制而非搜索预算问题。

Conclusion: 中间网格状态的结构特性确实能预测符号化ARC-AGI求解器的成功，这一信号具有跨求解器架构的泛化能力，可用于早期停止以显著减少计算成本，同时揭示了当前DSL原语库的覆盖限制是求解失败的主要原因。

Abstract: We ask whether structural properties of intermediate grid states predict whether a symbolic ARC-AGI solver will succeed, framed as a test of conditional mutual information I(X;Y|task) > 0. Across 44,800 runs spanning two architecturally distinct solvers (beam search and Stochastic DFS), 400 ARC tasks, 28 configurations per solver, and both training and evaluation splits, hand-crafted grid descriptors measured at 50% trajectory completion discriminate successful from failed runs within the same task (mean within-task best-feature AUC = 0.885, p < 0.001 under within-task label permutation). Most predictive content lies along a single grid-complexity axis. The result generalizes across solver architectures: a feature selected on one solver predicts success on the other with AUC 0.747-0.762 in all four transfer directions (p < 0.001, leakage controlled). On a pre-registered held-out set of 41 reliable tasks, the frozen feature n_components_final achieves AUC = 0.765 (95% CI [0.717, 0.810], p < 0.001), robust under task-clustered bootstrap resampling and cross-solver task collapsing. The signal is not explained by solver capacity (configuration-residualized AUC = 0.927 and 0.896 for beam search and SDFS, p < 0.001) and is only weakly coupled to score trajectories (R^2 approximately 0). Early stopping at 50% completion reduces beam-search compute by 33.6% while retaining 98.9% of solves; degenerate-trajectory detection reduces SDFS compute by 65.3% with no solve loss. Finally, on 229 of 400 evaluation tasks the DSL primitive library produces no valid transition from the input grid. This 0-step collapse is invariant to search budget and universally failed by beam search, indicating a DSL coverage limitation rather than a search-budget effect.

</details>


### [514] [TRIAGE: Dialectical Reasoning for Explainable Risk Prediction on Irregularly Sampled Medical Time Series with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09030)
*Hyeongwon Jang,Gyouk Chu,Changhun Kim,Joonhyung Park,Hangyul Yoon,Eunho Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TRIAGE框架通过让LLM生成针对竞争性临床结果的辩证推理，解决了医疗时间序列预测中风险极化问题，实现了连续风险评分和可解释的临床推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于电子健康记录的临床早期预警系统需要提供校准的风险评分和可验证的解释。现有LLM方法将分级临床风险过度简化为二元预测，导致风险极化和跨患者可比性差。

Method: 提出TRIAGE框架，训练LLM生成针对竞争性临床结果的辩证推理，通过引出结果特异性理性来缓解风险极化，使单个LLM能基于明确临床推理产生连续风险评分。

Result: 在三个ISMTS基准测试中，TRIAGE平均AUPRC提升3.3%，校准误差降低81%。LLM作为评判者的评估显示，其理性在临床推理质量上比基线后验解释高出20%。

Conclusion: TRIAGE通过辩证推理框架有效解决了LLM在医疗时间序列预测中的风险极化问题，实现了更好的校准、连续风险评分和高质量临床解释，代码已开源。

Abstract: Clinical early warning systems built on electronic health records, in which clinical observations are recorded as irregularly sampled medical time series (ISMTS), must deliver both calibrated risk scores for patient triage and interpretable rationales that clinicians can verify. Large Language Models (LLMs) have been explored for this task, yet they collapse graded clinical risk into overconfident binary predictions. This risk polarization undermines both calibration and cross-patient comparability. To address this, we propose TRIAGE, a framework that trains an LLM to generate dialectical reasoning over competing clinical outcomes by eliciting outcome-specific rationales. This dialectical formulation mitigates risk polarization, enabling a single LLM to yield continuous risk scores grounded in explicit clinical reasoning. Evaluated on three ISMTS benchmarks, TRIAGE achieves an average AUPRC improvement of 3.3% and reduces calibration error by 81% compared to the competitive baselines. An LLM-as-a-judge assessment further shows that our rationales surpass post-hoc explanations from the baseline by 20% in clinical reasoning quality. The source code is available at https://github.com/HyeongWon-Jang/TRIAGE .

</details>


### [515] [DynaCF: Mitigating Shortcut Learning in Reward Models via Dynamic Counterfactual Sensitivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09043)
*Fengyuan Liu,Yongliang Miao,Zirui He,Yanguang Liu,Fei Sun,Mengnan Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DynaCF是一种通过动态重加权缓解奖励模型中捷径学习的框架，通过在线测量捷径敏感性并相应调整样本权重来提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于成对偏好训练的奖励模型往往依赖表面的捷径线索而非学习真实响应质量，这影响了模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

Method: 提出DynaCF动态重加权框架：在优化过程中在线测量捷径敏感性，通过对样本应用语义保持的反事实扰动，跟踪当前模型下的边界偏移和偏好翻转，然后根据捷径敏感性动态调整Bradley-Terry目标中的样本权重。

Result: 大量实验表明，DynaCF在偏好建模中能持续提升鲁棒性，有效减少对捷径线索的依赖。

Conclusion: DynaCF通过动态识别和减轻捷径敏感性，为奖励模型训练提供了更鲁棒的框架，使模型更依赖任务相关的偏好信号而非表面模式。

Abstract: Reward models trained from pairwise preferences often exploit superficial shortcut cues rather than learning true response quality. We propose DynaCF, a dynamic reweighting framework for mitigating shortcut learning in reward model training. Unlike static shortcut heuristics, DynaCF measures shortcut sensitivity online during optimization by applying semantics-preserving counterfactual perturbations and tracking the resulting margin shifts and preference flips under the current model. Samples with higher shortcut sensitivity are dynamically downweighted in the Bradley-Terry objective, encouraging the model to rely less on superficial patterns and more on task-relevant preference signals. Extensive experiments show that DynaCF consistently improves robustness in preference modeling.

</details>


### [516] [Decoy-Calibrated Failure Audits for Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09046)
*Vyzantinos Repantis,Ameya Gawde,Harshvardhan Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Janus是一个用于验证机器学习模型错误解释可信度的审计流程，通过比较真实描述符与随机分配的解码描述符，并需要在新数据上复现，来筛选可信的失败模式解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前模型审计面临选择偏差风险：审计者可能测试多个候选错误解释（如长输入、间接问题、干扰证据等），但观察到的最大效应可能只是多次尝试中的最佳结果，而非真实失败模式。需要一种方法来决定哪些错误解释是可信的，值得报告。

Method: Janus流程：审计者从固定模型、标记评估集和冻结的候选解释列表（称为描述符）开始。Janus通过错误率提升来评分每个描述符，然后将真实描述符与具有相同频率但随机分配给示例的假描述符进行比较。描述符只有在发现数据上击败解码描述符，并在单独的保留数据上复现时，才被确认。

Result: 在多表查找任务的受控审计中，Janus成功识别了植入的失败，确认了长链描述符及其交互作用。在两个公开基准测试（MuSiQue和LongBench v2）中，SliceLine基线标记了看似合理的高错误区域，但Janus未确认任何描述符。消融实验显示两个保护措施都很重要：在LongBench v2上，未校准的固定阈值报告20个描述符，解码描述符筛选后剩下1个，保留检查拒绝了最后一个（其提升从0.36降至0.05）。

Conclusion: Janus提出了将提出解释与报告解释分离的原则。候选解释可以来自任何来源，但只有那些击败解码描述符并在新数据上复现的解释才能成为审计发现。这为模型审计提供了更严谨的可信度验证框架。

Abstract: Useful audits reveal not only how often a model fails, but also where its failures concentrate. An auditor may test many candidate explanations: long inputs, indirect questions, distracting evidence, or combinations of these factors. The risk is selection. The largest observed effect may reflect a real failure mode, or it may simply be the best result among many tried. We introduce Janus, a procedure for deciding when a proposed error explanation is credible enough to report. The goal is not to generate new explanations, but to decide which ones hold up. The auditor starts with a fixed model, a labeled evaluation set, and a frozen list of candidate explanations, which we call descriptors. Janus scores each descriptor by its error-rate lift, then compares real descriptors with fake ones that have the same frequencies but are randomly assigned to examples. A descriptor is confirmed only if it beats this decoy floor on the data used for discovery and then repeats on separate held-out data. In a controlled audit of multi-table lookup tasks, Janus identifies the planted failure, confirming long-chain descriptors and their interactions. The LLM often stops partway through the lookup chain instead of reaching the final answer. On two public benchmarks, MuSiQue and LongBench v2, the SliceLine baseline flags plausible high-error pockets, but Janus confirms none of them. Ablations show why both safeguards matter. On LongBench v2, an uncalibrated fixed threshold reports 20 descriptors, the decoy floor leaves one, and the holdout check rejects the last one after its lift shrinks from 0.36 to 0.05. The resulting principle separates proposing explanations from reporting them. Candidates may come from any source, but only those that beat decoys and replicate on fresh data become audit findings.

</details>


### [517] [Beyond Convolution: Advancing Hypergraph Neural Networks with Hypergraph U-Nets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09051)
*Fuli Wang,Wei Qian,Daniel L. Lau,Gonzalo R. Arce*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了用于超图数据的U-Net架构，通过并行分层池化(PHPool)和反池化(PHUnpool)操作解决超图缺乏有效池化/反池化方法的问题，在超图重建、分类和节点异常检测任务中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卷积操作已成功应用于超图等非欧几里得高阶域，但U-Net架构在超图数据上的应用仍未被充分探索，主要原因是缺乏定义良好的池化和反池化操作。需要设计能够保留输入超图最大结构信息的池化/反池化方法。

Method: 受分层聚类启发，通过在不同粒度切割聚类树状图，一次性构建并行分层池化(PHPool)和反池化(PHUnpool)算子。PHPool以全局并行方式设计，避免顺序学习过程中的局部结构破坏，确保对原始超图结构的保真度和计算效率；PHUnpool则专门执行PHPool的逆操作以实现超图重建。

Result: 在超图重建模拟、超图分类和节点级异常检测任务中验证模型性能，结果表明该模型在各项任务上均优于现有的最先进图和超图深度学习方法。

Conclusion: 该研究开创性地将U-Net架构应用于超图数据，通过创新的并行分层池化/反池化操作解决了超图缺乏有效池化方法的问题，为超图深度学习提供了新的架构范式。

Abstract: Convolutions have successfully transitioned from image processing to the complex realm of non-Euclidean higher-order domains, particularly in hypergraphs. Despite the success in convolution, the exploration of a popular architecture named U-Net remains largely unexplored for hypergraph data due to the lack of well-defined pooling and unpooling operations. This work pioneers the study of U-Net architectures for hypergraph data, addressing the critical challenge of designing effective pooling and unpooling operations that retain maximal structural information from the input hypergraph. Motivated by hierarchical clustering, we propose to construct the pooling and unpooling operators all at once by cutting the clustering dendrogram at different granularities, named the Parallel Hierarchical Pooling (PHPool) and Unpooling (PHUnpool) operators. Unlike existing pooling methods that risk local structural damage through a sequential learning procedure, our PHPool operators are designed in a global and parallel manner to ensure fidelity to the original hypergraph structure with efficient computation while the PHUnpool operators are tailored to perform inverse operations of the PHPools for hypergraph reconstruction. We validate our model through hypergraph reconstruction simulation, hypergraph classification, and node-level anomaly detection, where it demonstrates superior performance over existing state-of-the-art graph and hypergraph deep learning methods.

</details>


### [518] [INFUSER: Influence-Guided Self-Evolution Improves Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09052)
*Siyu Chen,Miao Lu,Beining Wu,Heejune Sheen,Fengzhuo Zhang,Shuangning Li,Zhiyuan Li,Jose Blanchet,Tianhao Wang,Zhuoran Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: INFUSER是一个自进化框架，通过生成器-求解器协同训练，让语言模型利用非结构化文档自动生成问题并改进推理能力，无需大量人工监督数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自进化方法要么依赖大量人工标注或教师生成的数据，要么使用与求解器改进无关的难度启发式奖励。需要一种更有效、更少监督的自进化方法。

Method: 提出INFUSER框架：生成器从文档池自动生成问题和参考答案，求解器通过标准正确性奖励训练；生成器通过优化器感知的影响分数（衡量问题是否真正改进求解器）获得奖励。使用DuGRPO（GRPO的双归一化变体）训练生成器。

Result: 在Qwen3-8B-Base上，INFUSER在Olympiad和SuperGPQA基准上相对现有自进化基线提升超过20%。8B INFUSER生成器在数学和编码任务上优于冻结的32B思考生成器。消融实验验证了每个设计选择的必要性。

Conclusion: INFUSER提供了一个灵活、可扩展的自进化框架，能够从非结构化文档中自动生成适应性课程，有效提升语言模型的推理能力，且可扩展到指令微调模型和规则可验证数据增强。

Abstract: Self-evolution offers a scalable path to stronger reasoning: a pretrained language model improves itself with only minimal external supervision. Yet existing methods either depend on extensively curated or teacher-generated training data, or, when the generator runs unsupervised, reward it by a difficulty heuristic that need not improve the solver. We introduce INFUSER, an iterative co-training framework with two co-evolving roles: a Generator that drafts questions and reference golden answers from a pool of unstructured, automatically collected documents, and a Solver that improves by training on them. The solver is trained with standard correctness rewards against the generator-provided answers, while the generator is rewarded by an optimizer-aware influence score that measures whether each proposed question would actually improve the solver on the target distribution. Because this continuous, noisy influence score is poorly served by standard GRPO, we propose DuGRPO, a dual-normalized variant of GRPO, for generator training. Together, these turn the document pool into an adaptive curriculum that favors questions useful to the current solver, not just hard ones. On Qwen3-8B-Base, INFUSER outperforms strong self-evolution baselines with over 20% relative improvement on Olympiad and SuperGPQA benchmarks, and an 8B INFUSER co-evolving generator outperforms a frozen 32B thinking generator on math and coding. Ablations confirm each design choice is necessary, and two extensions, applying INFUSER to an instruction-finetuned anchor and augmenting it with rule-verifiable RLVR data, further demonstrate the flexibility and generalizability of the framework. Code is available at https://github.com/FFishy-git/INFUSER.

</details>


### [519] [Stage-1 Controls the Entropy Regime, Not the Outcome](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09059)
*Jianxiong Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过两阶段后训练（第一阶段预热：SFT或OPD，第二阶段RL）分析视觉语言模型，发现第一阶段主要影响策略熵值而非最终性能，OPD在预热阶段有更高熵值和多样性，但RL后差异消失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索两阶段后训练中第一阶段（SFT或OPD预热启动）对视觉语言模型的实际控制作用，特别是在小数据设置下，理解不同预热方法对最终性能的影响机制。

Method: 使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型，以同模态72B VLM作为OPD教师，进行两阶段训练：第一阶段为SFT或OPD预热，第二阶段为强化学习。在Geometry3K内部验证集和MathVista外部数据集上评估性能，分析策略熵、答案多样性和pass@16等指标。

Result: 1. 三种预热方法在Geometry3K内部验证集上达到53-54%的狭窄区间，与近期专门方法范围一致，表明第一阶段对领域内终点影响有限
2. 匹配配方、早停的SFT在MathVista上提升2.1分，逆转了过训练变体的9.5分下降
3. OPD在进入RL时具有显著更高的策略熵值，且差异在可用轨迹中保持可见
4. OPD在领域内初始化阶段有更高答案多样性和pass@16（比SFT高2.0-5.2分），但问题级bootstrap区间显示较小对比不确定
5. RL后优势消失（终点pass@16值在1.1分内），MathVista上六个模型在1.2分内

Conclusion: 第一阶段主要与熵机制相关，但下游收益有限且局部化，没有证据表明OPD是更好的RL预热启动。该研究提供了有界的经验特征：在特定设置下，Stage-1强烈关联于熵机制，但对最终性能影响较小。

Abstract: Two-stage post-training -- a Stage-1 warm-start (supervised fine-tuning, SFT, or on-policy distillation, OPD) followed by Stage-2 reinforcement learning (RL) -- is increasingly used for vision-language models (VLMs). We ask what Stage-1 actually controls in a small-data study using Qwen2.5-VL-7B with a same-modality 72B VLM teacher for OPD. First, the three warm-starts reach a narrow $53$--$54\%$ band on Geometry3K internal validation, consistent with the narrow range reported by recent specialized methods; this setup provides little evidence that Stage-1 changes the in-domain endpoint. Second, a matched-recipe, early-stopped SFT improves out-of-domain MathVista by $+2.1$ points, reversing the $-9.5$-point drop of an over-trained variant. The clearest difference is the \emph{entropy regime}: OPD enters RL with substantially higher policy entropy than either SFT initialization, and the separation remains visible through the available trajectories. At the in-domain initialization, OPD also has higher answer diversity and pass@16 ($+2.0$ to $+5.2$ points over SFT), although problem-level bootstrap intervals show that the smaller contrast is uncertain. The advantage is absent after RL (endpoint pass@16 values within $1.1$ points) and on MathVista (six models within $1.2$ points). Our contribution is therefore a bounded empirical characterization: Stage-1 is strongly associated with the entropy regime in this setup, but the downstream payoff is small, localized, and not evidence that OPD is a better RL warm-start.

</details>


### [520] [OnlyDense: Reduced-Order Modeling for Lagrangian simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09065)
*Tu Do,Shannon Ryan,Santu Rana*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于大规模粒子系统（如SPH、MPM）的深度学习框架，将系统状态视为希尔伯特空间中的函数，用线性子空间近似状态空间，通过神经基函数实现高效表示和动力学建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统拉格朗日模拟方法（如SPH、MPM）在模拟多尺度空间或时间现象时计算成本过高，而基于图的方法将系统状态视为离散粒子集。需要一种更高效、可扩展的表示和动力学建模方法。

Method: 将系统状态视为希尔伯特空间中的函数，用学习到的神经基函数张成的线性子空间近似状态空间。该方法可直接投影获得潜在系数并显式访问基函数，避免在非线性潜在空间中进行优化。

Result: 在超过100万个粒子的大规模SPH模拟实验中，包括极端变形和破碎的动态事件，该方法仅使用32个基函数就能准确重建和预测动力学，R²分数超过0.99。

Conclusion: 该框架将经典的基于投影的降阶建模与现代深度学习统一起来，同时保持对离散化点数的不变性，为大规模粒子系统提供了高效、可解释的表示和预测方法。

Abstract: In science and engineering, Lagrangian simulation methods such as Smooth Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) or Material Point Method (MPM) are often employed to study the behavior of dynamic systems. However, these methods can be prohibitively computationally expensive, particularly when simulating multi-scale spatial or temporal phenomena, e.g., void growth and coalescence within macro-scale geometries, structural failure of spacecraft components resulting from hypervelocity impact of space debris particles, etc. In contrast to graph-based methods, where the state of the system is understood as a discrete set of particles, we propose a learning framework for scalable representation and dynamics modeling of massive particle systems by treating the system state as a function and its evolution as a trajectory in Hilbert space. Rather than representing the state as a discrete set of particles or embedding it in a nonlinear latent manifold, we approximate the state space with a linear subspace spanned by learned neural basis functions. This parameterization enables direct projection to obtain latent coefficients and explicit access to the basis functions, avoiding optimization over a nonlinear latent space. The resulting representation admits a natural interpretation: latent variables correspond to coefficients in Hilbert space, and basis functions correspond to spatial modes, analogous to Proper Orthogonal Decomposition. The framework thus unifies classical projection-based reduced-order modeling with modern deep learning, while remaining invariant to the number of discretization points. Experiments on large-scale SPH simulations with over one million particles, including dynamic events with extreme deformation and fragmentation, demonstrate that the proposed method accurately reconstructs and predicts dynamics, achieving an R$^2$ score above $0.99$ with as few as $32$ basis functions.

</details>


### [521] [A Unifying Lens on Reward Uncertainty in RLHF](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09073)
*Ely Hahami,Yoel Zimmermann,Ray Zhou,Jack Benarroch Jedlicki*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用分布奖励模型解决RLHF中的奖励黑客问题，通过悲观主义方法推导出封闭形式的有效奖励表达式，统一了现有RM集合聚合方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习从人类反馈（RLHF）面临奖励黑客问题，即策略利用代理奖励模型（RM）的错误来获得高RM分数而无需真正提升质量。标准标量RM无法提供原则性的不确定性度量，需要更好的解决方案。

Method: 提出使用分布奖励模型p(r|x,y)来建模奖励不确定性。在贝叶斯推断或KL分布鲁棒优化（KL-DRO）框架下，推导出KL正则化的RLHF目标的封闭形式有效奖励表达式：r̃(x,y) = ±β log E_p[e^{±r/β}]。

Result: 该有效奖励表达式统一了现有RM集合聚合的启发式方法：均值聚合、最坏情况优化（WCO）和不确定性加权优化（UWO）都作为该表达式的极限或截断形式出现，并阐明了每种现有规则的隐含假设。

Conclusion: 分布奖励模型为RLHF中的奖励黑客问题提供了原则性的悲观主义解决方案，通过统一的数学框架揭示了现有启发式方法之间的内在联系和隐含假设。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) is bottlenecked by \emph{reward hacking}, where the policy exploits errors in a proxy reward model (RM) and produces high RM scores without genuine quality gains. A natural mitigation is \emph{pessimism}: penalizing rewards in regions where the RM is uncertain. However, standard scalar RMs provide no principled notion of uncertainty. We argue that the right object is a \emph{distributional} reward model $p(r\mid x,y)$. Under either a Bayesian inference or a KL-distributionally robust optimization (KL-DRO) lens, the KL-regularized RLHF objective admits a closed-form effective reward $\tilde r(x,y) = \pmβ\log\mathbb{E}_p[e^{\pm r/β}]$. The pessimistic branch unifies the prior heuristics for RM ensemble aggregation: mean aggregation, worst-case optimization (WCO), and uncertainty-weighted optimization (UWO) all emerge as limits or truncations of this single expression. This also clarifies the implicit assumptions of each existing rule.

</details>


### [522] [Neural Legendre-Fenchel transform with Hessian Preconditioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09077)
*Basile Plus-Gourdon,Frank Nielsen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于Hessian预处理的深度Legendre变换方法，通过仿射不变性将病态函数转化为良态问题，显著提升了高维凸函数共轭计算的收敛速度和数值精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统深度Legendre变换方法在处理病态函数时面临挑战，现有技术难以有效处理条件数差的凸函数共轭计算问题。

Method: 利用Legendre-Fenchel变换的仿射不变性，提出Hessian预处理策略：通过仿射变形使函数在极小值点的二阶泰勒近似与标准抛物面一致，用残差网络学习简化映射，再通过逆变形恢复原始共轭映射。

Result: 在多种凸函数（包括高维基准测试）上实验表明，该方法显著提高了共轭计算的收敛速度和数值精度，特别对病态问题有显著改进，仅需初始化时的一次特征分解和每次查询时的两次矩阵向量乘法。

Conclusion: 提出的Hessian预处理策略有效解决了深度Legendre变换在处理病态函数时的挑战，但方法仍有适用范围限制，文中讨论了其适用性和局限性。

Abstract: The Legendre-Fenchel (LF) transform is a fundamental tool in convex analysis and machine learning that maps lower semi-continuous functions to their convex conjugates. In practice, when closed-form formula are not available for expressing convex conjugates of given functions, one must approximate them using various techniques. One recent such versatile numerical method is the deep Legendre transform method which relies on neural networks although it remains challenging particularly for tackling ill-conditioned functions. This work builds on the reformulation of the LF transform as a projective polarity. A notable property of this framework is its affine invariance. We leverage this affine invariance to introduce a Hessian-based preconditioning strategy. Specifically, we apply an affine deformation around a minimizer so that the second-order Taylor approximation of the function coincides with the canonical paraboloid, whose conjugation map is the identity. A residual network initialized near the identity can then learn this simplified mapping, while the original conjugation map is recovered through the inverse deformation. The proposed preconditioning incurs only a modest computational overhead, consisting of a single eigendecomposition during initialization and two matrix-vector multiplications per query. Experiments on a diverse set of convex functions, including high-dimensional benchmarks, demonstrate improved convergence rates and enhanced numerical accuracy of the conjugation, with particularly significant gains for ill-conditioned problems. Finally, we discuss the scope of applicability of our proposed method and highlight several of its limitations.

</details>


### [523] [The Hidden Bias of Process Reward Models:PRISM for Rewarding the Right Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09078)
*Aakriti Agrawal,Souradip Chakraborty,Armin Saghafian,Nihal Sharma,Rizal Fathony,Nam H Nguyen,C. Bayan Bruss,Amrit Singh Bedi,Furong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRMs存在训练数据不平衡导致的偏见问题，标准交叉熵训练会放大这种偏见，导致高误报率，对下游任务产生不对称的负面影响。作者提出PRISM框架，通过对比学习和硬负例生成来减少误报，无需新的人工标注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 发现过程奖励模型（PRMs）存在由步级训练数据严重不平衡引起的隐藏偏见。标准交叉熵训练会放大这种偏见，导致PRMs过度信任看似合理但错误的推理步骤，产生高误报率。这些误报对下游任务产生不对称的负面影响：误报会主动引导最佳选择、引导解码和政策优化走向错误推理，而误报主要只是减缓探索速度。

Method: 提出PRISM（改进步级建模的精度排序）框架，这是一种政策感知的PRM训练方法。该方法从对比性步级比较中学习，使用时间前瞻策略生成硬负例，无需新的人工标注。进一步采用难度感知课程学习来优化对比步级边界。

Result: 在PRMBench和ProcessBench上，PRISM显著减少了误报（在PRMBench上减少22%），并提高了宏观F1分数。当应用于政策优化和搜索任务（包括引导解码和最佳选择）时，它持续提高了准确性和鲁棒性（引导解码最高提升22%，最佳选择最高提升33%）。

Conclusion: 可信的过程监督不仅关乎分配高奖励，更重要的是为正确的推理赋予正确的理由。PRM训练应从点对点的标签拟合转向可靠的相对比较，PRISM框架通过减少误报和提高精度，为这一转变提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Process Reward Models (PRMs) improve credit assignment for reasoning by providing step-level feedback. However, we identify a hidden bias in PRMs caused by severe imbalance in step-level training data. Standard cross-entropy training amplifies this bias, causing PRMs to overcredit plausible but incorrect steps and produce high false-positive rates. We show that these false positives have an asymmetric downstream effect: false negatives mainly slow exploration, whereas false positives actively steer Best-of-N selection, guided decoding, and policy optimization toward flawed reasoning. This suggests that PRM training should shift from pointwise label fitting to reliable relative comparisons. To address this, we propose PRISM (Precision Ranking for Improved Step Modeling), a policy-aware PRM training framework that learns from contrastive step-level comparisons and hard negatives generated by a temporal lookahead strategy, requiring no new human labels. We further use a difficulty-aware curriculum to optimize the contrastive step margin. Across PRMBench and ProcessBench, PRISM substantially reduces false positives (22% on PRMBench) and improves macro F1 over strong discriminative PRMs. When applied to policy optimization and search tasks, including guided decoding and Best-of-N selection, it consistently improves accuracy (up to 22% for guided decoding and 33% for Best-of-N) and robustness. More broadly, trustworthy process supervision is not just about assigning high rewards, but about rewarding the right reasoning for the right reasons.

</details>


### [524] [FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09079)
*Yan Wang,Qifan Zhang,Jiachen Yu,Tian Liang,Dongyang Ma,Xiang Hu,Zibo Lin,Chunyang Li,Zhichao Wang,Jia Li,Yujiu Yang,Haitao Mi,Dong Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA)新推理范式，通过神经记忆索引器主动预测未来上下文需求，仅保留查询关键KV块在GPU内存中，大幅减少KV缓存占用至13.5%，同时保持或提升下游任务准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统LLM在解码时需加载完整KV缓存，导致GPU内存瓶颈，尤其在超长上下文服务中问题严重。需要一种更高效的推理范式来减少内存占用。

Method: 提出Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA)和神经记忆索引器，基于DeepSeek-V4架构。采用无主干解耦训练策略，将索引器构建为标准双编码器架构，使用标准检索训练框架独立训练，无需将大主干模型加载到GPU内存。

Result: 在LongBench-v2、LongMemEval、RULER等长上下文评估套件中，平均物理KV缓存占用压缩至完整上下文基线的13.5%，下游准确率保持或略有提升（平均+0.6%绝对边际）。在50万规模下，FlashMemory抑制物理KV缓存开销超过90%，且不破坏主干核心推理能力。

Conclusion: "少即是多"范式显著提升服务效率，同时作为有效的注意力去噪器在依赖长期全局记忆的任务中发挥作用，为超长上下文LLM服务提供了高效解决方案。

Abstract: Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA), a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. Rather than passively attending to all historical tokens, LSA proactively predicts future context demands and preserves only the query-critical KV chunks in the GPU memory. Crucially, we instantiate this architecture via a backbone-free decoupled training strategy. By formulating the indexer as a standard dual-encoder architecture, we train it independently using standard retrieval training frameworks without ever loading the massive backbone model into GPU memory.
  We demonstrate that this "less is more" paradigm significantly maximizes serving efficiency while acting as an effective attention denoiser in tasks that rely on long-term global memory. Across primary long-context evaluation suites (e.g., LongBench-v2, LongMemEval, and RULER), FM-DS-V4 compresses the average physical KV cache footprint down to merely 13.5% of the full-context baseline, while consistently preserving or slightly elevating downstream accuracy (+0.6% absolute margin on average). Crucially, at extreme 500K scales, FlashMemory suppresses the physical KV cache overhead by over 90% without destabilizing the backbone's core reasoning capacities.

</details>


### [525] [Beyond FLOPs: Benchmarking Real Inference Acceleration of LLM Pruning under a GEMM-Centric Taxonomy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09080)
*Haozhe Hu,Hao Wu,Anhao Zhao,Longwei Ding,Peiran Yin,Yunpu Ma,Xiaoyu Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于GEMM的剪枝分类法，统一了各种LLM剪枝方法，并通过系统化基准测试揭示了不同剪枝策略在实际加速效果与质量损失之间的权衡关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM剪枝方法虽然目标相同（加速推理），但实现方式各异（剪枝token、层、头、维度、注意力模式等），导致实际加速效果严重依赖于硬件和内核实现，缺乏统一评估框架来理解不同剪枝方法的实际加速效果。

Method: 提出了基于通用矩阵乘法（GEMM）维度的分类法，将现有剪枝方法按照M、N、K维度重新组织。构建了统一的基准测试框架，实现跨剪枝设计空间的一致性比较，系统化地刻画了加速-质量权衡的帕累托前沿。

Result: 静态深度剪枝在内存受限场景下仍是最强的帕累托最优基线，最接近理论加速上限。在预填充阶段，帕累托前沿随质量损失变化：低损失（0%-4%）时静态深度最优，中等损失（5%-16%）时动态深度最优，高损失（17%-26%）时静态宽度剪枝最优。

Conclusion: 该研究首次建立了剪枝加速LLM的实际极限的统一视图，为未来剪枝研究提供了指导，表明需要根据质量损失容忍度选择不同的剪枝策略。

Abstract: Pruning has emerged as a dominant paradigm for accelerating large language model (LLM) inference, spanning a broad spectrum of methods that remove computation across tokens, layers, heads, dimensions, and attention patterns. Despite sharing the same objective, these pruning approaches induce fundamentally different execution behaviors, causing realized speedups to depend heavily on hardware and kernel implementations. Consequently, the practical acceleration benefits of different pruning families remain poorly understood. In this work, we introduce a GEMM-centric taxonomy that reorganizes existing pruning methods according to the logical \textbf{M}, \textbf{N}, and \textbf{K} dimensions of general matrix multiplication (GEMM). Leveraging this abstraction, we build a unified benchmarking framework that enables implementation-consistent comparison across the pruning design space and systematically characterizes the acceleration--quality Pareto frontier. Our results show that static depth pruning remains the strongest Pareto-optimal baseline and stays closest to its theoretical acceleration upper bound in memory-bounded scenarios. During prefill, the frontier transitions from static depth at low quality loss (0\%--4\%), to dynamic depth at moderate loss (5\%--16\%), and finally to static width pruning at higher loss levels (17\%--26\%). These findings establish the first unified view of the practical limits of pruning-based LLM acceleration and provide guidance for future pruning research.\footnote{Code is available at https://github.com/EIT-NLP/LLM-Pruning/tree/main/PruningInferSim}

</details>


### [526] [Stabilizing On-Policy Distillation for MLLM Reasoning with Global Normalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09091)
*Dongze Hao,Zhiwei Jin,Chen Chen,Haonan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GNDPO提出全局归一化蒸馏策略优化方法，通过将原始KL分数转换为批次级相对优势来稳定优化，解决基于蒸馏的强化学习中的梯度爆炸问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于策略的蒸馏（OPD）作为重要的后训练范式，通过更强教师模型提供密集细粒度监督，相比基于可验证奖励的强化学习有优势。但原始的令牌级蒸馏可能因异常状态中的幅度失配导致梯度不稳定。

Method: 提出GNDPO方法，通过将原始KL分数转换为批次级相对优势来稳定优化，这种归一化有效缓解梯度爆炸同时保留令牌级指导的优势。

Result: 实验结果表明，GNDPO显著提高了训练鲁棒性和多模态推理任务的下游性能。

Conclusion: GNDPO通过全局归一化有效解决了OPD中的梯度不稳定问题，提升了基于蒸馏的强化学习的训练效果和性能。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has recently emerged as an important post-training paradigm. By using a stronger teacher model to provide dense, fine-grained supervision for sampled trajectories, OPD offers a clear advantage over reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), which typically depends on sparse binary or outcome-based environmental feedback. However, naive token-level distillation can suffer from gradient instability, due to magnitude misalignment in outlier states. To address this issue, we propose Globally Normalized Distillation Policy Optimization (GNDPO), a practical method that stabilizes optimization by transforming raw KL scores into batch-level relative advantages. This normalization effectively mitigates gradient explosions while retaining the benefits of token-level guidance. Experimental results show that GNDPO substantially improves training robustness and downstream performance across multimodal reasoning tasks. The code is released at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/GNDPO.

</details>


### [527] [From Shortcuts to Reasoning: Robust Post-Training of Theory of Mind with Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09092)
*Jike Zhong,Yuxiang Lai,Ming Li,Yuheng Li,Wuao Liu,Behzad Dariush,Konstantinos Psounis,Shao-Yuan Lo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现现有心理理论数据集存在"捷径"问题，通过状态追踪即可达到99%准确率，导致虚假的心理理论能力。作者开发了无捷径数据集，并提出Thinking-RFT方法（结合强化学习和显式推理链），在心理理论上比监督微调提升6%，在复杂高阶推理上提升10%，在多模态场景提升7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有心理理论训练存在严重问题：通过简单的状态追踪等"捷径"就能在数据集上达到99%准确率，造成模型具有心理理论能力的假象。这阻碍了真正有效的心理理论能力发展，需要系统性地解决数据集捷径问题并开发更有效的训练方法。

Method: 1. 开发框架系统检测心理理论数据集中的捷径问题；2. 构建四个无捷径数据集，涵盖三个心理理论场景；3. 提出Thinking-RFT方法：结合强化微调（RFT）与可验证奖励和显式推理链，对比监督微调（SFT）和非思考RFT。

Result: 1. Thinking-RFT在所有场景中提升心理理论能力6%（优于SFT），在复杂高阶推理中提升10%，在多模态场景提升7%；2. Thinking-RFT比非思考RFT平均提升7%；3. RFT通过学习基于关键词和状态变化等锚点线索进行推理；4. 信念类问题比意图类问题更容易出现捷径。

Conclusion: 心理理论研究需要解决数据集捷径问题，而Thinking-RFT（结合强化学习和显式推理）能有效提升心理理论能力，特别是在复杂高阶推理和多模态场景。该方法通过基于因果因素的锚点线索进行推理，为开发有效且鲁棒的心理理论训练提供了指导。

Abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM) is a must-acquire skill for modern foundation model systems to operate effectively and safely in the real world. Recent works have explored honing ToM via post-training; however, we show that such progress is confounded by a pervasive "shortcut" issue: tasks can reach up to 99% accuracy by simply exploiting spurious causal correlations, leading to a false sense of ToM. Motivated by this, we first develop a framework to systematically examine ToM datasets for shortcuts and provide guidance for future development. We find that questions reducible to pure state tracking, such as "belief," are especially shortcut-prone compared to mind questions, such as "intention," where reasoning beyond tracking is required. Using four shortcut-free datasets across three ToM contexts, we then comprehensively study whether Reinforcement Fine-Tuning with verifiable rewards and explicit reasoning chains, called Thinking-RFT, elevates ToM beyond Supervised Fine-Tuning, or SFT. Our key findings are as follows. First, Thinking-RFT effectively improves ToM in all scenarios, with a 6% improvement over SFT, particularly in complex higher-order reasoning, with a 10% improvement over SFT, and multimodal cases, with a 7% improvement over SFT. It also generalizes notably better to unseen domains and higher-order queries while being more robust to counterfactuals. Second, ToM benefits specifically from the joint effect of reasoning and RL: Thinking-RFT outperforms Non-Thinking-RFT by 7% on average. Third, RFT works by learning to ground its reasoning on anchor cues, such as keywords and state changes, that correspond to causal factors. We believe our study is useful for developing effective and robust ToM post-training datasets and advancing critical ToM capabilities.

</details>


### [528] [Addressing Market Regime Changes and Heavy-Tailed Returns in Portfolio Optimization via Bayesian VAR and Elliptical Black-Litterman](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09104)
*Daniil Mikriukov,Ruoyu Sun,Angelos Stefanidis,Jionglong Su,Zhengyong Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BAVAR-BLED算法结合BAVAR和BLED模型，在TD3架构下解决投资组合优化中的厚尾收益和时变特征问题，显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度强化学习投资组合优化模型存在两个主要问题：1) 无法处理实际市场中常见的厚尾收益分布；2) 将历史数据同质化处理，未考虑时间重要性，导致在制度转换期间失效。需要开发能够适应市场制度变化并考虑极端事件风险的方法。

Method: 提出BAVAR-BLED算法，结合贝叶斯平均向量自回归(BAVAR)和基于椭圆分布的Black-Litterman模型(BLED)，嵌入TD3架构。BAVAR捕捉多尺度时间特征，提供制度感知的收益期望和分散矩阵估计；BLED使用学生t分布处理厚尾收益；使用Transformer网络构建观点，CNN估计风险厌恶度，根据市场条件动态调整资产配置。

Result: 在29只道琼斯工业平均指数成分股十年期数据上的评估显示，BAVAR-BLED显著优于现有方法：夏普比率1.72，索提诺比率2.70，总回报率57.26%。

Conclusion: BAVAR-BLED算法通过整合BAVAR的制度感知能力和BLED的厚尾建模，在深度强化学习框架中有效解决了投资组合优化的关键挑战，实现了卓越的风险调整后收益。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks for portfolio optimization have shown promise for their ability to learn allocation rules dynamically from market data. However, these models fail to account for fat-tailed returns, which characterize actual market behavior with more frequent extreme events. Furthermore, historical data is treated homogeneously, without accounting for temporal importance, leading models to fail during regime changes. We propose a new BAVAR-BLED algorithm that combines methods derived from Bayesian-Averaging Vector Autoregressive (BAVAR) and the Black-Litterman model using Elliptical Distributions (BLED) within a TD3 architecture. BAVAR captures a set of vector autoregressive representations that consider multi-scale temporal features, enabling adaptive allocation decisions based on regime-aware estimates of return expectations and dispersion matrices. These estimates serve as prior inputs to BLED, a model that uses Student's t-distributions, allowing for more realistic fat tail return estimates. The BAVAR-BLED algorithm uses transformer networks for view construction and CNNs for risk-aversion estimates, which modify dynamic allocation decisions based on market conditions. An evaluation of 29 Dow Jones Industrial Average constituents over a decade-long market period shows that BAVAR-BLED significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving Sharpe and Sortino ratios of 1.72 and 2.70, respectively, and total returns of 57.26%.

</details>


### [529] [Hybridizing Equilibrium Propagation with Ising Machines for Efficient Energy-Based Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09112)
*Chen-Rui Fan,Bo Lu,Xing-Yu Wu,Tie-Jun Wang,Chuan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于伊辛动力学启发的平衡传播框架，通过引入共轭变量扩展相空间动力学，替代耗散性霍普菲尔德弛豫，以解决传统平衡传播训练中因相空间收缩导致的局部最小值收敛问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统GPU训练耗能高，物理动力学和能量基学习方案（如平衡传播EP）成为探索方向。但EP训练常因相空间收缩而陷入局部最小值，需要改进。

Method: 提出伊辛动力学启发的平衡传播框架，用扩展相空间动力学（包含共轭变量）替代耗散性霍普菲尔德弛豫，保留EP的局部两阶段学习规则，改变神经状态达到平衡的物理路径。

Result: 该动力学降低有效能量壁垒，加速收敛，提高噪声鲁棒性，在MNIST、FashionMNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上训练深度卷积霍普菲尔德网络，性能与反向传播相当。

Conclusion: 通过引入扩展相空间动力学，成功解决了传统EP训练中的局部最小值问题，实现了更高效、鲁棒的物理启发的神经网络训练方法。

Abstract: The rapid evolution of artificial intelligence has led to substantial advances in deep neural networks. Nonetheless, conventional GPU-based training remains highly energy-demanding, motivating the exploration of physical dynamics and compatible energy-based learning schemes, such as equilibrium propagation (EP). EP-based training, however, frequently suffers from convergence to local minima due to phase-space contraction. Here we introduce an Ising-dynamics-inspired equilibrium-propagation framework in which dissipative Hopfield relaxation is replaced by an extended phase-space dynamics with conjugate variables. The resulting training paradigm keeps the local two-phase learning rule of EP while changing the physical route by which neural states reach equilibrium. We show that this dynamics lowers effective energy barriers, accelerates convergence, improves noise robustness, and trains deep convolutional Hopfield networks on MNIST, FashionMNIST, and CIFAR-10 with performance comparable to backpropagation.

</details>


### [530] [Counterfactual Transport Flows for Offline Conservative Trajectory Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09115)
*Lena Krieger,Xuan Zhao,Zhuo Cao,Qin Wang,Hanno Scharr,Ira Assent*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于反事实传输流的离线强化学习框架，通过检索潜在轨迹空间中具有更高任务反馈的邻近轨迹来构建局部偏好对，从而指导轨迹的保守优化，在保持原始行为的同时实现改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习面临的关键挑战是在不超出离线数据支持范围的情况下改进观察到的行为。传统方法容易在数据支持不足的区域进行过度外推，导致性能下降。需要一种能够利用世界反馈（如历史回报）进行保守优化的方法。

Method: 提出反事实传输流框架：1）给定低反馈候选轨迹，在潜在轨迹空间中检索具有更高任务特定反馈的邻近轨迹；2）构建局部偏好对作为弱监督；3）学习实例特定的优化方向；4）在推理时通过优化强度参数控制轨迹传输距离，平衡原始行为保持与改进程度。

Result: 在D4RL基准测试（包括AntMaze和MuJoCo任务）上的实验表明，该方法能够利用历史回报作为世界反馈有效改进行为，同时提供可解释的轨迹级优化路径。

Conclusion: 反事实传输流框架为离线决策提供了一种基于世界反馈的保守优化方法，能够在保持数据支持的同时实现行为改进，并提供了可解释的优化过程控制机制。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) offers a path to policy improvement from logged data alone, using historical returns or other measurable outcomes as world feedback. A key difficulty is improving observed behavior without extrapolating beyond what the offline data supports. We propose \emph{counterfactual transport flows}, a source-conditioned trajectory refinement framework for offline decision-making guided by world feedback. Given a low-feedback candidate trajectory, we construct local preference pairs from offline data by retrieving nearby trajectories in latent trajectory space with higher task-specific feedback, and use them as weak supervision for conservative refinement. The framework learns instance-specific refinement directions: at inference time, a refinement strength parameter controls how far the candidate trajectory is transported, enabling a trade-off between preserving the original behavior and applying stronger improvement. Experiments on D4RL benchmarks, including AntMaze and MuJoCo tasks, show that our method improves behavior from historical returns as world feedback, while providing interpretable trajectory-level refinement paths.

</details>


### [531] [Optimizing Energy-based Neural Network Training with Coherent Ising Machine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09117)
*Chen-Rui Fan,Bo Lu,Zhi-Hong Zhang,Run-Qing Zhang,Jing-Wei Wen,Chuan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究利用相干伊辛机训练基于能量的神经网络，通过平衡传播和Adam优化器实现与软件实现相当的性能，并在深层网络和卷积运算中展示了可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统伊辛机在训练大规模神经网络时面临硬件连接限制和训练方法不足的问题，需要开发更可扩展的物理训练平台。

Method: 使用相干伊辛机结合平衡传播训练基于能量的神经网络，并集成Adam优化器求解Hopfield能量网络的基态。

Result: 实现了与现有软件实现相当的性能，显著提高了收敛速度和求解精度，并在深层架构和卷积运算中展示了可扩展性。

Conclusion: 相干伊辛机动力学为训练复杂神经网络提供了可扩展平台，为下一代AI硬件开发（模拟电路、光电子学、集成光子学）建立了物理框架。

Abstract: While Ising machines serve as advanced physical solvers for the Ising model,enabling applications in combinatorial optimization and neural network training,their scalability for large-scale neural networks remains constrained by hardware connectivity limitations and suboptimal training methodologies. In this work,we leverage a Coherent Ising Machine (CIM) to train an energy-based neural network using Equilibrium Propagation, achieving performance comparable to existing software-based implementations. We further enhance the algorithm by integrating the Adam optimizer to solve for the ground state of a Hopfield energy network, significantly improving convergence speed and solution accuracy. Additionally, we demonstrate the scalability of our approach across deeper network architectures and convolutional operations. Our results highlight the potential of CIM dynamics as a scalable platform for training complex neural networks, offering a pathway toward energy-efficient implementations via analog circuits, optoelectronics, or integrated photonics. This work establishes a novel physical framework for next-generation AI hardware development.

</details>


### [532] [Claw-R1: A Step-Level Data Middleware System for Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09138)
*Daoyu Wang,Mingyue Cheng,Qingchuan Li,Shuo Yu,Jie Ouyang,Qi Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Claw-R1是一个用于智能体强化学习的数据中间件系统，通过统一API入口和数据池管理，将智能体交互轨迹转化为可管理的训练数据资产。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体强化学习研究主要关注策略优化算法和训练框架，而忽视了从数据生产到训练消费的完整数据生命周期管理。需要弥合这一差距，将智能体交互轨迹视为可管理的数据资产而非临时运行时日志。

Method: Claw-R1通过两个核心组件连接异构智能体运行时和RL训练后端：1) Gateway Server通过统一LLM API入口捕获多轮交互步骤；2) Data Pool将步骤组织为包含提示ID、响应ID、奖励等元数据的步骤级记录。系统支持交互式轨迹检查、数据质量筛选和训练批次配置。

Result: 开发了Claw-R1系统，实现了智能体交互数据的统一管理和可视化。用户可实时检查交互轨迹、查看状态-动作-奖励信息、按质量和准备度筛选数据，并为不同RL算法配置训练就绪批次。

Conclusion: Claw-R1将智能体交互轨迹视为可管理的数据资产，填补了智能体强化学习中数据管理的重要空白，希望推动社区重视该领域的数据管理问题。

Abstract: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) has become an important post-training paradigm for turning LLMs from static chatbots into interactive agents, giving rise to representative applications such as OpenClaw. Existing work mainly focuses on policy optimization algorithms and training frameworks, but pays less attention to the full data lifecycle of agent-environment interactions, from data production to training consumption. To bridge this gap, we present Claw-R1, an interactive step-level data middleware system for agentic RL. Claw-R1 connects heterogeneous agent runtimes with RL training backends through two core components: a Gateway Server and a Data Pool. The Gateway Server captures multi-turn interaction steps through a unified LLM API entry point, while the Data Pool organizes them into step-level records consisting of prompt IDs, response IDs, rewards and other metadata. In our demo, users can interactively inspect live trajectories, examine the state, action, and reward of each step, curate data by quality and readiness, and configure training-ready batches for different downstream RL algorithms. Overall, Claw-R1 treats agent interaction traces as managed data assets rather than temporary runtime logs. Through this demonstration, we hope to encourage the community to recognize the importance of data management in agentic RL. Our code is available at https://github.com/AgentR1/Claw-R1 and the demonstration video can be found at link https://youtu.be/Pw47dAOw6B0.

</details>


### [533] [Improved Convergence Analysis of Topology Dependence in Decentralized SGD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09154)
*Yuki Takezawa,Anastasia Koloskova,Sebastian U. Stich*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了对去中心化SGD收敛分析的改进，表明网络拓扑结构的所有特征值（而不仅仅是谱间隙）都会影响收敛速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的去中心化SGD收敛分析主要关注谱间隙对收敛速率的影响，但实验表明拓扑结构在异构情况下的影响比在均匀情况下更大，现有分析无法准确解释这一现象。

Method: 提出了一种更紧密的去中心化SGD收敛分析框架，考虑了混合矩阵的所有特征值对收敛速率的影响，而不仅仅是谱间隙。

Result: 通过实验验证，新的收敛分析能够更准确地描述拓扑结构对收敛速率的影响，特别是在均匀训练情况下，能够解释为什么不同拓扑结构对训练行为影响较小。

Conclusion: 网络拓扑结构对去中心化SGD收敛速率的影响比现有分析所揭示的更为复杂，需要考虑混合矩阵的所有特征值而不仅仅是谱间隙，这为理解去中心化学习中的拓扑选择提供了更精确的理论基础。

Abstract: Decentralized SGD is a fundamental algorithm in decentralized learning, although the influence of an underlying network topology on its convergence behavior is not yet fully understood. Existing convergence analyses have shown that topologies with a small spectral gap significantly deteriorate the convergence rate of Decentralized SGD in both homogeneous and heterogeneous cases. However, many prior papers have reported that indeed the choice of the topology has a significant experimental impact in the heterogeneous case, but has little experimental impact on training behavior in the homogeneous case. In this paper, we present a tighter convergence analysis of Decentralized SGD, offering a more precise understanding of how topologies affect the convergence rate than the prior analysis. Specifically, unlike existing convergence analyses that used only the spectral gap as a property of the topology, our novel analysis shows that all eigenvalues of the mixing matrix affect the convergence rate. Throughout the experiments, we carefully evaluated the convergence behavior of Decentralized SGD and demonstrated that our novel convergence analysis can more accurately describe the effect of topology on the convergence rate.

</details>


### [534] [Crop Recommendation and Agricultural Query Answering System Using Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks and Hybrid Retrieval Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09160)
*Prajwal Thapa,Yagya Raj Pandeya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个支持精准农业的统一系统，集成了先进的天气预测、作物推荐和面向农民的问答工具，通过深度学习模型预测天气，结合土壤特性提供本地化作物建议，并开发了基于检索增强生成的聊天机器人，通过移动应用部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在农业资源有限、个性化指导不足的农村地区，农民需要基于本地天气和土壤条件的精准农业建议，以应对气候变化，提高作物产量和决策能力。

Method: 使用两种深度学习模型（基于Transformer的图神经网络和时空图卷积网络STGCN）预测未来30天天气，结合土壤静态属性（pH、水分、有机质）通过评分算法生成本地化作物推荐，并开发基于检索增强生成的聊天机器人，通过移动应用部署整个系统。

Result: STGCN模型在天气预测精度上优于Transformer模型（MSE约0.011 vs. 0.013），能有效建模气候数据的时空依赖性；系统通过移动应用提供实时建议和对话支持，用户反馈证实了系统的可用性和相关性。

Conclusion: 结合机器学习模型与本地农业数据，可以为农民提供可行的见解，促进更明智的决策、提高作物产量，并增强对气候变化的适应能力，展示了精准农业系统的实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper presents a unified system designed to support precision agriculture by integrating advanced weather prediction, crop recommendation, and a question-answering tool for farmers. We propose two deep learning models -- a Transformer-based Graph Neural Network and a Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (STGCN) -- to forecast weather conditions for the next 30 days using data from 1,359 locations in Nepal. The STGCN outperforms the Transformer-based model in accuracy (MSE ~0.011 vs. 0.013), effectively modeling both spatial and temporal dependencies in climate data. These predictions are combined with static soil properties such as pH, moisture, and organic content to generate localized crop recommendations through a scoring algorithm that matches each crop's optimal growing conditions. Additionally, we develop a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) chatbot that leverages domain-specific agricultural documents to answer farmers' questions in natural language. The entire system is deployed via a mobile application, offering real-time suggestions and conversational support. User feedback confirms the system's usability and relevance, especially in rural settings where personalized farming guidance is limited. Overall, our approach demonstrates how combining machine learning models with local agricultural data can empower farmers with actionable insights, promoting more informed decisions, better crop yields, and increased resilience to climate variability.

</details>


### [535] [CANS: Accelerating Multiuser Collaborative Edge Inference via Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09175)
*Zheshun Wu,Ziyang Zhang,Changyao Lin,Zenglin Xu,Jie Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CANS是一个协作边缘推理框架，通过设备间共享反馈信息自适应学习最优DNN划分，在异构设备环境下显著降低推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动边缘计算支持的多用户协作DNN推理面临挑战：无线链路波动和设备能力差异导致难以确定最优DNN划分策略，需要自适应解决方案。

Method: 提出CANS框架，集成FedLinUCB-DW算法对设备按类型分组，利用本地离线早期退出推理经验进行热启动，通过在线探索学习最优划分。

Result: 在模拟环境和硬件原型系统中验证，相比现有方法显著降低推理延迟，在原型实验中比非协作基线平均延迟降低达50%。

Conclusion: CANS能有效处理设备异构性，通过协作学习和经验共享实现自适应DNN划分，为资源受限移动设备提供高效边缘推理解决方案。

Abstract: Recently, mobile edge computing (MEC)-enabled collaborative deep neural network (DNN) inference has emerged as a promising approach for delivering intelligent services to resource-constrained mobile devices. A representative scenario is multi-user collaborative edge inference, where distinct devices independently partition their DNN models and offload backend computation to a common edge server over wireless networks. However, determining the optimal DNN partition for each device is challenging due to unknown and time-varying system conditions, including fluctuating wireless links and diverse device capabilities. To address this problem, we propose Cooperative Autodidactic NeuroSurgeon (CANS), a collaborative edge inference framework that enables devices to adaptively learn optimal DNN partitions by sharing informative feedback during online inference. To handle the challenge of device heterogeneity and better leverage offline inference experience, we integrate a novel FedLinUCB-DW algorithm that groups devices of the same type and warm-starts online exploration using local offline early-exit inference experience. Furthermore, we provide theoretical guarantees for FedLinUCB-DW by deriving the regret upper bound. We also validate our method on both a simulated environment and a hardware prototype system. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that CANS achieves lower inference latency compared to state-of-the-art baselines. Especially, in prototype experiments on two edge devices, the proposed CANS reduced average inference latency by up to 50% compared to the non-cooperative baseline.

</details>


### [536] [Asymptotic Optimality of Thompson Sampling for Risk-Averse Bandits with Sub-Gaussian Rewards](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09191)
*Joel Q. L. Chang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文证明了一种无锚点的非参数Thompson Sampling算法ρ-NPTS_SG在风险规避多臂老虎机问题中达到对数阶的实例相关下界，成为渐近最优算法，适用于包括CVaR、均值方差、夏普比率等连续风险泛函。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有风险规避老虎机算法需要较强的假设条件（如支配条件或Lipschitz连续性），无法处理非Lipschitz泛函（如夏普比率）且缺乏非参数设置的实例最优保证。该研究旨在开发一种在更弱条件下（仅需连续性）就能达到实例最优的非参数算法。

Method: 提出ρ-NPTS_SG算法，基于无锚点非参数Thompson Sampling框架。关键技术贡献包括：1）有界支撑情况下的离散化引理；2）次高斯尾情况下的截断离散化引理。利用狄利克雷后验的聚合性质，将增长字母表的后验投影到固定网格上，控制多项式预因子使其与样本量无关，突破先前证明中的超指数障碍。

Result: 算法对任何连续风险泛函ρ（包括CVaR、均值方差、夏普比率、失真风险度量等）在具有有界密度和次高斯尾的分布类上（包括高斯臂）达到对数阶的实例相关下界，成为渐近最优算法。该结果仅需ρ的连续性，比先前参数化Thompson Sampling的支配条件和UCB类算法的Lipschitz条件更弱。

Conclusion: 该研究首次为连续风险泛函（包括非Lipschitz的夏普比率）在非参数设置下提供了实例最优保证，突破了先前证明中的技术障碍，为风险规避老虎机问题提供了理论最优且实用的算法框架。

Abstract: We prove that $ρ\text{-}\mathrm{NPTS}_{\mathrm{SG}}$, an anchor-free nonparametric Thompson Sampling algorithm for risk-averse bandits, achieves regret matching the instance-dependent lower bound to leading order in $\log n$, establishing it as asymptotically optimal for any continuous risk functional $ρ$ (CVaR, mean-variance, Sharpe ratio, distortion risk measures, and more) on the class of distributions with bounded density and sub-Gaussian tails, including Gaussian arms. Both this result and its bounded-support counterpart require only continuity of $ρ$: strictly weaker than the dominance condition of prior parametric Thompson Sampling results, and strictly weaker than the Lipschitz condition of UCB-type algorithms, yielding the first instance-optimal guarantees for non-Lipschitz functionals such as the Sharpe ratio without parametric reward assumptions. The bounded-support case is developed first as a stepping stone sharing the same proof structure. The key technical contributions are a discretisation lemma (bounded support) and a truncated discretisation lemma (sub-Gaussian tails), each projecting the growing-alphabet Dirichlet posterior onto a fixed grid via the Dirichlet aggregation property, holding all polynomial prefactors at fixed degree independent of sample size and breaking the super-exponential barrier that blocked prior proofs.

</details>


### [537] [The Injection Paradox: Brand-Level Suppression in Safety-Trained LLM Recommendations via RAG Context Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09204)
*Hyunseok Paeng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文发现RAG推荐系统中存在"注入悖论"：安全训练后的Claude模型在面对包含提示注入的检索文档时，会大幅降低对目标品牌的推荐率，甚至低于无注入的基线，这种抑制效果会扩散到同一品牌的其他文档。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究RAG推荐系统中安全训练对提示注入攻击的影响，揭示安全机制可能产生的意外后果，特别是当攻击者的注入行为反而损害自身品牌时出现的"反向攻击"可能性。

Method: 在Claude和GPT模型上进行对比实验，将提示注入嵌入到检索文档中，观察对目标品牌推荐率的影响。实验包括50次试验，涉及三个品牌，其中仅1/4的品牌文档包含注入。

Result: Claude Opus 4.6中，目标品牌推荐率从54%基线降至零（前2推荐），抑制效果扩散到同一品牌未修改文档。GPT模型则相反，相同注入反而增加推荐率，显示模型家族差异。

Conclusion: 安全训练可能导致意外后果，攻击者可通过在竞争对手文档中嵌入注入来抑制其品牌推荐，存在反向攻击的技术可能性，揭示了RAG推荐系统中安全机制与推荐行为间的复杂关系。

Abstract: We present a reproducible failure mode of safety training in RAG-based LLM recommendation -- the Injection Paradox -- in which prompt injections embedded in retrieved documents backfire against the attacker, suppressing the target brand below the injection-free baseline. In safety-trained Claude models, documents containing prompt injections suffer a sharp drop in recommendation rate, and this suppression propagates beyond the injected document to unmodified documents of the same brand. In Claude Opus 4.6, the target brand drops from a 54% baseline to zero top-2 recommendations across all 50 trials, even though only 1 of 4 brand documents in the corpus contains an injection. The directional pattern is reproduced in counterfactual experiments and across three brands. A contrasting result across the GPT models tested, where the same injection instead increases recommendations, suggests model-family differences in how injection-like context affects recommendation behavior. These findings raise the technical possibility of a reverse-attack scenario in which an adversary embeds injections in a competitor's documents to suppress the competitor's brand via safety-sensitive model behavior.

</details>


### [538] [Orange Lab: Lowering Barriers to Data Mining through Embedded Interactive Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09239)
*Matej Bevec,Aleš Erjavec,Vesna Tanko,Lena Trnovec,Lan Žagar,Ana Farič,Janez Demšar,Blaž Zupan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Orange Lab是一个基于Web的可视化数据分析和协作环境，通过组件暴露机制将可视化工作流嵌入到任意Web环境中，实现数据分析流程的可分享和可嵌入


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的可视化数据分析系统大多局限于独立应用，难以将分析工作流分享、嵌入和适配到交互式Web环境中，限制了数据分析的民主化

Method: 采用组件暴露范式，允许用户将可视化工作流中的选定组件或其界面部分嵌入到任意Web上下文中，创建同步的交互式界面，同时隐藏底层工作流复杂性

Result: 在数据素养教育中部署应用，嵌入式组件能够引导学生动手探索机器学习概念，无需了解底层系统，有效降低了入门门槛

Conclusion: Orange Lab通过组件暴露机制支持数据分析工作流的分享、嵌入和适配，促进了数据科学的民主化，特别适用于教育和数据驱动叙事场景

Abstract: While visual programming of data analysis workflows has become an important vehicle for the democratization of data science, such systems remain largely confined to standalone applications and offer limited support for transitioning their visual analytics solutions into interactive web environments. As a result, data analysis pipelines are difficult to share, embed, and adapt into user-facing analytical tools. We present Orange Lab, a web-based collaborative environment for visual data analytics. At its core, Orange Lab enables users to visually construct machine learning workflows from modular components, where interactions in any component propagate seamlessly through the workflow, turning static pipelines into dynamic, reactive systems that support exploration and data-driven storytelling. Our key contribution is component exposition, a paradigm that allows authors to embed selected workflow components, or parts of their interfaces, into arbitrary web contexts, creating synchronized, interactive interfaces while hiding underlying workflow complexity. This enables the development of tailored analytical views and narrative-driven experiences that integrate data analysis directly into online materials. We demonstrate the approach through deployments in data literacy education, where embedded components guide students in hands-on exploration of machine learning concepts without requiring knowledge of the underlying system, showing that Orange Lab effectively lowers barriers to entry and supports the democratization of data science.

</details>


### [539] [BSTabDiff: Block-Subunit Diffusion Priors for High-Dimensional Tabular Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09257)
*Al Zadid Sultan Bin Habib,Md Younus Ahamed,Prashnna Gyawali,Gianfranco Doretto,Donald A. Adjeroh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BSTabDiff是一个针对高维低样本量（HDLSS）表格数据的生成框架，通过将m个特征划分为M个潜在块（M<<m），在紧凑的块潜在空间学习全局依赖，然后解码到完整特征空间，解决了n<<m时直接密度学习的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HDLSS表格数据（如组学数据）具有n<<m的特点，且常存在强局部相关组、稀疏跨组依赖、重尾非高斯边际、异方差噪声和结构化缺失等问题，使得在ℝ^m中直接进行密度学习条件不良。

Method: 将m个观测特征划分为M个潜在块（M<<m），通过共享的低维子单元变量生成每个块。在紧凑的块潜在空间ℝ^M中集中学习全局依赖，然后通过copula驱动的依赖关系、灵活的每特征边际和显式缺失机制解码到完整特征空间。支持现代深度先验（如扩散模型和归一化流）。

Result: BSTabDiff在HDLSS数据上比非结构化表格生成器产生更真实和稳定的高维合成数据。

Conclusion: BSTabDiff通过块-子单元生成框架有效解决了HDLSS表格数据的生成问题，在紧凑的潜在空间学习全局依赖，同时保持特征空间的灵活建模，为高维低样本量场景提供了稳定可控的基准生成方法。

Abstract: High-Dimensional Low-Sample Size (HDLSS) tabular domains (e.g., omics) are characterized by $n \ll m$, where $n$ = number of samples, and $m$ = number of features. Such domains often exhibit strong local correlation groups, sparse cross-group dependencies, heavy-tailed non-Gaussian marginals, heteroscedastic noise, and structured missingness, making direct density learning in $\mathbb{R}^m$ ill-conditioned since $n \ll m$. We propose BSTabDiff, a block-subunit generative framework that partitions the $m$ observed features into $M$ latent blocks ($M \ll m$) and generates each block via a shared low-dimensional subunit variable, concentrating global dependence learning in the compact block-latent space $\mathbb{R}^M$ while decoding to the full feature space with copula-driven dependence, flexible per-feature marginals, and explicit missingness mechanisms. BSTabDiff supports modern deep priors on block latents, including diffusion and normalizing flows, enabling stable synthesis and controllable benchmark generation in the HDLSS regime. Empirically, BSTabDiff produces more realistic and stable high-dimensional synthetic data when compared with unstructured tabular generators on HDLSS data.

</details>


### [540] [ERBench: A Benchmark and Testsuite for Equation Discovery Algorithms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09276)
*Paul Kahlmeyer,Henrik Voigt,Michael Habeck,Joachim Giesen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ERBench是一个新的方程发现评估框架，专注于方程恢复任务，强调算法在不同维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域下的鲁棒性评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有符号回归基准测试在方程恢复任务上存在不足：公开的已知真值公式数量少，且对算法在不同数据条件下的鲁棒性评估不够重视。然而，实际应用中数据通常是噪声的、来自不同领域、分布和样本大小，因此需要更全面的评估框架。

Method: 提出了方程恢复基准（ERBench），这是一个专门为方程发现任务设计的评估框架。该框架通过系统改变数据维度、采样大小、采样分布和采样域等条件，来评估符号回归算法在不同场景下的鲁棒性。

Result: 引入了一个新的评估框架，填补了现有符号回归基准在方程恢复任务评估上的空白，特别是针对算法鲁棒性的系统评估。

Conclusion: ERBench为方程发现任务提供了一个更全面、更严谨的评估框架，特别强调算法在不同数据条件下的鲁棒性，这对实际科学建模应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Equation discovery aims to automate the discovery of scientific models in the form of mathematical equations from data. Technically, equation discovery is implemented by symbolic regression algorithms. Performance of symbolic regression for equation discovery is measured along two dimensions: Prediction accuracy on test data, and recovery of known groundtruth formulas. For standard regression, accuracy is typically measured on in-domain test data, for instance, by splitting a data set randomly into training and test data. While this makes sense for in-domain interpolation, which is the common goal in ordinary regression, it can be a misleading proxy for true model discovery and generalization. The obvious alternative is to measure out-of-domain accuracy. However, obtaining challenging out-of-domain test data is a non-trivial problem. Therefore, we focus on equation recovery for evaluating symbolic regression algorithms for equation discovery. The rationale is that symbolic regression algorithms that perform well in recovering known groundtruth formulas are good candidates to perform well in unknown equation discovery. Existing benchmarks for symbolic regression include equation recovery tasks, however, with only a small number of groundtruth formulas that are publicly known. Moreover, these benchmarks place less emphasis on evaluating the robustness of algorithms in terms of their behavior under changing dimensionality, sampling size, sampling distribution and sampling domain. This, however, is of central importance to practitioners wanting to discover equations for modeling natural phenomena, since data is almost certainly noisy and comes from diverse domains, distributions, and sample sizes. To fill this gap, we introduce the Equation Recovery Benchmark (ERBench), a new evaluation framework designed to rigorously assess algorithms explicitly targeting the task of equation discovery.

</details>


### [541] [Internalizing Geometric Law: Learning from Solver Residuals for Precision-Critical Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09278)
*Rafael Cabral,Pang Zixi,Ziyi Shou,Shen Xin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文针对大语言模型在技术制图和机械设计等精度关键领域中的几何约束满足问题，提出了PyGeoX可编程几何DSL和PyGeoX-Bench基准测试，并发现了"离群梯度掩盖"问题，通过提出饱和加性奖励(SAR)方法显著提升了约束满足性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在需要严格几何约束的技术制图和机械设计等精度关键领域经常产生幻觉，无法满足数十个相互作用的几何约束。论文旨在解决从自由形式自然语言描述到精确几何构造的开放几何合成问题。

Method: 1. 发布PyGeoX：一个可编程的几何领域特定语言，将声明性约束编译为可微分损失函数；2. 发布PyGeoX-Bench：包含300个问题的分层测试套件，具有可验证的每约束奖励；3. 提出饱和加性奖励(SAR)：将奖励分解为有界的每约束项，即使在严重违反情况下也能保持部分进展和一致的梯度。

Result: 1. 发现了"离群梯度掩盖"问题：在全局范数奖励下，单个离群约束会掩盖所有其他约束的学习信号；2. 与几何求解器的自然基线MSE奖励相比，SAR将困难层级的解决率提高了2.3倍；3. 使用SAR训练的8B模型在该基准测试中与更大的前沿系统具有竞争力。

Conclusion: 论文通过PyGeoX框架和SAR方法有效解决了几何约束满足问题，显著提升了语言模型在精度关键几何合成任务中的性能，为技术制图和机械设计等领域的实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models frequently hallucinate in precision-critical domains such as technical diagramming and mechanical design, where outputs must satisfy strict geometric constraints. We study open-ended geometric synthesis from natural language: translating free-form descriptions into precise constructions whose entities must simultaneously satisfy dozens of interacting constraints. To make this tractable, we release PyGeoX, a programmable geometric DSL that compiles declarative constraints into a differentiable loss, and PyGeoX-Bench, a stratified suite of 300 problems with per-constraint verifiable rewards. Using PyGeoX as a verifier, we identify a failure mode we call Outlier Gradient Masking: under global-norm rewards (any scheme that aggregates residuals through a single norm, for example, $\exp(-\mathrm{MSE})$), a single outlier constraint can nullify the learning signal across all others. To address this, we propose Saturating Additive Rewards (SAR), which decompose the reward into bounded per-constraint terms, preserving partial progress and ensuring consistent gradients even under severe violations. Against MSE-based rewards, the natural baseline for geometry solvers, SAR improves the hard-tier solving rate by $2.3\times$, and the resulting 8B model is competitive with much larger frontier systems on this benchmark. We release the engine, benchmark, and data at https://github.com/Huawei-AI4Math/PyGeoX.

</details>


### [542] [Trajectory Geometry of Transformer Representations Across Layers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09287)
*Vishal Pandey,Gopal Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将Transformer前向传播重新表述为高维表示流形中的离散群体轨迹，使用几何工具分析表示演化，发现语义相关提示在中间到深层收敛、推理任务产生更高曲率轨迹、歧义标记出现轨迹分叉，以及普遍的三阶段结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解Transformer表示在层间的演化过程（而非仅表示内容）仍然是可解释性机制中的一个开放问题。研究者希望从几何角度分析表示轨迹，提供无需预定义探针的分析框架。

Method: 将Transformer前向传播重新表述为高维表示流形中的离散群体轨迹，使用五个几何度量：轨迹长度、曲率、语义收敛指数、层间余弦相似度和表示稳定性。在三个模型家族（GPT-2、TinyLlama、Qwen2.5）和五个受控提示家族上进行实验。

Result: 1) 语义相关提示在中间到深层显著收敛；2) 推理任务比词汇变化产生更高曲率轨迹；3) 歧义标记出现轨迹分叉，最终层表示分离达5.6倍；4) 层间余弦相似度揭示普遍的三阶段结构：编码、细化和输出准备。所有效应在随机层和随机嵌入控制下消失。

Conclusion: 轨迹几何为可解释性机制提供了一个无探针、有原则的分析视角，揭示了Transformer表示演化的普遍模式，并发布了完全开源、模型无关的分析流程。

Abstract: Understanding how transformer representations evolve across layers, not merely what they encode, remains an open problem in mechanistic interpretability. We recast the transformer forward pass as a discrete population trajectory through a high-dimensional representation manifold, drawing on geometric tools from computational neuroscience. Rather than probing for pre-specified features, we characterize trajectory geometry using five metrics computed directly in the ambient space: trajectory length, curvature, a semantic convergence index, layerwise cosine similarity, and representational stability. Across three model families (GPT-2, TinyLlama, Qwen2.5) and five controlled prompt families, we report four findings. First, semantically related prompts converge significantly in middle-to-late layers (peak CI 0.41--0.58, p<0.001, Mann-Whitney U), consistent with attractor-like dynamics. Second, reasoning tasks produce trajectories of greater curvature than lexical variations (0.71--0.83 rad vs. 0.27--0.31 rad), suggesting curvature encodes computational complexity. Third, ambiguous tokens exhibit trajectory bifurcation with up to 5.6x representational separation by the final layer, absent in unambiguous controls. Fourth, layerwise cosine similarity reveals a universal three-phase structure: encoding, elaboration, and output preparation, consistent across all three architectures. All four effects vanish under shuffled-layer and random-embedding controls. We release a fully open-source, model-agnostic pipeline and argue that trajectory geometry constitutes a principled, probe-free lens for mechanistic interpretability.

</details>


### [543] [Intention Driven Identification of In-Possession Match Phases in Association Football through Temporal Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09289)
*Yuesen Li,Daniel Link*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于时空追踪数据的足球比赛控球阶段识别框架，使用时间图注意力网络结合球员交互图和Transformer时序建模，实现战术意图和控球阶段的自动识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 足球战术组织分析需要识别不同的比赛阶段，但控球阶段难以直接观察且受战术意图影响而非仅空间模式。现有方法缺乏对战术意图的考虑。

Method: 提出数据驱动框架，定义三层战术意图（侵入对方空间、保持控球、得分）和六个阶段。开发T-GAN模型，结合帧级球员交互图、上下文特征和Transformer时序建模。

Result: T-GAN在意图级别达到0.87的宏平均F1分数，侵入相关阶段0.76，得分阶段0.79。序列处理后意图识别从0.68提升到0.79，阶段识别从0.61提升到0.71。

Conclusion: 该框架能将连续追踪数据转化为战术可解释的控球阶段表示，在自动比赛标注、战术分析和比赛风格分析方面具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Understanding tactical organisation of association football, hereafter referred to as football, requires identifying distinct match phases. Yet in-possession phases are rarely directly observable and are shaped by evolving tactical intentions, rather than spatial patterns alone. This study proposes a data-driven framework for identifying in-possession match phases from spatiotemporal tracking data. Seven German Bundesliga matches recorded at 25 Hz with TRACAB were analysed. A hierarchical phase model was defined with three tactical intentions (Invade Opponent Space, Keep Possession, Scoring) and six phases (Build Up, Progression, Counter Attack, Maintenance, Sustained Threat, Finishing). A Temporal Graph Attention Network (T-GAN) was developed to combine frame-level player-interaction graphs, contextual features, and Transformer-based temporal modelling. Performance was evaluated using frame-level F1 and a sequence-aware Intersection over Truth-Dominance (IoT-D) metric. T-GAN achieved macro-average frame-level F1 scores of 0.87 at the intention level, 0.76 for invasion-related phases, and 0.79 for scoring phases. At the sequence level, mean diagonal IoT-D F1 increased from 0.68 to 0.79 for intentions and from 0.61 to 0.71 for phases after post-processing, indicating improved temporal coherence. Model comparisons showed that sequence modelling was the main driver of segmentation quality, while graph-based relational modelling was particularly beneficial for Counter Attack recognition. Exploratory player attention analysis further suggested that wide and midfield positional groups contributed strongly to phase discrimination. Overall, the framework translates continuous tracking data into tactically interpretable in-possession phase representations, with potential applications in automated match annotation, tactical analysis, and playing-style profiling.

</details>


### [544] [PRISM: Topology-Aware Cross-Modal Imputation for Modality-Deficient Federated Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09301)
*Zekai Chen,Miao Zhang,Jiayang Xing,Xunkai Li,Xun Wu,Rong-Hua Li,Guoren Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PRISM是一个针对客户端级模态缺失的多模态联邦图学习框架，通过拓扑感知的联邦跨模态插补来解决现实世界中客户端可能缺少特定模态的问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的多模态联邦图学习面临客户端级模态缺失问题，例如视觉搜索客户端可能只有图像-交互图而无卖家描述，而目录客户端可能只有文本而无产品图像。这种缺失不同于随机的实例级缺失，而是缺乏重建缺失模态所需的本地语义基础。更重要的是，在图学习中，不完整的表示会初始化消息传递，导致插补错误被接收拓扑过滤、混合和放大。

Method: 提出了PRISM（通过结构元提示的主动检索和插补）框架。该方法不是仅从本地观察重建缺失模态，而是从联邦中恢复缺失模态的语义，并在拓扑感知的控制下将其引入本地图传播中。这是一个拓扑感知的联邦跨模态插补框架。

Result: 在六个多模态图数据集上进行了实验，涵盖了图中心任务和模态中心任务。实验结果表明，PRISM能够持续改善模态缺失的客户端性能，平均比最先进的基线方法提高了4.48%。

Conclusion: PRISM通过拓扑感知的联邦跨模态插补有效解决了客户端级模态缺失问题，在多模态联邦图学习中取得了显著改进，为现实世界中的多模态数据协作学习提供了实用解决方案。
