Abstract: Multimodal federated graph learning (MM-FGL) aims to collaboratively learn from decentralized graphs with text and images. However, real-world clients may not share a common modality basis: a visual-search client may contain image--interaction graphs but no seller descriptions, while a catalog client may provide text but no product images. We refer to this practical setting as client-level modality deficiency. Unlike random instance-wise missingness, a deficient client lacks the local semantic basis needed to reconstruct the absent modality. More importantly, in graph learning, incomplete representations initialize message passing, so imputation errors can be filtered, mixed, and amplified by the receiving topology. To address this gap, we propose \textbf{PRISM} (\textbf{P}roactive \textbf{R}etrieval and \textbf{I}mputation via \textbf{S}tructural \textbf{M}eta-prompting), a topology-aware federated cross-modal imputation framework. Rather than reconstructing the missing modality solely from local observations, PRISM recovers missing-modality semantics from the federation and introduces them into local graph propagation under topology-aware control. Experiments on six multimodal graph datasets across graph-centric and modality-centric tasks show that PRISM consistently improves modality-deficient clients, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines by \textbf{4.48}\% on average.

</details>


### [545] [Toward Compiler World Models: Learning Latent Dynamics for Efficient Tensor Program Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09312)
*Haolin Pan,Lianghong Huang,Xvlin Zhou,Mingjie Xing,Yanjun Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于世界模型思想的评估器，将调度评估建模为程序状态上的动作条件潜在动态，避免昂贵的AST操作和重复代码编码，显著提升张量程序优化效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动调度器通常将每个候选程序视为静态代码快照进行评估，忽略了产生它的调度轨迹，这使得它们对动作依赖不敏感，且容易受到表面代码变化的影响。

Method: 提出世界模型启发的评估器，从初始程序开始，在连续潜在空间中使用轻量级转移模型展开调度动作，避免昂贵的AST突变和重复代码编码。最终将动态表示与动作和硬件特征结合来对候选程序排序。

Result: 在TVM AutoScheduler中实现，在相同64次试验预算下，GPU上代表性子图延迟比Ansor提升1.37倍，CPU上提升1.54倍。使用10倍更少的测量次数，几何平均性能与Ansor-10K相差在2.2%以内。与PyTorch/PyTorch-opt(cuDNN)相比，全模型推理几何平均加速分别达到4.61倍和3.67倍。

Conclusion: 基于世界模型的评估方法通过建模调度轨迹的动态过程，显著提高了张量程序优化的效率和性能，在减少测量成本的同时实现了竞争力的优化结果。

Abstract: Tensor program optimization is essential for modern machine learning systems, but its search space is enormous. Existing auto-schedulers reduce measurement cost with learned cost models, yet they usually evaluate each candidate as a static code snapshot, ignoring the schedule trajectory that produced it. This makes them insensitive to action dependencies and vulnerable to superficial code variations. We propose a \emph{world-model-inspired} evaluator that models schedule evaluation as action-conditioned latent dynamics over program states. Starting from the initial program, it rolls out scheduling actions in a continuous latent space with a lightweight transition model, avoiding expensive AST mutation and repeated code encoding. The final dynamic representation is combined with action and hardware features to rank candidates. Implemented in TVM AutoScheduler, our method improves representative-subgraph latency over Ansor by 1.37$\times$ on GPU and 1.54$\times$ on CPU under the same 64-trial budget. It also matches Ansor-10K within 2.2% geometric mean using 10$\times$ fewer measurements, and accelerates full-model inference over PyTorch/PyTorch-opt(cuDNN) by 4.61$\times$/3.67$\times$ geometric mean.

</details>


### [546] [Machine-Learning Emulation of Satellite Greenhouse Gas Retrievals: Stability over Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09313)
*Nugzar Gognadze,Motonobu Kanagawa,Yu Someya,Hisashi Yashiro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究评估了用于温室气体卫星反演算法的机器学习模拟器在时间上的稳定性，发现简单Lasso模型在时间稳定性方面优于复杂神经网络，加入时间特征可显著提升预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有温室气体反演算法计算成本高，难以实现大规模实时估计。机器学习模拟器虽被提出作为快速替代方案，但现有研究多在训练数据同期的测试数据上评估，缺乏对时间稳定性的研究。

Method: 使用GOSAT卫星数据，研究机器学习模拟器随时间推移的稳定性。比较了Lasso和神经网络等模型，特别考察了将时间作为输入特征的影响。进一步使用TCCON地面观测网络数据进行验证。

Result: 预测精度通常随测试期远离训练期而下降。加入时间特征显著改善XCH4预测。简单Lasso模型性能与复杂方法相当甚至更好，且时间稳定性更高。在TCCON匹配数据集上，加入时间特征的Lasso模型误差与GOSAT和TCCON之间的差异相当。

Conclusion: 简单Lasso模型是温室气体反演算法模拟器的有效选择，具有良好性能和时间稳定性。将时间作为输入特征可改善预测，这对实际应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Retrieval algorithms are used to estimate atmospheric concentrations of greenhouse gases (GHGs), such as carbon dioxide (CO2) and methane (CH4), by solving inverse problems from high-spectral-resolution satellite radiance measurements. However, these algorithms are computationally expensive, which makes real-time estimation at scale difficult. Machine-learning models have therefore been proposed as fast emulators of retrieval algorithms. Most existing studies, however, evaluate them only on test data from the same period as the training data.
  We study the stability over time of such emulators using data from the Greenhouse Gases Observing SATellite (GOSAT). We show that prediction accuracy generally deteriorates when the test period moves away from the training period. We also show that including time as an input feature substantially improves XCH4 prediction for Lasso and neural-network models. Among the methods considered, a simple Lasso model performs as well as or better than more complex methods such as neural networks, and yields more stable predictions over time. We further validate the results using the Total Carbon Column Observing Network (TCCON), a ground-based observation network. On the TCCON-matched dataset, the time-augmented Lasso achieves errors against TCCON that are comparable to the disagreement between GOSAT and TCCON for both XCO2 and XCH4.

</details>


### [547] [A Universal Dense Football Event Representation Based on TabTransformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09327)
*Weiran Yang,Daniel Memmert,Maximilian Klemp-Weins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于Transformer的足球事件表示学习模型，通过嵌入向量捕捉动作语义，提升下游任务性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有足球事件数据分析方法主要使用one-hot或序数嵌入表示分类特征，忽略了动作描述符的内在语义信息，需要更好的表示学习方法

Method: 提出并实现了基于Transformer的模型，将分类特征编码为学习的嵌入向量，通过自注意力机制捕捉事件特征间的潜在依赖关系，生成足球事件的密集表示

Result: 嵌入表示在下游预测任务（如动作价值估计和比赛风格识别）中表现出优于任务特定基线的概率校准性能，通过Brier分数衡量

Conclusion: Transformer模型能够有效学习足球事件分类特征的语义表示，这些表示支持多种下游分析任务，为体育数据分析提供了新的方法

Abstract: Football event data constitute a rich spatiotemporal source for quantitative analysis of player actions in team sports. These datasets contain heterogeneous features, combining continuous location coordinates with categorical variables such as action type, action outcome, and body part. Such data have been applied in sports analytics for match outcome forecasting, player evaluation, and tactical pattern recognition. However, existing approaches predominantly encode categorical features using one-hot or ordinal embedding representations, overlooking the intrinsic semantics of action descriptors. The Transformer is a deep neural network architecture based on self-attention that captures dependencies between input features at arbitrary positions. We propose and implement a Transformer-based model to learn latent dependencies among categorical event features and produce dense representations of football events. By encoding categorical features as learned embedding vectors, sport-specific action semantics are captured during pretraining, enabling the representations to support downstream tasks such as action value estimation and play style recognition. Empirical evaluation shows that the embedding representations yield superior probability calibration over task-specific baselines on the downstream prediction tasks, as measured by Brier score.

</details>


### [548] [Thresholded Local Hyper-Flow Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09340)
*Meher Chaitanya,Sebastian Dalleiger,Luana Ruiz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TL-HFD是一种新的局部超流扩散方法，通过在种子周围维护活动区域，执行投影次梯度更新，并通过阈值边界激活扩展，实现了精确的局部更新，提高了计算效率并减少了激活体积。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的超流扩散(HFD)求解器在迭代过程中无法保持中间计算的局部性，这可能导致不必要的计算开销和非目标顶点的吸收，特别是在噪声实例中。

Method: 提出阈值局部HFD(TL-HFD)，在种子周围维护活动区域，执行投影次梯度更新，并通过阈值(前k个)边界激活扩展，确保局部更新与全局更新精确一致。

Result: 证明了局部更新的精确性，建立了有限时间对偶次优性，推导了受控的激活体积边界，将近似对偶最优性转化为早期停止迭代的鲁棒扫描切割保证。

Conclusion: TL-HFD在保持局部性的同时，通常匹配或优于HFD，激活体积更小，在噪声实例中效果尤为显著，解决了扩散倾向于吸收非目标顶点的问题。

Abstract: Local Hyper-Flow Diffusion (HFD) gives an edge-size-independent Cheeger-type guarantee for seeded clustering in general submodular hypergraphs, but existing HFD solvers do not keep intermediate computation local at every iteration. We introduce Thresholded Local HFD (TL-HFD), a first-order method that maintains an active region around the seeds, performs projected subgradient updates on that region and its immediate boundary, and expands via thresholded (top-k) boundary activation. We prove that the local update is exact: the degree-preconditioned projected subgradient step restricted to the active region and its boundary coincides with the unrestricted global update. We establish finite-time dual suboptimality for both exact and thresholded updates, treating the latter as inexact projected subgradient steps with explicit skipped-boundary error. We further derive an additive activated-volume bound controlled by realized local subgradient norms and the minimum boundary-push among newly activated vertices, and translate approximate dual optimality with localized support into a robust sweep-cut guarantee for early-stopped iterates. For general submodular cut-costs, each iteration is local in the scanned region and oracle-sensitive in the hyperedge primitive. Empirically, TL-HFD often matches or improves over HFD while activating less volume, with the largest gains on noisy instances where diffusion tends to absorb non-target vertices.

</details>


### [549] [PBSD: Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation for Long-Horizon Credit Assignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09348)
*Yang Tian,Rui Wang,Xumeng Wen,Junjie Li,Shizhao Sun,Lei Song,Jiang Bian,Bo Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PBSD是一种基于贝叶斯校准的自蒸馏方法，用于在稀疏最终奖励下进行细粒度信用分配，通过后验-先验概率比衡量轨迹质量，并将其转化为可处理的似然比，为多轮搜索智能体提供逐轮信用信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程智能体任务对基于结果的强化学习提出了根本的信用分配挑战：轨迹级奖励验证最终正确性，但对哪些中间推理步骤或工具交互对结果有贡献的指导有限。在多轮搜索智能体中尤为突出，成功轨迹可能包含误导性动作，而失败轨迹可能包含有价值的信息收集步骤。

Method: PBSD（特权贝叶斯自蒸馏）通过已验证答案的后验-先验概率比衡量轨迹质量，并应用贝叶斯规则将这个难以估计的答案侧比率转化为标准学生模型与特权答案条件教师模型之间的可处理似然比。该贝叶斯证据得分的自回归分解产生轮级信号，识别每个中间轮次是支持还是削弱已验证结果。

Result: 实验表明，PBSD在领域内和领域外设置中均能持续提升性能，并能有效地将短上下文训练的知识迁移到长上下文推理中，表明其细粒度信用分配机制促进了更有效的策略学习并改善了泛化能力。

Conclusion: PBSD提供了一种原则性且优雅的重新加权方案，将稀疏结果监督转化为贝叶斯校准的轮级信用信号，同时完全兼容标准策略优化方法，解决了长时程智能体任务中的信用分配挑战。

Abstract: Long-horizon agentic tasks pose a fundamental credit assignment challenge for outcome-base reinforcement learning: trajectory-level rewards verify final correctness but provide limited guidance on which intermediate reasoning steps or tool interactions contribute to the outcome. The difficulty is especially pronounced in multi-turn search agents, where successful trajectories may contain misleading actions and failed trajectories may contain valuable evidence-gathering steps. We propose PBSD (Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation), a Bayes-calibrated self-distillation method for fine-grained credit assignment under sparse final rewards. PBSD measures trajectory quality through the posterior-to-prior probability ratio of the verified answer and applies Bayes' rule to convert this hard-to-estimate answer-side ratio into a tractable likelihood ratio between a standard student model and a privileged answer-conditioned teacher model. Autoregressive decomposition of this Bayesian evidence score yields turn-level signals that identify whether each intermediate turn supports or undermines the verified outcome. Consequently, PBSD provides a principled and elegant reweighting scheme that transforms sparse outcome supervision into Bayes-calibrated turn-level credit signals, while remaining fully compatible with standard policy optimization. Experiments demonstrate that PBSD consistently enhances performance across both in-domain and out-of-domain settings, and effectively transfers knowledge from short-context training to long-context inference, suggesting that its fine-grained credit assignment mechanism facilitates more effective policy learning and yields improved generalization.

</details>


### [550] [Scaling Neural Network Verification with Tensor Parallelism and Fully Sharded Data Parallelism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09377)
*Sergei Vorobyov,Eugene Ilyushin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了两种并行化技术（张量并行TP和全分片数据并行FSDP）来突破GPU内存限制，实现大规模神经网络的形式化验证，其中FSDP能保持验证结果的比特级一致性，在CIFAR-100 ResNet-large等复杂模型上成功完成验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经网络形式化验证（证明网络对指定域内所有输入都满足安全属性）在实践中受限于GPU内存：标准的边界传播算法实现（如IBP、CROWN、α-CROWN）需要权重和松弛系数矩阵完全驻留在单个加速器上，这限制了可验证网络的规模。

Method: 1. 张量并行（TP）：将权重矩阵和A矩阵分片到多个GPU上，在P=2时实现约2倍峰值内存减少，但需要在分片区域内强制使用IBP替代中间边界，导致边界紧密度随分片区域数量增加而下降。2. 全分片数据并行（FSDP）：仅对权重矩阵进行分片，通过每层的AllGather操作，产生的边界与单GPU基线比特级一致，基线内存减少80-90%，峰值内存减少34-39%。FSDP可无缝集成到完整验证流程和卷积层中。

Result: 1. 在VNN-COMP 2022 MNIST-FC基准测试中确认了TP的正确性；2. FSDP在宽MLP上实现了显著的记忆减少，并在CIFAR-100 ResNet-large（VNN-COMP 2024）上获得了完整的unsat结果；3. 实验表明在α-CROWN+BAB模式下，内存瓶颈是每个神经元的alpha张量，而非权重矩阵。

Conclusion: 该研究成功将大规模模型训练中的并行化技术应用于神经网络验证，突破了GPU内存限制。FSDP方法能保持验证结果的精确性，是更优的选择。未来工作的关键方向是解决alpha张量的内存瓶颈问题。

Abstract: Formal neural network verification -- proving that a network satisfies safety properties for \emph{all} inputs in a specified domain -- is bounded in practice by GPU memory: standard implementations of bound-propagation algorithms (IBP, CROWN, $α$-CROWN) require weight and relaxation-coefficient matrices to reside entirely on one accelerator. We adapt two parallelism techniques originally developed for large-scale model training to the \texttt{auto\_LiRPA}\,/\,$α,β$-CROWN verification framework. \textbf{Tensor Parallelism (TP)} shards both weight and $A$-matrices across GPUs, achieving ${\approx}2\times$ peak-memory reduction at $P{=}2$; soundness is confirmed on VNN-COMP 2022 MNIST-FC benchmarks, though bound tightness degrades with the number of sharded zones due to forced IBP substitution for intermediate bounds inside sharded zones. \textbf{Fully Sharded Data Parallelism (FSDP)} shards only weight matrices with a per-layer \texttt{AllGather}, producing bounds that are \emph{bitwise identical} to the single-GPU baseline: baseline memory drops by 80--90\%, peak memory by 34--39\% on wide MLPs. FSDP integrates cleanly with complete verification ($β$-CROWN + Branch-and-Bound) and with convolutional layers (\texttt{BoundConv}); a complete \emph{unsat} result is obtained for CIFAR-100 ResNet-large (VNN-COMP 2024) under FSDP. Across all experiments the memory bottleneck in $α$-CROWN+BaB mode proves to be per-neuron alpha tensors, not weight matrices, pointing to the key direction for future work.

</details>


### [551] [Reasoning Arena: Trace Tournaments When Verifiable Rewards Fall Short](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09380)
*Han Zhou,Adam X. Yang,Laurence Aitchison,Anna Korhonen,Albert Q. Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Reasoning Arena：通过构建迹锦标赛，将无信息奖励组转化为相对奖励信号的自适应RL训练框架，提升LLM推理能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RLVR中，当同一提示的所有迹获得相同奖励时，组相对优势估计无法提供梯度信号，即使这些迹在推理质量上存在显著差异。这导致大量样本被浪费。

Method: 提出Reasoning Arena框架：1）将无多样性奖励组路由到评判系统；2）构建迹锦标赛，让推理迹进行头对头比较，暴露组内细粒度偏好；3）使用动态更新的锚点池进行高效比较；4）在不完整比较图上拟合Bradley-Terry模型，实现可扩展的RL集成。

Result: 在竞赛数学和编码基准测试中，Reasoning Arena平均优于RLVR基线7.6%。通过将零优势样本转化为有用梯度更新，训练速度提升27%至41%，节省近50%生成计算，显著提升整体推理性能。

Conclusion: Reasoning Arena通过将无信息奖励组转化为丰富的相对奖励信号，有效解决了RLVR中的梯度消失问题，显著提升了训练效率和推理性能，为基于结果的监督学习提供了更有效的框架。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a leading paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models through outcome-based supervision. However, verifiable rewards frequently become uninformative at the group level: when all sampled traces of a given prompt receive identical rewards, group-relative advantage estimation provides no gradient signal, even though the traces may differ substantially in reasoning quality. We propose Reasoning Arena, an adaptive training framework that routes such non-diverse reward groups to a judge system instead of discarding them. Beyond examining the final answer, Reasoning Arena constructs trace tournaments, where reasoning traces are compared head-to-head to expose finer-grained preferences within the group, converting reasoning quality into rich relative reward signals. To make reward estimation efficient, rather than exhaustively comparing every pair, each new trace is evaluated against a small, dynamically updated pool of previously generated traces as anchors to efficiently establish a relative ranking. We then fit a Bradley-Terry model on the incomplete comparison graph, enabling scalable RL integration without quadratic pairwise comparisons. Empirical results demonstrate that Reasoning Arena consistently outperforms the RLVR baseline by 7.6% on average in competition mathematics and coding benchmarks. By converting otherwise wasted zero-advantage samples into useful gradient updates, our method accelerates training by 27% to 41%, saving nearly 50% of generation compute, and substantially improves overall reasoning performance.

</details>


### [552] [Distilling Safe LLM Systems via Soft Prompts for On Device Settings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09388)
*Motasem Alfarra,Cristina Pinneri,Dana Kianfar,Mohammed Almousa,Christos Louizos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对资源受限边缘设备部署安全大语言模型的参数高效安全对齐方法，通过软提示与蒸馏训练相结合，实现了比现有方法更优的安全性与实用性平衡，同时显著降低了内存和计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源受限的边缘设备上部署安全的大语言模型面临挑战：传统的双模型系统（LLM+安全防护模型）虽然能提供有效的安全保障，但其巨大的内存和计算需求使得在设备上部署成本过高。

Method: 1. 系统评估了多种参数高效微调方法；2. 发现软提示与基于蒸馏的训练方法效果最佳；3. 提出了基于总变差和KL散度的蒸馏框架，将安全防护模型的行为转移到学习的软提示中。

Result: 在各种基准测试中，软提示蒸馏方法在安全性与实用性权衡方面优于LoRA适配器、引导向量和直接优化方法，同时在推理时仅需最小的额外内存和计算开销。

Conclusion: 软提示蒸馏是边缘设备上LLM安全对齐的首选方法，为资源受限环境下的安全模型部署提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Deploying safe large language models (LLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices presents a critical challenge: while dual-model systems combining LLMs with guard models provide effective safety guarantees, their substantial memory and computational demands make them prohibitively expensive for on-device deployment. This paper presents a comprehensive study of parameter-efficient safety alignment methods for resource-constrained settings. Through systematic evaluation across multiple LLM architectures, training objectives, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning approaches, we identify that soft prompts combined with distillation-based training consistently outperform alternative methods. We introduce distillation frameworks based on total variation and KL divergence that effectively transfer safety behaviors from guard models into learned soft prompts. Our evaluations on various benchmarks demonstrate that this combination achieves superior safety-usefulness trade-offs compared to LoRA adapters, steering vectors, and direct optimization methods, while requiring minimal additional memory and compute at inference time. These findings establish soft prompt distillation as the preferred approach for safety alignment in on-device LLM deployment.

</details>


### [553] [Benchmarking Empirical Privacy Protection for Adaptations of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09401)
*Bartłomiej Marek,Lorenzo Rossi,Vincent Hanke,Xun Wang,Michael Backes,Franziska Boenisch,Adam Dziedzic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究分析了差分隐私（DP）在大型语言模型（LLM）适应敏感应用时的实际隐私风险，发现即使有理论隐私保证，预训练数据与适应数据的分布重叠仍会显著影响实际隐私保护效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管DP为LLM在敏感应用中的适应提供了理论隐私保证，但其实际有效性仍不明确。主要问题在于LLM的预训练阶段：预训练数据与适应数据之间的重叠和相互依赖可能削弱DP的实际保护效果，即使应用了DP技术。

Method: 使用最先进的攻击方法（鲁棒成员推断和canary数据提取）来评估DP适应LLM的隐私风险。通过系统性地改变适应数据分布（从与预训练数据完全重叠，到同分布（IID）情况，再到完全异分布（OOD）示例）来建立基准。同时评估不同适应方法和不同隐私制度对漏洞的影响。

Result: 分布偏移强烈影响隐私漏洞：适应数据越接近预训练分布，即使没有直接数据重叠，在相同理论保证下的实际隐私风险也越高。参数高效微调方法（如LoRA）在OOD数据上实现了最高的实证隐私保护。

Conclusion: 该研究为在敏感环境中部署定制化模型提供了实用的隐私保护见解，并提出了一个超越适应隐私的整体隐私评估结构化框架，以识别和评估LLM整个预训练-适应流程中的风险。

Abstract: Recent work has applied differential privacy (DP) to adapt large language models (LLMs) for sensitive applications, offering theoretical guarantees. However, its practical effectiveness remains unclear, partly due to LLM pretraining, where overlaps and interdependencies with adaptation data can undermine privacy despite DP efforts. To analyze this issue in practice, we investigate privacy risks under DP adaptations in LLMs using state-of-the-art attacks such as robust membership inference and canary data extraction. We benchmark these risks by systematically varying the adaptation data distribution, from exact overlaps with pretraining data, through in-distribution (IID) cases, to entirely out-of-distribution (OOD) examples. Additionally, we evaluate how different adaptation methods and different privacy regimes impact the vulnerability. Our results show that distribution shifts strongly influence privacy vulnerability: the closer the adaptation data is to the pretraining distribution, the higher the practical privacy risk at the same theoretical guarantee, even without direct data overlap. We find that parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods, such as LoRA, achieve the highest empirical privacy protection for OOD data. Our benchmark identifies key factors for achieving practical privacy in DP LLM adaptation, providing actionable insights for deploying customized models in sensitive settings. Looking forward, we propose a structured framework for holistic privacy assessment beyond adaptation privacy, to identify and evaluate risks across the full pretrain-adapt pipeline of LLMs.

</details>


### [554] [LargeMonitor: Monitoring Online Task-Free Continual Learning via Large Pretrained Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09430)
*Mingqi Yuan,Xiaoquan Sun,Shihao Luo,Jiayu Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LargeMonitor：一个利用大型预训练基础模型自主编排无任务持续学习的框架，通过解耦的零样本漂移检测和基于大语言模型的语义诊断，实现对复杂数据流的精确识别和适应性优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有在线无任务持续学习范式主要依赖训练耦合的优化动态（如经验损失波动或潜在距离变化），这些方法无法识别分布漂移的结构性根源，在不同流式变化中机械地执行固定策略。

Method: 提出LargeMonitor框架：1）利用大型视觉模型的冻结稳定表示空间实现零样本漂移检测；2）通过大型多模态模型驱动上下文感知诊断模块，解释流变化的精确语义原因（如新类出现vs.环境域转移）；3）根据诊断结果动态部署适应性优化策略。

Result: 在多个无任务持续学习设置和基准测试中，LargeMonitor实现了对复杂数据流的精确、鲁棒的检测和诊断，同时持续提升了现有在线无任务持续学习算法的性能。

Conclusion: LargeMonitor通过解耦检测和基于大模型的语义诊断，解决了现有训练耦合方法无法识别分布漂移结构性根源的问题，为在线无任务持续学习提供了更智能、自适应的解决方案。

Abstract: Online task-free continual learning (TFCL) requires intelligent agents to sequentially accumulate knowledge from an unbounded, non-stationary data stream under strict single-pass constraints and without any explicit task identifiers. Existing online TFCL paradigms primarily rely on parameter-efficient prompt tuning or dynamic structure expansion driven by training-coupled optimization dynamics, such as empirical loss fluctuations or evolving latent distances. As a result, these training-coupled solvers remain agnostic to the structural origins of distribution drift, mechanically enforcing a fixed strategy across fundamentally distinct streaming variations. To address this gap, we propose LargeMonitor, a framework that leverages large pretrained foundation models to autonomously orchestrate task-free continuous adaptation. Specifically, LargeMonitor introduces a decoupled detection module utilizing the frozen, stable representation space of large vision models (LVMs) to achieve robust, zero-shot drift detection without training-dependent interference or brittle threshold tuning. Upon a confirmed drift, the framework activates a context-aware diagnostic module driven by large multimodal models (LMMs) to interpret the precise semantic etiologies of the stream variation (e.g., novel class emergence vs. environmental domain shift). This dual-stage capability empowers the continuous learner to dynamically deploy adaptive and shift-specific optimization strategies. Extensive experiments across multiple TFCL settings and benchmarks demonstrate that LargeMonitor achieves precise, robust detection and diagnosis of complex data streams while consistently improving the performance of existing online TFCL algorithms.

</details>


### [555] [Graph Mamba Operator: A Latent Simulator for Interacting Particle Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09432)
*Karn Tiwari,Niladri Dutta,N M Anoop Krishnan,Prathosh A P*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GraMO是一种结合图神经网络和状态空间模型的潜在空间模拟器，用于建模相互作用的动力系统，通过单一递归耦合图交互和时间状态更新，在长时预测中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常将空间和时间动态分开处理，依赖于自回归展开，导致长时预测中的误差累积，且主要关注局部交互和短时上下文，难以捕捉多跳依赖和全局结构。

Method: 提出Graph Mamba Operator (GraMO)，将状态空间模型与基于图的交互学习相结合，在单一递归中耦合图交互和时间状态更新，更新在潜在状态中呈线性，具有跨状态自适应的输入依赖系数。

Result: 在N体系统、运动捕捉和机器人数据集上评估，在所有基准测试中达到最低误差，在长时预测中取得最大增益。

Conclusion: GraMO通过整合图交互和时间动态的单一递归更新，有效解决了长时预测中的误差累积问题，能够捕捉多跳依赖和全局结构，在多个动力系统建模任务中表现优异。

Abstract: Modeling interacting dynamical systems requires capturing spatial interactions alongside long-range temporal dependencies. Graph neural networks (GNNs) provide a natural representation but typically rely on autoregressive rollouts and treat spatial and temporal dynamics separately, leading to error accumulation over long horizons. Existing approaches also focus on local interactions and short temporal contexts, limiting their ability to capture multi-hop dependencies and global structure. We introduce the Graph Mamba Operator (GraMO), a latent-space simulator that integrates state-space models with graph-based interaction learning. In contrast to prior work that sequences nodes or applies spatial and temporal updates in separate stages, GraMO couples graph-based interactions and temporal state updates within a single recurrence. The update is linear in the latent state, with input-dependent coefficients that adapt across regimes. We evaluate GraMO on N-body systems, motion capture, and robotics datasets, achieving the lowest error across benchmarks and the largest gains in long-horizon prediction.

</details>


### [556] [Operator learning for solving Fokker-Planck equations with various initial conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09434)
*Li Zeng,Xiaoliang Wan,Yaobin Wang,Fabio Nobile,Tao Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 基于条件归一化流的物理信息神经网络框架，用于高效求解Fokker-Planck方程的解算子，处理任意初始条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Fokker-Planck方程在描述随机动力系统的概率密度函数演化中至关重要，但传统方法难以高效处理任意初始条件。需要开发一种能够近似FPE解算子的框架，以应对实际应用中常见的不同初始分布问题。

Method: 1. 利用Chapman-Kolmogorov方程将问题转化为近似从任意点出发的Dirac质量初始分布的转移PDF；2. 采用条件归一化流和物理信息神经网络框架；3. 使用关联线性化SDE的PDF作为归一化流的基础分布，避免Dirac delta初始分布的奇异性；4. 引入时间加权损失函数缓解小时间尺度下的数值不稳定性。

Result: 提出的方法能够有效且稳健地近似FPE的解算子，通过多种数值实验验证了框架的有效性，特别是在处理不同初始条件和小时间尺度问题上的优越性。

Conclusion: 该条件归一化流PINN框架为Fokker-Planck方程提供了一种高效的解算子近似方法，能够处理任意初始条件，通过线性化SDE基础分布和时间加权损失函数解决了小时间尺度的数值挑战。

Abstract: The Fokker-Planck equation (FPE) plays a pivotal role in describing the time evolution of probability density functions (PDFs) for systems governed by stochastic dynamics. In this work, we propose a conditional normalizing flow-based physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework for efficiently approximating the solution operator of the FPE for a whole range of initial conditions. Leveraging the Chapman-Kolmogorov equation for Markovian stochastic processes, the problem is reformulated into approximating a transition PDF starting at initial time from a Dirac mass centered at an arbitrary point. The PDF of an associated linearized stochastic differential equation (SDE) is employed as the base distribution for the normalizing flow, providing a good approximation of the target PDF, especially for small times, and thereby avoiding the singularity of the map associated with the Dirac delta initial distribution. Furthermore, a time-weighted loss function is introduced to mitigate numerical instabilities arising at small times, achieving a balance between causality and training difficulty as time progresses. A variety of numerical experiments are presented to illustrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method.

</details>


### [557] [Breaking the Tokenizer Barrier: On-Policy Distillation across Model Families](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09456)
*Yifan Niu,Han Xiao,Dongyi Liu,Zelong Wang,Dihong Gong,Yasheng Wang,Jia Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种跨分词器的策略蒸馏方法，使教师模型和学生模型可以使用不同的分词器，从而扩展了策略蒸馏的应用范围。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有策略蒸馏方法要求教师和学生模型共享相同的分词器，限制了其在不同模型系列间的应用。当前主流方法使用教师生成响应的监督微调，但无法捕捉教师概率分布中的丰富知识。

Method: 提出跨分词器的策略蒸馏方法，通过精确的词元映射算法，使标准的策略蒸馏方法能够在不同模型系列间工作，确保高质量的词元级信号能够跨不同分词器传播。

Result: 大量实验表明，跨分词器策略蒸馏在各种基准测试中比基线方法显著更计算高效，结果解锁了更广泛的教师-学生模型配对可能性。

Conclusion: 该方法为策略蒸馏开辟了更广泛的教师-学生模型配对可能性，为大语言模型的适应和增强交互开辟了新途径。

Abstract: On-Policy Distillation (OPD) has become a core technique in the post-training of Large Language Models (LLMs) for transferring knowledge from domain experts to student models. However, existing OPD distillation methods require teacher and student models to share the same tokenizer, restricting the applicability of OPD within the model series. Current mainstream practice typically employs Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on teacher-generated responses for cross-tokenizer distillation, which fails to capture the rich knowledge embedded in the teacher's probability distribution. In this work, we enable the standard on-policy distillation method to operate across model families, ensuring that high-fidelity token-level signals can propagate across different tokenizers with a precise token-mapping algorithm. Extensive experiments show that cross-tokenizer OPD is significantly more compute-efficient than baselines on various benchmarks. Our results unlock a broader range of teacher-student pairs for OPD, opening up new avenues for adapting and enhancing interactions between LLMs.

</details>


### [558] [Escaping the KL Agreement Trap in On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09471)
*Haoran Xin,Anhao Zhao,Ying Sun,Jin Li,Xiaoyu Shen,Hui Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出KAT方法解决在线策略蒸馏中的低KL一致性陷阱问题，通过动态阈值检测并终止低质量监督，提升数学推理任务性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线策略蒸馏中，当学生模型生成不可恢复的前缀时，教师模型可能对退化状态产生局部同意，产生低反向KL但几乎没有纠正性训练信号，形成低KL一致性陷阱

Method: 提出KAT方法，使用动态训练自适应阈值检测持续的低KL一致性，过滤来自退化同意的弱监督信号

Result: 在四个数学基准测试中，平均top-k准确率提升2.66%，pass@k提升3.43%，同时平均rollout长度减少59.73%

Conclusion: KAT方法能有效检测并终止在线策略蒸馏中的低KL一致性陷阱，通过过滤弱监督信号显著提升数学推理任务的性能

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level supervision by asking a teacher to score student-generated rollouts. However, when the student drifts into an unrecoverable prefix, the teacher may locally agree with the degraded state, producing low reverse KL but little corrective training signal. We identify this persistent regime as a low-KL agreement trap. Further analyses show that tokens during and after such traps produce less useful supervision signals. We propose KAT (KL Agreement Trap Termination), an online OPD termination rule that detects persistent low-KL agreement with a dynamic training-adaptive threshold. By filtering weak supervision from degenerate agreement, KAT improves avg@k accuracy by 2.66% and pass@k by 3.43% across four mathematical benchmarks, while reducing average rollout length by 59.73%.

</details>


### [559] [Loss-Guided Adaptive Scale Refinement for Molecular Force Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09480)
*Limin Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种用于分子力预测的损失引导自适应尺度细化框架，通过插值、路由、可微分尺度更新和尺度池细化，从预定义尺度中自动发现任务最优的建模尺度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子系统涉及多空间尺度的相互作用，但现有分子表示学习方法大多依赖手动预定义尺度，而任务最优的建模尺度可能与这些固定尺度不一致。

Method: 提出损失引导自适应尺度细化框架，将预定义尺度作为初始锚点，通过插值、路由、可微分尺度更新和尺度池细化来发现任务有效的分辨率。

Result: 在NaCl水性离子系统中，硬路由将整体力MAE从399.65降至382.67，连续插值进一步降至380.96。在最近离子距离小于0.6nm的近距离区域，MAE从327.22降至260.51。从端点锚点{0,1}开始，通过损失引导更新自动生成中间尺度，最终尺度池{0,0.125,0.25,0.375,0.5,0.75,1}达到整体MAE 381.23。

Conclusion: 自适应尺度细化是分子表示学习的一个有前景方向，特别是在固定尺度建模不足的情况下，能够自动发现任务最优的建模尺度。

Abstract: Molecular systems involve interactions across multiple spatial scales, from local coordination and short-range perturbations to long-range electrostatic and solvent-mediated effects. However, most molecular representation learning methods rely on manually predefined scales, and the task-optimal modeling scale may not coincide with these fixed levels. This study introduces a loss-guided adaptive scale refinement framework for molecular force prediction, treating predefined scales as initial anchors and discovering task-effective resolutions through interpolation, routing, differentiable scale updates, and scale pool refinement.
  Using a NaCl aqueous ionic system as a minimal testbed, this study constructs short-scale and long-range force prediction branches and analyzes their complementarity. Oracle hard routing reduces the overall force MAE from 399.65 to 382.67, while continuous oracle interpolation further reduces it to 380.96. In close-contact regimes with nearest-ion distance below 0.6 nm, the close-contact MAE decreases from 327.22 to 260.51. A minimal scale pool update experiment shows that starting from endpoint anchors {0,1}, loss-guided updates automatically generate intermediate scales and recover most of the continuous oracle performance. The final updated scale pool {0,0.125,0.25,0.375,0.5,0.75,1} achieves an overall MAE of 381.23.
  These results support adaptive scale refinement as a promising direction for molecular representation learning, especially when fixed-scale modeling is insufficient.

</details>


### [560] [BUDDY: BUdget-Driven DYnamic Depth Routing for Adaptive Large Language Model Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09514)
*Yuhua Zhou,Shaoqi Yu,Shichao Weng,Changhai Zhou,Mingze Yin,Fei Yang,Aimin Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Buddy是一个预算驱动的动态深度路由框架，通过轻量级决策模块选择执行top-k层来满足计算预算，支持解码时重路由和单模型多预算


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型推理成本高，现有深度剪枝方法存在两个主要问题：1) 在用户特定计算预算下控制有限；2) 通常固定路由路径，无法在解码时上下文增长时自适应调整

Method: Buddy使用轻量级决策模块根据输入对中间层评分，确定性执行top-k层以满足预算。为支持解码时自适应，重用第一层KV缓存作为低开销全局上下文源，并与最新token表示池化后用于路由决策。可选预算预测器可估计输入相关计算水平

Result: 在Llama和Qwen模型上的实验表明，Buddy与强静态剪枝基线竞争，通常改善精度-计算权衡，同时独特支持严格预算控制、解码时重路由和单模型内多预算

Conclusion: Buddy提供了一个有效的动态深度路由框架，解决了现有方法的局限性，在保持计算效率的同时提供更好的预算控制和自适应能力

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) incur high inference cost due to their depth and parameter scale. Depth pruning can reduce latency by skipping redundant Transformer blocks, but existing methods (i) provide limited control under user-specific compute budgets and (ii) typically fix the routing path, failing to adapt as the context grows during decoding. We propose Buddy, a budget-driven dynamic depth routing framework. Buddy uses a lightweight Decision Module to score intermediate layers conditioned on the input and deterministically executes the top-k layers to satisfy a given budget. To support decode-time adaptation, Buddy reuses the first-layer KV cache as a low-overhead global context source and pools it together with the newest token representation before each routing decision. When no explicit budget is provided, an optional Budget Predictor estimates an input-dependent compute level to balance quality and efficiency. Experiments on Llama-family and Qwen models show that Buddy is competitive with strong static pruning baselines and often improves the accuracy-compute trade-off, while uniquely supporting strict budget control, decode-time rerouting, and multiple budgets within a single trained model.

</details>


### [561] [Investigating Calibration Challenges in Probabilistic Electricity Price Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09517)
*Jan Niklas Lettner,Hadeer El Ashhab,Benjamin Schäfer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Error


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Error

Method: Error

Result: Error

Conclusion: Error

Abstract: As renewable energy integration increases market volatility, probabilistic electricity price forecasting has become essential for effective risk management. However, current-proper-scoring rules often prioritize forecast sharpness at the expense of calibration, leading to overconfident and statistically unreliable uncertainty estimates. This work highlights the critical gap between theoretical scoring and practical calibration, demonstrating that models can become mere proxies for deterministic forecasts when reliability is neglected. We conclude that future research must shift toward calibration-aware objectives and architectures to ensure the distributional integrity of energy market forecasts.

</details>


### [562] [Efficient Traffic Prediction at Scale: A Systematic Study of STGCN Architectural Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09539)
*Soban Nasir Lone,Mohamed Abouelela,Taeyoung Yu,Jiwon Kim,Constantinos Antoniou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现STGCN的默认2块架构可能过度参数化，1块架构在短期预测中表现最佳且计算效率更高，对实际部署和基准测试有重要启示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时空图神经网络在交通预测中占主导地位，但计算需求对智能交通系统实际部署构成挑战。现有研究提出了高效替代方案，但未探讨这些架构本身是否过度参数化。

Method: 使用STGCN模型，在四个不同的交通数据集上系统比较1块、2块（标准）和3块变体，评估其预测性能和计算效率。

Result: 单块架构在三个数据集上对短期预测（10分钟）达到最优性能，在更长预测时间上仅产生≤1.8%的相对误差退化。2块变体CPU推理延迟增加61%，吞吐量降低37%。3块架构计算成本翻倍但改进＜0.5%。

Conclusion: 默认的2块STGCN可能对许多应用过度参数化，这对部署交通预测系统的实践者和基准测试效率方法的学者都有重要启示。

Abstract: Spatio-temporal graph neural networks (STGNNs) have become the dominant approach for traffic prediction, yet their computational requirements pose challenges for practical deployment in intelligent transportation systems (ITS). While recent work has proposed efficient alternatives to STGNNs, a fundamental question remains unexplored: are these architectures themselves over-parameterised? We examine this question using the Spatio-Temporal Graph Convolutional Network (STGCN), one of the most widely adopted models in this domain. Through systematic experiments across four diverse traffic datasets, we compare 1-block, 2-block (standard), and 3-block STGCN variants. Our findings reveal that the single-block architecture achieves optimal performance for short-term prediction (10 mins) on three of four datasets, while incurring only marginal degradation ($\leq$1.8% relative error) at longer horizons. Crucially, the 2-block variant incurs 61% higher CPU inference latency and 37% lower throughput relative to 1-block -- substantial overhead for resource-constrained ITS deployment. The 3-block architecture offers no favourable tradeoff, more than doubling computational cost for $<$0.5% relative improvement. These results suggest that the default 2-block STGCN may be over-parameterised for many applications, with implications for both practitioners deploying traffic prediction systems and researchers benchmarking efficiency-focused methods.

</details>


### [563] [Evaluating the Representation Space of Diffusion Models via Self-Supervised Principles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09718)
*Xiao Li,Yixuan Jia,Zekai Zhang,Xiang Li,Lianghe Shi,Jinxin Zhou,Zhihui Zhu,Liyue Shen,Qing Qu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个联合评估扩散模型表示能力和生成能力的自监督学习框架，通过分解不变特征和残差特征，引入不变污染比(ICR)指标来分析扩散模型特征空间中的信号污染情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在生成能力和自监督表示学习方面都表现出色，但这两者之间的联系尚未被充分探索。研究旨在建立统一的框架来评估扩散模型的表示和生成能力，理解特征空间中的不变性和变异性如何影响模型性能。

Method: 1. 提出自监督学习框架，将特征分解为不变分量和残差分量
2. 推导不变污染比(ICR)这一基于Fisher信息的度量指标，量化残差变化对不变信号的污染程度
3. 使用该框架分析扩散模型的判别性和生成性行为
4. 在不同噪声水平下研究表示不变性
5. 在数据有限情况下研究训练从真实泛化到记忆化的转变

Result: 1. 表示方面：不变性在中等噪声水平达到峰值，这些噪声水平也产生最佳下游分类性能
2. 生成方面：ICR可作为训练早期学习的敏感指标，残差能量沿Fisher方向增加标志着记忆化的开始
3. ICR仅从训练特征即可检测记忆化，无需外部评估器或保留测试集
4. 扩散模型可以通过其学习表示的几何结构从自监督角度进行监控

Conclusion: 扩散模型可以通过其学习表示的几何结构进行自监督监控，ICR指标能够有效量化特征空间中的信号污染，为理解扩散模型的表示和生成能力提供了统一的分析框架，有助于在训练过程中早期检测记忆化现象。

Abstract: Diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable generative capabilities and have also emerged as powerful self-supervised representation learners, yet the connection between these two abilities remains less explored. Drawing inspiration from self-supervised learning (SSL), we introduce a framework for jointly evaluating the representation and generation capabilities of diffusion models. Specifically, we decompose features into invariant and residual components and derive the Invariant Contamination Ratio (ICR), a Fisher-based metric that quantifies how residual variation contaminates invariant signal in feature space. We use this framework to analyze both discriminative and generative behavior of diffusion models. On the representation side, we find that invariance peaks at intermediate noise levels, which also yield the best downstream classification performance. On the generative side, we study how training transitions from genuine generalization to memorization in data-limited regimes, and show that ICR serves as a sensitive training-time indicator of early learning: increasing residual energy along Fisher directions marks the onset of memorization, detectable from training features alone without external evaluators or held-out test sets. Overall, our results show that diffusion models can be monitored from a self-supervised perspective through the geometry of their learned representations.

</details>


### [564] [On Choosing the $μ$ Parameter in Gaussian Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09582)
*Bogdan Kulynych,Antti Honkela*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文为纯差分隐私(ε-DP)到高斯差分隐私(GDP)提供了原则性映射方法，通过匹配强敌手成员推理攻击的最坏情况成功概率来建立转换关系，推荐μ≈ε/5作为保守的通用转换标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着高斯差分隐私(GDP)在隐私保护机器学习中的广泛应用，需要建立从传统纯差分隐私(ε-DP)到GDP的原则性转换方法，以统一报告隐私保证。

Method: 通过匹配强敌手成员推理攻击在三种指标下的最坏情况成功概率来建立映射关系：固定假阳性率下的乘性优势、固定召回率下的精确率、以及标准隐私轮廓。

Result: 提供了在有用参数范围内的μ值表格，并推荐μ≈ε/5作为保守的通用转换标准，为实际应用提供了具体的指导。

Conclusion: 建立了从纯差分隐私到高斯差分隐私的原则性转换框架，使研究人员能够统一报告隐私保证，同时保持了攻击者最坏情况下的保护水平。

Abstract: Recent work argues for using Gaussian differential privacy (GDP) to report the privacy guarantees in privacy-preserving machine learning. We provide principled mappings from pure-DP $\varepsilon$ to GDP $μ$ by matching the worst-case success of a strong-adversary membership inference attack in terms of three metrics: multiplicative advantage at fixed FPR, precision at fixed recall, and the standard privacy profile. We tabulate $μ$ values across a useful range of parameters and recommend $μ\approx \varepsilon/5$ as a conservative general-purpose conversion.

</details>


### [565] [Assessing Sample Quality in Conditional Generation under Compositional Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09601)
*Berker Demirel,Valentino Maiorca,Marco Fumero,Theofanis Karaletsos,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于评估条件生成模型在训练分布外生成样本的后验信任评分方法，结合全局真实性和属性忠实性两个可估计量，无需目标分布参考即可评估条件样本质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在科学等领域中，条件生成模型常用于探索真实样本稀少、昂贵或尚未观察到的条件。然而，在推断性区域评估条件生成质量存在循环问题：标准评估指标需要目标分布参考，但推断性区域的目标分布本身不可用。

Method: 提出一种后验的、针对每个样本的信任评分方法。该评分结合两个可估计量：1) 全局真实性：衡量样本与真实数据流形的兼容性；2) 属性忠实性：衡量样本是否更接近请求的属性而非其他合理替代属性。该方法仅使用训练分布，无需目标分布参考。

Result: 在生物成像领域，通过该评分选择的样本更好地保留了真实的形态结构，并提高了下游预测性能。在受控视觉基准测试中观察到类似改进。该评分能够恢复推断性生成之间的有意义比较，并支持有效的过滤、排序和生成放弃。

Conclusion: 该方法能够有效评估条件生成模型在训练分布外区域的生成质量，支持对生成样本的过滤、排序和放弃，可直接应用于现成的预训练模型，并在生物成像和视觉任务中展示了实际价值。

Abstract: Conditional generators provide a natural tool for controllable generation, including settings where the desired condition is a new composition of observed attributes or experimental factors. In many applications, especially in scientific domains, such models are attractive to explore conditions for which real samples are rare, expensive, or not yet observed. However, this creates a circularity for evaluation: standard conditional quality metrics require a reference target distribution, but in the extrapolative regime that distribution is unavailable by definition. We address this problem with a post-hoc, per-sample trust score for assessing conditional samples using only the training distribution. The score combines two estimable quantities: global realism, measuring compatibility with the real data manifold, and attribute-wise faithfulness, measuring whether a sample is closer to the requested attributes than to plausible alternatives. We show that the score can recover meaningful comparisons across extrapolated generations, under a mild coverage condition on the observed attributes. These comparisons enable effective filtering, ranking, and abstention of generations and can be used directly on off-the-shelf pretrained models. In biological imaging, selected samples preserve real morphological structure better and improve downstream predictive performance, while similar gains are observed on controlled vision benchmarks. Finally, we show how the score can be applied during generation, enabling abstention before full decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/berkerdemirel/faithful-cond-gen.

</details>


### [566] [Closure-Validated Circuit Discovery in Attention Heads: Co-activation Proposes, Ablation Disposes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09607)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过因果消融实验验证了基于共激活统计聚类发现的注意力头电路是否真实有效，发现在密集模型中能通过闭包测试，但在MoE模型中不行，表明廉价信号只是电路提议而非确认电路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前可解释性研究常将组件组而非单个单元作为基本对象，通过聚类共激活统计来发现注意力头电路。但作者质疑这种廉价信号是否能真正识别出有效的注意力头电路，因此需要通过因果消融来验证。

Method: 将稀疏自编码器聚类方法适配到注意力头，但通过因果消融而非重构来验证：1）聚类注意力头发现社区；2）进行闭包测试：消融发现的社区并与随机匹配对照组比较每个示例的损失变化；3）在两种密集模型（Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B）和两种输入分布上测试，并在混合专家模型（OLMoE-1B-7B）中使用路由条件聚类。

Result: 在两种密集模型中，发现的社区通过了闭包测试；但在MoE模型中，虽然路由条件聚类恢复了统计上真实的信号，但未能通过闭包测试（消融反而降低了损失，方向错误）。注意力目标选择性和参与率与功能在训练过程中解耦。

Conclusion: 廉价信号只是电路提议，而非已确认的电路；闭包测试才是区分两者的关键。仅基于共激活统计的聚类方法不足以确认电路功能，必须通过因果消融验证。

Abstract: Interpretability increasingly treats groups of components, not individual units, as the basic object, and proposes to find them by clustering co-activation statistics. We ask whether such a cheap signal actually identifies an attention-head circuit. Adapting a sparse-autoencoder clustering recipe to attention heads -- but validating by causal ablation rather than reconstruction -- we cluster heads and then run a closure test: ablate the discovered community and compare per-example damage to matched-random controls. Across two dense 1B-scale models (Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B) and two input distributions, the communities pass closure. In a Mixture-of-Experts model (OLMoE-1B-7B), route-conditional clustering recovers a statistically real signal that nonetheless does not survive closure -- ablation improves loss, the wrong direction. Extending closure across training, attention-target selectivity and participation ratio decouple from function in both directions. We conclude that a cheap signal is a circuit proposal, not a confirmed circuit; closure is what separates them.

</details>


### [567] [Constrained user-item allocation for e-commerce marketing campaigns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09623)
*Maja Lindström,Natalija Glisovic,Jan von Pichowski,Tommy Löfstedt,Martin Rosvall*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种自动定向营销方法，通过联合选择用户和产品来构建多个不相交的营销活动，解决了传统方法将产品选择与用户分配分离的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有营销活动决策方法存在两个主要问题：1) 假设预设的营销活动结构；2) 将产品选择与用户分配分离，无法从联合交互模式中直接发现营销活动分组。这导致无法形成用户与产品之间具有强相互亲和力的匹配。

Method: 提出了三种互补策略：1) 约束谱双聚类，用于在用户-产品亲和矩阵中找到密集区域；2) 带成对交换的贪婪局部搜索，用于组合优化；3) 多臂老虎机框架，通过探索来逃离局部最优。

Result: 在合成数据集、Amazon Reviews基准和大型商业数据上的评估显示，双聚类方法在营销活动质量、提升度和公平性得分方面表现最佳。虽然双聚类在较小数据集上运行高效，但在大型数据集上运行时显著增加，此时基于老虎机的方法提供了可扩展的替代方案。

Conclusion: 双聚类方法在营销活动质量方面表现最优，但面临可扩展性挑战。基于老虎机的方法为大规模数据集提供了可行的替代方案，实现了效率与质量的平衡。

Abstract: When running marketing campaigns, retailers must decide which products to promote and which users to target. These decisions are inherently coupled: effective campaigns match users and items with strong mutual affinity into non-overlapping groups of predefined sizes. However, existing approaches assume predefined campaign structure or decouple item selection from user assignment, and cannot discover campaign groupings directly from joint interaction patterns. We therefore formalize this campaign problem as auto-targeting: jointly selecting users and items to construct multiple disjoint campaigns. To solve this combinatorial problem, we propose three complementary strategies: (i) constrained spectral biclustering to find dense regions in the user-item affinity matrix, (ii) greedy local search with pairwise swaps for combinatorial refinement, and (iii) a multi-armed bandit framework to escape local optima through exploration. We evaluate these methods on a synthetic dataset, the Amazon Reviews benchmarks, and large-scale proprietary commercial data, and compare the results to simulated annealing as a baseline. The results show that biclustering consistently achieves the highest campaign quality, lift, and fairness scores. While biclustering runs efficiently on smaller datasets, its runtime increases substantially on very large ones, where bandit-based methods instead offer a scalable alternative.

</details>


### [568] [Data-driven discovery of governing differential equations across physical systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09638)
*Siyu Lou,Hao Xu,Wenguan Wang,Lu Lu,Hao Sun,Yang Liu,Linfeng Zhang,Dongxiao Zhang,Yuntian Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向问题视角的数据驱动微分方程发现方法，引入了方程可发现性的二维相图（结构复杂性和系数复杂性），并提出了表示-评估-优化（REO）框架作为发现过程的基本抽象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 微分方程在科学发现中至关重要，但数据驱动的微分方程发现在AI方法涌现后迅速扩展，缺乏清晰的组织视角。需要为这一领域提供系统化的理论框架。

Method: 1) 提出二维相图：按结构复杂性和系数复杂性组织发现问题；2) 提出REO框架：将发现过程抽象为表示、评估、优化三个核心环节；3) 从算法讨论转向决定可发现性的基本原理。

Result: 1) 相图展示了该领域从简单稀疏方程向复杂结构、灵活参数化方程的发展趋势；2) 解释了不同方法家族在不同问题设置中成功或失败的原因；3) REO框架识别了跨算法变体的核心问题。

Conclusion: 数据驱动微分方程发现的下一步挑战不仅是恢复方程，而是利用它们修订现有理论、提炼机制和形成新的科学概念。该框架为连接方法论与应用提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Differential equations play a critical role in scientific discovery because they provide a mathematical framework to describe the behaviour of physical phenomena. As a promising alternative to traditional first principles, data-driven differential equation discovery has attracted increasing attention for its ability to infer governing laws directly from experimental or simulated data, especially when the underlying physics is unclear. However, the field has expanded rapidly along diverse methodological directions, particularly with the emergence of AI-based approaches, and still lacks a clear organizing perspective. In this Review, we propose a problem-oriented perspective on data-driven differential equation discovery. We first introduce a two-dimensional phase diagram of equation discoverability, where discovery problems are organized according to structural complexity and coefficient complexity. This phase diagram shows how the field has moved from the discovery of sparse equations with simple coefficients toward more complex governing laws with richer structures and more flexible parameterizations. It also clarifies why different methodological families succeed or fail in different problem settings. We then present the representation-evaluation-optimization (REO) framework as a fundamental abstraction of the discovery process. By identifying the core problems of equation discovery that persist across algorithmic variations, REO shifts the discussion from individual algorithms to the fundamental principles that determine discoverability. We connect these perspectives to applications across physics and adjacent sciences, and argue that the next challenge is not merely recovering equations, but using them to revise existing theories, distil mechanisms and form new scientific concepts.

</details>


### [569] [A Unifying Framework for Concept-Based Representational Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09653)
*Grégoire Dhimoïla,Victor Boutin,Agustin Martin Picard,Thomas Fel,Thomas Serre*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个统一框架，将概念对齐分解为两个轴：对齐什么（表示 vs 概念）和在什么层次（实例级 vs 分布级），揭示了四种对齐属性，并证明了现有方法通常只优化其中部分属性。作者开发了InterVenchA基准来分别测量提取质量、翻译质量和概念一致性，并提出CoSAE方法联合执行互补的对齐目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同模型和模态的学习表示经常表现出结构相似性，暗示共享的概念分解。然而，概念对齐的定义模糊不清，现有方法在相同术语下优化不同目标，混淆了实际对齐的内容。

Method: 1. 提出统一框架，将对齐分解为两个轴：什么被对齐（表示 vs 概念）和什么层次（实例级 vs 分布级），产生四种对齐属性；2. 开发InterVenchA基准，分别测量提取质量、翻译质量和概念一致性；3. 提出耦合稀疏自编码器（CoSAE），联合执行互补的对齐目标。

Result: 1. 理论和实验表明，对齐目标之间的常见等价假设在实践中失败：优化一个属性不能可靠恢复其他属性；2. 纯无监督目标无法恢复有意义的实例级对齐；3. CoSAE能产生强对齐，仅需0.1%配对数据就能在锚定分布目标时恢复实例级对齐。

Conclusion: 概念对齐本质上是多目标的：必须作为多目标问题进行定义、测量和优化。联合执行互补对齐目标的方法（如CoSAE）才能实现真正的概念对齐。

Abstract: Learned representations across models and modalities often exhibit striking structural similarities, suggesting shared underlying concept decompositions. However, concept alignment remains poorly defined: existing approaches optimize different objectives under the same terminology, obscuring what is actually aligned.
  We propose a unifying framework that decomposes alignment along two axes: what is aligned (representations vs. concepts) and at what level (instance-wise vs. distributional). This induces four corresponding properties -- instance-wise and distributional variants of translation and concept consistency -- and reveals precisely which of these guarantees existing methods provide. We further introduce \InterVenchA, an intervention-based benchmark that separately measures extraction quality, translation quality, and concept consistency. Through theory and experiments, we show that commonly assumed equivalences between alignment objectives fail in practice: optimizing one property does not reliably recover the others, and purely unsupervised objectives fail to recover meaningful instance-level alignment. We then propose the Coupled Sparse Autoencoder (CoSAE), which jointly enforces complementary alignment objectives. Strong alignment emerges only in this regime. Surprisingly, as little as 0.1\% paired data is sufficient to recover instance-level alignment when anchoring distributional objectives.
  Overall, our results show that concept alignment is fundamentally multi-objective: it must be defined, measured, and optimized as such.

</details>


### [570] [Muon Learns More Robust and Transferable Features than Adam](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09658)
*Tianyu Ruan,Fengzhuo Zhang,Shuche Wang,Shihua Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Muon优化器在特征学习方面具有鲁棒性和可迁移性优势，相比Adam和SGD在预训练中能学习到更鲁棒且更易迁移的特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Muon在预训练大型语言模型和视觉分类器方面比Adam和SGD更高效，但其特征学习优势尚不明确。本文旨在从鲁棒性和可迁移性角度研究Muon的特征学习优势。

Method: 1. 通过评估在损坏图像和文本上的预训练模型，比较Muon、Adam和SGD学习特征的鲁棒性；2. 使用训练好的逐层探针分析对数边界；3. 通过在下游任务上训练线性分类器或微调完整模型，评估特征可迁移性；4. 通过有效秩衡量隐藏状态的多样性；5. 在多组件特征的分类问题中提供理论证明。

Result: 1. Muon学习的特征比Adam和SGD学习的特征更鲁棒，这种优势体现在更大的对数边界上；2. Muon学习的特征具有更好的可迁移性，这得到隐藏状态有效秩多样性的支持；3. 理论分析证明Muon在多组件特征分类问题中获得更大的边界和更高的有效秩。

Conclusion: Muon优化器在特征学习方面具有显著优势，能够学习到更鲁棒且更易迁移的特征，这为其在预训练中的优越表现提供了理论和实证支持。

Abstract: Muon has recently emerged as a state-of-the-art optimizer for pretraining Large Language Models (LLMs) and vision classifiers. Despite its efficiency advantage over Adam and SGD, the feature-learning advantage of Muon remains unclear. This paper investigates Muon's feature-learning advantage through the lens of robustness and transferability. First, by evaluating pretrained models on corrupted images and texts, we show that features learned by Muon are consistently more robust than those learned by Adam and SGD across different architectures, including transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Using trained layer-wise probes, we further show that this robustness advantage is reflected in larger logit margins across layers. Second, by training linear classifiers or fine-tuning full models from pretrained parameters on downstream tasks, we demonstrate that Muon-learned features transfer more effectively than those learned by Adam and SGD. This transferability advantage is further supported by the diversity of hidden states across layers, as measured by effective rank. Finally, in a representative classification problem with multi-component features, we prove that Muon attains larger margins and higher effective rank than Adam and SGD, providing theoretical support for our empirical findings.

</details>


### [571] [In-Context Learning for Latent Space Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09664)
*Tuan A. Vu,Harri Lähdesmäki,Julien Martinelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对潜在空间贝叶斯优化的表格基础模型适应方法，通过在分子VAE潜在空间上补充合成优化任务进行继续预训练，并引入正则化器来保持模型的广泛回归先验，从而改善LSBO中的不匹配问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 潜在空间贝叶斯优化(LSBO)用于分子和蛋白质等结构化对象的设计，而表格基础模型(如TabPFN和TabICL)作为BO代理取得了先进的回归性能。然而，LSBO中存在一个关键不匹配问题：从潜在代码到目标值的映射与训练现有上下文模型所用的回归任务有显著差异。

Method: 在分子VAE潜在空间上补充合成优化任务，对表格基础模型代理进行继续预训练。引入正则化器将模型锚定到原始检查点，保持其广泛的回归先验，同时避免对适应任务的过度专业化。

Result: 在保留的分子优化基准测试中，所得到的模型实现了强大的性能，支持了LSBO特定适应对于上下文代理的相关性。

Conclusion: 通过针对LSBO的特定适应方法，可以改善表格基础模型在潜在空间贝叶斯优化中的表现，为结构化对象的高效设计提供了更好的代理模型。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a central tool for sample-efficient design, and latent-space Bayesian optimization (LSBO) extends it to structured objects such as molecules and proteins. In parallel, tabular foundation models such as TabPFN and TabICL now achieve state-of-the-art regression performance and are increasingly used as BO surrogates. Because their Bayesian behavior is induced by large synthetic pretraining collections, the composition of this pretraining distribution is crucial. LSBO creates a distinctive mismatch: the induced map from latent code to objective value differs markedly from the regression tasks used to train current in-context models. We address this mismatch by complementing the pretraining stage of tabular foundation model surrogates with synthetic optimization tasks defined on the latent space of a molecular VAE. The continued-pretraining objective features a regularizer that anchors the model to the original checkpoint, preserving its broad regression prior while avoiding overspecialization to the adaptation tasks. On held-out molecular optimization benchmarks, the resulting model achieves strong performance, supporting the relevance of LSBO-specific adaptation for in-context surrogates.

</details>


### [572] [Algorithm for Contextual Queueing Bandits with Rate-Optimal Queue Length Regret](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09668)
*Seoungbin Bae,Dabeen Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的上下文排队老虎机算法，将队列长度遗憾从 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$ 改进到 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$，并证明了该速率是最优的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文排队老虎机算法在随机上下文下只能达到 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$ 的队列长度遗憾率，存在改进空间。本文旨在设计更高效的算法来提升学习速率。

Method: 提出了CQB-$η$-2算法，包含三个阶段：(1)纯随机探索构建初始估计器；(2)$η$-随机探索结合UCB规则继续学习，同时保持负漂移；(3)探索截止后使用纯UCB。关键创新是只在精心选择的截止轮次前进行随机探索。

Result: 算法实现了 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$ 的队列长度遗憾率，并通过构造两个统计不可区分的困难实例，证明了 $\Omega(T^{-1/2})$ 的极小极大下界，表明该速率是最优的（忽略对数因子）。

Conclusion: 本文通过设计新的三阶段算法，将上下文排队老虎机的队列长度遗憾率从 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$ 改进到 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$，并通过上下界匹配证明了该速率的最优性，为学习异构作业调度提供了更高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Contextual queueing bandits provide a framework for learning to schedule heterogeneous jobs under unknown context-dependent service rates. Under stochastic contexts, existing algorithms achieve $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/4})$ queue length regret, defined as the expected difference between the learner's and oracle's queue lengths at horizon $T$. In this paper, we improve this rate to $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$. The key observation is that random exploration is needed only up to a carefully chosen cutoff round, rather than throughout the entire horizon. We propose CQB-$η$-2, a three-phase algorithm: (i) pure random exploration to construct an initial estimator, (ii) $η$-random exploration combined with a UCB rule to continue learning while maintaining negative drift, and (iii) pure UCB after the exploration cutoff. Our proof decomposes the queue length regret at the cutoff round. Before the cutoff, negative drift suppresses queue length differences caused by suboptimal choices. After the cutoff, the first two phases provide sufficient random exploration samples, ensuring that UCB decisions incur small departure-rate gaps. Combining these two bounds yields queue length regret of order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(T^{-1/2})$. We further prove a minimax lower bound of order $Ω(T^{-1/2})$. The proof constructs two hard instances that are statistically indistinguishable up to the final service decision, and uses a queue-specific coupling argument to convert the resulting testing error into queue length regret. Together, our upper and lower bounds characterize the minimax dependence on the horizon $T$ up to logarithmic factors.

</details>


### [573] [Transition-Based Digital Twin Modelling for Alzheimer's Disease under Sparse Longitudinal Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09671)
*Yinyu Huang,Yilin Zhang,Sofia Michopoulou,Christopher Kipps,Rahman Attar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个个性化的数字孪生框架，用于阿尔茨海默病的预测和基于场景的分析，利用多模态纵向数据，通过整合互补的建模策略来捕捉临床转变和时间依赖性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阿尔茨海默病的进展具有高度异质性，通常通过稀疏且不规则的纵向数据进行观察，这给预测和个性化监测带来了挑战。现有的机器学习方法虽然通过多模态数据改进了AD预测，但往往侧重于静态分类或群体层面的风险估计，对个体特异性建模和不确定性感知推理的支持有限。

Method: 提出了一个个性化的数字孪生框架，整合了互补的建模策略来捕捉临床转变和跨访视的时间依赖性。使用来自ADNI的数据，包括认知评估、临床变量和MRI衍生表型，该框架预测认知状态和诊断类别，同时量化预测不确定性并支持患者特定的"假设"轨迹分析。

Result: 在无泄漏的个体层面分割评估中，该框架在分数预测和诊断分类方面表现出强大的性能。在稀疏且不规则的ADNI设置中，基于相邻访视的转变建模比基于序列的分支获得了更高的预测准确性，表明局部转变建模可能更具数据效率。

Conclusion: 虽然序列模型对于不确定性感知的轨迹预测仍然有价值，但局部转变建模提供了一种更具数据效率和鲁棒性的预测策略。这些发现强调了将时间建模策略与临床数据结构对齐的重要性，并表明基于转变的数字孪生框架可能为神经退行性疾病的个性化疾病预测提供实用且可解释的方法。

Abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progression is highly heterogeneous and is typically observed through sparse and irregular longitudinal data, posing challenges for prediction and personalised monitoring. Existing machine learning approaches have improved AD prediction using multimodal data, yet often focus on static classification or cohort-level risk estimation, providing limited support for subject-specific modelling and uncertainty-aware reasoning. To address these limitations, we present a personalised digital twin framework for AD prediction and scenario-based analysis using multimodal longitudinal data. The proposed approach integrates complementary modelling strategies to capture clinical transitions and temporal dependencies across visits. Using data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), including cognitive assessments, clinical variables, and MRI-derived phenotypes, the framework predicts cognitive status and diagnostic categories while quantifying predictive uncertainty and enabling patient-specific what-if trajectory analysis. Evaluation on leak-free subject-level splits demonstrates strong performance in score forecasting and diagnosis classification. In this sparse and irregular ADNI setting, transition-based modelling of adjacent visits achieved higher predictive accuracy than the sequence-based branch, suggesting that local transition modelling may be more data-efficient. While sequence models remain valuable for uncertainty-aware trajectory forecasting, local transition modelling offers a more data-efficient and robust predictive strategy. These findings highlight the importance of aligning temporal modelling strategies with clinical data structure and suggest that transition-based digital twin formulations may provide a practical and interpretable approach for personalised disease forecasting in neurodegenerative disorders.

</details>


### [574] [AutoMegaKernel: A Statically-Checked Agent Harness for Self-Retargeting Megakernel Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09682)
*Jaber Jaber,Osama Jaber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AutoMegaKernel (AMK) 将HuggingFace Llama系列模型编译成单个持久化的CUDA内核，实现整个前向传播一次启动，无需手动编写CUDA代码，重点在于系统而非原始速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统深度学习推理中需要手动编写CUDA内核的问题，通过自动化编译系统实现跨模型和硬件的统一优化，特别是针对推理类硬件的高效利用。

Method: 使用冻结的调度-IR验证器静态验证死锁和竞争自由，通过静态图检查拒绝不安全调度；同一源码支持多种GPU架构，自动生成正确的大内核；通过无人值守的智能代理研究循环自我改进。

Result: 在7160个对抗性调度测试中零误接受，正确接受所有360个真实调度；在多种NVIDIA推理类硬件上（L4、L40S、A10G、RTX 5090）超越cuBLAS bf16性能；在训练类硬件（A100/H100）上存在性能差距。

Conclusion: AMK系统能够自动生成正确高效的大内核，在推理类硬件上显著超越传统方法，展示了自动化编译系统的潜力，特别是在精度不对称（W8A16 vs bf16）的批量为1的解码场景中表现出色。

Abstract: AutoMegaKernel (AMK) compiles a HuggingFace Llama-family model into a single persistent cooperative CUDA kernel that runs the whole forward pass in one launch, with no per-model hand-written CUDA. The contribution is the system, not raw speed.
  A frozen schedule-IR validator statically certifies deadlock-freedom and race-freedom via static graph checks (not a mechanized proof), so an unsafe agent-proposed schedule is rejected before launch: across 7,160 adversarial schedules (6,091 unsafe) it had zero false-accepts and accepted all 360 real lowerings. The same source retargets sm_80/sm_90/sm_120 from one codebase, auto-generates correct megakernels for 10 of 10 supported models, and on a real SmolLM2-135M checkpoint reproduces HuggingFace greedy decode token-for-token (perplexity match 2.5e-7). An unattended, agent-drivable autoresearch loop self-improves the megakernel over its own baseline (1.25-1.72x).
  A search-found int8 (W8A16) megakernel beats CUDA-graphed cuBLAS bf16 at batch-1 decode across NVIDIA's datacenter inference fleet: L4 up to 1.33x, the current-gen L40S 1.25-1.27x, A10G up to 1.08x at scale, and the consumer RTX 5090 1.19-1.23x. The ordering is not a clean function of bandwidth (the 864 GB/s L40S beats the 600 GB/s A10G); the divide is inference-class vs training-class. AMK trails cuBLAS on the high-bandwidth training-class A100/H100, where the harness localizes the cross-SM-sync bottleneck; we report the gap plainly. This is a precision-asymmetric (W8A16 vs bf16) comparison at decode position 0; the largest real checkpoint is TinyLlama-1.1B. Code and the harness: https://github.com/RightNow-AI/AutoMegaKernel

</details>


### [575] [When Do Local Score Models Extrapolate Across Size? A Diagnostic Theory and Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09705)
*Wenjie Xi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了科学生成模型中尺寸外推的稳定性问题，发现仅凭架构局部性不足以保证稳定外推，关键在于高斯平滑分数的准局部性。作者提出了有限深度局部流作为诊断基准，并验证了空间混合、平滑分数准局部性和模型感受野之间的相互作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学生成模型通常需要进行尺寸迁移，即在小系统上训练的模型需要能外推到更大的系统。虽然平移不变架构支持这种评估，但仅凭架构局部性并不能保证稳定的尺寸外推，需要更深入理解其背后的机制。

Method: 通过Tweedie公式分析高斯平滑分数对局部评分的影响，形式化证明了反向扩散下局部边际的尺寸一致比较定理。引入了有限深度局部流作为白盒诊断基准，该基准具有精确的分数、密度和可控的响应范围。

Result: 实证验证了空间混合、平滑分数准局部性和模型感受野之间的相互作用：在空间混合下，平滑分数相对于感受野保持准局部性，从而实现稳定外推；当空间混合减弱时，分数的局部性迅速退化，导致尺寸迁移失败。

Conclusion: 稳定的尺寸外推不仅取决于架构局部性，更关键的是高斯平滑分数的准局部性。模型感受野必须覆盖平滑分数的响应范围才能成功进行尺寸迁移，这为设计可外推的生成模型提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Scientific generative modeling often requires size transfer, where models trained on small systems are evaluated on larger ones. While translation-invariant architectures enable this evaluation, we show that architectural locality alone does not guarantee stable size extrapolation. Instead, stable extrapolation is governed by the quasi-locality of the Gaussian-smoothed score. Through Tweedie's formula, far-away perturbations can influence local score components via posterior covariance, meaning a local model succeeds only if its receptive field covers the smoothed score's response range. We formalize this mechanism, proving a size-uniform comparison theorem for local marginals under reverse diffusion. We also introduce Finite-Depth Local Flow (FDLF), a white-box diagnostic benchmark with exact scores, densities, and controllable response ranges. Empirically, we validate the interplay between spatial mixing, smoothed-score quasi-locality, and model receptive fields. Under spatial mixing, the smoothed score remains quasi-local relative to the receptive field, enabling stable extrapolation. Conversely, when spatial mixing weakens, the score's locality rapidly degrades, causing size transfer to fail.

</details>


### [576] [BrainSurgery: Reproducible and Reliable Declarative Weight Manipulations for Model Editing and Upcycling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09707)
*Gianluca Barmina,Annemette Broch Pirchert,Andrea Blasi Núñez,Lukas Galke Poech,Peter Schneider-Kamp*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BrainSurgery是一个用于神经网络检查点"张量手术"的工具，通过声明式YAML计划实现稳健、可重复的张量变换，支持结构修改、数学变换和形状重塑，并内置验证功能防止错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着深度学习模型规模扩大，管理、检查和修改大型检查点变得日益困难。研究人员经常需要修改模型权重以进行层重构、精度转换、低秩分解和架构调试，但这些工作流程通常依赖于脆弱的临时Python脚本。

Method: BrainSurgery通过抽象存储格式和内存管理，通过声明式YAML计划执行复杂变换。它支持通过正则表达式和结构定位进行结构修改、数学变换和张量重塑，同时内置断言验证张量形状、数据类型和值。

Result: 论文展示了四个示例和三个案例研究，涵盖从模型升级到LoRA提取的应用。BrainSurgery提供了稳健、可重复的张量手术操作，防止了静默错误。

Conclusion: BrainSurgery通过其可重复和经过验证的操作，为未来研究提供了坚实的基础，有望成为神经网络检查点操作的标准工具。

Abstract: As deep learning models scale, managing, inspecting, and modifying large checkpoints has become increasingly challenging. Researchers often need to alter model weights for layer restructuring, precision casting, low-rank factorization, and architectural debugging, yet these workflows often rely on fragile ad-hoc Python scripts. Here, we introduce BrainSurgery, a tool for robust and reproducible "tensor surgery" on neural network checkpoints, and provide a system demonstration covering four examples and three case studies from model upcycling to LoRA extraction. By abstracting storage formats and memory management, BrainSurgery executes complex transformations through declarative YAML plans. It supports structural modifications, mathematical transformations, and tensor reshaping through expressive regex and structural targeting, while built-in assertions validate tensor shapes, data types, and values to prevent silent errors. We envision that BrainSurgery will provide a strong foundation for future research through its reproducible and validated operations.

</details>


### [577] [Disentanglement with Holographic Reduced Representations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09725)
*Jhonny J. Velasquez Olivera,Christo K. Thomas,Walid Saad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出使用全息约简表示（HRR）进行神经解耦的无监督学习算法，将解耦表示视为符号结构而非连续表示，通过HRR解绑定操作提供分离因素的归纳偏置，并在解耦度量和噪声鲁棒性方面取得竞争性结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解耦（将数据中的变化因素分离）是机器学习中长期存在的挑战。现有方法主要依赖连续表示（如变分自编码器和生成对抗网络），但本文认为解耦表示应被视为符号结构，受到构成样本概念之间组合关系的启发。学习离散符号结构同时保持可微性是困难的，需要新方法来解决。

Method: 引入基于全息约简表示（HRR）的无监督学习算法。利用HRR解绑定操作作为分离因素的归纳偏置，将解耦表示视为符号结构（向量求和而非标量维度）。通过信息论分析HRR解绑定通道，证明解绑定诱导近似独立的符号-值对，并推导每个槽的容量界限。

Result: HRR方法在潜在遍历和解耦度量方面与基线方法相比具有竞争力。HRR表示比标准自编码器模型更抗噪声，在一系列信噪比范围内保持重建质量。信息论分析显示解绑定操作能可靠编码的符号概念数量有定量界限。

Conclusion: HRR提供了一种新颖的神经解耦方法，将解耦表示视为符号结构而非连续表示。HRR解绑定操作提供了分离因素的强归纳偏置，产生的表示具有更好的噪声鲁棒性和可解释的容量界限，为解耦学习提供了新的理论框架。

Abstract: Disentanglement, the separation of factors of variation in data using neural networks, remains a long-standing challenge in machine learning. Prior work has addressed this problem with variational autoencoders and generative adversarial networks that incorporate ideas from variational inference and information-theoretic constraints. In contrast to methods that rely on continuous representations, we propose a design that treats disentangled representations as symbolic structures, motivated by the compositional relationships among the concepts that make up samples from a distribution. However, learning discrete symbolic structures with neural networks while maintaining differentiability is difficult and often requires complex architectures. To address this, we introduce an unsupervised learning algorithm that uses holographic reduced representations (HRR) for neural disentanglement. We show that the HRR unbinding operation provides an inductive bias for separating factors and yields competitive results against baselines, as measured by latent traversals and disentanglement metrics. We complement these empirical findings with an information-theoretic analysis of the HRR unbinding channel. We prove that unbinding induces approximately independent symbol-value pairs and derive a per-slot capacity bound that quantifies how many distinct symbolic concepts can be reliably encoded, giving a quantitative account of the inductive bias toward disentanglement. The resulting representations differ from standard autoencoder-based models, in that their latent units are vectors that are summed together, rather than scalar dimensions of a low-dimensional latent vector. We show that this HRR representation is more robust to noise than other disentangled representations and maintains reconstruction quality across a range of SNRs.

</details>


### [578] [Tight Sample Complexity of Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09731)
*Chenxiao Yang,Nathan Srebro,Zhiyuan Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文严格刻画了深度L、总参数量为W的Transformer的VC维，给出了O(LW log(TW))的上界和Ω(LW log(TW/L))的下界，同时刻画了使用此类Transformer进行思维链学习的样本复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动机：Transformer架构在深度学习中广泛应用，但其理论性质如VC维和样本复杂度尚未得到严格分析。特别是在思维链学习场景下，需要理解此类模型的泛化能力。

Method: 方法：通过理论分析，推导深度L、参数量W的Transformer在输入序列长度T下的VC维上下界。进一步分析使用思维链数据（包含T'个自回归步骤）时的样本复杂度。

Result: 结果：1) Transformer的VC维上界为O(LW log(TW))，下界为Ω(LW log(TW/L))；2) 思维链学习中，教师强制学习（训练数据上预测器与完整思维链一致）的样本复杂度为O(LW log((T+T')W))，任何使用思维链数据的学习规则至少需要Ω(LW log((T+T')W/L))个样本。

Conclusion: 结论：论文为Transformer的VC维和思维链学习的样本复杂度提供了紧密的理论刻画，揭示了模型参数、深度、序列长度与泛化能力之间的量化关系。

Abstract: We tightly characterize the VC dimension of depth-$L$ Transformers with a total of $W$ parameters, mapping an input sequence of length $T$ to a single output, establishing an upper bound of $O(L W \log (T W))$ and a nearly matching lower bound of $Ω(L W \log (T W / L))$. We further tightly characterize the sample complexity of chain-of-thought learning using such a Transformer, showing teacher forcing (i.e. selecting a predictor consistent with the entire chain-of-thought on training data) learns with sample complexity $O\left(L W \log \left(\left(T+T^{\prime}\right) W\right)\right)$ and that any learning rule that uses chain-of-thought data requires at least $Ω\left(L W \log \left(\left(T+T^{\prime}\right) W / L\right)\right)$ examples, where $T$ is the input length and $T^{\prime}$ is the number of autoregressive steps.

</details>


### [579] [Learning Dynamics Reveal a Hierarchy of Weight-Induced Layerwise Gram Metrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09744)
*Claudio Nordio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将ReLU网络中的梯度下降重新表述为训练集空间上的场动力学，通过消除权重变量得到残差的封闭方程，揭示了网络深度对动力学结构的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上梯度下降被看作权重空间中的动力学，本研究希望将其重新表述为训练集空间上的集体场动力学，从而更深入地理解神经网络训练过程。

Method: 研究固定读出和二次损失的ReLU前馈网络，从激活动力学中消除权重变量，得到残差的封闭方程。对于单隐层网络，得到由输入几何矩阵和动态共激活矩阵分解的集体核。对于更深网络，分析层间核结构，发现从三层开始需要权重诱导的Gram算子层次结构来实现闭包。

Result: 成功将梯度下降重新表述为训练集空间上的场动力学。对于单隐层网络，残差动力学由可分解的集体核控制。对于更深网络，残差动力学保持清晰的层间核结构，但从深度三开始需要权重诱导的Gram算子层次结构来实现信息跨层传输。

Conclusion: 梯度下降可以在训练集空间上被重新表述为集体场动力学，这种表述揭示了网络深度对动力学结构的重要影响：浅层网络有简单的分解结构，而深层网络需要更复杂的层次算子结构来实现闭包。

Abstract: We study feed-forward ReLU networks with fixed readout and quadratic loss. The aim is to rewrite gradient descent not primarily as a dynamics in weight space, but as a collective dynamics closed in terms of fields defined on the training-set space. For a single hidden layer, the weight variables can be eliminated from the activation dynamics, yielding a closed equation for the residuals governed by a collective kernel that factorizes into an input-geometric matrix and a dynamical co-activation matrix. For deeper networks, the residual dynamics retains a clean layer-wise kernel structure. However, from depth three onward, closure requires a hierarchy of weight-induced Gram operators that mediate information transport across layers.

</details>


### [580] [Perturbative Contrastive Physical Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09756)
*Kyungeun Kim,Amanuel Anteneh,Israel Klich,Olivier Pfister,J. M. Schwarz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了扰动对比物理学习（PCPL）框架，通过对比物理系统在不同条件下的响应来实现学习，无需集中式梯度计算或显式反向传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理系统对扰动的响应是理解其行为的关键。通过对比系统在略微不同条件下的反应，可以为学习提供机制。现有方法如平衡传播和频率传播虽然相关，但缺乏统一框架。

Method: PCPL框架通过控制输入、边界条件、参数或解释函数的变化，测量产生的物理状态之间的对比来实现学习。对比驱动的更新可以反映局部敏感性或全局逆问题结构，但不需要集中式梯度计算。学习几何从系统自身的物理响应中隐式地涌现出来。

Result: 在弹簧网络和连续变量光子电路两个平台上成功演示了PCPL。弹簧网络使用测量的位移和力更新键刚度；光子电路通过x正交测量和雅可比矩阵的有限差分估计进行训练。两个平台都成功学习了分类任务。光子电路还被训练实现了模拟乘法。

Conclusion: PCPL为物理学习提供了一个统一框架，将平衡传播和频率传播等方法统一起来。该框架允许学习行为从系统自身的物理响应中涌现，无需外部处理器或显式反向传播，为实现更自主的物理学习系统迈出了一步。

Abstract: Responses to perturbations are key to understanding physical systems. The ability to contrast such responses by comparing how a system reacts under slightly different conditions provides a mechanism for learning. Here, we introduce Perturbative Contrastive Physical Learning (PCPL), a general framework in which learning emerges from measurable contrasts between physical states produced by controlled changes to inputs, boundary conditions, parameters, or interpreter functions. PCPL unifies and extends prior approaches: Equilibrium Propagation is rooted in contrasts between free and nudged equilibria in energy-based systems, while Frequency Propagation corresponds to contrasts extracted from sinusoidally driven, frequency-demodulated responses. We show that contrast-driven updates can reflect either local sensitivities or global inverse-problem structure, yet do not require centralized gradient computation. Instead, effective learning geometry emerges implicitly from the system's own physical response, allowing learning behavior to arise without an external processor or explicit backpropagation. We demonstrate PCPL in two platforms: (i) spring networks that update bond stiffness using measured displacements and forces, and (ii) continuous-variable photonic circuits trained via x quadrature measurements and finite-difference estimates of the Jacobian. Both platforms successfully learn classification tasks. We further show that a continuous-variable photonic circuit can be trained to implement analog multiplication, illustrating a step toward more autonomous physical learning systems.

</details>


### [581] [Preserving Plasticity in Continual Learning via Dynamical Isometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09762)
*Andries Rosseau,Robert Müller,Ann Nowé*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了深度神经网络在非平稳环境下的持续学习问题，提出了通过促进动态等距性来保持网络可塑性的方法，并开发了AdamO优化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络在非平稳环境下的持续训练会导致可塑性逐渐丧失，限制了进一步学习能力。作者旨在解决这一持续学习中的核心问题。

Method: 1. 将可塑性与经验神经正切核相关联，识别动态等距性作为保持可塑性的关键机制；2. 提出高效的等距促进正则化方案；3. 开发AdamO优化器，将等距正则化与梯度更新解耦；4. 重新解释现有方法，指出它们只针对部分等距性度量。

Result: 在监督学习和强化学习的持续学习基准测试中，该方法始终匹配或优于现有方法，有效防止了可塑性损失。

Conclusion: 动态等距性是保持神经网络可塑性的关键机制，提出的等距促进方法和AdamO优化器为持续学习提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Continual training of deep neural networks under non-stationarity often leads to a progressive loss of plasticity, eventually limiting further learning. We relate plasticity to the empirical Neural Tangent Kernel, and identify dynamical isometry (the condition that layer-wise Jacobian singular values remain close to one) as a key mechanism for preserving plasticity in continual learning. We revisit a class of networks that are almost-everywhere isometric while remaining universal Lipschitz function approximators, demonstrating that near-dynamical isometry is compatible with expressive nonlinear representations. For general architectures, we propose an efficient isometry-promoting regularization scheme and identify a novel mechanism by which it can reactivate dormant ReLU units. Building on this, we introduce AdamO, an Adam-style adaptive optimizer that decouples isometry regularization from gradient updates, analogous to AdamW. We further reinterpret prior plasticity-preserving approaches through the lens of dynamical isometry, showing that they target only a partial measure of isometry. Across supervised and reinforcement-learning continual-learning benchmarks designed to induce plasticity loss, our methods consistently match or outperform existing approaches.

</details>


### [582] [iOSWorld: A Benchmark for Personally Intelligent Phone Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09764)
*Lawrence Keunho Jang,Mareks Woodside,Geronimo Carom,Andrew Keunwoo Jang,Jing Yu Koh,Ruslan Salakhutdinov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: iOSWorld是首个围绕持久用户身份构建的交互式原生iOS模拟器基准测试，包含26个新建iOS应用，涉及交易、消息、旅行记录等互联数据，包含133个任务，测试模型在个性化环境中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有移动代理基准测试缺乏个性化能力，无法真正理解用户的身份、历史和偏好。手机代理需要能够基于设备上的个人数据进行推理，而不仅仅是遵循孤立指令。

Method: 构建iOSWorld基准测试，包含26个新建iOS应用，应用间数据相互关联。设计了133个任务，分为三个难度类别：单应用任务(27个)、多应用任务(60个，跨2-8个应用)、记忆与个性化任务(46个，需要从个人数据中推断模式)。评估前沿和开源模型在仅视觉和特权视觉+XML两种设置下的表现。
